## Spec 211 вАФ Procurement terminology & level clarity, U1вАУU7 + U10a/b/c/d + U6b + U11a + U11b (2026-06-27)

Status: **shipping U1** (code-only, NO schema). Spec: `211-procurement-terminology-clarity.md`. Evidence: `docs/procurement-uxui-audit-2026-06.md` (multi-agent UX audit, 85 surfaces / 91 verified findings).

Operator report: admins can't intuitively distinguish a PO (аєГаЄЪаЄ™аЄ±аєИаЄЗаЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠) from its PO-items. The headline cause (audit `po-vs-items-01`, confirmed **high**, independently rediscovered √Ч9): a PO has no status column вАФ its roll-up is derived from member PRs вАФ so `PURCHASE_ORDER_STATUS_LABEL` and `PURCHASE_REQUEST_STATUS_LABEL` shared the byte-identical strings `аЄ™аЄ±аєИаЄЗаЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠аєБаЄ•аєЙаЄІ` (PR purchased / PO ordered) and `аЄБаЄ≥аЄ•аЄ±аЄЗаЄИаЄ±аЄФаЄ™аєИаЄЗ` (PR on_route / PO in_transit). On the PO detail the order pill and a line pill then read the same word.

**U1 (this unit):** split the PO roll-up vocabulary in `src/lib/i18n/labels.ts` вАФ `ordered: аЄ™аЄ±аєИаЄЗаЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠аєБаЄ•аєЙаЄІ вЖТ аЄ≠аЄ≠аЄБаєГаЄЪаЄ™аЄ±аєИаЄЗаЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠аєБаЄ•аєЙаЄІ`, `in_transit: аЄБаЄ≥аЄ•аЄ±аЄЗаЄИаЄ±аЄФаЄ™аєИаЄЗ вЖТ аЄБаЄ≥аЄ•аЄ±аЄЗаЄИаЄ±аЄФаЄ™аєИаЄЗаЄЧаЄ±аєЙаЄЗаєГаЄЪ` (PR map untouched; `open`/`partially_received`/`received` already order-scoped). Test-first: added a cross-map invariant in `tests/unit/i18n-labels.test.ts` вАФ the PR-status and PO-status maps must share NO string value (regression guard), plus pins for the two new strings. Display-only (logic keys on enums), so all PO surfaces (detail header, grid PO header row, phone PO card, delivery page) inherit it with no other code change. Verify limitation: not exercised in a live browser (PO detail needs LINE auth + seeded PO data); the unit test asserts the exact rendered strings the surfaces consume.

**U2 (PR #?? вАФ shipping):** visually type the IDs. New `src/lib/purchasing/format-id.ts` SSOT (`formatPoNumber`/`formatPrNumber`, zero-pad 4) routed through all 16 PR/PO render sites вАФ fixes the bare-`PR-7`-vs-`PR-0007` drift (the grid/basket/create-sheet showed bare numbers, everything else 4-padded). New server-safe `<PoNumberTag>` (a `bg-sunk` chip with the Package icon) marks every PO number as an order, visually distinct from the plain-mono PR number вАФ applied on the worklist grid PO header + phone PO card, the PO detail header, the delivery detail eyebrow, and the PRвЖТPO parent link. Notifications keep their own copy of the formatter (`compose-notification.ts` is danger-path вЖТ U8). Test-first `tests/unit/format-id.test.ts`; no existing test broke (purchase-request-card already rendered `PR-0007`). Code-only.

**U3 (PR #?? вАФ shipping):** de-overload `аЄ£аЄ≤аЄҐаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£` on the worklist grid (`procurement-grid.tsx` only). The word labelled the item column, the bundle hint, the selection count AND the drawer doc count вАФ colliding with its line-count meaning on the same screen. Renamed: column header `аЄ£аЄ≤аЄҐаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£`вЖТ`аЄ™аЄіаєИаЄЗаЄЧаЄµаєИаЄВаЄ≠аЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠`; bundle hint `аєАаЄ•аЄЈаЄ≠аЄБаЄЂаЄ•аЄ≤аЄҐаЄ£аЄ≤аЄҐаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£вА¶`вЖТ`аєАаЄ•аЄЈаЄ≠аЄБаЄЂаЄ•аЄ≤аЄҐаЄДаЄ≥аЄВаЄ≠вА¶`; selection `аєАаЄ•аЄЈаЄ≠аЄБ {n} аЄ£аЄ≤аЄҐаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£`вЖТ`аєАаЄ•аЄЈаЄ≠аЄБ {n} аЄДаЄ≥аЄВаЄ≠`; drawer doc fact `{n} аЄ£аЄ≤аЄҐаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£`вЖТ`{n} аєДаЄЯаЄ•аєМ`. The legitimate PO line-count (`{n} аЄ£аЄ≤аЄҐаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£`) is KEPT. Test-first `procurement-grid-terminology.test.tsx` (header rename; the bundle-hint case was dropped вАФ rendering the bundle path mounts the create-PO sheet's `useRouter`, which the grid-health test also avoids). Accounting register `аЄ£аЄ≤аЄҐаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£`вЖТ`аєГаЄЪаЄВаЄ≠аЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠` moved to U9. Code-only.

**U5 (PR #?? вАФ shipping):** PO membership visible in EVERY worklist band, not just the `in_transit` PO group. The page now fetches `po_number` for every PO any row belongs to (`poNumberById`, all bands), bakes it onto `ProcurementGridRecord.po_number`, and passes `poNumber` to `PurchaseRequestCard`. The desktop grid renders a `<PoNumberTag>` chip per row outside `in_transit` (which keeps its PoHeaderRow group); the phone card renders the chip whenever the request belongs to a PO. Required-field add to `ProcurementGridRecord` вЖТ updated all 4 constructors (page, grid-health test, terminology test, phone-basket test, grid-preview page). Test-first: extended `purchase-request-card.test.tsx` (chip shows with poNumber, absent without). Code-only.

**U6 (PR #?? вАФ shipping):** make the level legible in nav. The nav landmark named the whole purchasing area `аЄДаЄ≥аЄВаЄ≠аЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠` (the PR term) in every role's tab set, and a **PO** detail's back-chip read `аЄБаЄ•аЄ±аЄЪаєДаЄЫаЄДаЄ≥аЄВаЄ≠аЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠`. Renamed `аЄДаЄ≥аЄВаЄ≠аЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠` вЖТ neutral `аЄИаЄ±аЄФаЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠` in both nav sources (`hub-nav.tsx` desktop strip √Ч3 sets + `bottom-tab-bar.tsx` phone bar √Ч3 sets) + the worklist page title/kicker; back-chips on the PO detail and PR detail вЖТ `аЄБаЄ•аЄ±аЄЪаєДаЄЫаЄИаЄ±аЄФаЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠`. The PR-concept `аЄДаЄ≥аЄВаЄ≠аЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠` stays for the request list/empty-state/create buttons. Test-first: flipped the existing nav assertions in `hub-nav.test.tsx` + `bottom-tab-bar.test.tsx` to expect `аЄИаЄ±аЄФаЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠` (7 red вЖТ green). Code-only. **Deferred вЖТ U6b:** breadcrumb + `?from=` PRвЖТPO back-href.

**U4 (PR #?? вАФ shipping, operator-directed reframe):** status icons app-wide. Operator asked to "use icons to distinguish statuses, consistent with detail pages" вАФ better than restyling the PO pill colour (which would regress the spec-20 sun-readable solid fills). New SSOT `src/lib/status-icons.ts` (icon maps + accessors for all 7 StatusPill domains, `Record<Enum, LucideIcon>` = type-enforced totality) + an optional `icon` prop on `StatusPill` (backward-compatible). A one-agent-per-file **workflow** added `icon={domainIcon(sameArg)}` to all **28** call sites across **18** files, so the glyph renders identically on the worklist and every detail page/card/tracker. Test-first `status-icons.test.ts` (totality). Verified: tsc + eslint clean (run direct вАФ corepack flaked to pnpm 11.9.0 mid-run, recovered), 1796/1796 tests. Code-only. Feedback-status pills use a separate mechanism вЖТ follow-up.

**U7 (PR #?? вАФ shipping):** one band-label SSOT on the procurement worklist. The `to_order` band read three ways вАФ chip `аЄ≠аЄЩаЄЄаЄ°аЄ±аЄХаЄіаєБаЄ•аєЙаЄІ`, KPI tile `аЄ£аЄ≠аЄ™аЄ±аєИаЄЗаЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠`, pipeline header `аЄ£аЄ≠аЄ™аЄ±аєИаЄЗаЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠`. New `PROCUREMENT_BAND_LABEL` in `procurement-pipeline.ts`, consumed by the band headers + `worklist-status-chips.ts` + `worklist-kpis.ts`; the chip now uses the canonical `аЄ£аЄ≠аЄ™аЄ±аєИаЄЗаЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠` (in_transit/overdue already agreed, now SSOT-sourced). Test-first: flipped the chip assertion + added `band-label-ssot.test.ts` (the three sources must agree). The SITE band engine (`request-bands.ts`) is a separate role-view, NOT force-unified (cross-engine reconciliation is its own change). Code-only.

**U10a (PR #?? вАФ shipping):** delivery-installment term. A bare `аЄЗаЄІаЄФаЄЧаЄµаєИ N` collided with `аЄЗаЄІаЄФаЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ` (the billing/work milestone on deliverables + schedule gantt). New `deliveryOrdinalLabel(n)` SSOT in `po-deliveries.ts` вЖТ `аЄЗаЄІаЄФаЄИаЄ±аЄФаЄ™аєИаЄЗаЄЧаЄµаєИ N`, used in the deliveries section, the per-`аЄЗаЄІаЄФ` tracker, and the delivery detail h1. The billing `аЄЗаЄІаЄФаЄЧаЄµаєИ` (deliverables/gantt) is deliberately left untouched вАФ that's the disambiguation. Test-first `delivery-ordinal-label.test.ts`. Code-only. U10 split into sub-units (U10b ETA term, U10c store noun `аЄДаЄ•аЄ±аЄЗ`, U10d supplier-ref/stepper/dispatch/create-PO) вАФ done incrementally.

**U10b (PR #?? вАФ shipping):** ETA term SSOT. Expected-arrival read three ways вАФ grid English `ETA`, drawer `аЄДаЄ≤аЄФаЄІаєИаЄ≤аЄИаЄ∞аєДаЄФаєЙаЄ£аЄ±аЄЪ`, PO card `аЄБаЄ≥аЄЂаЄЩаЄФаЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаЄВаЄ≠аЄЗ`. New `ETA_LABEL = "аЄБаЄ≥аЄЂаЄЩаЄФаЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаЄВаЄ≠аЄЗ"` in labels.ts вЖТ grid header/cell + drawer Fact + PO card. Form inputs (create-PO sheet, purchase-record-form) keep `аЄДаЄ≤аЄФаЄІаєИаЄ≤аЄИаЄ∞аєДаЄФаєЙаЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаЄВаЄ≠аЄЗ` (set-the-date prompt, separate from display). Test-first (grid header drops English ETA). Code-only.

**U10c (PR #?? вАФ shipping):** store noun. Retired `аЄ™аєВаЄХаЄ£аєМ` (loanword duplicate) вЖТ SSOT `аЄДаЄ•аЄ±аЄЗ` across labels + store actions + PR form + store-count-manager + store-manager + wp-issue-stock + validate-purchase-request (13 sites). `аЄ™аЄХаєКаЄ≠аЄБ` (=quantity) kept (аЄДаЄ•аЄ±аЄЗ=place, аЄ™аЄХаєКаЄ≠аЄБ=quantity). Tests updated in lockstep. Code-only.

**U10d (PR #?? вАФ shipping, BATCHED):** the small terminology leftovers in one PR (operator "Batch"). `CREATE_PO_LABEL="аЄ™аЄ£аєЙаЄ≤аЄЗаєГаЄЪаЄ™аЄ±аєИаЄЗаЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠"` SSOT (dropped English "PO" from bundle bar/drawer/sheet/button/price-comparison); supplier-ref field `аєАаЄ•аЄВаЄЧаЄµаєИаєГаЄЪаЄ™аЄ±аєИаЄЗаЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠`вЖТ`аєАаЄ•аЄВаЄ≠аєЙаЄ≤аЄЗаЄ≠аЄіаЄЗаЄЬаЄєаєЙаЄВаЄ≤аЄҐ` (create-PO sheet + record-purchase form + validator); PR-stepper aria `аЄ™аЄЦаЄ≤аЄЩаЄ∞аЄБаЄ≤аЄ£аЄ™аЄ±аєИаЄЗаЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠`вЖТ`аЄ™аЄЦаЄ≤аЄЩаЄ∞аЄДаЄ≥аЄВаЄ≠аЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠`; dispatch button `аЄЪаЄ±аЄЩаЄЧаЄґаЄБаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£аЄИаЄ±аЄФаЄ™аєИаЄЗ`вЖТ`аЄЪаЄ±аЄЩаЄЧаЄґаЄБаЄІаєИаЄ≤аЄБаЄ≥аЄ•аЄ±аЄЗаЄИаЄ±аЄФаЄ™аєИаЄЗ`; `аЄ™аЄ£аєЙаЄ≤аЄЗ PR аєБаЄ•аєЙаЄІ`вЖТ`аЄ™аЄ£аєЙаЄ≤аЄЗаЄДаЄ≥аЄВаЄ≠аЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠аєБаЄ•аєЙаЄІ`. Lockstep test updates. One-agent-per-file workflow. Code-only.

**U6b (PR #?? вАФ shipping):** the two pieces deferred out of U6, both safe nav polish. **(1) PO-detail breadcrumb** вАФ the PO detail dropped you onto a supplier name with only a bare number chip for level context. New server-safe `<PoBreadcrumb>` (`src/components/features/purchasing/po-breadcrumb.tsx`, parallel to `PoNumberTag`) renders `аЄИаЄ±аЄФаЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠ вАЇ аєГаЄЪаЄ™аЄ±аєИаЄЗаЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠ [PO-####]` in the DetailHeader nameplate: the `аЄИаЄ±аЄФаЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠` area crumb links back to `/requests` (the U6 landmark), the order crumb is terminal (`aria-current="page"`, the typed U2 chip), replacing the bare `<PoNumberTag>` eyebrow. **(2) `?from=` PRвЖТPO back-href** вАФ a PR reached from its PO now returns to the PO, not the worklist: the PO detail wraps each member-PR link in `withBackFrom(.../requests/{id}, /requests/orders/{poId})`, and the PR detail reads `?from` вЖТ `safeBackHref(from, "/requests")` for its back chip (icon-only, label stays `аЄБаЄ•аЄ±аЄЪаєДаЄЫаЄИаЄ±аЄФаЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠`; other entry points keep the `/requests` fallback). Built on the already-tested `back-href.ts` primitives (same mechanism as WP/feedback detail). Test-first `po-breadcrumb.test.tsx` (area crumb links to /requests; аєГаЄЪаЄ™аЄ±аєИаЄЗаЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠ + PO-0012 shown; only the area crumb is a link). Code-only.

**U11a (PR #?? вАФ shipping; operator-steered 2026-06-27):** self-purchase consolidation. Operator steer: "PR is PR, self purchase is self purchase вА¶ consolidate in 1 place" (+ self-purchase needs item-image + docs uploads). The two self-purchase actions sat in DIFFERENT WP tabs вАФ `аЄЪаЄ±аЄЩаЄЧаЄґаЄБаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£аЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠аЄЂаЄЩаєЙаЄ≤аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ` (`SitePurchaseForm`, off-catalog + VAT invoice) in `аЄДаЄ≥аЄВаЄ≠аЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠`, and `аЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠аєАаЄЗаЄіаЄЩаЄ™аЄФ аєГаЄКаєЙаЄЧаЄµаєИаЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩаЄЩаЄµаєЙаєАаЄ•аЄҐ` (`SitePurchaseUseNow`, catalogued cash + buy/аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ) in `аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБаЄВаЄ≠аЄЗ`. New server-safe `<SelfPurchaseSection>` (`src/components/features/purchasing/self-purchase-section.tsx`) groups BOTH under one **`аЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠аєАаЄ≠аЄЗ`** heading with an invoice-vs-cash hint, rendered in the `аЄДаЄ≥аЄВаЄ≠аЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠` tab below the PR form; the cash buy is removed from the `аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБаЄВаЄ≠аЄЗ` tab (now the pure `WpIssueStock` withdraw). PR (`аЄ™аЄ£аєЙаЄ≤аЄЗаЄДаЄ≥аЄВаЄ≠аЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠`) stays its own distinct affordance вАФ "PR is PR". Both self-purchase RPC gates exclude procurement вЖТ kept the `!readOnly` gate. Test-first `self-purchase-section.test.tsx` (both paths under one heading). 1807/1807. Code-only, no schema.

**U11b (PR #?? вАФ HELD, danger-path RLS; operator-merge):** a self-purchase now carries an **item photo** in addition to the receipt/invoice docs. **Correction to the U11a-era "code-only" estimate:** the `reference` attachment INSERT RLS arm only admitted status `requested`, so a `site_purchased` self-purchase couldn't attach an item photo. Additive migration `20260813003900` widens the `reference` arm to also admit `site_purchased` (DROP+CREATE in place, reconstructed verbatim from the live spec-182-U4 policy вАФ only the reference arm changed; storage policy already admitted `site_purchased`). New `addReferenceAttachment` action (mirrors `addInvoiceAttachment`, purpose `reference`, `site_purchased`-gated) + thin `ItemPhotoUploader` (reuses `InvoiceUploader`, label `аєБаЄЩаЄЪаЄ£аЄєаЄЫаЄ™аЄіаЄЩаЄДаєЙаЄ≤`), shown beside the docs uploader in `SitePurchaseForm`'s success state. Only `#2` has a PR to attach to (`#3` use-now writes straight to stock movements, no PR вЖТ item images there = separate feature). Test-first `site-purchase-form-photos.test.tsx` + pgTAP `33-site-purchase.test.sql` E.1/E.2. **RLS = danger-path вЖТ PR held for operator one-tap merge; migration `db:push`'d to the shared DB ahead of merge (additive, safe).**

**Cross-engine band reconcile (PR #?? вАФ shipping):** `terminology-05`/`worklist-hub-16`, critic gap X2. The site worklist (`request-bands.ts`) and procurement pipeline (`procurement-pipeline.ts`) are two band engines over one table. Confirmed a user only ever sees ONE engine (`isProcurement` gate in `requests/page.tsx`) вЖТ no same-screen contradiction (that was U7); the real risk was DRIFT of the shared band terms (`аЄ£аЄ≠аЄ≠аЄЩаЄЄаЄ°аЄ±аЄХаЄі`, `аЄБаЄ≥аЄ•аЄ±аЄЗаЄИаЄ±аЄФаЄ™аєИаЄЗ`, the `аЄ£аЄ≠аЄ™аЄ±аєИаЄЗаЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠` core were duplicated literals). New `src/lib/purchasing/worklist-band-vocab.ts` `WORKLIST_BAND_TERM` SSOT; both engines source the shared terms from it (procurement verbatim; site `to_order` = `аЄ≠аЄЩаЄЄаЄ°аЄ±аЄХаЄіаєБаЄ•аєЙаЄІ ` + the shared core). The deliberate per-view differences are PRESERVED (site terminal `аєАаЄ™аЄ£аєЗаЄИаєБаЄ•аєЙаЄІ`/`closed` vs procurement `аєДаЄФаєЙаЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєБаЄ•аєЙаЄІ`). Behaviour-preserving (every rendered string byte-identical). Test-first `worklist-band-vocab.test.ts`. Code-only.

**U9a (PR #?? вАФ HELD, danger-path accounting; operator-merge):** carry the PO-vs-items clarity into the accounting surface. (1) voucher PO reference `#3` вЖТ `formatPoNumber()` = `PO-0003` (reuses the U2 SSOT; `accounting/purchases/[id]/page.tsx`). (2) register count `{n} аЄ£аЄ≤аЄҐаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£` вЖТ `{n} аєГаЄЪаЄВаЄ≠аЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠` via new tested `purchaseRegisterCountLabel()` in `purchases-view.ts` (accounting-ap-02, moved from U3). Test-first `purchases-view.test.ts`. Display-only, no schema; `src/app/accounting/**` = danger-path вЖТ held. **Deferred вЖТ U9b:** the live PO link (blocked вАФ `accounting` role isn't in `PURCHASING_ROLES` so the PO detail route is a dead link for it; needs an access-policy decision + `load-voucher` to expose the PO id) and the register grouping-by-PO with subtotal (bigger restructure).

**U8 (PR #?? вАФ HELD, danger-path notifications; operator-merge):** PR notifications name their parent PO (critic gap X1). `compose-notification.ts` pushed raw PR status words with no PO context; now `аЄДаЄ≥аЄВаЄ≠аЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠ PR-0012 ¬Ј аєГаЄЪаЄ™аЄ±аєИаЄЗаЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠ PO-0003: аЄБаЄ≥аЄ•аЄ±аЄЗаЄИаЄ±аЄФаЄ™аєИаЄЗ`. Code-only, no migration: the PO is resolved at compose time in `drain/route.ts` (the outbox row already carries `purchase_request_id` вЖТ batched 2-hop PRвЖТPOвЖТ`po_number` вЖТ new `ComposeContext.poNumber`, mirrors the `wpCode` enrichment). Composer drops its duplicated local `formatPrNumber` for the U2 SSOT via a new `prRef()` helper. Absent PO вЖТ unchanged. Test-first `compose-notification.test.ts`. `src/lib/notifications/**` + `src/app/api/notifications/**` = danger-path вЖТ held.

**U11c-A (PR #?? вАФ HELD, danger-path money migration; operator-merge):** VAT-invoiced buy-&-use-now. Operator approved the bounded U11c design (subagent posting-map showed the ONLY real missing combo is catalogued+VAT+use-now; free-text+use-now is structurally impossible AND not real вАФ `record_site_purchase` already books free-text to the WP). `site_purchase_use_now` gains `p_vat_rate` (DROP+CREATE, 7-arg; new arg defaults 0 вЖТ existing caller unbroken): stores the receipt NET + snapshots `vat_rate`, so the receipt poster (`post_stock_receipt_to_gl`, spec 208 U4b) splits `Dr 1300 Input VAT` via its no-PR fallback. `p_unit_cost` stays GROSS (ADR 0045); WP charged NET. At `p_vat_rate=0` byte-identical. migration `20260813004000`; pgTAP 228 +section F (107@7% вЖТ Dr1500 100/Dr1300 7/Cr2100 107, WP carries 100) + signature pins вЖТ 29/29. Migration db:push'd; only the known file-200 reconciliation drift fails (pre-existing, unrelated). Danger-path (money RPC) вЖТ held.

**U11c-B (PR #?? вАФ shipping; code-only):** the unified guided `аЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠аєАаЄ≠аЄЗ` form вАФ completes U11c. New `<SelfPurchaseForm>` replaces U11a's two cards: item is catalog (picker) OR free-text (mode toggle); `аЄИаЄ≥аЄЩаЄІаЄЩаєАаЄЗаЄіаЄЩ` GROSS; `аЄ°аЄµаєГаЄЪаЄБаЄ≥аЄБаЄ±аЄЪаЄ†аЄ≤аЄ©аЄµ` splits Input VAT (1300); `аЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠аєГаЄКаєЙаЄЧаЄµаєИаЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩаЄЩаЄµаєЙаєАаЄ•аЄҐ` shown for catalog items only (store keys on `catalog_item_id`). Routes catalog+use-now вЖТ `sitePurchaseUseNow` (VAT-aware via U11c-A), else вЖТ `recordSitePurchase` (books WP; success reveals item-photo + receipt uploaders). Plumbing: `validateSitePurchase` + both actions gain `vatRate` (neither self-purchase form collected VAT before). `SelfPurchaseSection` renders the one form; old `SitePurchaseForm`/`SitePurchaseUseNow` now unused вЖТ follow-up task to delete. Test-first `validate-site-purchase` (VAT) + `self-purchase-form.test.tsx` (both routes + VAT). 1823/1823.

**U9b (PR #?? вАФ HELD, danger-path auth/access; operator-merge; operator chose Option A):** the accounting voucher's PO becomes a live link into the PO detail. New `PO_DETAIL_VIEW_ROLES = PURCHASING_ROLES + accounting` opens the PO detail route to accounting **read-only**; accounting reads the PO via the admin client (org-wide money posture, no RLS grant/migration), sees money (`canSeeMoney = isBackOffice || isAccounting`), but write actions stay gated out (`isBackOffice`/`RECEIVE_ROLES` exclude accounting). `load-voucher` exposes `poId`; the voucher's `аєГаЄЪаЄ™аЄ±аєИаЄЗаЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠` row links to `/requests/orders/[poId]` with `?from=` вЖТ its back chip returns to the voucher (PO detail back chip gains `?from` via `safeBackHref`). Test-first `role-sets.test.ts`. Auth change вЖТ held.

**U9c (PR #?? вАФ HELD, danger-path accounting; operator-merge):** register grouped by PO (`accounting-ap-03`). The accounting purchase register now reads a PO at a time вАФ each PO group gets a `<PoNumberTag>` header + a gross subtotal; direct/site buys (no PO) group last (`аЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠аЄХаЄ£аЄЗ (аєДаЄ°аєИаЄ°аЄµаєГаЄЪаЄ™аЄ±аєИаЄЗаЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠)`). New pure `groupRegisterByPo()` in `purchases-view.ts` (generic, satang-summed, PO groups first-appearance order, no-PO last); `load-purchases` resolves a `poNumber` per row. Test-first `purchases-view.test.ts`. Display-only, no schema; `src/app/accounting/**` вЖТ held.

**Spec 211 COMPLETE** вАФ U1вАУU11 + cross-engine band SSOT + U6b + U8 + U9a/b/c + dead-form cleanup. (Dead-self-purchase-form cleanup done via #118.)

## Spec 206 вАФ WHT certificate recording UI (2026-06-26)

Status: **SHIPPED вАФ 2026-06-26** (code-only, NO schema/db:push). Audit gap **G11** вАФ
the last accounting back-office write gap. The `record_wht_certificate` RPC, the
`wht_certificates`/`wht_rates` tables, the GL-posting trigger, the pure
`validateWhtCertificate` validator, and the read-only register `/accounting/wht`
all existed since spec 149 U6, but the validator was **orphaned** вАФ no write
surface. This unit adds the "+ аЄЪаЄ±аЄЩаЄЧаЄґаЄБаєГаЄЪаЄЂаЄ±аЄБаЄ†аЄ≤аЄ©аЄµ" form over the existing RPC.

**Live-DB gate verification (the key find).** Before wiring the gate I queried the
live RPC: `record_wht_certificate` admits `pm/super/project_director` вАФ the
migration _file_ shows pm/super, but `вА¶0751вА¶_project_director_rpc_gates.sql`
widened it live (the "live-body re-source trap"). Same for `create_client_billing`

- `post_journal_entry` (both pd live). So the gate reuses **`PM_ROLES`** (the
  role-home SSOT) via `isManagerRole`, NOT a fresh `[pm,super]` literal вАФ matching
  the journal/G8 precedent and the live RPC. Among ACCOUNTING_ROLES reachers only
  super_admin is a manager, so today the write affordance lights up for super_admin
  only (auto-widens if spec 166 re-adds PM/PD to the page gate).

**TDD:** `resolveWhtRate(incomeType, override, rates)` (mirrors the RPC's
`coalesce(p_wht_rate, default_rate)` вАФ finite override wins incl. 0; else the
income-type default; unknown+no-override вЖТ null) written RED-first (6 cases) then
GREEN. `validateWhtCertificate` unchanged (still the amount gate). **Files:**
`resolveWhtRate` in `wht-certificate.ts`; `loadWhtFormData` in `load-registers.ts`
(income types + 3 party masters, parallel reads); `wht/actions.ts`
`recordWhtCertificate` (gate PM_ROLES, pre-validate, deducted-needs-party friendly
error, omit-optional args, call on auth.supabase, revalidate); `wht/record-wht-form.tsx`
(`'use client'` bottom-sheet вАФ direction/form/income-typeвЖТrate-autofill/13-digit
tax id/base/party[supplier|contractor for аєАаЄ£аЄ≤аЄЂаЄ±аЄБ, client for аЄЦаЄєаЄБаЄЂаЄ±аЄБ]/date/note +
live wht_amount preview); wired into `wht/page.tsx` (canWrite = isManagerRole,
parallel load). Reuses `AccountingActionResult` + `ACCOUNTING_ACTION_ERROR` from
`billing-actions.ts`. Verified: typecheck ¬Ј lint ¬Ј full vitest **1723/1723** green.
Visual preview skipped (no dev-auth path вАФ LINE OAuth only; the form is a 1:1 twin
of the shipped spec-204 billing form). Money renders via the canonical `baht()`
SSOT.

**Open questions / follow-ups:**

- `BILLING_WRITE_ROLES = [pm,super]` (spec 204) is now confirmed **stale vs its
  live RPC** (which admits project_director) вАФ a pre-existing UI under-grant (PD
  can post billings per the RPC but the form never offers it). Not a security hole;
  flagged for the role-set SSOT consolidation (architecture-audit **rank 2**:
  fold billing/journal/wht's identical pm/super/pd accounting-write sets into one
  `ACCOUNTING_WRITE_ROLES`). Not fixed here (scope).
- `pay_source_table`/`pay_source_id` linking (cert вЖТ its source payment), WHT-cert
  auto-record at billing certify, and аЄ†.аЄЗ.аЄФ. PDF generation remain deferred.

## Gap G8 вАФ manual journal-entry UI (2026-06-25)

Status: **SHIPPED вАФ 2026-06-25** (code-only, NO schema/db:push). Audit gap **G8** вАФ
the `post_journal_entry` / `reverse_journal_entry` RPCs existed since spec 149 with
no screen. New `/accounting/journal` (general journal): a multi-line entry form
(date + memo + account-picker/debit/credit rows, one-sided enforced at input, LIVE
double-entry balance preview via `validateJournalLines`) + a recent-entries list
with a per-entry аЄБаЄ•аЄ±аЄЪаЄ£аЄ≤аЄҐаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£ (reverse) control. **Gate = `PM_ROLES`** (pm/super/
project_director вАФ exactly who the RPCs admit; verified LIVE that a later migration
widened the gate to add project_director, NOT what the original migration file
shows). Placed in /accounting but gated to PM_ROLES (the journal-POST capability is
distinct from accounting-VIEW; only super_admin overlaps = today's operator); entry
point on the accounting landing shown only to `isManagerRole` so accounting-role
gets no dead link. **TDD:** `canReverseJournalEntry(status, alreadyReversed)`
predicate (mirrors the RPC guard вАФ original stays 'posted' after reversal since
append-only, so reversibility needs both) written RED-first then GREEN. **Loader**
`load-manual-journals.ts` parallelises fetches (specs 147/148) + one account map
resolves picker labels AND line codes (no N+1). **Riders (audit rank 7+12):**
standardised the new action on `requireActionRole`; hoisted the shared
`ACCOUNTING_ACTION_ERROR` next to `AccountingActionResult` and pointed billings at
it (DRY); wired the previously-dormant `validateJournalLines` (rank 12 вАФ its
intended consumer). Verified: typecheck ¬Ј lint ¬Ј full vitest 1698/1698 ¬Ј build
green; loader queries confirmed against live schema. Visual preview skipped (no
dev-auth path вАФ LINE OAuth only). **Open:** PM/PD have no nav entry point (can't
reach /accounting landing); accounting-role can't post manual JEs (RPC excludes it,
accounting is v3) вАФ both deferred, not blockers. Money renders via the canonical
`baht()` SSOT (audit rank 1 consolidation is a separate follow-up unit).

## Audit вАФ architecture & quality + GL test de-brittle (2026-06-25)

Status: **SHIPPED.** Ran an 8-lens multi-agent architecture/quality audit (49
agents, adversarial verify) before resuming feature builds: 40 candidates вЖТ 24
confirmed + 16 partial, 0 refuted вЖТ 15-item ranked register
(`docs/architecture-quality-audit-2026-06.md`), woven into the phase plan. Codebase
healthy; debt = latent drift/hygiene. **Acted on the one real blocker (rank 3):**
de-brittled GL pgTAP 81/85/86/87/88 (asserted table-wide aggregates that go red
once real revenue posts; 81 was already RED against the live DB's 27 real
journal_posted rows). 81 вЖТ fixture-scoped audit count (target_id); 85/86/87 вЖТ clear
gl_posting_outbox before the enqueue (mirrors 84); 88 вЖТ project-scope the
4100/1210 totals + delta the global retention control, keeping ќ£debit=ќ£credit +
tie-out flags. Full pgTAP 175/175, 2983 assertions, 0 failures. Next recommended:
rank 1 money-SSOT, rank 2 role-set dedup (incl. drain omits project_director).

## Spec 204 вАФ client billing + retention write UI (2026-06-25)

Status: **SHIPPED вАФ 2026-06-25** (code-only, NO schema/db:push). Audit gap **G10** вАФ the
single biggest "backend-shipped-no-UI" gap. Spec 149 U5 shipped the client_billings /
retention_receivables tables, the create/certify/mark-due/release RPCs, the GL-posting
triggers, and the read-only registers вАФ but no UI to create a claim, certify it (book
AR/revenue/VAT/WHT + accrue retention), mark retention due, or release it. The GL had a
cost side, no revenue side. This unit adds the write surfaces.

- TDD (RED first): `tests/unit/billing-actions.test.ts` (status predicates
  canCertifyBilling/canMarkRetentionDue/canReleaseRetention mirroring the RPC guards) вЖТ
  `src/lib/accounting/billing-actions.ts` (+ `BILLING_WRITE_ROLES` SSOT =
  [project_manager, super_admin], matching the RPC gate exactly вАФ NOT project_director).
- Actions: `billings/actions.ts` (createClientBilling, certifyClientBilling), `retention/
actions.ts` (markRetentionDue, releaseRetention) вАФ gate the AUTHED session, call the RPC
  on auth.supabase (never admin), revalidate both registers.
- UI: `CreateBillingForm` (BottomSheet + live computeBillingBreakdown preview), certify via
  ConfirmActionButton on draft/submitted rows; `RetentionRowActions` (mark-due date +
  release). Controls gated to BILLING_WRITE_ROLES (beta: super_admin only; auto-widens when
  spec 166 re-adds PM). Accounting role stays READ-ONLY on billing/retention (RPC = pm/super).
- QUALITY (architecture-first bar): extracted the copy-pasted server-action role-check into
  a shared `requireActionRole()` in `src/lib/auth/action-gate.ts` (periods/billings/retention
  now use it); extracted `baht()` into `src/lib/i18n/labels.ts` (3 of ~12 inline copies
  migrated); parallelized the billings-page reads (no waterfall, spec 147/148). Adversarial
  `/code-review high` вЖТ 3 real findings FIXED (rate-field reset leak across claims; canWrite
  hardcodedвЖТSSOT drift; baht DRY); rest refuted (input type=date guards dates; emptyвЙ†error).
- Verify: typecheck + lint + full vitest green; pgTAP 85/86 + client-billing.test already
  cover the RPCs/math. Operator visual-confirm on /accounting/billings + /accounting/retention
  as super_admin.

Open follow-ups (architecture-audit sweep): accountingвЖТcertify yes/no (a spec/product call вАФ
RPC currently pm/super); migrate the remaining ~9 inline `baht` copies and the rest of the
server-action files to `requireActionRole()`.

## Spec 203 U2 вАФ widen post_purchase_to_gl gate + remediate the 9 (2026-06-25)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-25** (0f13656, mig 20260813002100, pgTAP 225 plan 14).
Applied via db:push after operator OK; a manual `drain_gl_posting(100)` posted the 9 вЖТ
**verified: gl_posting_outbox purchase jobs = 27 posted / 0 failed / 0 pending; 9 new
WP-bound purchase entries, AP total аЄњ102,453.57** (matches the stranded amount exactly).
4-lens review вЖТ logic ships safe; the one blocker (seed aborting on CHECKs) was fixed. The drain-outage left 9 WP-bound PRs that advanced purchasedвЖТdelivered
before any drain ran; `post_purchase_to_gl` gated on purchased/site_purchased only, so it
refused them (~аЄњ102k unposted). U2 widens the gate to the committed-and-not-voided set
(purchased/site_purchased/on_route/delivered) and re-enqueues the 9 (failedвЖТpending) so the
cron posts them. SAFE (no double-book): the enqueue trigger fires ONLY at the purchased
transition, so one job per PR; WP-less stays suppressed (return null); divert reverses
directly (doesn't rely on the refusal). Re-sourced from LIVE 20260813001000.

mig 20260813002100 (gate + remediation UPDATE) ¬Ј pgTAP 225 (plan 12, RED on delivered/
on_route posting). A applied first verified green (224 + 85/86/87). **A's drain surfaced a
test-fragility casualty: 81-journal test 28 counts journal_posted audit rows table-wide
(have 20 want 2) вАФ same class the prune author flagged for 82/84/88. Folds into a
test-hardening sweep (scope all such counts to their fixtures) вАФ own follow-up, AFTER U2
posts the 9.**

## Spec 200 U2 вАФ assign a worker to a project at creation (2026-06-24)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-24** (no DB; lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј vitest green).
Follow-up to spec 200: the "add worker" form scoped a project-less worker, so a
new DC needed a second step to assign. U2 lets you pick the project on day one.

**Test-first** (RED): `worker-roster-manager.test.tsx` вАФ creating with a chosen
project calls `createWorker` with `projectId`. 1 RED вЖТ green.

**App (no DB вАФ reuses both existing RPCs):**

- The add-worker form gains the same optional **аєВаЄДаЄ£аЄЗаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£** `<select>` (`AddWorkerForm`
  now takes the `projects` prop).
- `createWorker` captures the new worker's id and, when a project was chosen, calls
  `assign_worker_to_project` вАФ a **create + assign**, avoiding a `create_worker`
  signature widen (no DROP+CREATE / re-grant trap). The assign is soft: the worker
  exists either way; a failed assign returns a message + can be set in the edit sheet.

## Spec 200 вАФ assign a worker to a project (the missing UI) (2026-06-24)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-24** (no DB; lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј vitest green).
Operator asked "how do we assign DC to projects?" вАФ the answer was _you couldn't
from the app_. The `assign_worker_to_project` RPC + `workers.project_id` (one
project at a time, audit trail) existed since spec 172/the assignment migration,
but `/workers` only created/edited/set-rate/invited вАФ no assign control. This
wires the engine to the UI. No DB change.

**Test-first** (RED): extended `tests/unit/worker-roster-manager.test.tsx` вАФ shows
the current project on the row; the edit sheet's аєВаЄДаЄ£аЄЗаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£ select вЖТ `assignWorkerToProject`
on save; no assign when unchanged. 3 RED вЖТ green (existing 7 still pass).

**App:**

- `assignWorkerToProject({ workerId, projectId })` action вАФ relays to the
  `assign_worker_to_project` definer (gate PM/super/director/procurement); `""`/null
  unassigns (RPC `p_project` defaults null вЖТ cleared).
- `WorkerRosterManager`: `ManagedWorker` += `project_id`; new `projects` prop
  (`AssignableProject[]`, default `[]`); each row shows its current project (or
  "аЄҐаЄ±аЄЗаєДаЄ°аєИаЄ£аЄ∞аЄЪаЄЄаєВаЄДаЄ£аЄЗаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£"); the per-row edit sheet gains a аєВаЄДаЄ£аЄЗаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£ `<select>` вЖТ
  assign-on-save (reassign moves it; one project at a time).
- `/workers` reads `workers.project_id` + the assigner's RLS-scoped projects.

**Note for the operator:** assignment is NOT required to log labour (the WP
labour picker lists everyone, ordering the project's crew first) вАФ it powers the
/store custody-receiver picker + the labour-picker ordering. Labour itself is
logged as full/half **days** (DC paid per day), per worker per day, on the WP
аЄЧаЄµаЄ°аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ (#wp-labor) tab. **Out of scope:** assign-at-creation (the add form still
makes a project-less worker вАФ `create_worker` takes no project; follow-up if wanted).

## Spec 198 вАФ divert a delivered WP-bound line into the store, U2 (2026-06-24)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-24** (ADR 0064; mig 20260813000900; pgTAP
216; lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј vitest ¬Ј db:test). **SPEC 198 COMPLETE (U1+U2).**
Operator chose Option 3 (AskUserQuestion) вАФ the cost-clean version of "pre-fill
аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤ from a delivery." Investigation found the simple pre-fill has no target
(store-bound lines already auto-check-in via spec 195 P3; stocking a WP-bound
line as-is double-counts), so U2 is an inventory **diversion with a GL transfer**.

**ADR 0064** вАФ divert a delivered WP-bound purchase into the store (cost transfer
WP-WIP вЖТ Inventory). Surfaced the GL risk + the design BEFORE building; operator
approved "build it + push (with ADR)."

**GL transfer (net):** reverse the WP purchase (Dr 2100 AP / Cr 1400 WP-WIP) +
the new stock_receipt (Dr 1500 Inventory / Cr 2100 AP) вЖТ WP-WIP 0 ¬Ј Inventory
+cost ¬Ј **AP unchanged**. A later аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ returns it Dr 1400 / Cr 1500 (cost lands on
the WP once, at usage вАФ the store-bound model).

**DB (migs 20260813000900 + 20260813001000):**

- New `divert_purchase_to_store(p_request_id)` definer RPC вАФ gate `SITE_STAFF`
  (procurement read-only in the store, spec 197), membership `can_see_project`,
  guards (delivered, WP-bound, catalogued, not already diverted вАФ the
  `stock_receipts_pr_uniq` index is the hard guard). It **reverses the WP purchase
  GL entry directly** (`reverse_journal_internal`, Dr 2100/Cr 1400) + **skips any
  pending purchase outbox job**, then inserts the `stock_receipt` (PR-stamped,
  all-in cost вЖТ auto-enqueues Dr 1500/Cr AP), rolls `stock_on_hand`, sets the PR
  `work_package_id = NULL`.
- **`post_purchase_to_gl` is UNCHANGED.** The first attempt (000900) re-enqueued a
  `purchase` job to do the reversal + reordered `post_purchase_to_gl`'s
  reverse-before-suppress вАФ but that poster only accepts `purchased`/`site_purchased`,
  so a _delivered_ PR raises `P0001` and the reversal never fires. **pgTAP 216
  caught this** (WP-WIP stayed 300 = double-count). The corrective mig 001000
  reverts `post_purchase_to_gl` to LIVE and rewrites the RPC to reverse directly +
  skip the stale job. **Lesson: the async GL poster won't process a status it
  gates on вАФ reverse synchronously in the RPC.**
- **Async-safe:** purchase posted вЖТ reverse it; still pending вЖТ skip it (no WP-WIP
  ever). Both converge.

**App:** `divertPurchaseToStore({ requestId })` action + `DivertToStoreList`
client component (per-line `аЄҐаєЙаЄ≤аЄҐаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤аЄДаЄ•аЄ±аЄЗ` via `ConfirmActionButton`). The аЄДаЄ•аЄ±аЄЗ page
reads the project's delivered + WP-bound + catalogued PRs not yet diverted (RLS

- filter out those with a `stock_receipts.purchase_request_id`), gated to
  `canIssue` (SITE_STAFF); renders the list after `StoreManager`. `db:types` regen.

**Test-first** (RED): `tests/unit/divert-to-store-list.test.tsx` (list + confirm
вЖТ `divertPurchaseToStore`). **pgTAP 216 (plan 17, the ledger proof):**
structure/anon-deny; pre-divert WP-WIP=300; guards (visitor/non-member 42501,
not-delivered/WP-less 22023); happy divert; receipt-stamped + on-hand rolled + PR
WP-less; post the GL; **WP-WIP nets to 0 ¬Ј Inventory=300 ¬Ј AP net credit=300**;
already-diverted 22023.

**v1 scope:** whole-line divert only (no partial); the PR loses its WP identity in
the list (trace via `stock_receipts.purchase_request_id`); full undo of a divert
(re-attach the WP) is out of scope.

## Spec 198 вАФ multi-line аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤ (bulk stock check-in), U1 (2026-06-24)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-24** (mig 20260813000800; pgTAP 215; lint ¬Ј
typecheck ¬Ј vitest ¬Ј db:test green). Operator: "checking in items is too
difficult, one at a time вАФ the check-in list should be the same as delivery."
The аЄДаЄ•аЄ±аЄЗ `аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤аЄ™аЄХаєКаЄ≠аЄБ` form was single-item-per-submit; U1 makes it a multi-row
**grid** recorded in one atomic call. (Operator chose **Both** grid + pre-fill-
from-delivery; U2 = pre-fill, sequenced next.)

**Test-first** (RED): `tests/unit/store-checkin-grid.test.tsx` вАФ opens a grid with
one draft row + `аєАаЄЮаЄіаєИаЄ°аЄ£аЄ≤аЄҐаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£` add-row + disabled `аЄЪаЄ±аЄЩаЄЧаЄґаЄБаЄЧаЄ±аєЙаЄЗаЄЂаЄ°аЄФ`; enables on a
complete row; records every complete row in one `recordStockInBulk` call; drops
incomplete rows. 4 RED вЖТ green.

**DB:** new `record_stock_in_bulk(p_project_id uuid, p_lines jsonb)` definer RPC
(mig 20260813000800) вАФ same role gate as the post-197 `record_stock_in`
(site_admin + PM tier + procurement + director), membership (`can_see_project OR
procurement`), per-line validation (qty>0, costвЙ•0, active item, supplier exists),
**atomic** (any bad line rolls back the whole batch вАФ no partial check-in), each
line inserts a `stock_receipts` row + rolls into `stock_on_hand`. Returns the
count. `CREATE` (new fn) + explicit grants (anon revoked). The single
`record_stock_in` is **KEPT** (spec 195 P3 auto-receipt depends on it). pgTAP 215
(plan 18): structure/anon-deny ¬Ј 2-line additive happy ¬Ј 7 validations ¬Ј atomicity
(good+bad line вЖТ 0 receipts) ¬Ј visitor/non-member 42501 ¬Ј site_admin member happy.

**App:**

- `recordStockInBulk({ projectId, lines })` action (`src/app/store/actions.ts`) вАФ
  maps rows вЖТ jsonb `[{catalog_item_id, qty, unit_cost, supplier_id, note}]`,
  calls the RPC, maps 42501/22023, `revalidatePath` the project store.
- `StoreManager` аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤ sheet rewritten as a draft-row grid (`DraftReceiptRow[]`
  state, `+ аєАаЄЮаЄіаєИаЄ°аЄ£аЄ≤аЄҐаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£` add, per-row `аЄ•аЄЪ` remove, one `аЄЪаЄ±аЄЩаЄЧаЄґаЄБаЄЧаЄ±аєЙаЄЗаЄЂаЄ°аЄФ` submit;
  enabled once вЙ•1 complete row; incomplete rows dropped on submit). Reuses the
  category-grouped item `<select>` per row. Swapped `recordStockIn`вЖТ`recordStockInBulk`.
- Updated the two spec-177 `store-manager.test.tsx` аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤ tests to the grid
  (button `аЄЪаЄ±аЄЩаЄЧаЄґаЄБаЄЧаЄ±аєЙаЄЗаЄЂаЄ°аЄФ`, asserts `recordStockInBulk` with a `lines` array).
- `db:types` regenerated (new RPC).

**U2 (pre-fill аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤ from a PO delivery вАФ incl. the anti-double-book rule vs
spec 195 P3 auto-receipt) NOT started.**

## Spec 197 вАФ empty-аЄДаЄ•аЄ±аЄЗ state, U3 (2026-06-24)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-24** (no DB; lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј vitest green).
**SPEC 197 COMPLETE (U1вАУU3).** A brand-new project's store is empty; a bare
"no stock" line was a dead end. The empty state now:

- Leads with the `аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤аЄ™аЄХаєКаЄ≠аЄБ` action as the **primary** CTA (the secondary
  header аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤ button is dropped when empty, so there is one clear lead).
- Shows one line вАФ "аЄҐаЄ±аЄЗаєДаЄ°аєИаЄ°аЄµаЄВаЄ≠аЄЗаєГаЄЩаЄДаЄ•аЄ±аЄЗ вАФ аєАаЄ£аЄіаєИаЄ°аЄИаЄ≤аЄБаЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤ аЄЂаЄ£аЄЈаЄ≠аЄЬаєИаЄ≤аЄЩаєБаЄЬаЄЩаЄИаЄ±аЄФаЄЂаЄ≤" вАФ where
  **аєБаЄЬаЄЩаЄИаЄ±аЄФаЄЂаЄ≤** links to the project's supply-plan chip, but only when the viewer
  can reach it (`SUPPLY_PLAN_ROLES`); for site_admin (can't plan supply) it stays
  plain text, never a dead link.
- Suppresses the `аЄХаЄ£аЄІаЄИаЄЩаЄ±аЄЪаЄЧаЄ±аєЙаЄЗаЄДаЄ•аЄ±аЄЗ` full-stocktake (U2) while the store is empty
  (counting zero items is meaningless).

**Test-first** (RED): `tests/unit/store-empty-state.test.tsx` вАФ leads with аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤ +
links аєБаЄЬаЄЩаЄИаЄ±аЄФаЄЂаЄ≤ when `emptyStateSupplyPlanHref` set; plain text (no link) when null.
2 RED вЖТ green. Also updated the spec-177 `store-manager.test.tsx` empty assertion
(old "аЄҐаЄ±аЄЗаєДаЄ°аєИаЄ°аЄµаЄ™аЄХаєКаЄ≠аЄБаєГаЄЩаЄ™аєВаЄХаЄ£аєМ" вЖТ "аЄҐаЄ±аЄЗаєДаЄ°аєИаЄ°аЄµаЄВаЄ≠аЄЗаєГаЄЩаЄДаЄ•аЄ±аЄЗ").

**App:**

- `StoreManager` gains `emptyStateSupplyPlanHref?: string | null` (default null).
  Non-null вЖТ empty state renders аєБаЄЬаЄЩаЄИаЄ±аЄФаЄЂаЄ≤ as a `<Link>` to the supply plan +
  a `BUTTON_PRIMARY` аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤ lead; null вЖТ plain text. Header аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤ now shows only
  when `onHand.length > 0`.
- `app/projects/[projectId]/store/page.tsx`: `canPlanSupply = SUPPLY_PLAN_ROLES`,
  passes `emptyStateSupplyPlanHref={canPlanSupply ? supplyPlanHref(id) : null}`;
  gates `аЄХаЄ£аЄІаЄИаЄЩаЄ±аЄЪаЄЧаЄ±аєЙаЄЗаЄДаЄ•аЄ±аЄЗ` on `canIssue && onHand.length > 0`.

Ties into the first-real-project adoption arc (spec 192). Placement/UX only.

## Spec 197 вАФ аЄХаЄ£аЄІаЄИаЄЩаЄ±аЄЪ unified into аЄДаЄ•аЄ±аЄЗ, U2 (2026-06-24)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-24** (no DB; lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј vitest green).
Retires the standalone `/stock-count` route and folds counting into the
per-project `аЄДаЄ•аЄ±аЄЗ` surface. Two modes, one home, one `record_stock_count`:

- **Mode A вАФ spot count** (unchanged): the per-row `аЄХаЄ£аЄІаЄИаЄЩаЄ±аЄЪ` on `StoreManager`,
  already on the аЄДаЄ•аЄ±аЄЗ page for SITE_STAFF (`canIssue`).
- **Mode B вАФ full stocktake** (relocated): the `/stock-count` page's
  `StoreCountManager` (the focused count-only item list) now renders on the
  аЄДаЄ•аЄ±аЄЗ page behind a `аЄХаЄ£аЄІаЄИаЄЩаЄ±аЄЪаЄЧаЄ±аєЙаЄЗаЄДаЄ•аЄ±аЄЗ` toggle, gated to `canIssue` (SITE_STAFF).

**Test-first** (RED): `tests/unit/store-full-stocktake.test.tsx` вАФ `FULL_STOCKTAKE_LABEL`,
`hidePicker` suppresses the picker, `collapsible` hides the list behind the
`аЄХаЄ£аЄІаЄИаЄЩаЄ±аЄЪаЄЧаЄ±аєЙаЄЗаЄДаЄ•аЄ±аЄЗ` toggle until opened. 3 RED вЖТ green.

**App:**

- `StoreCountManager` gains `hidePicker` (default false вЖТ existing B2 picker
  behavior preserved) + `collapsible` (default false вЖТ list always open). When
  `collapsible`, the list starts closed behind a `аЄХаЄ£аЄІаЄИаЄЩаЄ±аЄЪаЄЧаЄ±аєЙаЄЗаЄДаЄ•аЄ±аЄЗ` toggle.
- `app/projects/[projectId]/store/page.tsx` renders `<StoreCountManager hidePicker
collapsible>` after `StoreManager` (maps the on-hand to `CountStockRow[]`),
  gated to `canIssue`.
- `labels.ts`: `+FULL_STOCKTAKE_LABEL = "аЄХаЄ£аЄІаЄИаЄЩаЄ±аЄЪаЄЧаЄ±аєЙаЄЗаЄДаЄ•аЄ±аЄЗ"`; retired `STOCK_COUNT_LABEL`
  (its only consumer, the `/stock-count` page, is gone).
- `app/stock-count/page.tsx` вЖТ thin `redirect("/projects")`.
- Removed the site_admin `/stock-count` `SettingsLink` (+ orphan `ClipboardCheck`
  / `STOCK_COUNT_LABEL` imports).
- `bottom-tab-bar.tsx`: `SETTINGS_TAB.match` drops `/stock-count`.
- `nav-back-affordance.test.ts`: `/stock-count` вЖТ EXCLUDED (now a redirect).

**Scope note / open question:** the spec describes Mode B as a "batch submit"
full-list form (every item with an inline counted-qty field, one submit). The
actual `/stock-count` component is **per-row** (a sheet per item) вАФ the spec
author's recollection of the existing surface was inaccurate. Per the spec's own
overriding rule ("no new store capability вАФ relocation + consolidation only"), I
**relocated the existing per-row component** rather than build a new batch form
(that would be new capability). If the operator genuinely wants a single-submit
batch grid, that is a follow-up spec, not U2.

**Dead-but-tested:** `StoreCountManager`'s picker `onChange` still pushes
`/stock-count?project=вА¶` вАФ unreachable now (prod always passes `hidePicker`; the
standalone route redirects), but kept so the spec-178-B2 picker test stays green.

**U3 (empty-аЄДаЄ•аЄ±аЄЗ state) NOT started.**

## Spec 197 вАФ аЄДаЄ•аЄ±аЄЗ as a per-project surface, U1 (2026-06-24)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-24** (mig 20260813000700; pgTAP 181; lint ¬Ј
typecheck ¬Ј vitest ¬Ј db:test green). The store stops being a global `/settings`
drill-down reached through a project picker and becomes a **per-project
destination**: a sub-route `/projects/[projectId]/store` reached from a `аЄДаЄ•аЄ±аЄЗ`
header icon-chip (after `аєБаЄЬаЄЩаЄИаЄ±аЄФаЄЂаЄ≤`), exactly like `аЄХаЄ≤аЄ£аЄ≤аЄЗаЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ` / `аєБаЄЬаЄЩаЄИаЄ±аЄФаЄЂаЄ≤`.

**Test-first** (RED): `tests/unit/store-project-surface.test.tsx` вАФ pins the
testable contract (`storeHref` builder, `STORE_LABEL = "аЄДаЄ•аЄ±аЄЗ"`, the settings tab
drops `/store`, the projects tab lights on `/projects/[id]/store`, StoreManager
`hidePicker` hides the picker). 4 RED вЖТ green.

**App:**

- New route `app/projects/[projectId]/store/page.tsx` mirroring
  `schedule/page.tsx`: own `DetailHeader` (back вЖТ project), gated to
  `WP_DETAIL_ROLES`, projectId from the route (RLS scopes the viewer), renders
  the existing `StoreManager` with `hidePicker`. `canIssue = SITE_STAFF` (admits
  site_admin's аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ; procurement stays read-only); P&L stays super/director.
- `app/projects/[projectId]/page.tsx`: `canSeeStore = WP_DETAIL_ROLES.includes(role)`
  - a `Warehouse` `аЄДаЄ•аЄ±аЄЗ` chip after `аєБаЄЬаЄЩаЄИаЄ±аЄФаЄЂаЄ≤`.
- `StoreManager` gains an optional `hidePicker` prop (default false) вАФ the
  per-project route supplies the project, so the global picker is suppressed.
- `labels.ts`: `STORE_LABEL` changed `"аЄ™аєВаЄХаЄ£аєМаЄЂаЄЩаєЙаЄ≤аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ"` вЖТ **`"аЄДаЄ•аЄ±аЄЗ"`** (the
  destination SSOT, used by chip + sub-route header).
- `project-paths.ts`: new `storeHref(projectId)` builder.
- Removed the two `/store` `SettingsLink`s (procurement + isManager blocks) +
  the now-orphan `Warehouse` / `STORE_LABEL` imports in `settings/page.tsx`.
- Legacy `/store` вЖТ thin `redirect("/projects")`.
- `bottom-tab-bar.tsx`: `SETTINGS_TAB.match` drops `/store` (the projects tab
  owns the new sub-route; `/projects` prefix already lights it). `/stock-count`
  kept вАФ retired in U2.
- `nav-back-affordance.test.ts`: legacy `/store` moved to EXCLUDED (now a
  redirect). **Also swept in 4 pre-existing-unclassified spec-196 accounting
  routes** (ledger/payables/periods/purchases) that had left this anti-drift
  completeness test RED вАФ same test file, kept the suite green.

**DB:** mig 20260813000700 вАФ `record_stock_in` definer widened to admit
`site_admin` (was BACK_OFFICE tier only). `CREATE OR REPLACE`, **same signature**
(uuid,uuid,numeric,numeric,uuid,text) so grants + pgTAP positional pins hold;
body reconstructed verbatim from LIVE pg_proc, the only edited line is the role
gate `in (...)` set. pgTAP 181 +1 (plan 24вЖТ25): a site_admin member records a
аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤ into their own project. No `db:types` (signature unchanged).

**Scope held:** placement + access-widening only; no new store capability. U2
(unify аЄХаЄ£аЄІаЄИаЄЩаЄ±аЄЪ, retire `/stock-count`) and U3 (empty-аЄДаЄ•аЄ±аЄЗ state) NOT started.

**Open / deferred:** the legacy `/store` `actions.ts` still `revalidatePath("/store")`
(harmless вАФ `router.refresh()` drives the per-project route UI; left untouched
per scope). Action gates beyond аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤/аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ (аЄХаЄ£аЄІаЄИаЄЩаЄ±аЄЪ widening to site_admin) land
naturally in U2 when the count surface unifies.

## Spec 195 follow-up вАФ dashboard store-material spend (2026-06-24)

Status: **DONE вАФ 2026-06-24** (no DB; lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј vitest 1575 green). Closes
the "Open follow-up" flagged in `docs/feature-specs/195-project-level-purchasing.md`:
the manager dashboard's materials-by-project showed direct WP-bound purchase spend
only, so a project that procures heavily **into the on-site store** read as
artificially low (the cost is real вАФ it sits in `wp_profit` + Store P&L, just not
on the dashboard). **Fix:** `materials` now adds the project's non-reversed
`stock_issues` (аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ) at **cost** (`total_cost`). Disjoint sources вАФ store-bound
material comes from WP-less PRs, which `sumMaterials` excludes (ADR 0063) вАФ so
additive with no double-count (mirrors `wp_profit`'s two-term materials, but at COST
not the sell layer: the dashboard is budget-vs-**money-out**, like labor-at-cost and
purchases-at-supplier-amount; the store's internal transfer margin is not external
spend). New pure helper `sumStoreIssues` (`src/lib/dashboard/spend.ts`, tested) +
two admin reads (`stock_issues` by project_id, `stock_reversals` for the non-reversed
filter) in `src/app/dashboard/page.tsx`. Test-first (dashboard-spend.test.ts).
**Open:** dashboard total ignores store stock procured-but-not-yet-аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ'd (inventory,
not yet WP-consumed) вАФ deliberate, consistent with the cost-at-usage model.

## Spec 194 вАФ super_admin override on an approved supply plan (2026-06-24)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-24** (commit 58dc371; mig 20260813000100; pgTAP
209; lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј vitest 1567 ¬Ј db:test 159/0 green). Operator: a super_admin
should be able to revert the status / edit an approved (frozen) supply plan, with
the plan labeled "overridden by [name]" (chose **supply plans first** via
AskUserQuestion). The lifecycle is one-way past approval (PM submit вЖТ PD/super
approve вЖТ frozen; only rejected re-editable); this is the operator escape hatch.
**mig:** `supply_plans` += overridden_by / overridden_at; `reopen_supply_plan(plan)`
definer вАФ **super_admin only** вАФ reopens a submitted/approved plan to draft
(clearing the submit/approve stamps), recording overridden_by + overridden_at; the
marker PERSISTS through a later re-approval. **pgTAP 209** (super reopens, non-super
42501, draft can't reopen, execute lockdown). `reopenPlan` action + a "аєАаЄЫаЄіаЄФаєБаЄБаєЙаєДаЄВ
(аЄЬаЄєаєЙаЄФаЄєаєБаЄ•аЄ£аЄ∞аЄЪаЄЪ)" button on a frozen plan (canOverride = super) + a "¬Ј аЄЫаЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєБаЄБаєЙаєВаЄФаЄҐ [name]"
marker (name resolved via admin client). The pattern (reopen RPC + overridden_by
stamp + label) is reusable for other approved entities. **PAIRED REQUEST #1 вАФ supply
plan вЖТ store redesign вАФ NOT built (design proposal presented, awaiting the
operator's direction):** the operator wants supply-plan items to procure into the
on-site STORE (project-level, no WP), then WPs аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ (withdraw) per-WP вАФ moving WP
attribution to withdrawal (the store already does the аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ half, spec 177). Key
fork = how procurement lands in the store (light: plan вЖТ pre-filled stock-in; full:
project-level PRs вЖТ PO вЖТ receive-into-store, needs PR work_package_id nullable).

## Spec 193 вАФ in-app feedback (bug report / feature request) (2026-06-24)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-24** (commit d7b7b0d; mig 20260813000000; pgTAP
208; lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј vitest 1564 ¬Ј db:test 158/0 green; /feedback compiles +
gates unauth вЖТ /login, preview). Operator: add a bug-report / feature-request
channel in settings, **designed so CC has enough to fix or build without a
round-trip** (chose the guided single details field via AskUserQuestion). A
аЄДаЄІаЄ≤аЄ°аЄКаєИаЄІаЄҐаєАаЄЂаЄ•аЄЈаЄ≠ row in /settings вЖТ /feedback (settings sub-surface, getClaims so every
authenticated role can file): type toggle (аєБаЄИаєЙаЄЗаЄЫаЄ±аЄНаЄЂаЄ≤ / аЄВаЄ≠аЄЯаЄµаєАаЄИаЄ≠аЄ£аєМ) + title + ONE
details box whose placeholder swaps by type (bug: did вЖТ expected вЖТ actual; feature:
what + why) + optional "related screen". **The design point вАФ auto-attach the triage
context the user shouldn't type:** role_snapshot (most bugs are role/RLS-gated),
app_version (package.json, server-side), user_agent (mobile vs desktop), best-effort
page_path. **mig:** feedback table + feedback_type / feedback_status enums; writes
via submit_feedback definer (stamps submitted_by + role_snapshot); RLS = submitter
reads own, super_admin reads all (operator + CC's read role). **pgTAP 208** (submit,
role-stamp, RLS scoping, execute lockdown). Files: lib/feedback/validate.ts (pure),
app/feedback/{page,actions}.ts, components/features/feedback/feedback-form.tsx,
settings row. Guards: feature-components-structure (+feedback domain),
nav-back-affordance (+feedback STATIC_DETAIL). **CC reads submissions via
`pnpm exec supabase db query --linked` on the feedback table** (full per-row
context). **Deferred:** in-app super_admin review list ¬Ј screenshot attachment ¬Ј
status-update RPC + a Telegram ping on new feedback.

## Spec 192 вАФ first-real-project readiness, U4 SA daily home (2026-06-24)

Status: **U4 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-24** (commit f7e927f; NO DB; lint ¬Ј typecheck
¬Ј vitest 1555 green; /sa compiles + the site_admin gate redirects unauth вЖТ /login,
preview). Cliff 2 fixed: the SA landed on the project hub `/projects`, so the daily
loop (log labor / photos / PR) was buried 3вАУ4 taps deep in a WP tab. **Mock-first**
(show_widget вЖТ AskUserQuestion: build it + make it the SA's landing). Revived `/sa` =
greeting + "аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩаЄВаЄ≠аЄЗаЄЙаЄ±аЄЩ" вАФ the SA's visible **not-done** work packages (RLS-scoped to
member projects, drops complete + pending_approval), each row 1-tap to its detail +
three action chips (аЄ£аЄєаЄЫаЄЦаєИаЄ≤аЄҐ / аЄЧаЄµаЄ°аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ / аЄДаЄ≥аЄВаЄ≠аЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠) deep-linking the WP-detail tabs.
`lib/sa/my-work.ts` pure `buildMyWorkList` (join project name, sort project-then-WP).
WP-detail `hashTabMap` gained `wp-photos` / `wp-labor` (only `wp-requests` existed).
**Nav rework + 5 pin updates:** `roleHome(site_admin)` вЖТ `/sa`; `SA_TABS` prepend
аЄЂаЄЩаєЙаЄ≤аЄЂаЄ•аЄ±аЄБ (Home icon) + drop аЄ†аЄ≤аЄЮаЄ£аЄІаЄ° (four tabs); `SA_HUB_NAV` the same; pins
role-home, bottom-tab-bar (+ a /sa-lit test), hub-nav, nav-back-affordance
(NON_DETAIL + HUB_STRIP both + `sa`), and **handoff-poll-route** (the roleHome
consumer missed on the first pass вАФ grep ALL `roleHome("site_admin")` pins on a home
change). **U4b (deferred):** the standalone hero "аЄ•аЄЗаєАаЄІаЄ•аЄ≤аЄЧаЄµаЄ°аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩаЄІаЄ±аЄЩаЄЩаЄµаєЙ" + quick photo/PR
buttons need a global "pick a аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ" picker (v1 surfaces the actions per-WP instead).
**Spec 192 = U1 membership guard + U2 onboarding + U3 non-member explainer + U4 SA
home вАФ the first-real-project adoption arc, both cliffs addressed.**

## Spec 192 вАФ first-real-project readiness, U2+U3 (2026-06-24)

Status: **U2 + U3 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-24** (commits 93225df, 14b842e; NO DB;
lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј vitest 1549 green). Continuing the adoption arc after U1. **U2 вАФ
onboarding leads with the team:** the setup checklist listed "аєАаЄЮаЄіаєИаЄ°аЄЧаЄµаЄ°аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ" third with
no rationale, but team is the access prerequisite (a project is only visible to its
members) вАФ moved it FIRST + a one-line why ("аєАаЄЮаЄіаєИаЄ°аЄБаєИаЄ≠аЄЩаєАаЄЫаєЗаЄЩаЄ≠аЄ±аЄЩаЄФаЄ±аЄЪаєБаЄ£аЄБ аєАаЄЮаЄЈаєИаЄ≠аєГаЄЂаєЙаЄЮаЄІаЄБаєАаЄВаЄ≤
аєАаЄЂаєЗаЄЩаєВаЄДаЄ£аЄЗаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£аєБаЄ•аЄ∞аєАаЄ£аЄіаєИаЄ°аЄЧаЄ≥аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩаєДаЄФаєЙ"); rows gained an optional `hint`. **U3 вАФ non-member
explainer, not a bare 404:** when the user session can't see a project, an
admin-client exists-check distinguishes RLS-hidden (not a member) from truly-gone вАФ
gone still 404s, hidden renders `NoAccessNotice` ("аЄДаЄЄаЄУаЄҐаЄ±аЄЗаєДаЄ°аєИаєДаЄФаєЙаЄ≠аЄҐаЄєаєИаєГаЄЩаЄЧаЄµаЄ°аЄВаЄ≠аЄЗаєВаЄДаЄ£аЄЗаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£
аЄЩаЄµаєЙ вАФ аЄХаЄіаЄФаЄХаєИаЄ≠аЄЬаЄєаєЙаЄИаЄ±аЄФаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£аєВаЄДаЄ£аЄЗаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£аєАаЄЮаЄЈаєИаЄ≠аЄВаЄ≠аєАаЄЮаЄіаєИаЄ°аєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤аЄЧаЄµаЄ°") in the standard chrome with a back
link (super_admin / coordinator see-all, never reach it). Tests:
`onboarding-checklist.test.tsx` (+1), `no-access-notice.test.tsx`. **U4 вАФ site-admin
daily home: DESIGN APPROVED (mock-first, show_widget вЖТ AskUserQuestion: build it +
make it the SA's landing), NOT YET BUILT.** It's a central nav rework (roleHome +
SA_TABS + SA_HUB_NAV + 4 pinned nav tests) вЖТ its own focused unit; full plan in
`docs/feature-specs/192-first-project-readiness.md` ¬ІU4.

## Spec 192 вАФ first-real-project readiness, U1 (2026-06-24)

Status: **U1 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-24** (commit 69d94b0, NO DB; lint ¬Ј typecheck
¬Ј vitest 1547 green). After dark mode the operator said "decide and proceed" вАФ I
pivoted from feature-breadth to **adoption** (the app is feature-complete but
operator-incomplete; ~0 real data in prod, so the machinery is hollow without a
first real project producing data). Two cliffs mapped from the live code; U1 fixes
the **silent membership dead-end**: project visibility is membership-gated
(`can_see_project` = a `project_members` row OR the project_lead, ADR 0056), and
`removeProjectMember` had **no guard** вАФ a PM could remove the last member (or
themselves) and orphan the project (visible only to super_admin), with no in-app
recovery for the locked-out person. **Fix (invariant: a project keeps вЙ•1 member):**
`lib/projects/member-removal.ts` pure `evaluateMemberRemoval({totalMembers,
removingSelf})` вЖТ `{blocked (last), needsConfirm (self + others remain)}`;
`removeProjectMember` counts first and refuses the last removal (load-bearing Thai
error); `settings-form.tsx` (+`currentUserId` prop) disables the last member's вЬХ
with a hint, routes a self-removal through the themed `ConfirmDialog`
("вА¶аЄДаЄЄаЄУаЄИаЄ∞аєДаЄ°аєИаєАаЄЂаєЗаЄЩаєВаЄДаЄ£аЄЗаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£аЄЩаЄµаєЙаЄ≠аЄµаЄБвА¶"), keeps other-removal one-click, marks the current
user "(аЄДаЄЄаЄУ)". **NO migration** вАФ an action-level UX-footgun guard at the right
altitude (member ops are direct table writes under RLS, not RPCs; projects are
never hard-deleted, so no DELETE-cascade concern a DB trigger would hit). Tests:
`member-removal.test.ts` + 3 `settings-form.test.tsx` cases. **U2+ (next):**
onboarding leads with "add your team" (+ the visibility why); a non-member 404 вЖТ
"ask a PM to add you" explainer (admin exists-check); a **site-admin daily-loop
home** (log labor/photos/PR in one tap) вАФ net-new surface, wants a mock-first pass.

## Spec 190 вАФ dark mode (opt-in night theme), U1 (2026-06-24)

Status: **U1 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-24** (commit 40358c6, NO DB; lint ¬Ј typecheck
¬Ј vitest 1528 green; verified light+dark via the SSR cookie path + preview
screenshots). Operator asked "how hard is dark mode in settings?" вЖТ I assessed it
against the actual token system and recommended **default light + opt-in toggle**
(operator confirmed). Cheap because the design system was built for re-theming:
100% semantic tokens (enforced by `design-doctrine.test.ts`), OKLCH colors (dark =
invert the L channel, hue preserved), and `@custom-variant dark` already declared
(globals.css even comments "a future night-shift palette overrides :root"). So the
lift is a `.dark` palette + toggle plumbing вАФ **components are untouched.**
**Default LIGHT is deliberate** (spec-20 sun-first: dark is _worse_ in direct sun =
the field photo-capture flow; dark serves indoor/PM/back-office/portal/night). **U1:**
`lib/ui/theme.ts` (tri-state light/dark/system in a year `theme` cookie; pure
`resolveTheme`/`parseThemeSetting`, default light); no-flash (`layout.tsx` async,
reads the cookie server-side вЖТ `dark` class + `color-scheme` on `<html>` pre-paint,
`ThemeScript` resolves `system` before paint, `suppressHydrationWarning`);
`globals.css` `.dark {}` overriding every `--color-*` + the shadcn primitives (OKLCH
dark, WCAG floors held, amber fill keeps near-black ink, `*-soft` grounds вЖТ low-L
tints); `ThemeToggle` on `/settings` (`аЄБаЄ≤аЄ£аєБаЄ™аЄФаЄЗаЄЬаЄ•`, every role; аЄ™аЄІаєИаЄ≤аЄЗ/аЄ°аЄЈаЄФ/аЄ£аЄ∞аЄЪаЄЪ, 44px,
tracks OS live on аЄ£аЄ∞аЄЪаЄЪ). Tests: `theme.test.ts`, `theme-toggle.test.tsx`. **TRAP:
the husky Tailwind class-sorter (`prettier-plugin-tailwindcss`) mangled the
whitespace around a `${ternary}` inside the `className` template literal вАФ
`antialiased${c?" dark":""}` became `antialiaseddark` (junk class; dark only
survived via the JS script, not SSR). Fix: keep the separator space in the STATIC
part of the literal (`antialiased ${c?"dark":""}`); re-read className literals after
the commit hook.** No new route; new components in the existing `features/chrome`
domain (no spec-122 change). **U2 (next, optional polish):** screen-by-screen audit
on authenticated surfaces (cards, `*-soft` status grounds, brand band), shadow/
elevation tuning for dark, PWA status-bar `themeColor` per theme.

## Spec 183 вАФ approvals are awareness, not a tab (PM) (2026-06-23)

Operator: "аЄ£аЄ≠аЄХаЄ£аЄІаЄИ menu should not be the main menu, but rather notification of
how many Approvals are pending." Design challenge ("don't agree blindly"). Verdict:
operator's instinct ~70% right вАФ a bottom tab is a _place_, the review queue is a
_transient, often-empty worklist_; the count is the actionable signal. But the
proposal tangles two jobs: **awareness** (count вЖТ badge/card) and **doing the work**
(the queue needs a real home). Since approving IS the PM's primary job, we demote
the _tab-as-urgency-signal_, not the _queue-as-a-place_: relocate it onto the
dashboard (the new PM home) + count badge on the аЄ†аЄ≤аЄЮаЄ£аЄІаЄ° nav. Operator delegated
placement ("design with ux in mind") and said other approval types get awareness
in later units. Mocked the before/after with show_widget before building.

3-unit arc: U1 count + dashboard hero card ¬Ј U2 drop the tab + reroute home + badge
pins ¬Ј U3 the nav count badge (self-fetching). U4+ = other approval types (PR,
bank/consent) вАФ later.

**U1 SHIPPED 2026-06-23 (NO DB).** `src/lib/approvals/pending-summary.ts`: pure
`summarizePendingApprovals(rows, projectsById)` вЖТ `{count, oldest}` (oldest = min
updated_at, code tiebreak вАФ mirrors /review ordering) + async
`getPendingApprovalsSummary` (RLS-scoped, mirrors the /review queue query so count
== list). `features/dashboard/pending-approvals-card.tsx`: presentational, attention
(amber) palette when pending / calm muted when empty, links вЖТ /review. Wired into
/dashboard for the PM tier only (site_admin sees the dashboard, not the card).
Tests: pending-approvals-summary (pure, 5) + pending-approvals-card (render, 3).
LESSON: a new `features/<domain>/` folder must be added to the
`feature-components-structure.test.ts` ALLOWED_DOMAINS allowlist (spec 122 guard) вАФ
caught by the full suite, not the targeted run. vitest 1489/0.

**U2 SHIPPED 2026-06-23 (NO DB).** The nav flip. Dropped `аЄ£аЄ≠аЄХаЄ£аЄІаЄИ` from `PM_TABS`
(bottom-tab-bar) + `аЄ£аЄ≤аЄҐаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£аЄ£аЄ≠аЄХаЄ£аЄІаЄИ` from `PM_HUB_NAV` (hub-nav). Rerouted `roleHome`
PM tier (isManagerRole) вЖТ `/dashboard` (was `/review`). Gave `DASHBOARD_TAB`
`match: ["/review"]` so the queue lights аЄ†аЄ≤аЄЮаЄ£аЄІаЄ° as its sub-surface (bottom bar);
`/review` page passes HubNav `currentHref="/dashboard"` for the same effect on
desktop. `/review` stays a live route reached from the U1 card. Removed the unused
`ClipboardCheck` import. Pin churn (all 5 located up-front): role-home, role-sets,
require-role (redirect target), hub-nav (PM_ITEMS + assertion), bottom-tab-bar
(PM_TABS pin + two аЄ£аЄ≠аЄХаЄ£аЄІаЄИ-lighting cases rewritten to аЄ†аЄ≤аЄЮаЄ£аЄІаЄ°). The `match` choice
minimized churn AND kept the sun-mode test green (it asserts an active tab exists on
/review вАФ аЄ†аЄ≤аЄЮаЄ£аЄІаЄ° now provides it). vitest 1489/0; lint¬Јtc green.

**U3 SHIPPED 2026-06-23 (NO DB).** The count badge on the аЄ†аЄ≤аЄЮаЄ£аЄІаЄ° bottom tab (PM
tier) вАФ the literal "number on the main menu" the operator asked for.
`features/dashboard/pending-approvals-badge.tsx` ('use client'): pure
`formatBadgeCount` (null at 0, cap 99+) + presentational `ApprovalsBadge({count})`

- self-fetching `PendingApprovalsBadge` (browser client, RLS-scoped `work_packages`
  status=pending_approval head-count вАФ same visibility as /review; best-effort,
  errors leave it hidden). Wired into bottom-tab-bar over the аЄ†аЄ≤аЄЮаЄ£аЄІаЄ° icon, gated
  `tab.href==="/dashboard" && isManagerRole(role)` (site_admin shares the tab, no
  badge вАФ doesn't approve). Tests: formatBadgeCount (3) + ApprovalsBadge render (3).
  The self-fetch is inert in jsdom (network fails вЖТ count 0 вЖТ renders nothing), so the
  18 existing tab-bar tests stayed green untouched. amber attn pill (bg-attn/on-attn).
  **Desktop hub-strip badge DEFERRED** (HubNav is a server component with no role prop
  вАФ threading it to every call site is its own change; the phone bottom bar IS the
  "main menu" the operator named, so this is the core win). vitest +6.

**U4 SHIPPED 2026-06-23 (NO DB).** Desktop hub-strip badge вАФ operator "both, one at
a time" (this first). `ApprovalsBadge`/`PendingApprovalsBadge` gained a
`position: "overlay" | "inline"` prop (overlay = the bottom-tab icon overlay,
default, unchanged; inline = `relative ml-1` pill after a text label). `HubNav`
gained an optional `role?: string`; when `isManagerRole(role)` it renders
`<PendingApprovalsBadge position="inline" />` on the `/dashboard` item. Passed
`role` at all 5 HubNav call sites (settings/review/requests/projects/dashboard вАФ all
already had ctx.role/role). TRAP: `exactOptionalPropertyTypes` rejects forwarding
`position={undefined}` to an optional prop вЖТ default it in the wrapper
(`position = "overlay"`). Optional role = call sites that omit it render no badge
(hub-nav component tests pass no role вЖТ badge inert, stayed green). Test +1 (inline
variant asserts no `absolute`, has `ml-1`).

**SPEC 183 ARC U1вАУU4 SHIPPED 2026-06-23 (one session, NO DB):** count helper +
dashboard hero card вЖТ drop the аЄ£аЄ≠аЄХаЄ£аЄІаЄИ tab + reroute PM home to аЄ†аЄ≤аЄЮаЄ£аЄІаЄ° вЖТ count badge
on the home tab (phone) вЖТ same badge on the desktop hub strip. аЄ£аЄ≠аЄХаЄ£аЄІаЄИ is awareness
(card + badge on both nav surfaces), not a main-menu tab; the queue lives under
аЄ†аЄ≤аЄЮаЄ£аЄІаЄ° (/review one tap from the card). DEFERRED: other approval types (PR,
bank/consent вАФ NEXT, operator's second "both"); header bell for a unified inbox.

## Spec 184 вАФ approval-type awareness (PR + bank changes) (2026-06-23)

Operator's second "both": extend spec-183 awareness to the other PM-tier approval
flows. Explore mapped them: PR = `purchase_requests.status='requested'`, lives on
the аЄДаЄ≥аЄВаЄ≠аЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠ /requests tab; bank-change = `contractor_bank_change_requests.status=
'pending'`, NO nav surface (only on a contractor's detail page = blind spot);
consent = no approval queue (recorded, not approved вЖТ out of scope). `project_director`
is on all three policies (mig 20260752), so all gate to `isManagerRole`. **Design
rule: a tabbed flow gets a tab badge; a tabless flow gets a dashboard card.** So WP
(183) = badge+card, PR = аЄДаЄ≥аЄВаЄ≠аЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠ tab badge, bank-change = dashboard card (U2).

**U1 SHIPPED 2026-06-23 (NO DB).** PR awaiting-decision badge. Generalized the badge:
extracted `SelfCountBadge({load, position, label})` + module-level RLS-scoped loaders
(`loadPendingWpApprovals`, `loadPendingPurchaseDecisions`); `PendingApprovalsBadge`
(WP) kept as a thin wrapper (аЄ†аЄ≤аЄЮаЄ£аЄІаЄ° wiring unchanged) + new
`PendingPurchaseDecisionsBadge` (label "аЄДаЄ≥аЄВаЄ≠аЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠аЄ£аЄ≠аЄЮаЄіаЄИаЄ≤аЄ£аЄУаЄ≤"). `ApprovalsBadge` gained an
optional `label` (aria noun, default "аЄ£аЄ≠аЄХаЄ£аЄІаЄИ"; local `label`вЖТ`text` to avoid the
collision). Wired onto the аЄДаЄ≥аЄВаЄ≠аЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠ tab (bottom-tab over the icon) + /requests hub item
(inline), gated `href==="/requests" && isManagerRole(role)` вАФ SA/procurement share the
tab but don't decide вЖТ no badge. Module-level loaders = stable refs, so the `[load]`
effect runs once. Test +1 (custom label aria). vitest 1497/0; lint¬Јtc green.

**U2 SHIPPED 2026-06-23 (NO DB).** Bank-change dashboard card вАФ the blind-spot flow
(contractor bank changes had NO nav surface, only a contractor's detail page).
`src/lib/approvals/pending-bank-changes.ts`: `getPendingBankChangeCount` (RLS-scoped
head-count of `contractor_bank_change_requests` status='pending'; errorвЖТ0).
`features/dashboard/bank-change-awareness-card.tsx`: presentational, renders ONLY
when count>0 (exception-driven вАФ unlike the always-on аЄ£аЄ≠аЄХаЄ£аЄІаЄИ card, bank changes are
occasional, so no zero-state clutter), amber attn, links вЖТ /contacts/subcontractors
to drill in and decide. Wired into /dashboard under the аЄ£аЄ≠аЄХаЄ£аЄІаЄИ card, PM tier only.
Tests: card render (nothing at 0; count+link at >0). Typecheck confirmed the table +
'pending' status in the generated types. vitest +2.

**SPEC 184 ARC COMPLETE U1вАУU2 2026-06-23 (NO DB):** PR awaiting-decision badge on the
аЄДаЄ≥аЄВаЄ≠аЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠ tab + bank-change awareness card on the dashboard. With spec 183, the PM now
sees all three PM-tier approval flows without hunting (WP card+badge, PR tab badge,
bank-change card). Design rule held: tabbed flow вЖТ tab badge, tabless flow вЖТ dashboard
card. DEFERRED: dedicated bank-change queue page (vs drilling from the contractor
list); worker-DC bank changes (ADR 0062 U4c-2 not built вАФ folds into the card when it
lands); header bell for a unified approvals inbox.
