## Spec 185 вАФ one number for all approvals (unified pending on the home) (2026-06-23)

Operator: "proceed" вЖТ "design the process yourself." Capstone of the awareness arc.
Original ask (183) was "how many APPROVALS are pending" вАФ a single total. Rejected a
header bell: this app has NO global header (chrome = BottomTabBar + HubNav, pages
render their own/none), so a bell has no consistent home. Instead fold the total into
the existing idiom: аЄ†аЄ≤аЄЮаЄ£аЄІаЄ° badge = total, dashboard = complete inbox.

**U1 SHIPPED 2026-06-23 (NO DB).** Complete the dashboard inbox + generalize the card.
Extracted `features/dashboard/awareness-card.tsx` `AwarenessCard({count,label,href,icon})`
(renders only when count>0, attention palette, ArrowRight) and REMOVED the
spec-184 `bank-change-awareness-card.tsx` (+ its test) вАФ subsumed. Added
`src/lib/approvals/pending-purchase-decisions.ts` `getPendingPurchaseDecisionCount`
(server, RLS head-count of `purchase_requests`='requested'; errorвЖТ0). Dashboard (PM
tier) now renders, under the аЄ£аЄ≠аЄХаЄ£аЄІаЄИ hero: PR card (вЖТ/requests, ShoppingCart) + bank
card (вЖТ/contacts/subcontractors, Landmark), via the generic card. Test: AwarenessCard
(nothing at 0; count+label+link at >0). Net vitest 1499 (вИТ2 bank test, +2 awareness).

**U2 SHIPPED 2026-06-23 (NO DB).** аЄ†аЄ≤аЄЮаЄ£аЄІаЄ° badge = the TOTAL. Added pure
`sumApprovalCounts(values)` (nullвЖТ0) + a `loadPendingBankChanges` client loader +
`loadTotalPendingApprovals` (Promise.all the 3 head-counts вЖТ sum). `PendingApprovalsBadge`
now loads the total + label "аЄ£аЄ≠аЄ≠аЄЩаЄЄаЄ°аЄ±аЄХаЄі" (was WP-only "аЄ£аЄ≠аЄХаЄ£аЄІаЄИ"); `PendingPurchaseDecisionsBadge`
stays PR-only on аЄДаЄ≥аЄВаЄ≠аЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠. So the number on the main menu = all pending approvals, and
the dashboard breakdown (аЄ£аЄ≠аЄХаЄ£аЄІаЄИ hero + PR + bank cards, U1) reconciles to it. Test +2
(sumApprovalCounts). vitest 1501/0; lint¬Јtc green.

**SPEC 185 ARC COMPLETE U1вАУU2 2026-06-23 (NO DB):** the capstone вАФ one number (аЄ†аЄ≤аЄЮаЄ£аЄІаЄ°
badge = WP+PR+bank total, "аЄ£аЄ≠аЄ≠аЄЩаЄЄаЄ°аЄ±аЄХаЄі") + the dashboard as the complete inbox. **APPROVALS-
AWARENESS ARC (183+184+185) COMPLETE:** аЄ£аЄ≠аЄХаЄ£аЄІаЄИ went from a main-menu tab вЖТ a total count
on the home + a per-type dashboard inbox + per-surface tab badges, across all three
PM-tier approval flows. DEFERRED: bank-change queue page; worker-DC bank changes (ADR
0062 U4c-2 unbuilt).

## Spec 174 вАФ project Google-Maps link (precise pin) (2026-06-22)

Operator: "Add Pinned map, or attach link from gMap." Chose (one question)
**attach a gMap link** вАФ paste the Maps "Share" URL on the project; the вУШ sheet's
"open in Maps" link opens the EXACT pin, replacing the spec-173 address-search
fallback. (Embedded pinned map declined вАФ needs an API key + coordinates.)

**SHIPPED to prod 2026-06-22.** **mig 20260798:** `projects.gmap_url` (nullable) +
CHECK https-only; DROP+CREATE `update_project_settings` with a trailing
`p_gmap_url` (mirrors site_address: null preserves, '' clears) + re-applied EXECUTE
grants. **mig 20260799:** grant SELECT on the column вАФ `projects` has COLUMN-level
SELECT grants (budget excluded), so the new column did NOT inherit SELECT; granted
authenticated + anon (mirrors site_address). **mig 20260800:** revoke anon EXECUTE
on the recreated RPC вАФ Supabase default privileges silently re-granted anon EXECUTE
on the DROP+CREATE'd function; the pre-174 RPC had anon revoked (pgTAP 32 pins it).
App: `validateGmapUrl` (https + Google host allowlist вАФ rejects javascript:,
non-https, look-alike domains, >2048); the form gains a URL field; `gmapUrl` rides
the single settings payload; the project detail page computes
`mapsUrl = gmap_url ?? address-search ?? null` for the existing вУШ link (no
component change). **LESSONS (both caught by db:test, fixed forward):** (1) a new
column on a column-SELECT-granted table does NOT inherit SELECT вЖТ must grant
explicitly; (2) DROP+CREATE of an RPC re-triggers Supabase's default-privilege
EXECUTE grant to anon вЖТ must revoke anon (CREATE OR REPLACE would have avoided
both, but a new param forces DROP+CREATE). pgTAP 32 (+3, 11-arg sig); unit
validateGmapUrl + settings-form (+1 each). db:types regenerated (signature change).
Verify: db:test 120 / 2301 / 0; pnpm test green; lint¬Јtypecheck¬Јbuild green. Builds
on [[spec173-procurement-project-visibility]].

## Spec 173 вАФ procurement read-only project visibility (2026-06-22)

Operator: "Procurement needs to see Project information and schedule." Clarified
(two questions): besides the schedule, procurement also needs the deliverables
(аЄЗаЄІаЄФаЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ) list, to open WP details, and the project info fields (team, PM, dates,
Google-Maps link, address, status). Audit: procurement already reads /projects +
/projects/[id] + the вУШ sheet (spec 102), but a spec-102 early-return branch gave
it a minimal names+status WP list, and `deliverables` / `work_package_dependencies`
/ `project_members` SELECT had no procurement arm вЖТ empty аЄЗаЄІаЄФ grouping, empty
schedule swimlanes/deps, empty team list.

**SHIPPED to prod 2026-06-22.** **U1 (RLS, mig `20260797000000`):** procurement
OR-arm added to `deliverables` + `work_package_dependencies` SELECT (kept the
`can_see_project` / `can_see_wp` predicate вАФ files 70/73 pins hold) and appended to
the flat `project_members` staff role-list (team-name resolution; project_director
kept, file 91). Read-only widening, no write arm. New pgTAP file 173 (+12):
procurement reads cross-project аЄЗаЄІаЄФ + dependency + members; a membership-scoped PM
still sees only its own; quals still name the helpers. **U2 (schedule):** new
`SCHEDULE_VIEW_ROLES` (= SITE_STAFF + procurement, coordinator still excluded per
spec 154) gates `/projects/[id]/schedule` + the calendar chip (`canOpenSchedule`).
**U3 (WP nav):** `canOpenWp` re-expressed as `WP_DETAIL_ROLES.includes(role)` so
procurement's WP rows link to the (read-only, spec 171) detail. **U2+U3 removed the
spec-102 procurement early-return branch** вАФ procurement now flows through the main
project page, every write affordance already `isPmRole`/`isManagerRole`-gated and
`WorkPackageList` role-agnostic (procurement gets the аЄЗаЄІаЄФаЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ lens by default).
**U4 (project info):** the вУШ `ProjectInfoButton` sheet gains аЄ™аЄЦаЄ≤аЄЩаЄ∞ (status),
аЄБаЄ≥аЄЂаЄЩаЄФаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£ (start + planned-completion dates, formatThaiDate), and a аєАаЄЫаЄіаЄФаєГаЄЩ Google
Maps link derived from `site_address` (no geo columns вЖТ address search URL); status
is always present so the sheet always renders. New const unit-tested
(`SCHEDULE_VIEW_ROLES`); ProjectInfoButton test extended (+2). Verify: db:test
**120 files / 2298 / 0**; pnpm test green; lint¬Јtypecheck¬Јbuild green. RLS-only
migration вЖТ db:types regen skipped. Out of scope: project reports/settings/budget
(stay PM/super/director; budget admin-only), any procurement WRITE, geo/embedded
map, coordinator schedule access (spec 154 preserved). Builds on
[[spec171-procurement-purchase-requests]] [[spec172-procurement-back-office-domains]].

## Spec 172 вАФ procurement owns contractors / equipment / DC onboarding (2026-06-21)

Operator: "procurement also takes care of 1. Contractors 2. Equipment Rentals 3. Onboarding DCs." Decisions: FULL ownership (procurement **sets DC pay rate** +
**manages contractor bank**), build all three. **Phase A (equipment) = ALREADY
ENABLED, no-op:** audit found procurement already gated into every equipment
surface (registry CRUD/movements/rates/rental-batch+allocation+usage RPCs +
/equipment via EQUIPMENT_MOVE_ROLES/BACK_OFFICE_ROLES, spec 141/146). The only gap
is app-wide (no UI to view/manage rental batches+allocations) вАФ a SEPARATE feature,
not a procurement-permission item. **Phase B (contractors incl. bank) SHIPPED to
prod (commit 8f431bc, mig `20260795000000`):** procurement now curates contractors
like suppliers вАФ RLS adds procurement to contractors INSERT/UPDATE; CREATE OR
REPLACE `set_contact_bank` (staff bank-write) + `set_work_package_contractor`
adding procurement, **bodies sourced from the LIVE prod definition** (project_director
rides along, file 91). App: `/contacts/subcontractors` + the back-office branch of
`/contacts/[type]/[id]` (contractors+suppliers) gate on BACK_OFFICE_ROLES;
createContractorRecord/updateContractorRecord/setContactBank вЖТ backOfficeSession;
the PM-only detail workflows (bank-change approval, doc upload, portal invite,
consent) gated to isPmTier so procurement gets a clean read+bank surface without
broken affordances; `contact_bank` stays zero-grant (admin-read behind the gate).
Nav (the spec-171-U4 lesson): subcontractors added to PROCUREMENT_HUB_NAV (desktop)

- a `role==='procurement'` /settings block (phone path). pgTAP 24 (+3) / 45 (+1) вАФ
  procurement creates/updates a contractor, sets its bank, assigns it to a WP;
  db:test 0 failures; lint¬Јtypecheck¬Јbuild green. **Phase C (DC onboarding incl.
  rate) SHIPPED to prod (mig `20260796000000`):** the concurrent spec-170 worker
  session had settled (origin/main at the Phase B docs commit, tree clean, no fresh
  worker commits), so Phase C built cleanly. CREATE OR REPLACE on `create_worker` /
  `update_worker` / `assign_worker_to_project` / `create_worker_invite` /
  `set_worker_day_rate` adding `procurement` to each role gate вАФ **every body
  re-sourced from the LIVE prod definition** (pg_get_functiondef), signatures
  UNCHANGED so the authenticated-only EXECUTE lockdown (pgTAP 36) is preserved and
  db:types needs no regen; project_director rides along in every list (file 91).
  Bank/tax/phone/day_rate are written through these definer bodies (zero
  column-grant bypassed); the READ path stays admin-only вАФ this opens onboarding,
  not PII. App: new `WORKER_ROSTER_ROLES` (= PM_ROLES + procurement) gates
  `/workers`; nav wired (the spec-171-U4 lesson) вАФ аЄЧаЄµаЄ°аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ вЖТ `/workers` added to
  PROCUREMENT_HUB_NAV (desktop) + the `role==='procurement'` /settings block (phone
  path). New pgTAP file 172 (+19): procurement creates a DC (arrangement+bank+rate),
  updates, sets the rate, assigns to a project, issues an invite; bank/tax/phone/
  day_rate still 42501 to a raw authenticated SELECT (PII isolation preserved);
  visitor still refused (negative control). db:test 119 files / 2286 / 0; unit
  WORKER_ROSTER_ROLES (+3); lint¬Јtypecheck¬Јtest¬Јbuild green. Built via explicit-path
  commits + `push origin HEAD:main` (rebase on non-ff); never `git add -A`.
  **Spec 172 COMPLETE (A no-op ¬Ј B + C shipped).**

## Spec 171 вАФ procurement can make purchase requests from the WP screen (2026-06-21)

Status: **U1 + U2 COMPLETE вАФ shipped to prod 2026-06-21.** Operator: "there are
times procurement needs to make a purchase request instead of the site admins вАФ
enable them to see [the WP] just like site admins, but only able to edit the PRs."
Clarified: procurement **opens the work-package screen** read-only, only the
request is editable. Requests are created only in WP context (`work_package_id`
NOT NULL); that screen was `SITE_STAFF_ROLES`-gated (procurement excluded, spec
70). procurement is **cross-project** (spec 102 / ADR 0056) вЖТ `can_see_wp()` is
false for it, so it could neither read the WP's photos/labour/approvals (pure
`can_see_wp` SELECTs) nor insert a request (the INSERT also gates on
`can_see_wp`). **U1 (migration `20260780000000`, commit af754b9):** added a
`current_user_role() = 'procurement'` arm BESIDE the existing `can_see_wp` arm on
`photo_logs` / `labor_logs` (staff) / `approvals` SELECT and on the
`purchase_requests` INSERT policy (DROP+CREATE in place, names unchanged вЖТ files
70/73 `can_see_wp` pins hold). No UPDATE (can't approve/decide), no other writes;
column-scope INSERT grant already to `authenticated`. **Bug caught by db:test +
fixed-forward:** the PR-insert arm named `project_manager` without
`project_director` (I copied the role list from the pre-director migration file,
not the live post-director policy) вЖТ pgTAP file 91 "no RLS policy names
project_manager without project_director" failed; added `project_director` and
re-applied the policy to prod. **TDD:** file 17 E.6 flipped (procurement INSERT
`throws 42501` вЖТ `lives_ok`); new file **115** pins the four arms (procurement +
can_see_wp present). **db:test 115 files / 2201 / 0.** db:types = no drift (RLS
only). **U2 (commit e378d30):** admit procurement via `WP_DETAIL_ROLES`
(SITE_STAFF_ROLES + procurement) + `isReadOnlyWpViewer(role)` (the single
read-only flag the page branches on); photos render the read-only `PhaseGallery`
(extracted from /review into `components/features/photos/phase-gallery.tsx`,
behaviour-preserving) not the capture zone; labour `locked + showFlags=false`;
notes static; site-purchase / contractor-assign / assign-prompt / report-defect
suppressed; аЄИаЄ±аЄФаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£ stays planner-only. **TDD:** role-sets.test.ts pins
WP_DETAIL_ROLES + isReadOnlyWpViewer (RED first). lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј vitest 201 /
1336 ¬Ј build green. **U3 (commit 1a990be):** added `procurement` to `contractors`
SELECT (mig `20260781000000`) so the WP's assigned-contractor name shows in
procurement's read-only info sheet вАФ contractors is global master data (plain
role-level read, like the suppliers master); no app change (page already renders
it read-only). file 115 +1, db:test **115 / 2202 / 0**. **U4 (commit 9776c38) вАФ
the "procurement still can't access WP details" fix:** root cause was
NAVIGATION, not permission вАФ spec 102's separate read-only procurement project
view rendered WP rows as plain cards (no link), predating U2's read-only detail
access. Made each row a `<Link>` to `workPackageHref`; no DB change. Landed amid a
concurrent payroll/DC-payment session ([[concurrent-session-hazard]]): shared HEAD
was on its feature branch + its WIP left the tree mid-compile, so the one-file fix
was committed in isolation and ff-pushed to main (their branch/tree untouched).
**Editing an existing request's content is out of scope** (no such feature for any
role вАФ site admins only create).

## Spec 166 U1 - beta finance gating (hide provisional GL from PMs) (2026-06-21)

Status: **COMPLETE вАФ 2026-06-21.** Pre-beta money-surface audit found Nova fully super-gated + project/WP pages money-clean, but the GL `/accounting` surface was PM/director-reachable (spec 152) and its numbers are provisional until accountant config. Operator: hide аЄЪаЄ±аЄНаЄКаЄµ (GL) from PMs for beta, keep аЄДаєИаЄ≤аЄИаєЙаЄ≤аЄЗ (payroll). **NO DB change** вАФ GL tables are zero-grant, read via admin client behind requireRole, so the route guard is the gate. Tightened `ACCOUNTING_ROLES` [accounting, pm, super, director] вЖТ **[accounting, super_admin]** (auto-tightens all 4 /accounting route guards вАФ PM/director now bounce) + gated the settings аЄБаЄ≤аЄ£аєАаЄЗаЄіаЄЩ вЖТ аЄЪаЄ±аЄНаЄКаЄµ link to ACCOUNTING_ROLES (аЄДаєИаЄ≤аЄИаєЙаЄ≤аЄЗ/payroll stays under isManager). Reversible (re-add the 2 roles вЖТ link + guards follow). **TDD:** RED first вАФ role-sets.test.ts pins `ACCOUNTING_ROLES === [accounting, super_admin]` (+ not-contains pm/director). **Verify:** lint¬Јtypecheck¬Ј**vitest 200/1324**¬Ј**build green** (no db:test вАФ no DB change). **Money-surface audit result: Nova operator-only вЬУ ¬Ј GL now operator-only for beta вЬУ ¬Ј project/WP pages leak no money вЬУ вАФ core-ops beta surfaces are money-safe.**

## Spec 164 U3 - bulk аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩвЖТаЄЗаЄІаЄФ mapping + ungrouped funnel (2026-06-21)

Status: **COMPLETE вАФ 2026-06-21.** The biggest click-saver: map many WPs into a аЄЗаЄІаЄФ at once instead of one-at-a-time on each WP detail. **NO DB change** вАФ loops the existing `set_work_package_deliverable` RPC (spec 155; membership-gated, PM is a member вЖТ can_see_wp passes). `assignWorkPackagesToDeliverable(projectId, workPackageIds[], deliverableId)` action (PM_ROLES gate, uuid-validate/filter, sequential RPC loop, 42501/22023 map + mid-batch "аЄҐаєЙаЄ≤аЄҐаєДаЄФаєЙ N аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ" report). `GroupWorkPackagesSheet` (target аЄЗаЄІаЄФ `<select>` + аєАаЄ•аЄЈаЄ≠аЄБаЄЧаЄ±аєЙаЄЗаЄЂаЄ°аЄФ + scrollable WP checkbox list, each `aria-label="code name"` + "аЄҐаєЙаЄ≤аЄҐ N аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ" вЖТ action вЖТ refresh; Set preserves selection order). Amber funnel banner (`bg-attn-soft`/`border-attn-edge`/`text-attn-ink`) in DeliverablesManager ("N аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩаЄҐаЄ±аЄЗаєДаЄ°аєИаЄ≠аЄҐаЄєаєИаєГаЄЩаЄЗаЄІаЄФ" + аЄИаЄ±аЄФаЄБаЄ•аЄЄаєИаЄ°аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ trigger) shown when deliverables exist AND ungrouped WPs > 0; ungrouped list derived in page.tsx from the loaded WPs. **TDD:** RED first вАФ `group-work-packages-sheet.test.tsx` (4: disabled-until-аЄЗаЄІаЄФ+аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ; assign checkedвЖТ`(p1,[w1,w2],d1)`+refresh; select-all checks all; inline error no-refresh). **Verify:** lint¬Јtypecheck¬Ј**vitest 196/1309** (no db:test вАФ RPC unchanged). **NEXT: U4 onboarding nudge (checklist item + banner).** Lesson: wrapping-label text content drops CSS-gap whitespace вЖТ put explicit `aria-label="code name"` on each checkbox so getByLabelText (and screen readers) get the spaced name.

## Spec 164 U1 - create аЄЗаЄІаЄФаЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ in-app (2026-06-21)

Status: **COMPLETE вАФ 2026-06-21.** Root fix for "nowhere to add deliverables": `create_deliverable` was deferred (ADR 0059 ¬І1) so аЄЗаЄІаЄФ only ever came from `seed-deliverables.sql`. Operator direction: "both, import-first"; аЄЗаЄІаЄФ NOT in WP sheet вЖТ creation = paste-list (U2) + manual (U1), mapping = in-app (U3). **TDD:** RED first вАФ pgTAP 111 (14: exists/secdef; PM/super/director create + sort_order 1/2/3; dupвЖТ23505; empty/over-long code, empty name, unknown projectвЖТ22023; site_admin/visitorвЖТ42501) + `add-deliverable-sheet.test.tsx` (3: disabled-until-valid; create+refresh; inline error). **Verify:** db:push¬Јdb:types¬Ј**db:test 111 files/2152/0**¬Јlint¬Јtypecheck¬Ј**vitest 194/1302**. Lessons: deliverables SELECT is membership-scoped (spec 143/ADR 0056) вЖТ pgTAP readback needs the PM as lead+member (create itself is role-only); plan(N) must equal asserted count; a transient Mgmt-API 502 on file 21 cleared on rerun. **NEXT: U2 bulk-paste аЄЗаЄІаЄФ list вЖТ U3 bulk аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩвЖТаЄЗаЄІаЄФ mapping + ungrouped funnel вЖТ U4 onboarding nudge.**

## Spec 163 U1 - paste work packages from Google Sheets (2026-06-21)

Status: **COMPLETE вАФ 2026-06-21.** The U7 importer (`parseAndValidate`, `src/lib/wp-import/parse.ts`) now accepts a Google-Sheets cell paste вАФ **tab-delimited, no header, code+name** вАФ backward-compatible with the comma+`code,name,description` CSV. Auto-detect: `detectDelimiter` (TAB anywhere вЖТ `\t` else `,`) + `hasHeaderRow` (first non-empty line's first cell == `code`, case-insensitive, BOM-tolerant via `.trim()`) вЖТ header-by-name vs positional (col1 code / col2 name / col3 description). Both shapes normalise to the same `RawRow[]` вЖТ the existing validation loop (required code/name, in-file dup, existing-code, 1-based data-row numbers) is UNCHANGED. U7 sheet (`import-work-packages-sheet.tsx`) relabelled for paste-from-sheet ("аЄІаЄ≤аЄЗаЄ£аЄ≤аЄҐаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ" / "аЄІаЄ≤аЄЗаЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩаЄИаЄ≤аЄБ Google Sheet аЄЂаЄ£аЄЈаЄ≠ CSV" / "аЄІаЄ≤аЄЗаЄВаєЙаЄ≠аЄ°аЄєаЄ•аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ" + tab-example placeholder); stale "аЄХаєЙаЄ≠аЄЗаЄ°аЄµаЄЂаЄ±аЄІаЄХаЄ≤аЄ£аЄ≤аЄЗ" empty-result message in `importWorkPackagesCsv` fixed. NO DB change вАФ reuses the `create_work_package` loop. **TDD:** RED first вАФ 5 new `wp-import-parse.test.ts` cases (tab/headerless 2-col; 3rd tab col вЖТ description; header honoured even with tabs; headerless validation row-numbers; headerless trim) + updated `import-work-packages-sheet.test.tsx` copy. **Verify:** lint¬Јtypecheck¬Ј**test 193 files/1299 pass**. Acceptance: pasting the spec's 262-row tab example creates 262 WPs (operator on-device). Out of scope: parser length validation, status/extra-column import, manual delimiter picker.

## Spec 161 U13 - Nova economy overview on the console (2026-06-21)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-21.** An at-a-glance economy snapshot atop `/nova`. NO DB change. **`summarizeLedger(postings)`** (`src/lib/nova/economy-summary.ts`) вАФ pure + tested: `issued` (ќ£ positive), `returned` (ќ£ |negative| = redeemed + confiscated), `outstanding` (the live coin liability = issued вИТ returned), `holders` (workers with net balance > 0), `bySource` (net per coin_source). The /nova page renders a **аЄ†аЄ≤аЄЮаЄ£аЄІаЄ°аєАаЄЂаЄ£аЄµаЄҐаЄН** card (outstanding ¬Ј аєБаЄИаЄБаєБаЄ•аєЙаЄІ ¬Ј аєГаЄКаєЙ/аЄ£аЄіаЄЪаЄДаЄЈаЄЩ ¬Ј holders + an issued-by-source line) from the ledger it already loads вАФ no new query. **TDD:** `nova-economy-summary.test.ts` (4: empty zeros; issued/returned/outstanding; holders count nets per worker; string-amount coercion). **Verify:** lint¬Јtypecheck¬Јtest + **`pnpm build` green** (full production build вАФ 40 static pages, all new /nova routes compile). Final autonomous polish.

## Spec 161 U12 - worker Nova detail + per-worker actions (operator UI) (2026-06-21)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-21.** The operator's per-worker window вАФ closes the visibility/action gaps (vesting, redeem, saver-bonus, confiscate had no UI). **`/nova/worker/[id]`** (super_admin, dynamic route вЖТ auto-classified DETAIL, renders DetailHeader). NO DB change. **Reads use BOTH clients:** table reads (worker, coin_postings ledger, shop_redemptions, coin_confiscations, active shop_items) via the **admin client**; the **gated vesting derives** (`coin_balance`/`coin_unvested_balance`/`coin_vested_balance`/`coin_spendable_balance`) via the **RLS server client** (the super JWT the SECURITY DEFINER gate needs вАФ the admin/service-role client has no auth ctx вЖТ would 42501). Shows the balance breakdown (аЄҐаЄ≠аЄФ ¬Ј аЄ™аЄЄаЄБаЄЗаЄ≠аЄ°-theirs ¬Ј аєГаЄКаєЙаєДаЄФаєЙ-spendable ¬Ј аЄҐаЄ±аЄЗаєДаЄ°аєИаЄ™аЄЄаЄБаЄЗаЄ≠аЄ°-at-risk) + ledger/redemptions/confiscations history. **`NovaWorkerActions`** (client): аЄ°аЄ≠аЄЪаєВаЄЪаЄЩаЄ±аЄ™аЄ≠аЄ≠аЄ° (`awardSaversBonusAction`), аєБаЄ•аЄБаЄВаЄ≠аЄЗаЄ£аЄ≤аЄЗаЄІаЄ±аЄ• (item picker вЖТ `redeemShopItemAction`), аЄ£аЄіаЄЪаєАаЄЂаЄ£аЄµаЄҐаЄН (reason picker + note вЖТ themed `ConfirmActionButton` вЖТ `confiscateCoinsAction`). `worker-actions.ts` (super-only, RLS client, conditional params); `confiscation.ts` = reason SSOT (Thai labels). /nova balance rows now link to the detail. **TDD:** `nova-worker-actions.test.tsx` (4: saver bonus call+refresh; redeem chosen item; confiscate chosen reason after themed confirm вЖТ `(worker,'theft','')`; inline error). **Verify:** lint¬Јtypecheck¬Јtest (full suite). Verified-by-checklist (auth-gated). **The Nova economy is now fully observable + operable per worker.** NEXT (optional): economy overview/dashboard; worker-facing surfaces (gift-first, later).

## Spec 161 U11 - defect-clawback button on the settlement UI (2026-06-21)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-21.** Makes the U10 clawback operable. NO DB change. `clawBackProjectAction(projectId, note?)` (super-only, RLS server client вЖТ `claw_back_project_coins`; params built conditionally for `exactOptionalPropertyTypes`). `NovaSettlementList`: a **DISTRIBUTED** project now shows a danger **"аЄ£аЄіаЄЪаєАаЄЂаЄ£аЄµаЄҐаЄН (аЄХаЄ≥аЄЂаЄЩаЄі)"** button guarded by the themed **`ConfirmActionButton`/`ConfirmDialog`** (spec 18) вЖТ clawback + refresh. **First-RED caught the doctrine:** initial `window.confirm` tripped `design-doctrine` ("uses no window.confirm in src" вАФ native dialogs break Field-First; destructive actions use the themed dialog) вЖТ swapped to `ConfirmActionButton`. **TDD:** `nova-settlement-list.test.tsx` (now 6: + claws after confirming the themed dialog вЖТ `clawBackProjectAction(id)`+refresh; + cancel вЖТ not called). **Verify:** lint¬Јtypecheck¬Јtest (full suite). Verified-by-checklist (auth-gated). NEXT = U12 worker Nova detail (vesting view + redeem/saver-bonus/confiscate per worker).

## Spec 161 U10 - per-project defect clawback (ADR 0060 design-rule 1) (2026-06-21)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-21.** Completes the flagged follow-up (a defect-reopen claws back). Migrations `20260773000000_coin_postings_project.sql` + `20260773000100_project_coin_clawback.sql`. **Project tag:** `coin_postings.source_project_id` (nullable FKвЖТprojects, additive); **`post_coins` gained `p_source_project uuid default null`** (DROP+CREATE вАФ a defaulted-param add via create-or-replace would make a 2nd overload + ambiguate the 4-named-arg callers; plpgsql callers bind at runtime so DROP is safe; only pgTAP 96's signature pin needed updating, calls use вЙ§5 positional args). **`distribute_project_coins` now TAGS** its profit_share postings (HT cut + DC shares) with the project. **`claw_back_project_coins(p_project, p_note)`** super-only: per worker, claws `least(project's REMAINING in-tail coins [signed ќ£ of the project's in-window postings вЖТ nets prior clawbacks вЖТ idempotent], worker's total `coin_unvested_balance`)` as a negative `confiscation` (reason `defect_rework`, project-tagged) + a `coin_confiscations` row; per-worker advisory lock. **VESTED coins (past the tail) + OTHER projects' coins are never touched** (the trust invariant). **DECISION вАФ manual, NOT auto-fired from spec-144 reopen:** (a) a single-WP defect auto-clawing a whole project's distribution is too blunt; (b) reopen is site_admin/PM-callable but minting/forfeiting is super-only вЖТ an auto-call hits the super gate or forces an ungated post_coins bypass. Operator claws back via this RPC (UI next). **pgTAP 110** (12: column + secdef; pmвЖТ42501; super claws P вЖТ W1 keeps other-project Q coins [500] but loses P-unvested [1000вЖТbal 500], W2 P-unvested 800вЖТ0, W3 P-coins VESTEDвЖТuntouched 2000; 2 defect_rework confiscations + 2 project-tagged confiscation postings; idempotent re-run claws 0; unknownвЖТP0001). Updated pgTAP 96 (post_coins 6-arg signature). **Verify:** lint¬Јtypecheck¬Јdb:test 110 files/2138/0¬Јdb:types¬Јtest. Lesson: adding a defaulted param to a function with named-arg callers needs DROP+CREATE (overload would ambiguate), grep the signature pins.

## Spec 161 hardening - coin-engine fixes from adversarial review (2026-06-21)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-21.** Migration `20260772000000_nova_hardening.sql` (5 create-or-replace, signatures unchanged вЖТ grants kept; behaviour unchanged for 104-108). Post-arc adversarial review (3 `caveman:cavecrew-reviewer` agents over the engine SQL + UI) surfaced three real fixes (noise filtered: negative weights impossible via `nova_dials value>=0` CHECK; "vesting locks forever" was a backwards misread вАФ tail=0 вЖТ fully vested; UI was clean). **A вАФ `settle_project`:** a MISSING `coin_multiplier` dial silently produced a NULL pool вЖТ now guards вЖТ P0001 (the dial is seeded + RPC-update-only, but a deleted dial must fail loud). **B вАФ `distribute_project_coins`:** per-worker `round()` drifted вАФ ќ£ shares could over-mint or lose coins вЖТ the LAST worker (by worker_id, via `row_number()/count() over()`) now takes the **exact remainder** (`v_dist вИТ ќ£ allocated`) so **ќ£(minted) == pool EXACTLY**, never over-mints. **C вАФ TOCTOU race:** `redeem_shop_item`/`confiscate_coins`/`award_savers_bonus` did balance-check-then-post; two concurrent calls could both pass вЖТ overspend/double-confiscate/double-bonus. Added a **per-worker `pg_advisory_xact_lock(hashtextextended('nova_coin:'||worker,0))`** (the `log_labor_day` pattern; auto-released at commit). **pgTAP 109** (6: missing-multiplierвЖТP0001; distribute 10000 over 3 equal weights вЖТ ќ£==10000 exactly + dc_distributed==10000 + each ~3333.33 + 3 postings). **Verify:** lint¬Јtypecheck¬Ј**db:test 109 files/2126/0** (104-108 unchanged). SQL-only вАФ no JS/db:types delta. Lessons: per-row round() in a loop drifts вЖТ allocate the last as remainder; balance-check-then-post needs a per-actor advisory lock.

## Spec 161 U9 - Nova shop admin (operator UI) (2026-06-21)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-21.** Completes the operator UI suite. **`/nova/shop`** (super_admin, drills from /nova). NO DB change. Reads `shop_items` via the ADMIN client (to show inactive too; numeric вЖТ `Number()`). **`NovaShopAdmin`**: a create form (name + coin price вЖТ `upsertShopItem`) + a row per item (edit price вЖТ `upsertShopItem({id,вА¶})`, toggle аєАаЄЫаЄіаЄФ/аЄЫаЄіаЄФ вЖТ `setShopItemActive(id, !active)`). `shop-actions.ts`: super-only, RLS server client, UUID-validated, `revalidatePath`; **upsert params built CONDITIONALLY** (omit absent optionals вАФ `exactOptionalPropertyTypes` forbids passing `undefined`). Prices = coins (no baht peg). **TDD:** `nova-shop-admin.test.tsx` (4: create gate name+price>0; createвЖТ`upsertShopItem({name,priceCoins})`+refresh; toggle activeвЖТ`setShopItemActive(id,false)`+refresh; inline error). Updated `nav-back-affordance` (+`nova/shop`). **Verify:** lint¬Јtypecheck¬Ј**test (full suite)**. **Verified-by-checklist** (auth-gated; component test carries the contract). **Two test bugs caught + fixed:** (1) `exactOptionalPropertyTypes` typecheck on undefined rpc args вЖТ conditional params; (2) `getByLabelText` collision вАФ item-row price label was identical to the create form's вЖТ renamed to distinct "аЄ£аЄ≤аЄДаЄ≤". **SPEC 161 OPERATOR UI SUITE COMPLETE (U7 dials ¬Ј U8 settle/distribute ¬Ј U9 shop).** The whole arc (U1вАУU9) is now operable without SQL.

## Spec 161 U8 - settlement + distribution operator flow (operator UI) (2026-06-21)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-21.** The close-out lifecycle without SQL. **`/nova/settlement`** (super_admin, drills from /nova). NO DB change. Reads `projects` + zero-grant `project_settlements` + `project_coin_distributions` via the ADMIN client behind requireRole (numeric вЖТ `Number()`), keyed into per-project state. **`NovaSettlementList`** renders each project by state and offers only the applicable action: OPEN вЖТ none ("аЄЫаЄіаЄФаєВаЄДаЄ£аЄЗаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£аЄБаєИаЄ≠аЄЩ"); CLOSED-unsettled вЖТ **аЄ™аЄ£аЄЄаЄЫаЄБаЄ≥аєДаЄ£** (`settleProjectAction` вЖТ `settle_project`); SETTLED-undistributed вЖТ shows pool/banked-baht/WP counts/equipment-flag + **аєБаЄЪаєИаЄЗаєАаЄЂаЄ£аЄµаЄҐаЄН** (`distributeProjectCoinsAction` вЖТ `distribute_project_coins`); DISTRIBUTED вЖТ shows HT cut + DC split + "аєБаЄЪаєИаЄЗаєБаЄ•аєЙаЄІ". Actions in `settlement-actions.ts`: settle gated **super+director**, distribute **super-only** (matches the RPCs), both via the RLS server client (not admin вАФ JWT-bound gates), UUID-validated, `revalidatePath`. Coins = points, banked profit = baht. **TDD:** `nova-settlement-list.test.tsx` (4: settle closed-unsettledвЖТaction+refresh; distribute settledвЖТshows pool 16,400 + action+refresh; open offers no settle; inline error). Updated `nav-back-affordance` (+`nova/settlement`). **Verify:** lint¬Јtypecheck¬Ј**test (full suite)**. **Verified-by-checklist** (auth-gated; component test carries the contract; operator on-device = acceptance). **NEXT = U9 shop admin.**

## Spec 161 U7 - Nova dials calibration console (operator UI) (2026-06-21)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-21.** First operator UI for the economics arc вАФ makes the SQL-only dials tunable. **`/nova/dials`** (super*admin, drills down from /nova). NO DB change. Reads the zero-grant `nova_dials` + `sell_rate_table` via the **ADMIN client** behind `requireRole(["super_admin"])` (numeric вЖТ `Number()`); tunes via `setNovaDial`/`setSellRate` server actions. **KEY: setters use the RLS SERVER client (user JWT), NOT the admin client** вАФ `set_nova_dial`/`set_sell_rate` gates read `current_user_role()` off the caller's JWT, which the service-role admin client lacks (would deny). Actions re-check super (defence in depth) + `revalidatePath`, mirroring `awardCoins`. **`NovaDialsForm`** client component: a row per dial (9: coin_multiplier¬Јht_cut_pct¬Јlevel_weight*{senior,mid,junior,apprentice}¬Јexternal_factor¬Јvesting_tail_days¬Јsavers_bonus_rate) + a row per sell-rate level (cost/internal/external), each with its own edit-state + save вЖТ refresh; inline error. `src/lib/nova/dials.ts` = SSOT for Thai labels/hints/order + `WORKER_LEVEL_LABEL`. Link added on /nova. **TDD:** `nova-dials-form.test.tsx` (4: renders seeded values; saves dial via `setNovaDial(key,value)`+refresh; saves rate via `setSellRate(level,cost,internal,external)`; inline error). Updated `nav-back-affordance` (+`nova/dials` STATIC_DETAIL). **Verify:** lint¬Јtypecheck¬Ј**test 189 files/1272**. **Verified-by-checklist** (page auth-gated super_admin+LINE вЖТ can't e2e on cloud PC; component test carries the contract; operator on-device = acceptance вАФ spec 162 precedent). Operator can now calibrate every seeded placeholder before go-live. **NEXT = U8 settle/distribute operator flow вЖТ U9 shop admin.**

## Spec 161 U6b - saver's bonus + vesting + narrow confiscation (ADR 0060 ¬І6 + decision c) (2026-06-21)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-21.** Migrations `20260771000000_add_confiscation_coin_source.sql` (enum-add) + `20260771000100_nova_vesting.sql`. The **TRUST layer** (ADR 0061 "can't build inclusion on a currency people fear"; design-rules 1/6/7): **holding is safe.** **Vesting = time-based + external lock**, derived from posting age вАФ NO project link added to coin_postings (`post_coins` untouched). **`coin_unvested_balance(p_worker)`**: an **external** DC (contractor `dc_temporary`) вЖТ the **whole balance** locked (¬І4, generalized вАФ unlocked only when invited internal); an **internal** DC вЖТ `least(balance, ќ£ positive postings within `vesting_tail_days`)` (recently-earned, still in the warranty/defect tail). **`coin_vested_balance`** = balance вИТ unvested; **`coin_spendable_balance`** = vested (so external spendable = 0). All SECURITY DEFINER + **super/director gate** (null-safe, no PM вЖТ 90/91 untouched). **`redeem_shop_item` REPLACED** (same signature, grants kept) to spend only `coin_spendable_balance` вАФ the lock is now REAL (U6a built it on the full balance). **Narrow confiscation** (decision c): `confiscation_reason` enum = `('fraud','theft','gross_misconduct','defect_rework')` вАФ the 3 gross violations + the quality clawback (design-rule 1; same mechanism, distinct reason; **no catch-all `other`** вЖТ never arbitrary) + a new `confiscation` `coin_source` (2nd sink, own enum-add). **`confiscate_coins(p_worker, p_reason, p_note)`** SECURITY DEFINER **super-only**; forfeits **only `coin_unvested_balance`** (vested NEVER touched вАФ the trust invariant); `unvested вЙ§ 0` вЖТ P0001 (fully-vested worker is safe); posts negative `confiscation` + records `coin_confiscations` (append-only, super-read). **`award_savers_bonus(p_worker)`** SECURITY DEFINER super-only; `bal √Ч savers_bonus_rate`; rewards **continued holding** вАФ first bonus allowed, a later one blocked if a `shop_redemption` posted since the last `savers_bonus` (P0001 'spent since last bonus'); cadence operator-driven. **New seeded dials (PLACEHOLDERS):** `vesting_tail_days 365`, `savers_bonus_rate 0.02`.

**pgTAP 108** (25: catalog 3 derives + 2 secdef + confiscation*reason labels + coin_source has confiscation + coin_confiscations table; internal vesting [unvested 500/vested 1000/spendable 1000] vs external [unvested 800/vested 0/spendable 0]; redeem respects lock [external blocked, internal spends vested]; confiscate removes 500 unvested only [balance 1000, вИТ500 posting], fully-vestedвЖТP0001, pmвЖТ42501; saver bonus 1000вЖТ1020, spender-since-bonusвЖТP0001; pm deriveвЖТ42501). **Updated pgTAP 96** again (`enum_has_labels` += `confiscation`). **Verify:** lint¬Јtypecheck¬Јdb:test 108 files¬Јdb:types¬Јtest 188/1268 вАФ all green. **U6b spec detail authored first.** **DEFERRED (own follow-up):** per-project **defect clawback auto-wiring** (spec-144 reopen вЖТ claw THAT project's unvested profit_share) needs a project link on coin_postings + a post_coins extension вЖТ flagged, not built (U6b ships time-based vesting + the `defect_rework` reason = the manual clawback). Also OUT: external inviteвЖТunlock event, attrition-signal watchlist, worker-facing vested/locked UI. **SPEC 161 ARC COMPLETE (U1вАУU6b).** **Operator MUST calibrate before go-live:** `coin_multiplier`, `ht_cut_pct`, `level_weight*\*`, `external_factor`, `vesting_tail_days`, `savers_bonus_rate` (all seeded placeholders).

## Spec 161 U6a - Nova shop + per-item pricing + redemption (ADR 0060 ¬І4) (2026-06-21)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-21.** Migrations `20260770000000_add_shop_redemption_coin_source.sql` (enum-add, own migration) + `20260770000100_nova_shop.sql`. The coin **SINK**: per-item pricing in COINS (abstract points, **no baht peg** вАФ decision b) + the redemption (spend) path. **`shop_items`** (id/name/description/`price_coins numeric(20,4) > 0`/active/sort_order/created+updated audit cols; a point price list, **NOT money** вЖТ RLS on + SELECT granted to authenticated [a future worker shop reads it], writes RPC-only). **`shop_redemptions`** (append-only spend trail: worker/item/`price_coins` snapshot/`posting_id` вЖТ the negative posting/redeemed_by/at; **zero write grant**, super-read, **self-auditing** like post_coins). **`coin_source` gains `shop_redemption`** (the first SINK source вАФ its own enum-add migration; a redemption is a negative posting). **`upsert_shop_item(p_name, p_price_coins, p_description default null, p_sort_order default 0, p_id default null) returns uuid`** SECURITY DEFINER super-only (create when p_id null, else update; name nonblank + price > 0; audits generic `update`). **`set_shop_item_active(p_id, p_active)`** super-only toggle. **`redeem_shop_item(p_worker, p_item) returns uuid`** SECURITY DEFINER **super-only** (operator-driven for now вАФ worker self-redeem later, gift-first); worker+item exist & item active вЖТ P0001; balance вЙ• price (P0001 'insufficient'); posts `post_coins(worker,'shop_redemption',-price,вА¶)` (existing path, negative) + records shop_redemptions (snapshot + posting_id). **U6b narrows "balance" вЖТ spendable (vested).**

**pgTAP 107** (22 asserts: catalog tables + 2 secdef + coin_source has shop_redemption + shop_items authenticated-SELECT; upsert create+update+read-back, gate pm¬Јvisitor 42501, zero price P0001; redeem buyer 500вЖТ400 + redemptions row + вИТ100 posting, gate pm 42501, insufficient 50<100 P0001, inactive item P0001, unknown worker/item P0001). **Also updated pgTAP 96** (coin-ledger): `enum_has_labels(coin_source,вА¶)` is EXACT-match вЖТ adding `shop_redemption` broke it вЖТ add the value to the expected array (the "enum-add breaks the pinning test" lesson, like audit_action). **Verify:** lint¬Јtypecheck¬Ј**db:test 107 files/2095вЖТgreen**¬Јdb:types¬Јtest 188/1268. **U6a spec detail authored first.** **NEXT = U6b** (saver bonus + vesting/confiscation; redeem REPLACE вЖТ spendable). LESSON: a new `coin_source` value needs its own migration (can't be used in the tx it's added) AND must be added to the EXACT-match enum_has_labels pin in pgTAP 96.

## Spec 161 U5 - coin distribution: distribute_project_coins (ADR 0060 ¬І4) (2026-06-21)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-21.** Migration `20260769000000_coin_distribution.sql`. Turns the U4b settlement **pool** into postings on the spec-160 coin ledger. ADR 0060 ¬І4: **HT takes a cut off the top** (`ht_cut_pct` dial); the **rest splits by LEVEL WEIGHT** among the DCs who worked the project (SeniorвЖТApprentice; **internal > external**; externals a **flat, level-blind** share). Formulaic from `labor_logs` (the ¬І5 anti-favoritism pillar вАФ no subjective input). **A DC's share FOLLOWS THEM across project moves** вАФ the weight reads `labor_logs` (where work was done), never `workers.project_id`. **`distribute_project_coins(p_project) returns table(ht_coins, dc_distributed, dc_count, total_distributed)`** SECURITY DEFINER ¬Ј **super_admin ONLY** (minting = peak operator authority вАФ the `post_coins`/`set_nova_dial` gate; deliberately NOT super+director like U4b settlement, because distribution REUSES `post_coins` which is super-only вАФ a definer-to-definer call resolves the original caller's role, so a director would hit 42501; null-safe `is distinct from`, **no PM ref вЖТ 90/91 untouched**) вЖТ 42501. Project exists вЖТ P0001; **must be settled** (a `project_settlements` row вЖТ else P0001 'not settled'); **idempotent** (a `project_coin_distributions` row вЖТ P0001 'already distributed'). HT cut = `pool √Ч ht_cut_pct` вЖТ `post_coins(ht,'profit_share',вА¶)`; distributable = pool вИТ cut; per-DC `weight = (external? external_factor : level_weight[level]) √Ч days` over CURRENT (non-superseded) DC labor on the project's WPs, **excluding the HT** (no double-dip); a **window `sum(weight) over ()`** over the `weight > 0` set gives ќ£weight (ungraded `level NULL` вЖТ weight 0 вЖТ filtered, never dilutes); each DC's `coins = round(distributable √Ч weight/ќ£weight, 4)` вЖТ `post_coins(dc,'profit_share',вА¶)` (source **already in the enum**, no enum-add). Records `project_coin_distributions` (project_id PK = idempotency key; coin_pool/ht_worker_id/ht_coins/dc_distributed/dc_count; **zero authenticated grant**); audits (generic `update`).

**Internal vs external** = the DC's tenure: a worker whose contractor is `contractor_subtype='dc_temporary'` is EXTERNAL; null/other contractor вЖТ INTERNAL (ADR 0060 ¬І1, the `dc_regular`/`dc_temporary` subtypes; no-contractor DC defaults internal, like `wp_economics.is_external`). **New seeded dials (decision a вАФ PLACEHOLDERS, operator must calibrate before go-live):** `ht_cut_pct 0.15`, `level_weight_senior 4 / mid 3 / junior 2 / apprentice 1`, `external_factor 1` (< every internal weight вЖТ internal > external). Externals' **invisible + lock** posture: U5 only POSTS; coins already super-only-read (externals can't see them, spec 160 U3) and the **spend lock** lands in U6b. **pgTAP 106** (19 asserts: catalog + secdef; money posture; gate super-only [director¬Јpm¬Јvisitor 42501]; not-settledвЖТP0001; pool 10000, ht_cut 0.2, weights senior 4/mid 2, external_factor 2 вЖТ HT 2000 (cut only, no double-dip), senior 4000, mid 2000 [share follows them вАФ now on another project], external 2000 [flat level-blind], ungraded 0; recorded ht_coins 2000¬Јdc_distributed 8000¬Јdc_count 3; total minted = pool 10000; idempotent re-distributeвЖТP0001; unknownвЖТP0001). **Verify:** lint¬Јtypecheck¬Ј**db:test 106 files/2073/0**¬Јdb:types¬Јtest 188/1268 вАФ all green. **U5 spec detail authored first.** **NEXT = U6a Nova shop** (shop_items + redeem + 'shop_redemption' coin_source) вЖТ U6b saver-bonus + vesting + confiscation. LESSON: reuse `post_coins` from a definer needs the SAME (super-only) gate, else 42501 cascade.

## Spec 161 U4b - project settlement engine: settle_project (ADR 0060 ¬І3 model-b) (2026-06-20)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-20.** Migration `20260768000000_settlement_engine.sql` (sequenced **above** the concurrent spec 146 U3 equipment block `20260767*`). ADR 0060 ¬І3 model-b: WPs bank profit as they complete; the **whole project settles ONCE at close** вЖТ `coin_pool = ќ£ banked WP profit √Ч coin_multiplier` (U4a dial). Produces the pool **number** + a **frozen snapshot**; distribution = U5. **DECISION вАФ bank-at-SETTLEMENT with a frozen snapshot (not a completion trigger):** a completion trigger fires under whoever flips the WP status (usually a site_admin on photo-approval) and would call the super/director-gated `wp_profit`/`wp_labor_sell` вЖТ **42501**, forcing an ungated refactor of shipped U3/U3b + failing the completion tx. Instead `settle_project` is an explicit super/director action **at close** that calls `wp_profit` **in its designed caller context** (gate passes) and FREEZES each completed WP's profit into `wp_profit_bank` вАФ so post-settlement corrections can't move settled coins (U5 reads the frozen bank, never live `wp_profit`). Trade-off accepted: a correction between WP-complete and project-close IS reflected (correct); defect-rework-before-close handled naturally (a WP in 'rework' isn't 'complete' вЖТ excluded). **`settle_project(p_project) returns table(coin_pool, banked_profit_total, coin_multiplier, wp_banked_count, wp_skipped_null_budget_count, equipment_costed)`** SECURITY DEFINER ¬Ј super+director null-safe `is distinct from` (no PM ref вЖТ **90/91 untouched**) вЖТ 42501; project exists вЖТ P0001; **closed-only** (`status in ('completed','archived')`) вЖТ P0001; **idempotent** (a `project_settlements` row exists вЖТ P0001 'already settled'). Loops WPs `status='complete'`, calls `wp_profit`; **budget-NULL (profit NULL) вЖТ SKIP + COUNT** (`wp_skipped_null_budget_count`, never silently 0); else **freezes** a `wp_profit_bank` row + sums; `coin_pool = total √Ч multiplier`; audits (generic `update`). **`project_settlements`** (project_id PK = idempotency key; coin_multiplier/banked_profit_total/coin_pool/counts/equipment_costed/settled_by) + **`wp_profit_bank`** (frozen 6 wp_profit components per WP, unique per WP) вАФ both **zero authenticated grant** (money). **Equipment gap CLOSED** by the concurrent spec 146 U3 (`wp_profit` now folds in `wp_equipment_sell`) вЖТ `equipment_costed` aggregates **true**; pool no longer provisional.

**pgTAP 104** (20 asserts: catalog project_settlements+PK / wp_profit_bank / settle_project secdef; money posture both tables; gate pm¬Јsa¬ЈvisitorвЖТ42501; closed project w/ WP-1 budget 5000+senior-full labor 800вЖТprofit 4200, WP-2 4000вЖТ4000, WP-3 complete-no-budgetвЖТSKIPPED, WP-4 in_progressвЖТignored, multiplier 2.0 вЖТ banked 8200¬Јpool 16400¬Јbanked_count 2¬Јskipped 1¬Јequipment_costed true¬Ј2 bank rows; director settles a 2nd closed project; idempotent re-settleвЖТP0001; active projectвЖТP0001; unknownвЖТP0001). **Verify:** lint¬Јtypecheck¬Ј**db:test 105 files/2054/0**¬Јdb:types¬Ј**test [vitest]** вАФ all green. **U4b spec detail authored first.** **CONCURRENCY EVENT:** the spec 146 U3 equipment session was building in the SAME tree + remote DB вАФ collided on migration version 20260766000000 + pgTAP 104, and its `wp_profit_with_equipment` REPLACE changed the foundation. Operator confirmed (AskUserQuestion) the equipment session finished вЖТ I renumbered above it (768), repaired the orphan remote `20260766000000` (`supabase migration repair --status reverted` вАФ my botched first-push left a phantom version whose create-table tx rolled back), and built ON the equipment-aware `wp_profit`. **First-RED bug:** seeded projects as 'completed' THEN inserted WPs вЖТ spec-145 trigger `P0002 cannot add a WP to a closed project`; fix = seed active, add WPs, then close. **NEXT = U5 distribution** (HT cut + level-weight split вЖТ coin_postings via post_coins). LESSON: `wp_profit%rowtype` fails (it's a fn, not a relation) вЖТ use `record`; a live concurrent session in one tree/DB = the [[concurrent-session-hazard]] (check list_sessions, renumber, migration-repair the orphan).

## Spec 146 U3 - equipment usage logs: check-out/check-in вЖТ per-WP charge вЖТ wp_profit (ADR 0055 + ADR 0060 ¬І2) (2026-06-20)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-20** (commits ba8a52d feat ¬Ј 115d6ab director-fix ¬Ј 6ed8af0 types; migrations 20260767000000вАУ000400). Closes the spec 161 U3b equipment gap (`equipment_cost=0`/`equipment_costed=false`): attribute equipment to a WP via a **check-out/check-in usage log**, derive a **per-WP equipment charge live**, wire into `wp_profit`. **Verify:** lint¬Јtypecheck¬Јtest **188/1268**¬Јdb:push (5 migrations)¬Јdb:types (app+worker)¬Ј**db:test 105 files (104 passed; my 105=41/41, 102/90/91/86 all green)** вАФ the **1 failure is `104-settlement-engine.test.sql`, the CONCURRENT session's in-progress file, NOT mine** (its closed-project seed bug; not in any of my commits). **Operator picks (this session, via AskUserQuestion):** (1) granularity = **check-out вЖТ check-in SPAN** (one row/checkout, billed whole days on site √Ч daily rate), NOT row-per-day; (2) the WP is charged the **CHARGE-OUT daily rate computed LIVE** (transfer price, symmetric with DC labor @ SELL; PRC keeps the margin over the batch cost вАФ Case A + ADR 0060 ¬І2), NOT a GL-allocated batch-cost share. **This REVISES the roadmap-table U3/U4 sketch** (was per-day log + frozen `wp_equipment_costs`): the live `wp_profit` reuses live reads (`wp_labor_sell`), never the frozen snapshot, so the frozen `wp_equipment_costs`/`freeze_wp_equipment_cost` (old U4) is deferred to budget-vs-spend + a WP-dimensioned equipment GL posting (later seam). **No new GL account this unit** вАФ the charge-out is a number the GL doesn't hold (GL holds batch COST at batch grain), so computing it live from the usage logs is the transfer-price layer, NOT a second costing path (exactly like `wp_labor_sell` vs the GL's labor COST).

**Builds:** `equipment_usage_logs` (append-only, supersede; `item_id`/`work_package_id` WP-grain/`checked_out_on`/`checked_in_on` null=open/`daily_rate_snapshot` MONEY zero-grant/`superseded_by`/`correction_reason` nullable вАФ NO `reason-iff-superseded` CHECK since check-in is the first supersede; CHECK inвЙ•out; column-scoped SELECT omitting the rate, like `labor_logs`; append-only block trigger) ¬Ј `check_out_equipment(item,wp,date)` (gate site_admin/pm/procurement/super; per-item advisory lock; item must be priced + WP not complete + no existing open checkout for the item вЖТ P0001) ¬Ј `check_in_equipment(log,date)` (closes the open row via a superseding closed successor; in<out вЖТ P0001; re-check-in of closed/superseded вЖТ P0001) ¬Ј `wp_equipment_sell(p_wp)` (mirror `wp_labor_sell`: super+director gate null-safe, ќ£ over CURRENT rows of `greatest((coalesce(checked_in_on,current_date)вИТchecked_out_on)+1,0) √Ч daily_rate_snapshot` вАФ whole days inclusive, open accrues to today, no internal/external branch) ¬Ј `wp_profit` REPLACE (same signature; `equipment_cost = wp_equipment_sell`, `equipment_costed = true`). pgTAP **file 105** (104 taken by a concurrent Spec 161 U4b settlement-engine session вАФ renumbered; my migrations likewise 20260766вЖТ20260767 around their pushed settlement_engine) + update `102-wp-profit` (`equipment_costed` falseвЖТtrue). Spec 146 U3 detail authored first.

**ADR 0058 fix (migration 20260767000400):** the check_out/check_in RPC gates + the `equipment_usage_logs` read policy initially named `project_manager` WITHOUT `project_director` вЖТ **pgTAP 90 + 91 (the see-all-PM completeness invariants) caught it** on the first GREEN db:test. Forward-fix migration adds `project_director` to both gates + the policy (DROP+CREATE вАФ no CREATE OR REPLACE POLICY). Lesson re-confirmed: **any new gate/policy naming project_manager must also name project_director** ([[spec152-project-director-role]]). **Concurrent-session reconciliation:** the half-applied push (table created but unrecorded after the 20260766 collision) was repaired via `supabase migration repair --status applied 20260767000000` then push-the-rest вАФ NOT a re-create (verified table+fn+trigger+policy+grants all present first via `supabase db query`).

## Spec 161 U4a - settlement multiplier dial: nova_dials (ADR 0060 ¬І3 + decision a) (2026-06-20)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-20.** Migration `20260765000000_settlement_multiplier_dial.sql`. Third unit this session (operator chose "build w/ seeded default" via AskUserQuestion). ADR 0060 ¬І3: coin pool = ќ£ banked WP profits √Ч the **project multiplier** ("the most important undefined lever"). Per **build-decision (a)** (every dial = editable seeded data, tune anytime) the multiplier ships as a **seeded editable dial**, not a constant вАФ the settlement engine (U4b) reads it. **`nova_dials`** = the one **key/value home for every economic dial** (the literal ADR-decision-a shape; HT cut % + level weights [U5] + saver-bonus rate [U6] land here as seeded rows in their units): `dial_key text PK`, `value numeric(20,4) вЙ•0`, updated_by/at. **MONEY/economics posture: zero authenticated grant** (operator reads via admin client behind requireRole; U4b engine reads via definer; setter is sole writer). **Seeded `('coin_multiplier', 1.0)`** вАФ placeholder (1 baht banked profit вЖТ 1 coin point; coins=abstract points no peg, decision b); **operator MUST calibrate vs utilization before go-live** (standing markup-% open dial вАФ flagged, not blocking: mechanism ships, number tuned). **`set_nova_dial(p_key,p_value)`** SECURITY DEFINER **super_admin-only** (operator economics, anti-favoritism ¬І5, like sell-rate dials; null-safe `is distinct from`; **no PM ref вЖТ 90/91 untouched**) вЖТ 42501; valueвЙ•0 (P0001); **update-only on a SEEDED key** (typo'd key вЖТ P0001, no phantom dials); audits (generic `update` action, target nova_dials, payload key+old+new вАФ no enum-add). **U4a = the dial ONLY**; the settlement math (ќ£ wp_profit √Ч multiplier вЖТ pool) + banking-at-completion = **U4b**, mirrors U1-dials-before-U3-read.

**pgTAP 103** (13 asserts: catalog table+dial_key PK+value col+set_nova_dial secdef; seed coin_multiplier=1.0; money posture authenticated-no-SELECT; super tunes to 1.5 + reads back + audited once; negativeвЖТP0001; unknown keyвЖТP0001; pm¬ЈvisitorвЖТ42501). Verify: lint¬Јtypecheck¬Јtest **188/1268**¬Јdb:push¬Ј**db:test 103 files/1993/0** (was 1980 вЖТ +13)¬Јdb:types (nova_dials + set_nova_dial added) вАФ all green. **U4a spec detail authored first.** **NEXT = U4b settlement engine** (ќ£ wp_profit over project WPs √Ч coin_multiplier вЖТ coin pool; banking profit at WP completion; null-budget WP handling) вЖТ U5 distribution (HT cut + level weights вЖТ `coin_postings`) вЖТ U6 shop. **U4b/go-live STILL wants operator UTILIZATION DATA** to calibrate coin_multiplier (seeded 1.0 is a placeholder). LESSON: pnpm must run from the INNER nested repo (`prc-ops/prc-ops`) вАФ bash cwd reset to outer mid-session, ERR_PNPM_NO_IMPORTER_MANIFEST_FOUND; cd inner or `pnpm -C prc-ops`.

## Spec 161 U3b - WP profit assembly: wp_profit, materials from GL (ADR 0060 ¬І2 + ADR 0057) (2026-06-20)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-20.** Migration `20260764000000_wp_profit.sql`. Assembles the ¬І2 read `profit = budget вИТ labor_sell вИТ materials вИТ equipment`, **exposing every term** (returns table). **`wp_profit(p_wp uuid) returns table(budget, labor_sell, materials_cost, equipment_cost, equipment_costed, profit)`** SECURITY DEFINER¬Јstable¬Јpinned search_path. **budget** = wp_economics.budget (NULL until PD sets вЖТ profit NULL). **labor_sell** = `wp_labor_sell(p_wp)` REUSED (definer-to-definer: caller's role resolves so its identical super/director gate passes вАФ no re-impl). **materials_cost DERIVED FROM THE GL** (ADR 0057, NOT a re-sum of purchase_requests): `ќ£(debitвИТcredit)` on `journal_lines` for the WP on WIP account **1400**, restricted to PURCHASE-sourced entries via `coalesce(orig.source_table, e.source_table)='purchase_requests'` (`left join journal_entries orig on orig.id=e.reversal_of`) вАФ **reversal-safe** (a reversal carries source_table 'journal_reversal' but copies work_package_id + swaps debit/credit, so an auto-corrected purchase nets via reversal_ofвЖТoriginal's source; verified `post_purchase_to_gl` reverse-and-reposts). **Labor also debits 1400 but EXCLUDED** (source wp_labor_costs); VAT (1300) + equipment (no WP dim) naturally excluded. **profit = budgetвИТlabor_sellвИТmaterialsвИТequipment, NULL if budget NULL.** Gate **super_admin+project_director** (no PM ref вЖТ 90/91 untouched), null-safe `is distinct from` (NULL-role denied) вЖТ 42501; unknown WP вЖТ P0001; execute revoke-public/grant-authenticated; read вЖТ no audit/enum.

**EQUIPMENT GAP (operator-confirmed via AskUserQuestion 2026-06-20 вАФ chose "build profit w/o equipment, flag it"):** investigation (Explore agent + verified by hand) found `post_rental_batch_to_gl` ([20260743000100:176-178]) posts a rental batch to WIP 1400 at **batch grain with NO work_package_id (nor project_id)** вАФ equipment cost is **not WP-dimensioned in the GL**, can't be derived per-WP today. Splitting a batch across a project's WPs needs a **business allocation rule** = a follow-up spec touching the equipment poster / ADR 0055 (operator decision). U3b does NOT improvise it (scope rule + "discovering a missing requirement mid-unit isn't license to expand"): **equipment_cost=0 + equipment_costed=false** so the omission is LOUD, never folded silently. U4 minting is blocked anyway вЖТ no payout rides on the partial figure. Profit is OVERSTATED by missing equipment until that follow-up.

**pgTAP 102** (18 asserts: catalog has_function+secdef; gate super+director read / pm¬Јsa¬Јvisitor 42501; WP-A all 6 components [budget 5000¬Јlabor_sell 800¬Јmaterials 1000 (labor 1400 entry EXCLUDED)¬Јequipment 0¬Јequipment_costed false¬Јprofit 3200]; WP-B reversal-safe materials [2000вИТ2000+1500=1500, profit 2500]; WP-C budget-null вЖТ budget NULL + profit NULL; unknown WP P0001). Journal rows seeded directly (accounting_period 2099-12 + journal_entries/lines, gl_accounts by code) to isolate from the poster machinery. Verify: lint¬Јtypecheck¬Јtest **188/1268**¬Јdb:push¬Ј**db:test 102 files/1980/0** (was 1962 вЖТ +18)¬Јdb:types (`wp_profit` added) вАФ all green. **U3b spec detail authored first.** **NEXT = equipment-per-WP follow-up spec** (allocation rule, gated on operator basis) + **U4 settlement √Ч project multiplier** (gated on utilization data for markup-%/multiplier). LESSONS: reversal entries carry source_table='journal_reversal' (not the original's) but COPY work_package_id + swap debit/credit вЖТ net via reversal_ofвЖТorig.source_table; labor + materials BOTH hit WIP 1400 вЖТ must isolate by source, not account alone.

## Spec 161 U3 - WP labor priced at SELL: wp_labor_sell (ADR 0060 ¬І2) (2026-06-20)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-20.** Migration `20260763000000_wp_labor_sell.sql`. The **novel core** of the ¬І2 profit engine вАФ `WP profit = budget вИТ (equipment + DC labor @ SELL + materials)` вАФ built as **only** the SELL-priced DC-labor term (the one number no existing fn produces; `freeze_wp_labor_cost` sums the same logs at COST). **`wp_labor_sell(p_wp uuid) returns numeric`** SECURITY DEFINER ¬Ј `stable` ¬Ј pinned search_path. Sums over **CURRENT** labor_logs (anti-join + tombstone filter, ADR 0009 вАФ mirrors the cost engine) where `worker_type_snapshot='dc'` (own labor = payroll overhead, NOT transfer-priced вЖТ excluded, as it's absent from the ¬І2 formula), valued at the worker's per-level sell rate: `(fullвЖТ1, halfвЖТ0.5) √Ч (internal_sell unless wp_economics.is_external вЖТ external_sell)`; `coalesce(вА¶,0)`. **is_external** = `coalesce((select is_external from wp_economics where wp=p_wp), false)` (no row = internal, U2 posture). **Ungraded DC вЖТ 0** вАФ the inner join to `sell_rate_table` drops a NULL-level worker, so an ungraded DC can never silently inflate profit; **decision: contribute 0, no side-effect flag** (pure read; surfacing the ungraded-DC-day count = U3b's profit struct). **Level = live grade** (labor_logs has no level snapshot; level-at-time = later refinement, noted). **Gate super_admin + project_director only** (no project_manager ref вЖТ ADR 0058 pgTAP 90/91 untouched); **null-safe `is distinct from` form** denies NULL-role/service-role (rls-self-check-coalesce trap) вЖТ 42501; unknown WP вЖТ P0001 (typo errors, never a misleading 0). Reads zero-grant money tables (definer bypasses RLS); **invoked under the caller's authed session** (real super/director JWT so current_user_role() resolves), never the admin client вАФ like freeze. Execute lockdown: `revoke all from public; grant execute to authenticated`. Pure read вЖТ **no audit, no enum-add**. **pgTAP 101** (12 asserts: has_function+secdef; gate super+director pass / pm¬Јsite_admin¬Јvisitor 42501; internal WP senior-full 800 + mid-half 350 = **1150**; same crew external = **1375** and `>` internal; edge WP = **290** [only junior current-half counts: ungradedвЖТ0, own-with-level excluded, superseded-old excluded, tombstone excluded]; unknown WP P0001). Verify: lint¬Јtypecheck¬Јtest **188/1268**¬Јdb:push¬Ј**db:test 101 files/1962/0** (was 1950 вЖТ +12)¬Јdb:types (`wp_labor_sell` added) вАФ all green. **Spec U3 detail authored first** (like U1/U2/U2b). **NEXT = U3b** full profit assembly (subtract equipment [spec 141/146] + materials [purchasing] from `wp_economics.budget`, **reconcile to GL** ADR 0057 вАФ derive from, not a second costing path) вЖТ U4 settlement √Ч project multiplier вЖТ U5 coin distribution вЖТ U6 shop. **Open dial (flag, not blocking):** markup % still wants real **utilization data** for a solvent default вАФ rates are editable/seeded, so the mechanism is built; operator should sanity-check sell rates vs actual billable-vs-idle DC-days before go-live.

## Spec 162 U1 - Nova operator surface (2026-06-20)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-20.** Operator: "can we start showing something on nova?" вЖТ the **first visible Nova surface**. Everything before was backend (ledger 160 U2, dials 161) вАФ invisible. **`/nova` operator console** (`requireRole(["super_admin"])` вАФ coins are super_admin-read + externals-invisible ADR 0060 ¬І4 + gift-first ADR 0061, so worker-facing Nova waits). **No DB change** (reuses `coin_postings`/`coin_balance`/`post_coins`). Reads via RLS server client (super_admin sees all postings): active workers + coin_postings (newest first) вЖТ derives per-worker **balances** (group+sum, never stored) + the recent **ledger**. **`NovaAwardForm`** (client): worker + source picker (`coin_source`, default behavior_bonus) + amount + reason вЖТ **`awardCoins`** server action (super_admin re-check вЖТ `post_coins` RPC, maps errors Thai, revalidates). Coins shown as "аєАаЄЂаЄ£аЄµаЄҐаЄН" (points, no baht peg). `COIN_SOURCE_LABEL` SSOT in `src/lib/nova/coin-source.ts` (form + ledger). **Settings hub:** the HELD "Nova" coming-soon row вЖТ real `/nova` link for super_admin (home = аЄЪаЄ±аЄНаЄКаЄµ section); other roles keep coming-soon. **/nova uses DetailHeader** (back chip вЖТ /settings; classified as STATIC_DETAIL drill-down). **Anti-favoritism note (ADR 0060 ¬І5):** a manual award is discretionary = the operator's INTERIM recognition tool; the automatic earn-rules (161 U5 settlement, U6 saver bonus) are the pillar-clean path. **TDD:** `nova-award-form.test.tsx` (3: submit-gate worker+amount>0+reason; awards right args + resets + router.refresh; error inline). **Updated 2 structural guards** for the new route/folder: `feature-components-structure` (+nova domain), `nav-back-affordance` (+nova STATIC_DETAIL). Verify: lint¬Јtypecheck¬Ј**test 188 files/1268** вАФ all green (no DB). **Verified-by-checklist** (page auth-gated super_admin+LINE вЖТ preview /login on cloud PC; form test carries the contract; operator on-device = acceptance вАФ the operator can now award a coin + watch the balance/ledger populate). **Scope OUT:** worker-facing Nova (gift-first/Internal-invite later); automatic earn-rules (161 U5/U6); leaderboards (toxic вАФ ADR 0060 private/rate-based). **First Nova pixels are live.**

## Spec 161 U2b - HT (Head Technician) assignment (ADR 0060) (2026-06-20)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-20.** Migration `20260762000000_project_ht.sql`. ADR 0060 ¬І1: the **HT is a promoted DC, one per site, exclusive WP owner; the PM assigns**. `projects.ht_worker_id uuid null references workers(id)` вАФ the single column **IS** the one-per-project rule. **Not money** (role designation) вЖТ added to the projects **per-column** SELECT grant (maintenance rule from 20260626000200 вАФ projects grant is per-column, not table-wide; a new non-money column must be granted or the app can't read it). **`assign_project_ht(p_project,p_worker)`** SECURITY DEFINER: gate **pm+director+super** (PM assigns ¬І1; references project_manager вЖТ director included per ADR 0058) вЖТ 42501; project exists (P0001); worker must be an **active DC** (`worker_type='dc'` AND `active` вАФ "a promoted DC") вЖТ P0001; sets ht_worker_id (overwriting вАФ last-wins); audits (generic `update` action, target projects, target_id project). Role-only (not membership-scoped) for v1, like U2. **pgTAP 100** (14 asserts: catalog col+type+FK; secdef; pm assigns active-DC / director overwrites last-wins; site_admin+visitor 42501; own-worker / inactive-DC / unknown-project / unknown-worker P0001; current HT = last assigned; 2 assigns audited). Verify: lint¬Јtypecheck¬Јtest **188/1268**¬Јdb:push¬Ј**db:test 100 files/1950/0**¬Јdb:types вАФ all green. **LESSON (re-confirmed): pgTAP UUIDs are HEX-ONLY** вАФ first run errored 22P02 on `owвА¶owowowow` (o/w not hex); fixed to `0aвА¶0a0a0a0a`. **WP-profit-center SETUP now complete: budget (U2) + internal/external (U2) + HT (U2b).** **NEXT = U3 WP profit engine** (reads sell_rate_table + wp_economics.budget + labor@sell + equipment вЖТ profit) вАФ **BLOCKED on operator UTILIZATION DATA for markup % calibration** (ADR 0060 open dial).

## Spec 161 U2 - WP economic identity: budget + internal/external (ADR 0060) (2026-06-20)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-20.** Second economics unit. Migration `20260761000000_wp_economics.sql`. The WP's profit-engine inputs, isolated so **budget keeps the MONEY posture** (the profit denominator, hidden from non-HT DCs) instead of leaking through a `work_packages` column grant вАФ mirrors `wp_labor_costs`. **`wp_economics`** (one row per WP, upserted): `work_package_id` PK+FK (on delete cascade), `budget numeric(20,4)` null (вЙ•0 when set), `is_external boolean not null default false`, updated_by/at. **Zero authenticated grant** (RLS on, revoke all вАФ pm/director/super read via admin client; SECURITY DEFINER setters are the only writers). **`set_wp_budget(wp,budget)`** = **project_director + super only** (the PD sets budget, ADR 0060 ¬І1; anti-favoritism root = benchmark-to-scope) вЖТ **no project_manager ref, so pgTAP 90/91 not triggered**; validates WP-exists + budgetвЙ•0 (P0001); upserts budget preserving is_external; audits. **`set_wp_external(wp,bool)`** = **pm + director + super** (PM classifies; **references project_manager вЖТ director included** per ADR 0058); upserts is_external preserving budget; audits. Both audit via generic `update` action (target wp_economics, target_id=wp), no enum-add. Gates **role-only** (not membership-scoped) for v1 вАФ budget gate is see-all anyway; PM-membership on set_wp_external = later refinement. Nothing computes profit from these yet (U3). **pgTAP 99** (19 asserts: catalog table+PK+FK+cols; money posture no-auth-SELECT; set_wp_budget director+super set / pm+visitor 42501 / unknown-WP+negative P0001; set_wp_external pm sets / site_admin+visitor 42501 / unknown P0001; **upsert preserves the other column** вАФ budget=120000 + is_external=true coexist; 3 sets audited). Verify: lint¬Јtypecheck¬Јtest **187/1264**¬Јdb:push¬Ј**db:test 99 files/1936/0**¬Јdb:types вАФ all green. **NEXT = U2b** (HT assignment: `projects.ht_worker_id`, one per project, PM-assigned) then **U3 WP profit engine** (reads sell_rate_table + wp_economics + labor + equipment вЖТ profit; **needs operator UTILIZATION DATA for markup % calibration** вАФ ADR 0060 open dial). **Lesson: money column on an existing table with a table-wide grant would leak вАФ isolate WP money in a separate zero-grant table (wp_labor_costs pattern).**

## Spec 161 U1 - profit-sharing economics: per-level rate foundation (ADR 0060) (2026-06-20)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-20.** **ADR 0060 ACCEPTED this session** (was design-only) вАФ operator approved the build with 3 anchors: **(a) editable dials seeded with defaults** (tune live, not hardcoded вАФ satisfies "tune before build"); **(b) coin value = abstract points, per-item shop pricing, NO baht peg** (coins accrue as raw points; WP P&L + sell rates are baht, the separate reward layer settles from banked baht profit); **(c) narrow confiscation, vested coins are the worker's to keep** (resolves ADR 0060 ¬І6 saver-bonus collision toward trust; ADR 0061 invariant). Spec 161 = the economics arc (U1 rate dials ¬Ј U2 WP profit center+budget+is_external+HT ¬Ј U3 WP profit engine ¬Ј U4 project settlement√Чmultiplier ¬Ј U5 coin distributionвЖТ`coin_postings` ¬Ј U6 Nova shop+saver bonus+vesting). **U1 (THIS):** migration `20260760000000_sell_rate_foundation.sql`. `worker_level` **enum** (senior/mid/junior/apprentice; ADR 0060 ¬І1); `workers.level` nullable col (category not money вЖТ `grant select(level)` authenticated); **`sell_rate_table`** (level PK, baht `cost_band`/`internal_sell`/`external_sell` numeric(20,4), updated_by/at, nonneg check) вАФ **MONEY posture: zero authenticated grant** (day_rate posture вАФ operator reads via admin client behind requireRole super_admin), **SEEDED** 4 rows (senior 650/800/950 ¬Ј mid 550/700/850 ¬Ј junior 450/580/720 ¬Ј apprentice 380/480/600 вАФ illustrative, operator retunes). **`set_worker_level(worker,level)`** SECURITY DEFINER super_admin (grading=operator economics, anti-favoritism ¬І5; `is distinct from` null-safe gate; reuses `worker_change` audit kind=level_change). **`set_sell_rate(level,cost,internal,external)`** SECURITY DEFINER super_admin, nonneg (P0001), updates row + audits (action `update`, target sell_rate_table, payload old/new вАФ generic action, no enum-add). **No `project_manager` ref вЖТ pgTAP 90/91 not triggered.** Nothing READS the rates yet (U3). **pgTAP 98** (19 asserts: enum labels; workers.level col+type; table+PK; seed count=4 + senior value; money posture no-authenticated-SELECT; set_worker_level sets+audits+gate super/pm/visitor/unknown-worker; set_sell_rate updates+audits+gate+negative). Verify: lint¬Јtypecheck¬Јtest **187/1264**¬Јdb:push¬Ј**db:test 98 files/1917/0**¬Јdb:types вАФ all green. **Lessons applied:** super_admin-only gate avoids the 90/91 invariant; `is distinct from` null-safe (rls-self-check-coalesce); zero-grant money table read-as-owner in pgTAP (can't SELECT as authenticated). **NEXT = U2** (WP budget + is_external + HT assignment). Markup % calibration still needs operator utilization data (ADR 0060 open dial).

## Spec 160 - worker-ecosystem foundation Stage 0 (ADR 0061) (2026-06-20)

Status: **U1 + U2 + U3 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-20. STAGE 0 COMPLETE** (person + ledger + portal-home; economics deferred). Under ADR 0061 вАФ the foundation spine before any economics; also the long-promised `DC вЖТ Project` correction (closes the original "site admins can't find the DCs" thread; DC belongs to a project, not a crew, per [[prc-ops-pay-model]]). Units: **U1 DC-as-person + project assignment** (add `workers.project_id` nullable FK + append-only `worker_project_moves` stream mirroring equipment_movements + `assign_worker_to_project` RPC pm/super + **drop the `workers_dc_has_contractor` force-tie** so a DC needs no contractor; additive/reversible; pgTAP 95) ¬Ј U2 event-sourced coin-ledger skeleton (append-only `coin_postings`, derived balance, pluggable sources вАФ no economics) ¬Ј U3 portal as the worker's home (extend ADR 0051). **Build order (ADR 0061 decided): Stage 0 first; coin dials + economy deferred.**

**U1 detail (SHIPPED 2026-06-20):** migrations `20260756000000_worker_project_assignment.sql` (+ fix-forward `20260757000000_worker_assignment_director_gate.sql`). Adds `workers.project_id uuid null references projects(id)` (current assignment; granted to authenticated like the other non-rate columns; NO backfill вАФ data-only follow-up); **DROPS** CHECK `workers_dc_has_contractor` (a DC may now have a null contractor; `contractor_id` column + `workers_own_has_no_contractor` kept); append-only `worker_project_moves` (`worker_id`/`project_id` nullable=unassigned/`moved_at`/`moved_by`/`reason`, RLS on, **zero write grant вАФ RPC-only**, no update/delete, definer-owner insert bypasses); `assign_worker_to_project(p_worker,p_project,p_reason)` SECURITY DEFINER pinned search_path, gate **pm/super/director** вЖТ else 42501, sets `project_id` + appends a move row + an `audit_log` row (reuses `worker_change` action, `payload.kind='project_move'`) in one tx; worker-not-found вЖТ P0001. **No economics** (spine only). **pgTAP 95** (25 asserts: catalog col+FK; moves table append-only no UPDATE/DELETE/INSERT priv; CHECK dropped+kept; relaxed-CHECK lives_ok; RPC secdef; pm sets+appends+audits; sa/visitor 42501; super second-move historyвЖТ2). Verify: lint¬Јtypecheck¬Јtest **187 files/1258**¬Јdb:push¬Ј**db:test 95 files/1860/0**¬Јdb:types вАФ all green. **LESSONS:** (1) **project_director rides along** вАФ ADR 0058 global invariants (pgTAP 90 "no PM-gated RPC without project_director" + 91 "no RLS policy names project_manager without project_director") broke because the spec's "pm/super" shorthand omitted director; every new PM gate/policy MUST add `project_director` вАФ caught by db:test, fixed forward (20260757). (2) **Relaxing a CHECK breaks the test that pinned it** вАФ pgTAP 29 asserted `throws_ok(dc-without-contractor, 23514)`; rewired to a catalog assertion that the CHECK is now dropped (no row added вЖТ preserves the later `count(workers)=4`). (3) timestamp pick: latest applied migration was `20260755000000` (specs 155-157), not the `20260752000000` an audit-action grep surfaced вАФ `migration list` before choosing.

**U2 detail (SHIPPED 2026-06-20):** migration `20260758000000_create_coin_ledger.sql`. Realizes ADR 0061 invariants 2+3 вАФ the event-sourced coin-ledger spine, **NO economics** (sources named not valued; no value/earn-rules/settlement/shop/vesting/dials). `coin_source` **enum** (`profit_share`/`savers_bonus`/`behavior_bonus`; pluggable via future `add value`); append-only **`coin_postings`** (`worker_id` FK / `source` / `amount numeric(20,4)` **signed** вАФ clawback = negative posting, not an edit / `reason` nonblankвЙ§500 / `occurred_at` / `created_by` / `created_at`; checks amountвЙ†0 + reason; index worker+occurred_at). **Money/authority posture:** RLS on, `revoke all`, **zero write grant (RPC-only)**, SELECT policy **super_admin-only** (worker-sees-own waits for U3 portal); **self-auditing** like equipment_movements вЖТ no audit_log row, no audit_action. **`coin_balance(worker) numeric`** = `coalesce(sum(amount),0)` вАФ **SECURITY INVOKER** so it respects the read policy (non-operator sees 0, no leak); **balance always derived, never stored**. **`post_coins(worker,source,amount,reason,occurred_at)`** SECURITY DEFINER pinned search_path, gate **`current_user_role() is distinct from 'super_admin'`** (null-safe вАФ the rls-self-check-coalesce trap; a single `<>` would open on NULL) вЖТ 42501; validates worker-exists/amountвЙ†0/reason (P0001); inserts with `created_by=auth.uid()`. **No `project_manager` in any gate/policy вЖТ ADR 0058 invariants (pgTAP 90/91) not triggered** (lesson applied from U1 вАФ super_admin-only is intentional). **pgTAP 96** (28 asserts: catalog table+cols+FK+enum labels; append-only no U/D/INSERT priv; secdef + coin_balance exists; super postsвЖТbalance 100вЖТ150; negative clawback netsвЖТ120; ledger grew to 3; zero-amount/blank-reason/unknown-worker P0001; pm/sa/visitor 42501; super reads / non-operator reads 0 via RLS). Verify: lint¬Јtypecheck¬Јtest **187/1264**¬Јdb:push¬Ј**db:test 96 files/1888/0**¬Јdb:types вАФ all green.

**U3 detail (SHIPPED 2026-06-20):** migration `20260759000000_crew_assignments_portal.sql` (read-only RPC, no table/grant change). Realizes ADR 0061 invariant 5/6 (portal = worker's home) as the **first Stage-0 step**: the external DC portal (`/portal`, ADR 0051) crew list now shows **each member's current project** (U1 `workers.project_id`) вАФ record, not coin. **`get_my_crew_assignments()`** SECURITY DEFINER, returns `(worker_id,name,active,project_id,project_code,project_name)` for the caller's OWN crew (`workers.contractor_id = current_user_contractor_id()`, ADR 0051 binding), left-joined to `projects` вАФ the definer join lets an external contractor read **only their assigned projects' names** past the staff-scoped projects RLS; unbound/staff caller (NULL binding) вЖТ zero rows; `revoke public/anon, grant execute authenticated` (get_my_dc_payments posture). **`loadPortalData` swaps the crew RLS query for the RPC** (fan size + concurrency unchanged); portal renders project under each crew name or "аЄҐаЄ±аЄЗаєДаЄ°аєИаєДаЄФаєЙаЄБаЄ≥аЄЂаЄЩаЄФаєВаЄДаЄ£аЄЗаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£" (graceful pre-backfill, like the picker). **COINS DELIBERATELY EXCLUDED from the portal** вАФ ADR 0060 ¬І4 makes external DCs' coins **invisible** (unlock only on Internal invite) + ADR 0061 **gift-first** (first experience = record, not the opaque coin); `coin_postings` stays super_admin-only. **pgTAP 97** (10 asserts: secdef; contractor A sees only own crew + project code/name resolved; never B's crew; B sees own + null project when unassigned; unbound/staff вЖТ 0 rows). **vitest** load-portal-data (crew fan member = RPC, assignment shape). Verify: lint¬Јtypecheck¬Јtest **187/1264**¬Јdb:push¬Ј**db:test 97 files/1898/0**¬Јdb:types вАФ all green. **Verified-by-checklist** (portal auth-gated вЖТ preview /login on cloud PC; pgTAP carries RPC security; operator on-device = acceptance).

**STAGE 0 COMPLETE (U1+U2+U3).** **Open / next (own units):** **backfill existing DCs' `project_id`** (data-only вАФ BLOCKED on operator's DCвЖТproject mapping; lights up both the spec 158 U2 picker's in-project section AND the U3 portal crew-project line). **Worker-sees-own-coins** on the portal вАФ deferred to the Internal-invite / policy-evolution step (ADR 0060 ¬І4 + invariant 6); not built. **Economics** (coin value/earn-rules/settlement/shop/vesting, ADR 0060 dials) вАФ the next major arc, all deferred per ADR 0061 build order until the dials are tuned with the operator. Spec 158 U3 (SA-adds-DC-on-spot; operator sign-off first).

## Spec 159 U1 - subcontractor vs DC terminology consistency (2026-06-20)

Status: COMPLETE (pending full-suite green + commit). Operator: "DC setting is confusing вАФ аЄЬаЄєаєЙаЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄЂаЄ°аЄ≤/DC, аЄЧаЄµаЄ°аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ." Root cause: **"аЄЬаЄєаєЙаЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄЂаЄ°аЄ≤" overloaded 3 ways** вАФ (1) general WP contractor [LEAVE, operator], (2) subcontractor `category=contractor` [firm pays its own crew], (3) DC `category=dc` [PRC pays directly] mislabeled аЄЬаЄєаєЙаЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄЂаЄ°аЄ≤ on several surfaces. **Taxonomy already exists** (`contractor_category` + `contractor_subtype` enums; Contacts tabs render DC аЄЪаЄ£аЄіаЄ©аЄ±аЄЧ/аЄЫаЄ£аЄ∞аЄИаЄ≥/аЄКаЄ±аєИаЄІаЄДаЄ£аЄ≤аЄІ) вАФ NO schema change. **U1:** SSOT `SUBCONTRACTOR_LABEL = "аЄЬаЄєаєЙаЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄЂаЄ°аЄ≤аЄКаєИаЄІаЄЗ"` in labels.ts; rewired the 4 subcontractor surfaces to it (contacts-tabs TAB*LABEL.contractors + CONTRACTOR_FIELDS name + addLabel; contacts/crews title+h1; contacts/[type]/[id] TYPE_CONFIG label; settings crews door label+hint вАФ kills the `аЄЬаЄєаєЙаЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄЂаЄ°аЄ≤/DC` slash-merge вЖТ `аЄЬаЄєаєЙаЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄЂаЄ°аЄ≤аЄКаєИаЄІаЄЗ / DC`). DC tab/subtypes untouched (already consistent). **CAUGHT: "аЄЬаЄєаєЙаЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄЂаЄ°аЄ≤" is a SUBSTRING of "аЄЬаЄєаєЙаЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄЂаЄ°аЄ≤аЄКаєИаЄІаЄЗ"** вЖТ consistency guards assert presence-of-аЄКаєИаЄІаЄЗ / absence-of-exact-merged-string, never absence-of-аЄЬаЄєаєЙаЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄЂаЄ°аЄ≤. **TDD:** source-guard `contact-subcontractor-label.test.ts` (SSOT value; 4 surfaces reference the constant; settings no longer has `аЄЬаЄєаєЙаЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄЂаЄ°аЄ≤/DC`). First test wrongly asserted the literal вАФ but SSOT means surfaces hold the \_constant name*, so the guard checks constant usage (the stronger anti-drift check).

**Open questions (OUT вАФ own units):** **U2 DC-side de-аЄЬаЄєаєЙаЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄЂаЄ°аЄ≤** вАФ labor-cost-view (`dc: "аЄЬаЄєаєЙаЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄЂаЄ°аЄ≤"`, `аЄЬаЄєаєЙаЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄЂаЄ°аЄ≤ (DC)`), /payroll ("аЄДаєИаЄ≤аєБаЄ£аЄЗаЄЬаЄєаєЙаЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄЂаЄ°аЄ≤"), the DC-worker **parent picker** (worker-roster-manager + workers/actions + group-workers UNKNOWN label), the DC **portal** ("аЄЮаЄ≠аЄ£аєМаЄЧаЄ±аЄ•аЄЬаЄєаєЙаЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄЂаЄ°аЄ≤"), the role label `contractor: "аЄЬаЄєаєЙаЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄЂаЄ°аЄ≤ (DC)"` all still call a DC "аЄЬаЄєаєЙаЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄЂаЄ°аЄ≤"; needs the operator's chosen DC-crew word (e.g. аЄЧаЄµаЄ° DC / аЄ™аЄ±аЄЗаЄБаЄ±аЄФ DC) first.
