The front door is now visible: PM/super get a **+ аєАаЄЮаЄіаєИаЄ°аєВаЄДаЄ£аЄЗаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£** button on the project hub (gated `isPm`; procurement/site_admin still browse read-only вАФ they don't even trigger the suggest RPC, which would 42501). **Shipped:** (1) pure `validateProjectCode` + `PROJECT_CODE_MAX=50` in `@/lib/projects/validate-settings` (non-empty, вЙ§50, trims; the RPC + unique constraint are the real guard вАФ this is fast feedback; TDD first); (2) server action `createProject` in `src/app/projects/actions.ts` вАФ mirrors `updateProjectSettings`'s gate (getActionUser + PM_ROLES, defense-in-depth over the SECURITY DEFINER RPC), validates code/name/type/client, calls `rpc("create_project")`, maps 23505вЖТ"аЄ£аЄЂаЄ±аЄ™аЄ°аЄµаЄ≠аЄҐаЄєаєИаєБаЄ•аєЙаЄІ аєГаЄКаєЙаЄ£аЄЂаЄ±аЄ™аЄ≠аЄЈаєИаЄЩ" / 42501вЖТPM-only / 22023вЖТbad-data, returns `{ok,id}`, `revalidatePath("/projects")`; (3) client `NewProjectSheet` (`src/app/projects/new-project-sheet.tsx`, co-located like settings-form) вАФ reuses the spec-78 `BottomSheet` primitive; identity-only fields (code prefilled from suggest + editable, name required, optional project_type + client selects); submit gated on name+code validity; on success `router.push(projectHref(id))`, on error inline `role=alert`; (4) hub `page.tsx` wiring вАФ PM-only `Promise.all([rpc suggest_project_code, clients id/name])`, header row (`items-baseline`) with the trigger. **Verified-by-checklist** (auth-gated hub вЖТ preview renders /login only; the 5 component tests cover open/prefill/submit-gate/success-nav/edited-values/error through the mocked action; create_project correctness already green in pgTAP 67 on prod; operator on-device pass = acceptance). Spec 142 doc gained the U2 status. **Seams / OUT:** suggested code computed at page load (a stale suggestion just yields a friendly 23505 on submit вАФ the field is editable); no re-suggest-on-conflict (deferred); stub is identity-only by design вАФ dates/budget/team/WPs are the project page's job. **Next:** U3 вАФ onboarding checklist on the project detail page (derived done-state from project fields + member/WP counts, deep-links to settings/WP-add, dismissible via a new `onboarding_dismissed_at` column).

## Spec 142 U3 вАФ onboarding checklist on the project page (2026-06-18)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-18.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **1077 unit (156 files; +5 TDD: onboarding-checklist)** ¬Ј green; **pgTAP file 68 green post-push (19/19; full suite 68 files / 1413 asserts, 0 failures)**; `db:push` applied `20260726000000`; `db:types` reconciled. PM/super now see a dismissible "аєАаЄ£аЄіаєИаЄ°аЄХаєЙаЄЩаєВаЄДаЄ£аЄЗаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£ (X/5)" checklist atop the project page guiding enrichment. **Migration** `20260726000000_project_onboarding_status.sql`: `projects.onboarding_dismissed_at timestamptz null` (+comment); `project_onboarding_status(uuid) returns table(dates_lead_set, budget_set, team_added, work_packages_added, client_set, dismissed)` вАФ **SECURITY DEFINER + stable** so it reads the money-isolated `budget_amount_thb` (spec 79) and returns **only a boolean**, no amount leak; `dismiss_project_onboarding(uuid) returns boolean` (stamps the column, idempotent). Both **PM/super only** (42501 otherwise); neither re-checks per-project visibility (current model = PM/super see all; spec 143 will gate the page). **Money-safe by construction:** the page never reads budget вАФ it reads the booleans RPC. **UI (co-located under `src/app/projects/[projectId]/`):** `OnboardingChecklist` (presentational, derived вАФ hides when dismissed OR all 5 met, never stores checklist state; 5 rows: dates+lead / budget / team / client вЖТ `projectSettingsHref`, work_packages вЖТ `#work-packages` in-page anchor; met rows show a Check + line-through, unmet rows are tappable Links with a chevron); `DismissOnboardingButton` ('use client', dismiss action вЖТ router.refresh); `dismissProjectOnboarding` action (PM_ROLES gate mirroring settings, maps RPC result). Page wiring: PM-only `rpc("project_onboarding_status")` вЖТ `OnboardingChecklist`; WP section heading got `id="work-packages"` as the anchor target. **pgTAP file 68** (plan 19): column shape, both functions exist, EMPTY project вЖТ all false, FULL project (dates+lead+budget+client+member+wp) вЖТ 5 flags true, visitor status/dismiss denied (42501), PM dismiss returns true + status then dismissed. **Verified-by-checklist** (auth-gated page вЖТ preview renders /login; the 5 component tests cover render/done-markers/hidden-when-dismissed/hidden-when-complete/dismiss-wiring; the RPCs' correctness is green in pgTAP 68 on prod; operator on-device pass = acceptance). Spec 142 doc gained the U3 status. **Seams / OUT:** the work_packages row anchors to the WP list on the same page вАФ once U4 ships the in-app "add work package" button there, the row points straight at the action; auto-hide needs ALL 5 met (budget/client optional in practice вЖТ dismiss is the escape); no undismiss UI. **Next:** U4 вАФ in-app "add work package" form + `create_work_package` RPC (baseline WP seeding; turns the checklist's last row into a real create flow).

## Spec 142 U4 вАФ in-app "add work package" (2026-06-18)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-18.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **1086 unit (158 files; +9 TDD: 6 validate-new-wp + 3 add-work-package-sheet)** ¬Ј green; **pgTAP file 69 green post-push (12/12; full suite 69 files / 1425 asserts, 0 failures)**; `db:push` applied `20260727000000`; `db:types` reconciled. Baseline WP seeding: PM/super get a **+ аєАаЄЮаЄіаєИаЄ°аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ** button beside the аЄ£аЄ≤аЄҐаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ heading on the project page вЖТ sheet (code, name, optional description) вЖТ the WP appears in the list. This makes the U3 checklist's `аєАаЄЮаЄіаєИаЄ°аЄ£аЄ≤аЄҐаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ` row a real create flow (the `#work-packages` anchor lands right on it). **Migration** `20260727000000_create_work_package_rpc.sql`: `create_work_package(p_project_id, p_code, p_name, p_description default null) returns uuid` вАФ **SECURITY DEFINER + PM/super gate** (same posture as create_project U1; a definer RPC sidesteps the work_packages table-grant question вАФ the create migration never granted authenticated INSERT, only the RLS policy). Validates code (вЙ§50) + name (вЙ§200) + **project existence** (22023); composite-unique `(project_id, code)` duplicate вЖТ 23505. **UI (co-located `src/app/projects/[projectId]/`):** pure `validateWorkPackageCode`/`validateWorkPackageName` + `WP_CODE_MAX/WP_NAME_MAX` in `@/lib/work-packages/validate-new-wp`; `createWorkPackage` action appended to the project actions file (PM_ROLES gate, conditional `p_description` arg per exactOptionalPropertyTypes, maps 23505вЖТ"аЄ£аЄЂаЄ±аЄ™аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩаЄ°аЄµаЄ≠аЄҐаЄєаєИаєБаЄ•аєЙаЄІаєГаЄЩаєВаЄДаЄ£аЄЗаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£"/42501/22023, returns `{ok,id}`, revalidates); `AddWorkPackageSheet` ('use client', reuses BottomSheet; submit gated on code+name; on success clears + closes + router.refresh). Page wiring: WP heading became a flex row with the PM-only trigger. **pgTAP file 69** (plan 12): catalog + secdef, PM/super create + row-exists, site_admin/visitor deny (42501), empty name/code (22023), unknown project (22023), duplicate-in-project (23505), same-code-different-project allowed. **Verified-by-checklist** (auth-gated page вЖТ preview renders /login; the 3 component tests cover submit-gate/success-refresh/error; create_work_package green in pgTAP 69 on prod; operator on-device pass = acceptance). Spec 142 doc gains the U4 status. **Decision (author):** direct RLS-client insert was rejected in favour of the RPC to avoid the missing table-grant + match U1 вАФ noted as a deviation from the spec's wording (it said RPC anyway). **Seams / OUT:** stub WP (code/name/description) вАФ owner/priority/schedule/deliverable stay in the existing WP detail + settings surfaces; no bulk add here (that's U7 CSV). **MVP onboarding loop (U1вАУU4) is now end-to-end: create project вЖТ land вЖТ checklist вЖТ add work packages.** **Next:** U5 вАФ WP template by `project_type` (`wp_templates` + `apply_wp_template`); U6 copy-from-project; U7 CSV import. U5/U6 carry small open design forks (template authoring = hardcode-via-migration v1 vs an editor; copy source = same-type vs any) вАФ leaning hardcode v1 + same-type unless the operator redirects.

## Spec 143 U1 вАФ membership-scoped project visibility (ADR 0056) (2026-06-18)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-18.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **1086 unit** ¬Ј green; **pgTAP file 70 green post-push (30/30; full suite 70 files / 1455 asserts, 0 failures)**; `db:push` applied `20260728000000`; `db:types` reconciled. Operator's 2nd ask: **project_manager + site_admin now see only the projects they're involved with** (a `project_members` row OR `project_lead_id`); **project_coordinator + super_admin see all**; **procurement keeps** its spec-102 cross-project read on projects/work_packages/purchase_requests. **Full RLS isolation** (operator decision) вАФ enforced on every project-scoped table, not just the hub. **ADR 0056** (amends 0013) written + indexed; spec 143 written + indexed. **Migration** `20260728000000_project_visibility_scope.sql`: two SECURITY DEFINER STABLE helpers вАФ `can_see_project(uuid)` (super/coordinatorвЖТtrue; pm/site_adminвЖТmember-or-lead; else false, never NULL вЖТ closes the [[rls-self-check-coalesce]] trap) and `can_see_wp(uuid)` (resolves WPвЖТproject, coalesce false); definer so they read project_members/projects/work_packages without re-triggering the policies that call them (ADR 0011, no recursion). **LeadвЖТmember backfill** in the same migration (idempotent `on conflict do nothing`) keeps current leads visible. **Rewrote 7 SELECT policies** (writes untouched), each preserving its exceptions: projects/work_packages = `procurement OR can_see_project`; deliverables = `can_see_project`; photo_logs/approvals = `can_see_wp`; purchase_requests = `requested_by=auth.uid() OR procurement OR can_see_wp` (separate appsheet_writer policy untouched); reports = `can_see_project AND role<>'site_admin'` (spec 19 вАФ reports still never reach site_admin). Eval-once wrapped form throughout (file 40). **Authoritative current policies pulled from pg_policies first** (not stale migration files) вАФ caught that spec 102 had added procurement to projects+work_packages. **pgTAP file 70** (plan 30): helper behaviour across 8 role/involvement combos + can_see_wp; projects/work_packages end-to-end per-row visibility (member sees, non-member doesn't, procurement keeps all, visitor none); child-policy wiring (qual references the right helper; reports excludes site_admin; PR keeps requester self-read). **Blast radius (expected вАФ access-model change):** 15 existing pgTAP suites hard-coded the old "PM/site_admin see everything" and broke on the read; fixed by seeding each fixture's PM/site_admin test users as project_members of its fixture project (scoped by test code + `auth.users.email` subquery вАФ `public.users` has no email column, the first attempt's trap). One ADR-0026 qual pin (file 17: "PR SELECT admits site_admin site-wide") was obsoleted by 0056 and re-pinned to the new `can_see_wp` gate. **No app code changed** вАФ RLS filters every cross-project list automatically (hub, worklists, payroll, reports). **ROLLOUT HEADS-UP (operator):** turning this on hides existing projects from PMs/site_admins who aren't a member/lead. Prod data is tiny (2 projects, 2 PMs, 3 site_admins; backfill enrolled the 1 lead) + super_admin sees all, so add the right people to each project via project settings (spec 80 UI). **Verified-by-checklist** (RLS is the SUT; pgTAP 70 + the regression suite carry correctness; operator on-device pass = acceptance). **Next:** U2 вАФ enable `project_coordinator` as a real role (roleHome вЖТ `/projects` + add to PROJECT_VIEW_ROLES so the see-all coordinator can actually browse; currently lands on /coming-soon). Then onboarding U5вАУU7 (WP seeding) remain.

## Spec 143 U2 вАФ enable project_coordinator (routing + chrome) (2026-06-18)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-18.** App-only, **no migration** (U1's RLS already lets coordinator read every project). lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **1088 unit (+2 TDD: role-home coordinator pin + bottom-tab-bar coordinator set)** ¬Ј green. Makes U1's see-all coordinator actually reachable (it was DB-visible but `roleHome`вЖТ/coming-soon + excluded from PROJECT_VIEW_ROLES). **Shipped:** (1) `roleHome('project_coordinator')` вЖТ `/projects`; (2) `PROJECT_VIEW_ROLES` += `project_coordinator` (gates `/projects` + `/projects/[id]`); (3) `COORDINATOR_TABS` = `[аєВаЄДаЄ£аЄЗаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£, аЄХаЄ±аєЙаЄЗаЄДаєИаЄ≤]` + `tabsForRole` case (bottom-tab-bar) вАФ lean two-tab set because the coordinator is NOT admitted to /review, /requests, or /dashboard (SITE_STAFF/PM/procurement gates), so every tab stays a live destination; (4) `COORDINATOR_HUB_NAV` = `[аєВаЄДаЄ£аЄЗаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£, аЄХаЄ±аєЙаЄЗаЄДаєИаЄ≤]` (desktop strip mirror); (5) `/projects` hub coordinator branch вАФ kicker "аЄЬаЄєаєЙаЄЫаЄ£аЄ∞аЄ™аЄ≤аЄЩаЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩаєВаЄДаЄ£аЄЗаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£" + COORDINATOR_HUB_NAV. Coordinator does NOT get the create-project button / suggest RPC / add-WP (all `isPm`-gated) вАФ it's read-only oversight by design. **Verified-by-checklist** (auth-gated pages вЖТ preview renders /login; role-home + bottom-tab-bar unit tests carry the wiring; RLS visibility green in pgTAP 70 on prod; operator on-device pass = acceptance). **Decision:** kept the coordinator tab set lean rather than widening /dashboard's SITE_STAFF_ROLES gate (scope) вАФ a coordinator dashboard is a later call. Spec 143 + ADR 0056 doctrine now complete (U1 RLS + U2 enablement). **Next:** onboarding U5вАУU7 (WP seeding: template-by-type / copy-from-project / CSV import).

## Spec 142 U6 вАФ copy work packages from another project (2026-06-18)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-18.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **1091 unit (159 files; +3 TDD: copy-work-packages-sheet)** ¬Ј green; **pgTAP file 71 green post-push (11/11; full suite 71 files / 1466 asserts, 0 failures)**; `db:push` applied `20260729000000`; `db:types` reconciled. (Reordered ahead of U5-templates вАФ copy needs no invented content; U5's per-type seed is operator domain knowledge, saved for last.) PM/super get a **аЄДаЄ±аЄФаЄ•аЄ≠аЄБаЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ** button beside add-WP вЖТ pick a source project вЖТ its WP skeleton clones in. **Migration** `20260729000000_clone_work_packages.sql`: `clone_work_packages(p_src,p_dst) returns integer` вАФ SECURITY DEFINER, PM/super; copies **skeleton only** (code/name/description; status defaults not_started, no logs/photos/owner/schedule/money); `on conflict (project_id,code) do nothing` вЖТ **idempotent**, skips codes the dst already has; returns rows inserted; rejects src=dst + unknown project (22023). **UI:** `copyWorkPackages(sourceId, projectId)` action (PM_ROLES gate, maps 42501/22023, returns `{ok,count}`); `CopyWorkPackagesSheet` (BottomSheet + source picker вЖТ action вЖТ router.refresh). Page wiring: PM-only fetch of other projects `neq self` вАФ **RLS-scoped, so the source list is only the PM's own projects** (a nice consequence of spec 143); button shown only when sources exist. **pgTAP file 71** (plan 11): catalog+secdef, clone-2, skeleton landed (description copied, status not_started), idempotent re-clone (0), partial skip (1), site_admin deny (42501), src=dst + unknown-project (22023). Test needed PM enrolled in the clone fixtures (the clone RPC is definer + works, but the PM-session verification reads are membership-scoped now вАФ spec 143 interaction). **Verified-by-checklist** (auth-gated page вЖТ /login in preview; 3 component tests + pgTAP 71 carry correctness; operator on-device = acceptance). **Decision:** source = any visible project (not same-type-only) вАФ more useful with few projects + RLS already scopes it. Spec 142 doc gains U6. **Next:** U7 вАФ CSV import surfaced in the UI (reuse `src/lib/wp-import/parse.ts`); then U5 вАФ WP template by project_type (mechanism + a starter seed for the operator to edit).

## Spec 142 U7 вАФ import work packages from CSV (paste) (2026-06-18)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-18.** App-only, **no migration** (reuses the wp-import parser + U4's create_work_package RPC). lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **1094 unit (160 files; +3 TDD: import-work-packages-sheet)** ¬Ј green. Surfaces the CLI-only `pnpm import:wp` flow in-app for the non-dev operator. PM/super get a **аЄЩаЄ≥аєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤ CSV** button вЖТ paste rows (`code,name,description` with header) вЖТ valid rows created. **Chose paste-textarea over file upload** вАФ robust + testable (jsdom File.text() is flaky) + mobile-friendly (operator is on mobile). **Action** `importWorkPackagesCsv(projectId, csvText)`: PM_ROLES gate вЖТ fetch existing codes (RLS read; PM is a member) вЖТ `parseAndValidate(csv, existingCodes)` (ADR 0014 parser вАФ header-based, dup-in-file + already-exists + blank checks) вЖТ on parser errors return first 8 joined (textarea lets fix+retry) вЖТ else create each valid row via `create_work_package` **sequentially** (definer RPC sidesteps the work_packages table-grant; sequential so a mid-batch failure reports how far it got) вЖТ `{ok, inserted}`. **UI:** `ImportWorkPackagesSheet` (BottomSheet + monospace textarea + multi-line `whitespace-pre-line` error alert + router.refresh). Page wiring: added to the PM-only WP-heading button group (now `аЄЩаЄ≥аєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤ CSV` ¬Ј `аЄДаЄ±аЄФаЄ•аЄ≠аЄБаЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ` ¬Ј `+ аєАаЄЮаЄіаєИаЄ°аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ`, flex-wrap). **Verified-by-checklist** (auth-gated page вЖТ /login in preview; 3 component tests cover submit-gate/success-refresh/error; the parser has its own unit suite; create_work_package green in pgTAP 69; operator on-device = acceptance). Spec 142 doc gains U7. **Seam:** per-row RPC (fine for onboarding-sized CSVs; a bulk RPC is a later optimization if imports get large). **Onboarding WP-seeding now: manual (U4) ¬Ј copy-from-project (U6) ¬Ј CSV (U7) all shipped.** **Next / last:** U5 вАФ WP template by project_type (`wp_templates` table + `apply_wp_template` RPC + a starter seed the operator edits).

## Spec 142 U5 вАФ WP template by project_type (2026-06-18)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-18.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **1096 unit (161 files; +2 TDD: apply-template-button)** ¬Ј green; **pgTAP file 72 green post-push (11/11; full suite 72 files / 1477 asserts, 0 failures)**; `db:push` applied `20260730000000`; `db:types` reconciled. The last seeding path: a typed project can seed a standard WP breakdown in one tap. **Migration** `20260730000000_wp_templates.sql`: `wp_templates` (project_type, code, name, description, sort_order; unique(project_type, code)) вАФ **reference data, read-only to authenticated** (SELECT `using(true)`; no write policies вЖТ seeded by migration/service-role only; the apply RPC is definer so it reads regardless). **Seeded GENERIC starter phases** per type (new_building 7, renovation 5, factory_warehouse 6, infrastructure 5, systems 5; 'other' none) вАФ a starting point the **operator should refine** (a template editor is a future unit; flagged). `apply_wp_template(p_project_id) returns integer` вАФ SECURITY DEFINER, PM/super; reads the project's type, inserts matching templates into work_packages `on conflict do nothing` (idempotent), returns rows inserted; typeless project вЖТ 0, unknown вЖТ 22023. **UI:** `applyWpTemplate(projectId)` action (PM gate, maps 42501/22023) + `ApplyTemplateButton` ("аєГаЄКаєЙаєАаЄЧаЄ°аєАаЄЮаЄ•аЄХаЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ", pending + inline error + router.refresh). Page wiring: PM-only `wp_templates` count-by-type check вЖТ button shown only when a template exists for the project's type. WP-heading button group is now `аєГаЄКаєЙаєАаЄЧаЄ°аєАаЄЮаЄ•аЄХаЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ ¬Ј аЄЩаЄ≥аєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤ CSV ¬Ј аЄДаЄ±аЄФаЄ•аЄ≠аЄБаЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ ¬Ј + аєАаЄЮаЄіаєИаЄ°аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ` (flex-wrap). **pgTAP file 72** (plan 11): table+RLS, function+secdef, seed present+staff-readable, apply=template-count, WPs landed, idempotent re-apply (0), typelessвЖТ0, visitor+site_admin deny (42501). **Verified-by-checklist** (auth-gated page вЖТ /login in preview; 2 component tests + pgTAP 72 carry correctness; operator on-device = acceptance). **Decision:** seeded generic defaults (the "hardcode v1" fork) rather than blocking on operator-authored content вАФ refine later via an editor. Spec 142 doc gains U5.

**SPEC 142 COMPLETE (U1вАУU7 all on prod): create_project + suggest_code (U1) ¬Ј create modal (U2) ¬Ј onboarding checklist (U3) ¬Ј add WP (U4) ¬Ј template-by-type (U5) ¬Ј copy-from-project (U6) ¬Ј CSV import (U7).** Full onboarding: create a project вЖТ guided checklist вЖТ seed work packages four ways. SPEC 143 also complete (U1 RLS isolation + U2 coordinator enablement).

## Spec 143 U3 вАФ complete the membership-scoping U1 missed (2026-06-18)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-18.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **1096 unit** ¬Ј green; **full pgTAP suite 73 files / 1489 asserts, 0 failures** post-push; `db:push` applied `20260731000000` + `20260732000000` (fix-forward, below); `db:types` reconciled. A **full-project-lifecycle audit** (4 parallel explorers) found U1's "full isolation" was incomplete: three project-scoped child tables still had role-level SELECT (cross-project leak to PM/site_admin), and the SELECT-only U1 left the app write policies role-level (a non-member could write a row for a project they can't read). **Migration `20260731000000`:** scoped `labor_logs` (staff SELECT only вАФ the bound-contractor self-read untouched) + `work_package_dependencies` SELECT via `can_see_wp`; mirrored the membership gate onto the **8 app write policies** (photo_logs INSERT, approvals INSERT, purchase_requests app-INSERT, deliverables INSERT+UPDATE, reports INSERT, work_packages UPDATE вАФ each KEEPS its role list so `project_coordinator` stays read-only; `labor_logs`/`wp_dependencies` are RPC-write-only so no write policy to mirror). Authoritative current policies pulled from `pg_policies` first (not stale files). **Self-inflicted regression + fix-forward:** `20260731000000` also tried to scope `photo_markups` (SELECTвЖТ`can_see_photo_log`, + helper). `photo_markups`' INSERT policy self-references `photo_markups` (tombstone-target EXISTS) вАФ safe only under a trivial role SELECT policy; under a function SELECT policy Postgres raised **42P17 infinite recursion** on every markup INSERT (caught by pgTAP files 31 + the test, but the migration was already pushed вЖТ prod markup-insert briefly broken). **`20260732000000`** reverts `photo_markups` to its original working policies + drops the unused `can_see_photo_log` вАФ prod un-broken. **pgTAP file 73** (plan 12): labor_logs + wp_dependencies + 7 write-mirror wirings + wp_dependencies end-to-end (member sees dep / non-member doesn't). **Two existing suites repaired:** `29-labor-capture` got a membership seed (its `correct_labor_log` id-lookup reads labor_logs as the PM вАФ now scoped); `31-photo-markups` returns to green once `photo_markups` reverted. **Verified-by-checklist** (RLS is the SUT; pgTAP 73 + the suite carry it). **Lesson:** scoping a SELECT policy on a table whose own write policy self-joins that table triggers 42P17 (ADR 0011 trap) вАФ needs a SECURITY DEFINER tombstone-target helper (pr_attachment_tombstone_target_ok precedent). **Remaining leak (documented, deferred to U4):** `photo_markups` is still role-level (low sensitivity вАФ drawing annotations). `labor_logs` (the sensitive one вАФ worker/day data) IS closed. **SPEC 143 now: U1 (RLS) + U2 (coordinator) + U3 (labor_logs/wp_dependencies + write-mirror) on prod; U4 (photo_markups via definer helper) is the one open item.**

## Spec 143 U4 вАФ scope photo_markups (recursion-free) (2026-06-18)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-18. SPEC 143 COMPLETE.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **1096 unit** ¬Ј green; **full pgTAP suite 74 files / 1501 asserts, 0 failures** post-push; `db:push` applied `20260733000000`; `db:types` reconciled. Closes the last read-leak the lifecycle audit found вАФ `photo_markups` was still role-level (cross-project). **Migration `20260733000000`:** recreates `can_see_photo_log(uuid)` (dropped in U3's revert) + adds `photo_markup_tombstone_target_ok(uuid,uuid)` вАФ a SECURITY DEFINER helper that performs the tombstone-target self-read (bypassing RLS, `auth.uid()` still the caller so the creator-pin holds). `photo_markups` SELECT вЖТ `can_see_photo_log`; INSERT keeps the content/own-tombstone rule but the tombstone branch now calls the helper instead of an inline `EXISTS (select вА¶ from photo_markups вА¶)`, so the policy no longer self-joins the table вЖТ **no 42P17** (the U3 failure mode). Role list kept (coordinator read-only). **pgTAP file 74** (plan 12): both helpers exist + secdef, SELECT/INSERT wiring, and behaviourally the **exact content+tombstone INSERT that recursed in U3 now `lives_ok`** for a member, non-member sees 0 + INSERT denied, visitor sees 0. **Existing `31-photo-markups` (the comprehensive markup insert/tombstone/current-view suite) passes under the scoped policies** (its users are members via the U1 seed) вАФ strong real-world coverage that the recursion is gone and the member path is intact. **Lesson applied:** the pr_attachment_tombstone_target_ok pattern (definer helper for a self-referential append-only policy) is the canonical fix whenever such a table gets a function-based SELECT policy. **ADR 0056 "full isolation" is now actually complete** across all project-scoped tables (projects, work_packages, deliverables, photo_logs, approvals, purchase_requests, reports, labor_logs, work_package_dependencies, photo_markups); the only remaining write-side note is the labor RPCs (log_labor_day/correct_labor_log) gate on role + WP-status but not membership вАФ residual defense-in-depth (UI is read-locked for non-members), recorded, not exploitable.

## Spec 144 U1 вАФ defect rework: 'rework' status + reopen RPC (2026-06-18)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-18.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **1097 unit (+1: rework transition assert)** ¬Ј green; **full pgTAP suite 75 files / 1511 asserts, 0 failures** post-push; `db:push` applied `20260734000000` (enum) + `20260734000100` (RPC); `db:types` reconciled. Closes the lifecycle-audit gap "complete is terminal" вАФ operator: "complete doesn't mean defect-free." **Model (operator-chosen):** reopen to a new `rework` WP status (not reuse in_progress, not a punch-list entity); `complete вЖТ rework вЖТ re-capture After вЖТ pending_approval вЖТ complete`. **Reportable by site_admin + PM/super** (field finds defects; PM re-approves). **Migrations:** `rework` added to `work_package_status` in its OWN migration (PG: can't use a new enum value in the tx that adds it; `add value if not exists`), then `reopen_work_package_for_defect(p_wp,p_reason)` вАФ SECURITY DEFINER, role-gated (sa/pm/super) + membership-gated (`can_see_wp`, ADR 0056), complete-only, flips to `rework` + writes an `audit_log` row (`action='other'`, payload `{event:'wp_reopened_for_defect',reason}`, actor captured); non-complete/empty-reasonвЖТ22023, wrong-role/non-memberвЖТ42501. **Transition wiring:** `TRANSITIONABLE_FROM_STATUSES` += `rework` (after-photo from rework вЖТ pending_approval); labor already allowed in rework (log_labor_day blocks only complete); list-filter "outstanding" shows rework automatically; cost re-freezes on re-approve (existing path). **Enum-add ripple вАФ all consumers handled, typecheck-surfaced (the safety net):** `WORK_PACKAGE_STATUS_LABEL` (аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩаєБаЄБаєЙаєДаЄВ), `workPackageStatusPillClasses` (amber), `deriveActionBand` (reworkвЖТtodo) + `nextAction` (capture), `schedule-gantt` `STATUS_STYLE` (amber, pct 90; this one was caught only by typecheck вАФ a Record the grep would've missed). **pgTAP file 75** (plan 10) + enum pin (file 08) вЖТ six values. **Verified-by-checklist** (pure transition predicate unit-tested; RPC pgTAP'd; UI is U2). **Next:** U2 вАФ the "report defect" control on the WP page (complete-only, SA/PM/super) вЖТ reopen + show the rework status + reason from the latest audit row.

## Spec 144 U2 вАФ report-defect UI (2026-06-18)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-18. SPEC 144 COMPLETE.** App-only, **no migration** (reuses U1's `reopen_work_package_for_defect` RPC). lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **1100 unit (162 files; +3 TDD: report-defect-control)** ¬Ј green. Makes the reopen path operable on the WP detail page. **Shipped:** (1) `reportDefect({projectId, workPackageId, reason})` action appended to the WP actions file вАФ validates reason (вЙ§1000), calls the RPC under the user session (the SECURITY DEFINER RPC carries role+membership+complete-only), maps 42501вЖТ"аєДаЄ°аєИаЄ°аЄµаЄ™аЄіаЄЧаЄШаЄіаєМ (аЄХаєЙаЄ≠аЄЗаєАаЄЫаєЗаЄЩаЄЧаЄµаЄ°аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ)" / 22023вЖТ"аєАаЄЙаЄЮаЄ≤аЄ∞аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩаЄЧаЄµаєИаєАаЄ™аЄ£аєЗаЄИаєБаЄ•аєЙаЄІ", revalidates the WP + project paths; (2) `ReportDefectControl` ('use client', reuses `BottomSheet`: reason textarea вЖТ action вЖТ router.refresh, inline error); (3) WP page wiring вАФ when `status='complete'` show the report-defect button (all WP-page viewers are SA/PM/super; the RPC re-gates membership), when `status='rework'` show an amber `AttentionCard` with the latest defect reason (fetched from the newest `wp_reopened_for_defect` audit_log row via `payload->>event` filter). From rework, the existing captureвЖТapprove cycle resumes (after-photoвЖТpending_approval wired in U1; cost re-freezes on re-approve). **Verified-by-checklist** (auth-gated page вЖТ /login in preview; the 3 component tests cover submit-gate/success-refresh/error; the RPC is pgTAP'd in file 75; operator on-device = acceptance). **SPEC 144 COMPLETE (U1 DB + U2 UI): a defect on a completed WP now reopens it to `rework`, captures the reason, and flows back through capture вЖТ re-approval вЖТ complete.** Closes the lifecycle-audit "complete is terminal" gap.

## Spec 145 вАФ lock new work on a completed project (warranty-aware) (2026-06-18)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-18.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **1100 unit** ¬Ј green; **full pgTAP suite 76 files / 1521 asserts, 0 failures** post-push; `db:push` applied `20260735000000`; `db:types` reconciled. Operator decision: a project locks once completed вАФ **caveat:** completion вЙ† full closure (client retains a warranty %, Buildall 5% for a year; defects surface in that window), so the lock blocks NEW work but must NOT block warranty defect-rework. **Enforcement = a `BEFORE INSERT` trigger on `work_packages`** (`work_packages_block_insert_on_closed_project`, raises `P0002`) gated by `project_is_open(uuid)` (status in active/on_hold) вАФ **one chokepoint** over every WP-creation path (manual/template/copy/CSV) without re-typing the 3 creation RPCs, and **INSERT-only** so spec-144 reopen-to-rework (an UPDATE) + the rework WP's capture/labor/approval cycle keep working on a completed project (the warranty carve-out falls out for free; gates on WP status, not project status). The **project record stays editable** (status вЖТ active to reopen the project; record retention notes in settings). **Actions** map `P0002` вЖТ "аєВаЄДаЄ£аЄЗаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£аЄЩаЄµаєЙаЄЫаЄіаЄФаєБаЄ•аєЙаЄІ аєАаЄЫаЄіаЄФаєВаЄДаЄ£аЄЗаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£аЄБаєИаЄ≠аЄЩвА¶" (createWorkPackage/copyWorkPackages/applyWpTemplate/importWorkPackagesCsv). **UI (project page):** added `status` to the project select + `projectOpen`; when closed, hides the seeding controls + onboarding checklist and shows a lock banner pointing to settings. **pgTAP file 76** (plan 11): helper truth table, direct-insert + all 3 RPCs blocked on a completed project (P0002), create still works on active, **reopen-for-defect still works on a completed project (warranty)**; fixtures seed WPs while active then flip to completed (so the seed doesn't trip the trigger). **Verified-by-checklist** (DB lock pgTAP'd; UI gate + action mapping are thin glue over the tested DB behavior). **Out of scope (deliberate):** retention %/warranty billing вАФ a finance feature the app resists (status-only at most, per ceo-review); not built. **Project lifecycle now complete:** active/on_hold (full edit) вЖТ completed (locked for new work; warranty: defects reopen individual WPs to rework вЖТ fix вЖТ re-approve) вЖТ archived; reopen the project via statusвЖТactive. **Audit-found project-status gap closed.**

## Spec 167 вАФ WP detail segmented tabs (2026-06-21)

Status: **SHIPPED вАФ 2026-06-21.** App-only, **no migration / no schema / no new query** (pure UI restructure). lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **1328 unit (201 files; +4 TDD: wp-detail-tabs)** ¬Ј `pnpm build` green. Operator: _"WP detail page is too long with contents, scrolling through unrelated contents is distracting."_ Direction chosen via AskUserQuestion: **segmented tabs** (over collapse-sections / sticky-jump-nav). **Shipped:** `WpDetailTabs` ('use client') вАФ a WAI-ARIA tablist (`role=tablist/tab/tabpanel`, `aria-selected`, `aria-controls`/`labelledby`, arrow/Home/End roving focus) that shows **one panel at a time** with inactive panels kept **mounted via `hidden`** (so a half-typed purchase request + the spec-147 single fetch survive a switch вАФ NOT `?tab=` nav, which would re-run `loadWorkPackageDetail` per tap). Active tab = `text-action` + bottom indicator bar (mirrors `BottomTabBar`); вЙ•44px tap floor; token classes only (passes design-doctrine grep). Width via `PAGE_MAX_W`. **WP page regrouped:** header nameplate + phase progress bar + attention stack + defect/rework cards stay **pinned** (needs-action / at-a-glance, never behind a tap вАФ extends spec 94's "don't bury the assign prompt"); photos ¬Ј purchases ¬Ј labor ¬Ј info fold into tabs (аЄ£аЄєаЄЫаЄЦаєИаЄ≤аЄҐ default ¬Ј аЄДаЄ≥аЄВаЄ≠аЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠ ¬Ј аєБаЄ£аЄЗаЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ ¬Ј аЄВаєЙаЄ≠аЄ°аЄєаЄ•), and the **planner management block (rename/priority/аЄЗаЄІаЄФаЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ-bind/schedule/delete) becomes a аЄИаЄ±аЄФаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£ tab appended only when `isPlanner`** вАФ it no longer pushes the capture hero down for PMs. Per-section `<h2>` icon headings dropped (tab label names the section); `Camera/FileText/ShoppingCart/Users` imports removed. **Deep link:** the pending-requests `CountChip` keeps `href="#wp-requests"`; `WpDetailTabs` takes `hashTabMap={{ "wp-requests": "purchases" }}` + listens for `hashchange` вЖТ tapping the chip opens the аЄДаЄ≥аЄВаЄ≠аЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠ tab. **Test** `wp-detail-tabs.test.tsx` (4): one tab per section + default-first, every panel mounted with inactive `hidden`, click switches the active panel, a mapped `hashchange` opens the right tab. **Verified-by-checklist** (auth-gated route вЖТ /login in preview, the standing constraint for SA/PM pages; behavior is unit-pinned; build green; operator on-device = acceptance). **Out of scope (recorded):** no **sticky** tab bar this unit вАФ the header is already `sticky top-0` with a dynamic height, so a second sticky bar below it would need that height as its `top` offset (fragile); the tablist sits in normal flow under the pinned progress bar (still near the top, each panel now short). The **PM review** WP page (`/review/work-packages/[workPackageId]`) is a separate surface вАФ untouched; one-component follow-up if the operator wants the same there. **U2 (af3144d): аєБаЄ£аЄЗаЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ вЖТ аЄЧаЄµаЄ°аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ term sweep** вАФ operator flagged аєБаЄ£аЄЗаЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ ("labor/laborer") as a sensitive word; аЄЧаЄµаЄ°аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ was already the de-facto SSOT for the workforce (/workers, roster, Nova, contacts). Replaced all 10 user-facing аєБаЄ£аЄЗаЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ literals phrased per context (tab, аЄЪаЄ±аЄЩаЄЧаЄґаЄБаЄЧаЄµаЄ°аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ button + tests, error, review heading/variance copy, delete-guard; over-alloc flag dropped the noun). Left аЄДаєИаЄ≤аєБаЄ£аЄЗ (standard wage term) + a pgTAP fixture name. Follow-up: single-source аЄЧаЄµаЄ°аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ in labels.ts. db:test 201/1328 green.

## Spec 168 вАФ split subcontractor + DC contact pages (2026-06-21)

Status: **SHIPPED вАФ 2026-06-21.** App-only, **no migration / no schema / no new component** (pure IA split). lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **unit green (+ updated 3 pins)** ¬Ј `pnpm build` green. Operator: _"Setting page of sub contractor should not be in the same page as DC."_ Spec 99's `crews` group put **аЄЬаЄєаєЙаЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄЂаЄ°аЄ≤аЄКаєИаЄІаЄЗ** (subcontractor вАФ a firm that pays its own crew) and **DC** (paid directly) on one page (`/contacts/crews`) behind a tab chip row, reached from a single аЄХаЄ±аєЙаЄЗаЄДаєИаЄ≤ door `аЄЬаЄєаєЙаЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄЂаЄ°аЄ≤аЄКаєИаЄІаЄЗ / DC`. They are different relationships вЖТ split into two pages. **Shipped:** `lib/contacts/groups.ts` вАФ `ContactGroup` drops `crews`, adds `subcontractors: ["contractors"]` + `dc: ["dc"]` (single-type groups вЖТ `ContactsTabs` renders no chip row via its `tabs.length > 1` guard). New routes **`/contacts/subcontractors`** (fetch `contractor_category='contractor'`, title `SUBCONTRACTOR_LABEL`) and **`/contacts/dc`** (fetch `='dc'`, title `аЄЧаЄµаЄ° DC`), each + `loading.tsx`, both PM/super, `DetailHeader` backвЖТ/settings, reusing `ContactsTabs`. **`/contacts/crews` removed** (page + loading; it was a аЄХаЄ±аєЙаЄЗаЄДаєИаЄ≤-only door, replaced here). **`/settings`:** the one merged door вЖТ **two doors** вАФ аЄЬаЄєаєЙаЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄЂаЄ°аЄ≤аЄКаєИаЄІаЄЗ (`/contacts/subcontractors`, icon `Hammer`) + DC (`/contacts/dc`, icon `Contact`, hint `DC аЄЫаЄ£аЄ∞аЄИаЄ≥/аЄКаЄ±аєИаЄІаЄДаЄ£аЄ≤аЄІ/аЄЪаЄ£аЄіаЄ©аЄ±аЄЧ`). `/workers` (DC _worker_ roster + day rates) untouched вАФ distinct from the DC _contact_ list. **Same `contractors` table + same detail route `/contacts/contractors/[id]` for both categories** вАФ only the list IA changed. **Tests (path b):** `contacts-groups.test.ts` asserts the new map + no `crews`; `contact-subcontractor-label.test.ts` SSOT surface crewsвЖТsubcontractors; `nav-back-affordance.test.ts` `STATIC_DETAIL` drops crews, adds the two (the completeness guard forces every new page.tsx to be classified). **Lesson:** deleting a route leaves **stale `.next/types/validator.ts`** referencing the old `page.js` вЖТ `tsc` fails with TS2307 until a build regenerates the route types (run `pnpm build` before re-typechecking). **Verified-by-checklist** (auth-gated routes вЖТ /login in preview; group map + route classification unit-pinned; build green; operator on-device = acceptance).

## Spec 169 вАФ bottom tabs (+ hub strip) are first-layer destinations (2026-06-21)

Status: **SHIPPED вАФ 2026-06-21.** App-only, **no migration / no route / no role-set change** (nav behaviour). lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **unit green (nav suites 71; +1 TDD)** ¬Ј `pnpm build` green. Operator: _"Hitting the menu button should take users back to the top of the sitemap вА¶ all the tabs on the bottom of screen must be treated as first layer."_ **Root cause:** `BottomTabBar` rendered the **active** tab as an inert `<span>` (only inactive tabs were `<Link>`s), so on a sub-page (e.g. `/projects/[id]/...`) the section's own tab (аєВаЄДаЄ£аЄЗаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£) was active = **not tappable** вЖТ no one-tap way back to the section root (`/projects`, the first layer). **Fix:** render **every** tab as a `<Link>` to its root; the active one keeps its identity via `aria-current="page"` + the indicator bar + `text-action`/bold (active detection unchanged вАФ longest-prefix still lights exactly one). A tap on the active tab now returns to the first layer. **Extended to `HubNav`** (the desktop `sm:` strip the codebase keeps mirrored with the bottom bar вАФ same inert-`<span>` current item вЖТ same dead tab on a cloud PC; operator is a desktop user, so parity matters): current item is now a `<Link aria-current="page">` with the underline/`font-semibold` style. **Tests (path b):** `bottom-tab-bar.test.tsx` вАФ new test pins the active tab is a tappable `<a href=root>` on a deep `/projects/[id]/work-packages/[id]` path; the PM active tab (аЄ£аЄ≠аЄХаЄ£аЄІаЄИ on /review) is a link to /review; `hub-nav.test.tsx` вАФ every item is a link, current carries `aria-current` (was: span). Both updated the prior "active renders as a span, not a link" pins. **Scope note:** detail screens that deliberately hide the bottom bar (WP detail's thumb capture bar) are unchanged вАФ this only changes how the bar behaves where it already renders. **Verified-by-checklist** (auth-gated routes; the nav components are unit-pinned; build green; operator on-device = acceptance). Spec doc `169-tabs-are-first-layer.md`.

## Spec 170 вАФ DC is a worker (ADR 0062 arc), U1 (2026-06-21)

Status: **U1 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-21.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest green** ¬Ј **db:test 114 files / 2193 / 0** ¬Ј `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260778000000`; db:types regenerated. Operator: _"DC is confusing again"_ вЖТ chose **rethink the model (unify the data)** + the decisive fact **"there is no DC firm, we hire DC directly"** вЖТ **ADR 0062: a DC is a single `workers` record, no contractor party** (full design pass + prod audit showing 0 DC rows/payments/bindings = no migration risk; committed earlier 78973e5). **U1 (additive вАФ nothing removed; payment/portal/Nova stay party-keyed until U2вАУU4):** migration `20260778000000_dc_worker_fields.sql` вАФ new enum `dc_arrangement` (regular|temporary); `workers` gains `dc_arrangement` (DC-only CHECK) + payee fields `phone`/`tax_id`/`bank_name`/`bank_account_number`/`bank_account_name` (length-capped). **bank+tax+phone = ZERO authenticated grant** (money/PII isolation, the day_rate posture spec 46 C3; admin-client-only); `dc_arrangement` granted (non-sensitive). `create_worker`/`update_worker` **DROP+CREATE** (can't add params via REPLACE) to accept the new fields вАФ reproduced the spec-152 `project_director` gate, reject an arrangement on a non-dc worker, and **re-applied the EXECUTE lockdown** (20260625000200) for the NEW signatures (else DROP resets to PUBLIC default вЖТ anon hole + pgTAP 36 break). **`/workers` add form drops the аЄЬаЄєаєЙаЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄЂаЄ°аЄ≤ parent picker for DC** (spec 160 already nulled contractor_id) + collects arrangement (аЄЫаЄ£аЄ∞аЄИаЄ≥/аЄКаЄ±аєИаЄІаЄДаЄ£аЄ≤аЄІ) + payee fields; `createWorker` keeps an optional `contractorId` for the subcontractor-crew flow (contact-crew-section) only. **Tests:** `worker-roster-manager.test.tsx` (DC form shows arrangement+payee, no picker; adds DC worker w/ arrangement+bank); pgTAP 29 (+7 вЖТ 60: bank/tax isolated 42501, dc_arrangement readable, create DC w/ no parent + stores arrangement/bank, arrangement rejected for non-dc); pgTAP 36 updated to the new 12/11-arg signatures. **Lessons:** the LATEST create_worker/update_worker bodies were in the spec-152 RPC-gate migration (project_director added), NOT the base вАФ always source the current body before DROP+CREATE; a DROP+CREATE resets EXECUTE to PUBLIC default so the lockdown grants must be re-applied for the new signature (pgTAP 36 is the guard); `pnpm exec supabase db query --linked --file` audits prod; run-pgtap.ts ignores file args (runs all). **NEXT (own sessions):** U2 Nova externalвЖТworker arrangement ¬Ј U3 dc_paymentsвЖТworker ¬Ј U4 portalвЖТworkers.user_id ¬Ј U5 remove /contacts/dc + door ¬Ј U6 labels. Edit-payee-in-place (create-only today) = small follow-up.

**U2 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-21** (mig 20260779000000; **db:test green**; app untouched, no type change). Nova "external" now reads the **worker's** `dc_arrangement='temporary'` instead of the contractor party's `contractor_subtype='dc_temporary'`. CREATE OR REPLACE (signatures unchanged вЖТ grants preserved) the two functions that read the rule: `distribute_project_coins` (external вЖТ flat external_factor weight, else level weight) + `coin_unvested_balance` (external lock вАФ whole balance unvested). pgTAP 106 (distribution) + 108 (vesting) repointed: the external DC fixture is marked `update workers set dc_arrangement='temporary'` (keyed on the holdover dc_temporary contractor); assertions unchanged. The contracts-UI `dc_temporary` subtype labels (/contacts/dc) are untouched вАФ they're the party subtype display, cleaned up in U5. **NEXT:** U3 dc_paymentsвЖТworker.

**U4c-2 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-23** (3-unit arc, commits 74e3c3b¬Јe38df1b¬Ј39f9358; migs `20260810000000` + fix-forward `20260810000100`; pgTAP `201` 18/18; lint¬Јtypecheck¬Јvitest 1513 green). Staged worker (DC) bank-change вЖТ PM approval вАФ the worker analogue of the contractor anti-fraud gate (spec 130 U4 / ADR 0051 ¬І6) вАФ folded into the approvals-awareness arc (specs 183вАУ186). **OPEN-6 resolved (operator AskUserQuestion): a parallel `worker_bank_change_requests` table, NOT polymorphic on the contractor table** вАФ the apply path forks (a worker change writes `workers.bank_*` inline, no `contact_bank` row) and a separate table isolates the shipped, pgTAP-pinned (file 39) contractor gate from regression. **U1 (DB):** table reuses enum `contractor_change_status`, bank caps match the workers columns (120/50/120); RLS readable-by-bound-worker (`current_user_worker_id()`) + pm/super/director, writes RPC-only; `submit_worker_bank_change` (bound-worker / own / one-pending) + `decide_worker_bank_change` (pm/super/director; approve writes `workers.bank_*`, reject discards; idempotent). **U2 (portal):** `WorkerBankChangeForm` on the /portal worker branch's bank card (reuses `validateBankChange` + `submitWorkerBankChange`), pending-state gate. **U3 (awareness fold):** the аЄ†аЄ≤аЄЮаЄ£аЄІаЄ° total badge gains a 4th read (WP + PR + contractor-bank + worker-bank); the dashboard bank-change card shows the COMBINED count; `/contacts/bank-changes` merges both kinds (queue item gains `kind` + a unified `name`; `BankChangeDecision` gains a `kind` prop routing approve/reject to the matching decide RPC; rows tagged аЄЧаЄµаЄ°аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ / аЄЬаЄєаєЙаЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄЂаЄ°аЄ≤). **Trap re-hit:** the status `CASE вА¶ 'approved' вА¶ END` yields TEXT вЖТ no implicit textвЖТenum cast вЖТ `42804` on every decide; fix-forward `20260810000100` added `::public.contractor_change_status` (the same trap fixed for the contractor RPC in `20260708000100` вАФ copy the LIVE def, not the uncast base). **Concurrent-session handled:** a parallel spec-187 session shared the tree throughout; staged only my files explicitly each commit (never `git add -A`), db:types diff stayed mine-only (their migration was type-neutral). **STILL PENDING:** U4c-3 (DC documents, OPEN-7 storage RLS), OPEN-1 (portal DC-only vs dual-tenant). NEXT after this = U6 (DC labels pass; retire `contractor_users` if unused).

## Spec 175 вАФ item catalog (on-site storage / inventory foundation), U1 (2026-06-22)

Status: **U1 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 1366 (206 files; +1 TDD: catalog-list)** ¬Ј **db:test 121 files / 2311 / 0** ¬Ј `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260801000000`; db:types regenerated. First unit of the on-site **storage-unit / inventory** feature (design in `docs/inventory-store/README.md`): the store is a transfer-pricing BU with three flows (Supply Plan / Stock-In / аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ), staged **cost-first**; everything downstream keys on one **item identity**, which the per-site spreadsheet can't provide. **U1 builds that item master вАФ read-only + seeded.** **Migration `20260801000000`:** new enum `item_category` (12 codes) + `catalog_items` (id, category, base_item, spec_attrs, unit text, stockable, note, is_active, created_at) вАФ reference data, **read-only to authenticated** (RLS enable; revoke anon+authenticated; grant select authenticated; SELECT policy `using(true)`; **no write policy** вЖТ seeded by migration, the `wp_templates` posture spec 142). **Unique identity** index on `(base_item, coalesce(spec_attrs,''))` = the anti-drift guard the sheet lacked. **Seeded 71 deduped items** from the operator's previous-site purchase sheet (`docs/inventory-store/seed-catalog.csv`); **17 `stockable=false`** (made-to-length roofing CC/760+аЄДаЄ£аЄ≠аЄЪ, fire doors, stainless fab, engineered Aqua tanks вЖТ direct-to-WP, never inventoried). **Units stored as text reusing `COMMON_UNITS`** (spec 16 doctrine: units are client-side text, NOT a DB table вАФ the course-correction from the original two-table design) вАФ normalised аЄБаЄБ.вЖТаЄБаЄіаєВаЄ•аЄБаЄ£аЄ±аЄ°, аЄ°.вЖТаєАаЄ°аЄХаЄ£; non-stock lines (freight/service/VAT/WHT) excluded. **No prices** (price is not item identity; real cost comes from receipts later). **Page `/catalog`:** server component, `requireRole(BACK_OFFICE_ROLES)` (pm/super/procurement/director вАФ the back-office curators, mirroring the suppliers master), settings drill-down (DetailHeaderвЖТ/settings + BottomTabBar, no HubNav). `CatalogList` (pure presentational) groups by category in **enum order** (iterates the ITEM_CATEGORY_LABEL key order), each row base_item¬Јspec¬Јunit + a **аєАаЄБаєЗаЄЪаЄ™аЄХаєКаЄ≠аЄБ / аЄ™аЄ±аєИаЄЗаЄХаЄ£аЄЗаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ** badge; empty state. **Labels (SSOT, labels.ts):** `CATALOG_LABEL`=аЄЧаЄ∞аєАаЄЪаЄµаЄҐаЄЩаЄІаЄ±аЄ™аЄФаЄЄ, `ITEM_CATEGORY_LABEL` (12), `CATALOG_STOCKABLE_LABEL`/`CATALOG_NON_STOCKABLE_LABEL`. **Nav:** аЄЧаЄ∞аєАаЄЪаЄµаЄҐаЄЩаЄІаЄ±аЄ™аЄФаЄЄ door (Package icon) in the procurement block + isManager master-data block of `/settings`; `/catalog` added to the аЄХаЄ±аєЙаЄЗаЄДаєИаЄ≤ tab `match`. **Tests:** `catalog-list.test.tsx` (5: section per present category, **enum order not input order**, item name/spec/unit, stockable badge counts, empty state); pgTAP `119-item-catalog` (10: table/RLS, enum 12-label pin, anon-deny + auth-allow grants, **unique-identity reject (23505)**, seed present + known item + stockable & non-stockable exist). **Three completeness guards updated (the repo's anti-drift net):** `nav-back-affordance` STATIC_DETAIL (classify `catalog`), `feature-components-structure` ALLOWED_DOMAINS (new `catalog` domain folder), `bottom-tab-bar` аЄХаЄ±аєЙаЄЗаЄДаєИаЄ≤ match. **Lessons:** the codebase already had a units vocabulary (`src/lib/purchasing/units.ts`) вАФ reused it as text rather than inventing an `item_units` table (CLAUDE.md: don't swap the established approach); adding a `features/<domain>/` folder trips the `feature-components-structure` allowlist (third anti-drift guard, alongside nav-back-affordance + the tab match). **Verified-by-checklist** (auth-gated page вЖТ /login in preview; component unit-pinned, DB pgTAP'd; operator on-device = acceptance). **NEXT (later units):** create/edit catalog items (write RPC); then **Phase 2 вАФ Supply Plan** (PM bulk plan, qty-per-WP, PD approve-once, reactive-PR reason codes) = the PM-accuracy engine. Out of scope here: store entity, Stock-In, аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ/Issue, custody handshake, sell-rate/margin layer.

## Spec 175 вАФ item catalog, U2: add item (2026-06-22)

Status: **U2 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 1369 (207 files; +1 TDD: add-catalog-item)** ¬Ј **db:test 122 files / 2322 / 0** ¬Ј `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260802000000`; db:types regenerated. Makes the catalog operable вАФ back-office adds items in-app (U1 was read-only/seeded). **Migration `20260802000000`:** `create_catalog_item(category, base_item, spec_attrs, unit, stockable, note) returns uuid` вАФ SECURITY DEFINER, role gate `current_user_role() in (project_manager/super_admin/procurement/project_director)` (the BACK_OFFICE set, inline like `apply_wp_template`), trims inputs (empty spec/note вЖТ NULL via `nullif(btrim(coalesce(вА¶,'')),'')`), length caps вЖТ `22023`, unique-identity index вЖТ `23505`. **`catalog_items` stays write-locked** (no INSERT grant / no write policy) вАФ the definer RPC is the sole write path (controlled writes for reference data). **`revoke вА¶ from anon`** explicitly (the Supabase default-privilege EXECUTE-to-anon trap вАФ applies to a fresh CREATE FUNCTION too, not just DROP+CREATE; pgTAP guards it). **Action `src/app/catalog/actions.ts`** `createCatalogItem`: `requireRole(BACK_OFFICE_ROLES)` (defense-in-depth + fast bounce), validates category against `ITEM_CATEGORY_LABEL` keys, calls the RPC under the user session, maps `23505`вЖТ"аЄ£аЄ≤аЄҐаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£аЄЩаЄµаєЙаЄ°аЄµаЄ≠аЄҐаЄєаєИаєБаЄ•аєЙаЄІ" / `42501`вЖТ"аєДаЄ°аєИаЄ°аЄµаЄ™аЄіаЄЧаЄШаЄіаєМ", `revalidatePath('/catalog')`. **Typecheck caught** passing `null` to the RPC's `text` args (typegen types them non-null `string`) вЖТ pass the trimmed strings, the RPC nullifies empties. **`AddCatalogItem` ('use client', BottomSheet):** category select, name, spec, **unit picker reusing `COMMON_UNITS` + аЄ≠аЄЈаєИаЄЩ аєЖ free-text** (`UNIT_OTHER_VALUE`), stockable checkbox (default on), note; submit вЖТ reset + close + `router.refresh`; inline error. Sits above the read-only list on `/catalog`. **Tests:** `add-catalog-item.test.tsx` (4: submit-gating, create-with-values+refresh, free-text-unit reveal, inline error); pgTAP `120-create-catalog-item` (11: exists+secdef, anon-deny+auth-allow execute, PM creates+row lands, procurement creates, blankвЖТ22023, dupвЖТ23505, site_admin+visitorвЖТ42501). **Verified-by-checklist** (auth-gated page; component unit-pinned, RPC pgTAP'd; operator on-device = acceptance). **NEXT:** U3 edit / deactivate existing items (correct the seed / my U1 calls) вАФ then **Phase 2 Supply Plan** (the PM-accuracy engine). Catalog is now create-capable; edit/deactivate + Supply Plan remain.

## Spec 175 вАФ item catalog, U3: edit / deactivate (2026-06-22)

Status: **U3 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 1373 (208 files; +1 TDD: edit-catalog-item)** ¬Ј **db:test 123 files / 2336 / 0** ¬Ј `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260803000000`; db:types regenerated. Makes the catalog **correctable** вАФ back-office edits any field or removes an item (so the operator can fix the U1 seed: the screw unit, the stockable flags). **Migration `20260803000000`:** two more controlled-write RPCs (catalog_items stays write-locked вАФ no table grant; the definer RPCs are the sole write path). `update_catalog_item(id, category, base_item, spec_attrs, unit, stockable, note) returns void` вАФ same back-office gate + trim/validate as create; **unknown id вЖТ `22023`** (`get diagnostics row_count`), **duplicate identity вЖТ `23505`** (the unique index). `set_catalog_item_active(id, active) returns void` вАФ **soft delete / restore** (`is_active`; the /catalog list shows active only, so deactivate = removal but reversible). Both `revoke вА¶ from anon` (default-priv trap). **Refactor (behaviour-preserving):** the U2 `AddCatalogItem` field set extracted to **`CatalogItemForm`** shared by add + edit (so the two never drift); a seeded unit not in `COMMON_UNITS` (аЄІаЄЗ/аЄЭаЄ≤/аЄХаЄєаєЙ) opens as the free-text "other" so an edit preserves it. **`EditCatalogItem` ('use client'):** per-row "аєБаЄБаєЙаєДаЄВ" вЖТ BottomSheet pre-filled вЖТ save (`updateCatalogItem`) or "аєАаЄ≠аЄ≤аЄ≠аЄ≠аЄБ" (`setCatalogItemActive` false). **Injected into each `CatalogList` row via an optional `renderRowAction` render-prop from the page** вАФ deliberately so the list module stays free of client-action imports (importing the `"use server"` actions file, which has `import "server-only"`, into the U1 list test would throw; the page вАФ a server component вАФ renders the client edit control instead). **Actions** `updateCatalogItem` / `setCatalogItemActive`: `requireRole(BACK_OFFICE_ROLES)`, UUID-guard, map `23505`/`42501`/`22023`, `revalidatePath`. **Tests:** `edit-catalog-item.test.tsx` (4: pre-fill, save+refresh, deactivate+refresh, inline error); pgTAP `121-edit-catalog-item` (14). **The U2 add test + U1 list test stay green** (the form extraction preserved AddCatalogItem's output; renderRowAction defaults off). **Lesson:** a server component CAN pass a render-prop function to another server component (no client boundary) вАФ the clean way to inject a client control per row without dragging server-action imports into a presentational list. **Verified-by-checklist.** **NEXT:** Phase 2 вАФ the **Supply Plan** (PM bulk plan, qty-per-WP, PD approve-once, reactive-PR reason codes) = the PM-accuracy engine. Catalog is now full CRUD-lite (create/edit/deactivate); read + write complete for the item master.

## Spec 175 вАФ item catalog, U4: item image (2026-06-22)

Status: **U4 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 1376 (209 files; +1 TDD: catalog-image-control)** ¬Ј **db:test 124 files / 2346 / 0** ¬Ј `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260804000000`; db:types regenerated. Operator: "add images to the existing list." One reference photo per item вАФ thumbnail in the list + on the edit sheet. **Migration `20260804000000`:** private **`catalog-images`** bucket (25 MiB, image MIME) + a back-office INSERT policy on `storage.objects` (`current_user_role() in pm/super/procurement/director`); **NO SELECT policy** вАФ reads via service-role signed URLs (the photos-bucket posture spec 02/03). `catalog_items.image_path text` (**inherits the table-level SELECT grant** вАФ no column-grant trap, unlike `projects`). `set_catalog_item_image(id, path) returns void` вАФ back-office gate, null clears, unknown id вЖТ `22023`, `revoke вА¶ from anon`. **`CatalogImageControl` ('use client'):** pick вЖТ **reuse spec-34 `preparePhotoForUpload`** (client downscale, JPEG 0.8, EXIF baked) вЖТ upload to `catalog-images` at `{itemId}/{crypto.randomUUID()}.{ext}` via the **browser** supabase client (the INSERT policy gates it) вЖТ `setCatalogItemImage` records the path вЖТ `router.refresh`. Replace + remove; **old objects retained on replace** (keep-originals doctrine [[ai-driven-direction-keep-images]]). Mounted on the `EditCatalogItem` sheet (image attaches on EDIT вАФ the item must exist for its storage path; matches "existing list"). **Display:** the page mints 120s signed URLs via **`mintSignedUrls(CATALOG_IMAGES_BUCKET, вА¶)`** (spec-65 shared core) for items with `image_path` вЖТ `thumbnailUrl` on `CatalogItem` вЖТ `CatalogList` renders a 40px thumbnail; placeholder icon when empty. **Actions** `setCatalogItemImage`: `requireRole(BACK_OFFICE_ROLES)`, UUID-guard, empty path вЖТ clear, map `42501`/`22023`. **Tests:** `catalog-image-control.test.tsx` (3: downscaleвЖТuploadвЖТrecordвЖТrefresh w/ path `^{id}/вА¶\.jpeg$`, removeвЖТnull, reject-non-image) + pgTAP `122-catalog-item-image` (10). **`<img>` for signed URLs** (same as `ZoomablePhoto`) with an eslint-disable for `@next/next/no-img-element`. **Typecheck caught** `exactOptionalPropertyTypes`: pass `item.thumbnailUrl ?? null` (optional field вЖТ can't hand an explicit `undefined` to a `?: string | null` prop). **Verified-by-checklist** (browser-upload seam is review/operator-phone verified per spec-34 precedent; control unit-pinned, RPC+bucket pgTAP'd). **Decision:** single current image (Option A) + retained old blobs honours keep-images without an append-only table; a `catalog_item_images` history table stays an additive later option. **NEXT:** Phase 2 вАФ the **Supply Plan** (the PM-accuracy engine). The item master is now view/add/edit/deactivate/image вАФ feature-complete as a catalog.

## Spec 175 вАФ item catalog, U5: consistent image slot + remove bad images (2026-06-22)

Status: **U5 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 1378 (209 files; +2: catalog-list placeholder)** ¬Ј `pnpm build` green. App-only вАФ **no migration / no DB schema change**. Operator feedback on the U4 image batch: "the images are not related, remove or change them" + "always put image placeholders, so the list is consistent." **(a) Removed the 8 auto-sourced CC images** вАФ `update catalog_items set image_path = null` (via `db query`) + deleted the bucket objects (`supabase storage rm --experimental --yes "ss:///catalog-images/<id>/web1.jpg"` вАФ **rm prompts `[y/N]`; the non-interactive shell defaults to N, so `--yes` is required**); deleted the now-stale `docs/inventory-store/image-credits.md`. The Openverse-sourced photos were generic representatives, not the actual items вАФ no reliable way to verify relevance without vision, so removed rather than re-guessed; operator adds real photos via аєБаЄБаєЙаєДаЄВ. **(b) `CatalogList` always renders a 40px image slot** вАФ the thumbnail when `thumbnailUrl` present, else a placeholder (`role="img" aria-label="аєДаЄ°аєИаЄ°аЄµаЄ£аЄєаЄЫаЄ†аЄ≤аЄЮ"` box + `ImageIcon`) вАФ so every row aligns regardless of whether an item has a photo (was: nothing rendered for imageless items вЖТ ragged rows). **Test:** `catalog-list.test.tsx` (+2: N placeholders for N imageless fixture rows; thumbnail-img-present + no-placeholder when an item has an image; the real `<img alt="">` is decorative so it's out of the a11y tree, leaving the placeholder the only `role=img` вАФ that's what the test keys on). **Lesson (image ops):** sourcing images programmatically without vision is unreliable for relevance вАФ prefer operator-supplied photos; the auto-source was a miss. **NEXT:** Phase 2 Supply Plan.

## Spec 175 вАФ item catalog, U6: category filter (2026-06-22)

Status: **U6 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 1381 (209 files; +3: catalog-list filter)** ¬Ј `pnpm build` green. App-only вАФ **no migration / no DB change**. Operator: "since we already grouped by category, allow users to select category first" (+ "All" is an option). **`CatalogList` converted from a server component to `'use client'`** to hold the filter selection. Renders a `RadioChip` row (the spec-67 primitive вАФ native sr-only radio, 44px target, token active fill): **`аЄЧаЄ±аєЙаЄЗаЄЂаЄ°аЄФ (N)`** default (the full grouped overview) + a chip per **present** category (empty categories get no chip) with its item count; selecting one filters to that single section. **Architectural ripple:** because the list is now a client component, the per-row **`EditCatalogItem`** control (U3) **moved INSIDE `CatalogList`** behind an `editable` prop вАФ the U3 `renderRowAction` function-prop can't cross the serverвЖТclient boundary (spec-109 lesson: functions don't serialize serverвЖТclient). The page drops `renderRowAction` + its `EditCatalogItem` import and passes `<CatalogList items={вА¶} editable />` (data only). The catalog-list test now mocks `@/app/catalog/actions` + `next/navigation` (CatalogList's module graph reaches the "use server" actions via EditCatalogItem). **Test:** `catalog-list.test.tsx` (+3: аЄЧаЄ±аєЙаЄЗаЄЂаЄ°аЄФ + chip-per-present-category, no chip for empty; select-category shows only its items; аЄЧаЄ±аєЙаЄЗаЄЂаЄ°аЄФ restores all). **Lesson:** adding client state (a filter) to a presentational server list forces it client вЖТ fold any server-injected render-props into data-only props. **NEXT:** Phase 2 Supply Plan.

## Spec 176 вАФ Supply Plan (PM-accuracy engine), U1: data foundation (2026-06-22)

Status: **U1 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј `pnpm build` green ¬Ј **db:test 125 files / 2365 / 0** (file 176, 19 asserts); db:push applied `20260805000000`; db:types regenerated (+123). The start of Phase 2 вАФ the operator's stated purpose for the on-site store: measure **PM planning accuracy** (plan materials up front вЖТ frozen baseline вЖТ compare to actual/reactive). Sits on the catalog (spec 175): plan lines reference `catalog_items`. **Migration `20260805000000`:** enum `supply_plan_status` (draft/submitted/approved/rejected); **`supply_plans`** (id, project_id **unique вАФ one plan/project**, status, note, created_by `default auth.uid()`, created/submitted/approved stamps); **`supply_plan_lines`** (supply_plan_id, catalog_item_id, **nullable** work_package_id = site-general, qty `numeric(12,2)` CHECK>0, note) + **unique `(plan, item, coalesce(wp, sentinel))`**. **RLS:** both READ via `can_see_project` (ADR 0056 вАФ super/director/coordinator see-all, PM/SA by membership; `can_see_project` from migration 20260728); **no write policy** вАФ definer RPCs are the sole write path (catalog/deliverables posture). **RPCs (planner tier pm/super/director, incl. project_director per the spec-152 lesson):** `create_supply_plan(project)` вАФ **get-or-create** (idempotent), role + `can_see_project` membership + project-exists (22023); `add_supply_plan_line(plan, item, wp, qty, note)` вАФ **draft-only** (frozen plan вЖТ 22023), qty>0, item exists+active, WP-belongs-to-plan-project, dup (item,WP) вЖТ 23505. **pgTAP `176-supply-plan` (19):** structure + anon-deny; create idempotent; add returns id; qtyвЙ§0 / WP-other-project / inactive-item / dup / frozen-plan rejected; non-member PM + visitor вЖТ 42501; super unknown-project вЖТ 22023. **DB-only foundation** вАФ no app surface (verified by pgTAP). **Decisions made (flagged in the spec for operator review before U2/U3):** one-plan-per-project (no versioning yet); no price/ETA in the plan (PM intent only; price lives in procurement execution later); proposed reactive reason-code taxonomy (unplanned-miss/rework/breakage/scope-change/unforeseeable). **Lesson reused:** project-scoped child = READ via `can_see_project`, WRITE via role+membership definer RPC; always include `project_director` in the planner gate. **NEXT:** U2 planning UI (PM picks catalog items + WP + qty), then U3 submit+PD-approve (freeze).

## Spec 176 вАФ Supply Plan, U2: planning screen (2026-06-22)

Status: **U2 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 1386 (210 files; +4: supply-plan-manager)** ¬Ј **db:test 126 files / 2374 / 0** (file 177, 9 asserts) ¬Ј `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260806000000`; db:types regenerated. The PM-facing planning screen вАФ first VISIBLE Supply Plan surface. **Migration `20260806`:** `remove_supply_plan_line(line)` вАФ SECURITY DEFINER, planner tier + member, **draft-only** (frozen plan вЖТ 22023), unknown line вЖТ 22023, anon-revoked; the table has no DELETE grant (RPC is sole delete path). **Page `/projects/[projectId]/supply-plan`** (dynamic route вЖТ auto-classified as a detail route by nav-back-affordance; renders DetailHeader backвЖТproject): `requireRole(PM_ROLES)` then project read via RLS (`can_see_project` вЖТ non-member PM gets `notFound`); loads plan + lines (FK-join `catalog_items(base_item,spec_attrs,unit)` + `work_packages(code,name)` вАФ to-one embeds typed as objects, accessed `r.catalog_items?.base_item`) + pickers (active catalog items + project WPs). **`SupplyPlanManager`** ('use client'): status chip (аЄ£аєИаЄ≤аЄЗ/аЄ™аєИаЄЗаЄ≠аЄЩаЄЄаЄ°аЄ±аЄХаЄіаєБаЄ•аєЙаЄІ/аЄ≠аЄЩаЄЄаЄ°аЄ±аЄХаЄіаєБаЄ•аєЙаЄІ/аЄХаЄµаЄБаЄ•аЄ±аЄЪ); "аєАаЄЮаЄіаєИаЄ°аЄ£аЄ≤аЄҐаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£аєБаЄЬаЄЩ" вЖТ BottomSheet (item `<select>` **grouped by category with `<optgroup>`** вАФ first optgroup use in the app, WP `<select>` **required in U2**, qty number, note) вЖТ `addPlanLine`; per-line `Trash2` remove вЖТ `removePlanLine`; **submitted/approved = read-only** (no add/remove). **Actions** `addPlanLine` (get-or-create `create_supply_plan` вЖТ `add_supply_plan_line`) / `removePlanLine`: `getActionUser` + RPC + map `23505`("already planned")/`42501`/`22023` + `revalidatePath(supplyPlanHref)`. **Entry:** a `ClipboardList` chip on the project header (isManagerRole block) вЖТ `supplyPlanHref`. **Feature folder `supply-plan` added to `feature-components-structure` ALLOWED_DOMAINS** (the 4th anti-drift guard hit this session). **Decision:** U2 form **requires a WP** per line (the core qty-per-WP case) вАФ avoids the nullable-uuid RPC-arg typing issue (a non-null `uuid` arg types as non-null `string`); site-general (null WP) stays schema-supported for a later "аЄЧаЄ±аєЙаЄЗаєВаЄДаЄ£аЄЗаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£" option. **Tests:** `supply-plan-manager.test.tsx` (4) + pgTAP 177 (9). **NEXT:** U3 submit + PD approve/reject (freeze the baseline), then U4 reactive reason codes, U5 measurement.

## Spec 176 вАФ Supply Plan, U3: submit + PD approve/reject (2026-06-22)

Status: **U3 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 1388 (210 files; +2: supply-plan-manager lifecycle)** ¬Ј **db:test 127 files / 2391 / 0** (file 178, 17 asserts) ¬Ј `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260807000000`; db:types regenerated (+3). The plan lifecycle + freeze. **Lifecycle:** `draft вЖТ(PM submit)вЖТ submitted вЖТ(PD approve)вЖТ approved [FROZEN]` / `вЖТ(PD reject)вЖТ rejected вЖТ(PM revises+resubmits)`. **Separation of duties:** planner tier (pm/super/director) SUBMITS; only the approver tier (`project_director`/`super_admin`) APPROVES/REJECTS вАФ a plain PM cannot approve its own plan (pgTAP-pinned: PM approve вЖТ 42501). **Migration `20260807`:** `submit_supply_plan` (planner; draft|rejectedвЖТsubmitted, sets submitted_at), `approve_supply_plan` (PD/super; submittedвЖТapproved, sets approved_by/at), `reject_supply_plan` (PD/super; submittedвЖТrejected); all SECURITY DEFINER + `can_see_project` + status-guard (wrong status вЖТ 22023), anon-revoked. **CREATE OR REPLACE `add_supply_plan_line` + `remove_supply_plan_line`** to widen the edit gate `draft вЖТ draft|rejected` (a rejected plan is revisable) вАФ same signatures so grants preserved (anon stays revoked; no pgTAP signature-pin break). **`SupplyPlanManager`:** `editable` includes `rejected`; header action group by state/role вАФ **аЄ™аєИаЄЗаЄ≠аЄЩаЄЄаЄ°аЄ±аЄХаЄі** (planner, draft/rejected), **аЄ≠аЄЩаЄЄаЄ°аЄ±аЄХаЄі/аЄХаЄµаЄБаЄ•аЄ±аЄЪ** (approver, submitted), **аЄ£аЄ≠аЄ≠аЄЩаЄЄаЄ°аЄ±аЄХаЄі** text (non-approver, submitted), frozen when approved. Page passes `planId` + `canApprove` (`ctx.role` director/super). **Actions** `submitPlan`/`approvePlan`/`rejectPlan`: getActionUser + RPC + map 42501/22023 + revalidatePath. **Tests:** `supply-plan-manager.test.tsx` (+3: submit, approve+reject, non-approver read-only) + pgTAP `178-supply-plan-lifecycle` (17: submit/approve/reject transitions, PMвЙ†approver 42501, approved-frozen, rejected-editable-again, wrong-status 22023, visitor 42501). **NEXT:** U4 reactive-PR reason codes (tag scramble-orders; `unplanned-miss` dings PM), U5 measurement (planned vs reactive).

## Spec 176 вАФ Supply Plan, U4: reactive-PR reason codes (2026-06-22)

Status: **U4 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 212 files / 1399 (+53: reason-code validators + 2 form tests + reason-module pins)** ¬Ј **db:test 128 files / 2406 / 0** (file 179, 16 asserts; file 33 + 91 updated) ¬Ј `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260808000000` + `20260808000100`; db:types regenerated. Operator-locked (AskUserQuestion): (1) the 5-code taxonomy `unplanned_miss`/`rework`/`breakage`/`scope_change`/`unforeseeable` вАФ **only `unplanned_miss` counts against the PM**; (2) **required on every PR**; (3) **both create paths** (the `/requests` form + the WP-detail on-site quick-record). **Design (spec 176 ¬ІU4):** new enum `purchase_request_reason_code` + nullable `purchase_requests.reason_code` (NO default вАФ legacy rows stay null = pre-feature/unscored; required-ness on the WRITE paths, not a column NOT NULL or DB CHECK вАФ matches the `priority`/`needed_by` requester-field posture, ADR 0026); additive `grant insert (reason_code)` (column-scoped grant, spec 33); **insert RLS untouched** (pins 70/73/91/115 + the 64 owner-role fixtures stay green). Form path: `validateCreatePurchaseRequest` gains a required `reasonCode` (checked LAST so existing earlier-field error cases keep their message) + `createPurchaseRequest` inserts `reason_code` + a required reason `<select>` on `PurchaseRequestForm`. Site path: `validateSitePurchase` + `recordSitePurchase` + a required reason `<select>` on `SitePurchaseForm`. Shared `src/lib/purchasing/reason-code.ts` (type + list + guard) + `PURCHASE_REQUEST_REASON_CODE_LABEL` (аЄІаЄ≤аЄЗаєБаЄЬаЄЩаЄХаЄБаЄЂаЄ•аєИаЄЩ/аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩаєБаЄБаєЙаєДаЄВ/аЄВаЄ≠аЄЗаЄКаЄ≥аЄ£аЄЄаЄФ¬ЈаєАаЄ™аЄµаЄҐаЄЂаЄ≤аЄҐ/аЄВаЄ≠аЄЪаєАаЄВаЄХаЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩаєАаЄЫаЄ•аЄµаєИаЄҐаЄЩ/аєАаЄЂаЄХаЄЄаЄ™аЄЄаЄФаЄІаЄіаЄ™аЄ±аЄҐ). **Out of scope (вЖТU5):** card/list display + planned-vs-reactive aggregation (the column carries the tag for U5 to read). **Migrations split into TWO:** `20260808000000` = enum + column + insert grant; `20260808000100` = `record_site_purchase` DROP+CREATE. **TWO traps caught by db:push/db:test + fixed forward вЖТ [[prc-ops-db-migration-lessons]]:** (1) **OVERLOAD** вАФ I sourced the RPC body from migration file `20260630000100` (5-arg) but the LIVE function was the **7-arg VAT version** (`20260701000200` added `p_vat_rate`); my first `record_site_purchase` create made a vat-LESS duplicate (would regress VAT) instead of replacing it. Fix: drop the real `(вА¶,numeric,numeric)` + create the **7-arg** `(uuid,text,numeric,text,reason_code,numeric,numeric)` with reason BEFORE the defaulted amount/vat, VAT preserved; queried `pg_proc` to confirm a single signature; made mig 100 self-dropping (drops its own 7-arg too) so a repair+repush is idempotent. (2) **project_director ride-along** вАФ the reconstructed pre-152 body dropped `project_director` from the gate вЖТ **pgTAP file 91** ("no PM-gated RPC left without project_director") went RED; re-added it. Plus a pgTAP UUID hex-length slip in 179 (13-char final group). **The meta-lesson: reconstruct a definer RPC body from the LIVE `pg_get_functiondef`/`pg_proc`, never an old migration file.** **Tests:** pgTAP 179 + `validate-purchase-request`/`validate-site-purchase` (+reason cases) + `purchase-request-form-reason` + `site-purchase-form-reason`. **NEXT:** U5 measurement (planned `supply_plan_lines` vs reactive `unplanned_miss` PRs, per project/WP/PM вАФ the PM-accuracy number).

## Spec 176 вАФ Supply Plan, U5: measurement (PM-accuracy) (2026-06-22)

Status: **U5 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 213 files / 1402 (+3: supply-plan-accuracy)** ¬Ј **db:test 129 files / 2421 / 0** (file 180, 15 asserts) ¬Ј `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260808000200`; db:types regenerated. **Spec 176 arc COMPLETE.** The payoff: surface planned vs reactive so the operator sees how well a PM planned. Migration `20260808000200` (808000000/100 were U4), pgTAP `180`. **Design (spec 176 ¬ІU5):** PRs carry `work_package_id` + free-text item (no `catalog_item_id`) вЖТ can only measure count-based PER WP (no PRвЖФplan-line item match). **RPC `supply_plan_accuracy(p_project_id)`** SECURITY DEFINER, planner tier (incl. project_director per file-91 pin) + `can_see_project` (unknownвЖТ22023); returns a TABLE one row per WP (or null=site-general) with a plan line OR a PR: `planned_lines`, `planned_qty`, `unplanned_miss`, `fair_reactive` (rework/breakage/scope_change/unforeseeable), `untagged` (null reason). FULL OUTER JOIN of per-WP planned + per-WP PR aggregates (PRsвЖТproject via `work_packages.project_id`), worst-offender first. ALL PR statuses count (status-filter = flagged refinement). **Surface:** read-only `SupplyPlanAccuracy` server component on `/projects/[id]/supply-plan` вАФ project totals (planned ¬Ј unplanned_miss HIGHLIGHTED ¬Ј fair ¬Ј untagged) + per-WP table (site-general = "аЄЧаЄ±аєЙаЄЗаєВаЄДаЄ£аЄЗаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£"). **Per-PM:** per-project number = per-PM-per-project (plan has created_by); cross-project roll-up = flagged follow-up, NOT built. **Tests:** pgTAP 180 + `supply-plan-accuracy.test.tsx`. **Lesson (caught by db:test):** the plan-line unique index is `(plan, item, coalesce(wp, sentinel))` вЖТ two lines on the SAME WP need TWO catalog items; my first fixture used one item and asserted 2 lines (impossible) вАФ the RPC was correct, the fixture wrong. **Spec 176 (Supply Plan) COMPLETE: U1 data вЖТ U2 planning UI вЖТ U3 submit/approve freeze вЖТ U4 reactive reason codes вЖТ U5 PM-accuracy measure. NEXT (storage arc Phase 3):** store + stock-in at cost (аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤ вЖТ store buys from supplier; reuse deliveries spec 135).

## Spec 177 вАФ Store + Stock-In (аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤) at cost (inventory Phase 3), U1: data foundation (2026-06-22)

Status: **U1 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 213 files / 1402** (DB-only вАФ no unit-test delta) ¬Ј **db:test 130 files / 2445 / 0** (file 181, 24 asserts) ¬Ј `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809000000`; db:types regenerated. **Phase 3 of the on-site storage/inventory arc** (after spec 175 catalog + spec 176 supply plan). The store is a transfer-pricing BU; this unit puts STOCK ON HAND вАФ goods enter the store, at COST, and the store knows what it holds and what it's worth. **Cost-first staging is a locked dial:** the sell-to-WP margin layer + the flip of `wp_profit` to at-issue-sell-price + external sales are LATER phases, explicitly NOT this spec. **Operator decisions (AskUserQuestion, all 3 recommended):** (1) **stock-in source = standalone catalog-keyed receipt** вАФ a "store buys catalog item X, qty Y, at unit-cost Z from supplier S" entry keyed on `catalog_item_id`; it does **not** touch the existing PR/PO/delivery flow (whose lines are FREE-TEXT, no catalog link), so zero purchasing-break risk; a future POвЖТstore linkage is flagged. (2) **on-hand = per-project, NO `stores` table** вАФ keyed by `(project_id, catalog_item_id)`, the project's on-site store is implicit ("1 unit per site"), RLS rides existing `can_see_project`, issue-to-WP (Phase 4) stays in-project. (3) **moving-avg cost tracked NOW** вАФ `qty_on_hand` + `total_value` вЖТ avg = value/qty (the COST basis, not the sell/margin layer). **Design (spec 177 ¬ІU1, DB-only вАФ mirrors the 176-U1 cadence; /store UI is U2):** `stock_receipts` (append-only аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤ events: project_id, catalog_item_id, qty>0, **unit snapshotted from the catalog item at receipt**, unit_costвЙ•0, **`total_cost` GENERATED `qty*unit_cost`**, nullable supplier_id, received_at, note, created_by вАФ no UPDATE/DELETE policy; corrections = a later reversal unit per CLAUDE.md append-only doctrine) + `stock_on_hand` (derived, PK `(project_id, catalog_item_id)`, qty_on_hand + total_value; moving-avg cost is DERIVED not stored). **RPC `record_stock_in(project, item, qty, unit_cost, supplier, note)`** SECURITY DEFINER: role gate = `BACK_OFFICE_ROLES` (pm/super/procurement/director вАФ the cost-bearing curation tier; documented аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤ actor is procurement); membership = `can_see_project(project) OR current_user_role()='procurement'` (procurement is a cross-project curator, mirrors spec 171/172); validates project/active-catalog-item/qty>0/unit_costвЙ•0/supplier-exists (all 22023), non-memberвЖТ42501; inserts the receipt + **additively** upserts on-hand (`on conflict вА¶ do update set qty+=, value+=`) вАФ a pure stock-IN needs no weighted-avg recompute (that's issue-OUT, Phase 4). **READ:** both tables SELECT = `can_see_project OR procurement` arm (procurement must read what it writes); no write policy вАФ the RPC is the sole writer. **Migration `20260809000000`, pgTAP `181`** (structure + anon-deny, procurement cross-project + PM-member happy paths, moving-avg maths across two receipts at different unit costs вЖТ value 600/qty 20 = avg 30, generated total_cost, unit snapshot, every deny/validation branch). **THREE traps caught + fixed forward:** (1) **bare `current_user_role()` in an RLS policy** вЖТ the "no public policy calls current_user_role() bare" guard pgTAP went RED вАФ Postgres-RLS perf pattern requires `(select public.current_user_role())` (I'd wrapped `can_see_project` but not the role call); fixed both policies (edited the migration file AND applied the wrap live via `supabase db query --file` so file==DB, no noise migration). (2) **`suppliers.created_by` is NOT NULL with no default** вАФ my fixture inserted only (id, name) вЖТ the whole 181 file errored at setup ("not ok - 181"); added created_by.
