(3) **plan() undercount** вАФ `plan(22)` but 24 asserts ran (miscounted the read-posture section) вЖТ `plan(24)`. **Lesson:** when a fixture row errors, the runner reports the whole file `not ok` with the diagnostic hidden if you grep-filter the output вАФ re-run unfiltered to a file to see the `# ERROR:` line. **Out of scope (flagged):** /store UI (read on-hand + record form) = U2; аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ/Issue + two-party custody + weighted-avg-cost decrement = Phase 4; GL posting of stock-in (Dr Inventory/Cr AP into the spec-149 outbox) = later; POвЖТstore linkage (needs catalog_item_id on PR/PO lines first); receipt reversal/correction; required supplier; stock count/variance; SA self-receive (self-governance). **NEXT (Phase 3 cont.):** U2 = the `/store` surface (read on-hand per project + the record-stock-in form, back-office tier).

## Spec 177 вАФ Store + Stock-In, U2: the /store surface (read on-hand + record stock-in) (2026-06-22)

Status: **U2 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 214 files / 1409 (+7: store-manager)** ¬Ј **db:test 130 files / 2445 / 0** (no new pgTAP file; 181 re-runs green after the function REPLACE) ¬Ј `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809000100`; db:types regenerated. The screen that drives the U1 engine: a back-office user picks a project, sees its on-hand stock, and records a аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤ at cost. **Surface (`/store`, single route, BACK_OFFICE_ROLES, settings drill-down вАФ DetailHeader backвЖТ/settings, no HubNav, mirrors /catalog):** a project `<select>` (RLS-scoped picker вАФ procurement sees all, PM sees member projects; `onChange` вЖТ `router.push('/store?project=<id>')`); the chosen project's on-hand list (item ¬Ј аЄХаєЙаЄЩаЄЧаЄЄаЄЩаєАаЄЙаЄ•аЄµаєИаЄҐ avg = value/qty ¬Ј qty+unit ¬Ј value) + a `аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤аЄ™аЄХаєКаЄ≠аЄБ` BottomSheet form (catalog item `<optgroup>` by category ¬Ј аЄИаЄ≥аЄЩаЄІаЄЩ ¬Ј аЄ£аЄ≤аЄДаЄ≤аЄХаєЙаЄЩаЄЧаЄЄаЄЩ/аЄЂаЄЩаєИаЄІаЄҐ ¬Ј optional аЄЬаЄєаєЙаЄВаЄ≤аЄҐ ¬Ј аЄЂаЄ°аЄ≤аЄҐаєАаЄЂаЄХаЄЄ) вЖТ `recordStockIn` action. The record UI is gated on a selected project (no project = pick-a-project hint, no form). **`StoreManager`** ('use client': selector navigation, sheet state, submit transition + refresh) in the new `src/components/features/store/` folder. **`recordStockIn` server action** (`src/app/store/actions.ts`) validates uuids/qty>0/unit_costвЙ•0, maps the RPC's 42501/22023, `revalidatePath('/store')`. **Labels SSOT:** `STORE_LABEL` (аЄ™аєВаЄХаЄ£аєМаЄЂаЄЩаєЙаЄ≤аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ) + `STORE_RECEIVE_LABEL` (аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤аЄ™аЄХаєКаЄ≠аЄБ) in `labels.ts`. **Nav:** аЄ™аєВаЄХаЄ£аєМаЄЂаЄЩаєЙаЄ≤аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ door (Warehouse icon) in /settings procurement + manager blocks (next to аЄЧаЄ∞аєАаЄЪаЄµаЄҐаЄЩаЄІаЄ±аЄ™аЄФаЄЄ). **Migration `20260809000100`** = CREATE OR REPLACE `record_stock_in` adding `default null` to the two trailing nullable args (p_supplier_id, p_note) вАФ same signature, grants preserved, pgTAP-181 positional calls unaffected. **Updated 3 anti-drift guards (the spec-175 settings-drill-down trio):** nav-back-affordance `STATIC_DETAIL += "store"`, feature-components-structure `ALLOWED_DOMAINS += "store"`, bottom-tab `SETTINGS_TAB.match += "/store"` (no per-role `[label,href]` pin touched вАФ only the match array). **TWO typegen traps caught by typecheck + fixed forward вЖТ [[prc-ops-db-migration-lessons]]:** (1) **nullable RPC arg needs `default null`** (the spec-155 lesson, re-learned) вАФ `p_supplier_id` had no default вЖТ generated Args typed it required `string`, so passing a null supplier wouldn't compile; added `default null` (+ trailing `p_note` per Postgres trailing-default rule) via the U2 migration; reconstructed the body from LIVE `pg_get_functiondef` (the U4 rule). (2) **`exactOptionalPropertyTypes` forbids explicit `undefined`** for an optional prop вЖТ can't pass `p_supplier_id: supplierId ?? undefined`; must OMIT the key вАФ conditional spread `...(supplierId !== null ? { p_supplier_id: supplierId } : {})`. **Test (written first, RED proven):** `store-manager.test.tsx` (on-hand rows + derived avg-cost display, empty state, project-selector navigation, submit-gating until item+qty+cost, the recordStockIn call shape, record control hidden until a project is chosen). Self-inflicted test-helper bug fixed: `opts.selectedProjectId ?? "p1"` coerced an explicit `null` to "p1" вЖТ use `=== undefined ?` to distinguish omitted from null. **Browser pass = operator on-device** (the page is behind requireRole/LINE auth; no real creds on the cloud PC вАФ spike-02). **Out of scope (unchanged from U1):** аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ/Issue + custody (Phase 4), GL posting of stock-in, POвЖТstore linkage, receipt reversal, stock count/variance, SA self-receive, the margin layer. **NEXT (Phase 3 cont.):** U3 вАФ аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ/Issue (issue-out to a WP, weighted-avg-cost decrement, two-party custody handshake), the first OUT flow.

## Spec 177 вАФ Store + Stock-In, U3: аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ/Issue (the first OUT flow), at weighted-avg cost (2026-06-22)

Status: **U3 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 214 files / 1409** (DB-only вАФ no unit-test delta) ¬Ј **db:test 131 files / 2465 / 0** (file 182, 20 asserts) ¬Ј `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809000200`; db:types regenerated. The first OUT flow: a work package draws stock from its project's store; the store issues it OUT at the **moving-average cost** (the COST basis вАФ the sell/margin layer stays locked out). **Design (spec 177 ¬ІU3, DB-only вАФ mirrors the U1 cadence; the аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ UI is U4):** `stock_issues` (append-only аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ events: project_id, catalog_item_id, **work_package_id NOT NULL** = the WP drawn for, qty>0, **unit snapshot**, **unit_cost = moving-avg at issue**, **`total_cost` GENERATED**, note, issued_by, issued_at вАФ no UPDATE/DELETE policy; corrections = a later reversal). **RPC `issue_stock(project, item, wp, qty, note default null)`** SECURITY DEFINER: role gate = **SITE_STAFF_ROLES** (site_admin draws at the WP + the PM tier вАФ **NOT procurement**, which does аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤ IN not аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ OUT вАФ the gate that differs from U1/U2) + `can_see_project`; validates qty>0 / WP-in-project / active-catalog-item / **sufficient on-hand** (all 22023), non-memberвЖТ42501; **locks the on-hand row (`for update`)**, computes `avg = round(total_value/qty_on_hand, 2)`, decrements `qty_on_hand -= qty` and `total_value -= qty*avg` вАФ **fully depleting forces total_value to 0** so rounding dust never lingers вАФ and writes the issue at the snapshot avg cost. **READ:** `stock_issues` SELECT = `can_see_project OR procurement` (consistent with receipts/on-hand; policy uses the wrapped `(select current_user_role())` вАФ the U1 guard lesson applied up front). **Migration `20260809000200`, pgTAP `182`** (structure + anon-deny; site_admin issues 5 of 20@avg30 вЖТ on-hand 15 / value 450, issue unit_cost 30 / total_cost 150; issue the remaining 15 вЖТ qty 0 / value forced 0; insufficient-stock 22023; PM-member issues a 2nd item; qtyвЙ§0 + WP-from-another-project 22023; non-member + visitor 42501; member reads 3 issues, outsider 0). **Clean first push вАФ no traps** (the U1/U2 lessons preempted them: policy wrapped, fixtures complete, plan count correct). **Out of scope (flagged):** the аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ UI (a button on the WP detail and/or /store) = **U4**; **two-party custody handshake** (store-keeper hands / receiver attests, reuse polymorphic consents) = later; **wiring issue cost into `wp_profit`** (the WP material cost = at-issue cost) = the cost-attribution/margin layer, deliberately deferred; equipment round-trip return; receipt/issue reversal; stock count/variance. **NEXT (Phase 3 cont.):** U4 вАФ the аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ UI (issue-out from the WP detail / store), then the two-party custody handshake.

## Spec 177 вАФ Store + Stock-In, U4: the аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ UI on /store (issue-out + recent issues) (2026-06-22)

Status: **U4 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 214 files / 1414 (+5: store-manager аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ cases)** ¬Ј `pnpm build` green. **No DB change** (the `issue_stock` RPC + `stock_issues` table shipped in U3; types already regenerated) вЖТ no migration, no db:test delta. The first UI for the OUT flow: the U3 `issue_stock` engine now has a button. **Surface choice:** put аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ on the **existing `/store` console** (reuses U2's per-project on-hand) вАФ /store becomes a complete store console (see on-hand ¬Ј аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤ ¬Ј аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ) with the least new code. **Gate:** the аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ control shows only for the **manager tier** (`isManagerRole` = PM/super/director) вАФ the intersection of `/store` access (BACK_OFFICE) and the `issue_stock` gate (SITE_STAFF); **procurement reaches /store but cannot issue** (button hidden), and **site_admin can issue per the RPC but isn't on /store** вЖТ its field-draw UI at the WP detail is **U5** (flagged). **Design:** each on-hand row gets a `аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ` button вЖТ a BottomSheet pre-scoped to THAT item (shows "аЄ°аЄµаєГаЄЩаЄ°аЄЈаЄ≠ N unit") with a WP `<select>` (the project's WPs) + qty + note вЖТ `issueStock` action вЖТ `issue_stock` RPC вЖТ refresh. Below on-hand, a read-only **аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБаЄ•аєИаЄ≤аЄ™аЄЄаЄФ** list (last 10 issues: item ¬Ј WP ¬Ј at-issue cost ¬Ј qty). **`StoreManager`** gains `canIssue` / `workPackages` / `issues` props + the issue-sheet state (a second `useTransition`); the page computes `canIssue`, fetches the project's WPs + the recent `stock_issues` (joined to catalog_items + work_packages). **`issueStock` server action** (`src/app/store/actions.ts`) validates the 3 uuids + qty>0, maps the RPC's 42501 вЖТ no-permission and 22023 вЖТ "аЄ™аЄХаєКаЄ≠аЄБаєДаЄ°аєИаЄЮаЄ≠ аЄЂаЄ£аЄЈаЄ≠аЄВаєЙаЄ≠аЄ°аЄєаЄ•аєДаЄ°аєИаЄЦаЄєаЄБаЄХаєЙаЄ≠аЄЗ" (covers insufficient stock / wrong-project WP / inactive item), `revalidatePath('/store')`. **Label:** `STORE_ISSUE_LABEL` (аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБаЄ≠аЄ≠аЄБ) in `labels.ts`. **No new anti-drift guards** (the `/store` route + the `store` component folder were already registered in U2; no migration, no nav change). **Test (written first, RED proven вАФ 4 failed/7 passed before, 11/11 after):** `store-manager.test.tsx` gains the аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ describe (no control when `!canIssue`, a control per row when `canIssue`, issuing the row's item to the chosen WP+qty calls `issueStock`, submit gating on WP+qty, the recent-issues list renders). The two sheets share a `аЄИаЄ≥аЄЩаЄІаЄЩ` label but never collide вАФ `BottomSheet` returns null when closed (verified), so only the open sheet's labels are in the DOM. **Browser pass = operator on-device** (page behind requireRole/LINE auth). **Out of scope (flagged):** **U5 = the site_admin field-draw UI at the WP detail** (the doctrine's primary drawer); the two-party custody handshake; wiring issue cost into `wp_profit`; equipment round-trip; reversals; stock count/variance. **NEXT (Phase 3 cont.):** U5 вАФ аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ at the WP detail for site_admin (field self-service), then the custody handshake.

## Spec 177 вАФ Store + Stock-In, U5: аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ at the WP detail (site_admin field-draw) (2026-06-22)

Status: **U5 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 215 files / 1419 (+5: wp-issue-stock)** ¬Ј `pnpm build` green. **No DB change** (reuses the U3 `issue_stock` RPC + the U4 `issueStock` action) вЖТ no migration, no db:test delta. The doctrine's PRIMARY drawer: a site_admin draws stock from the project store TO the WP they're standing in вАФ at the WP detail screen, not /store (site_admin has no /store access). **Surface:** a аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ block in the **аЄДаЄ≥аЄВаЄ≠аЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠ tab** of the WP detail (`src/app/projects/[projectId]/work-packages/[workPackageId]/page.tsx`), rendered in a CARD right after the аЄЪаЄ±аЄЩаЄЧаЄґаЄБаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£аЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠аЄЂаЄЩаєЙаЄ≤аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ (site-purchase) block вАФ both gated `!readOnly` (= SITE_STAFF, which is exactly the `issue_stock` gate; **procurement is the read-only viewer вЖТ no аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ**, mirroring site-purchase). **New component `WpIssueStock`** (`src/components/features/store/wp-issue-stock.tsx`, 'use client'): a `аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБаЄІаЄ±аЄ™аЄФаЄЄаЄИаЄ≤аЄБаЄ™аєВаЄХаЄ£аєМ` button вЖТ BottomSheet (item `<select>` from the project's on-hand showing "аЄ°аЄµ N unit", qty, note) вЖТ `issueStock({project, item, **this WP**, qty, note})` вЖТ `router.refresh()`; empty store вЖТ "аЄҐаЄ±аЄЗаєДаЄ°аєИаЄ°аЄµаЄ™аЄХаєКаЄ≠аЄБаєГаЄЩаЄ™аєВаЄХаЄ£аєМ" + no button; below it, this WP's recent аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ list. **Page wiring:** the project's `stock_on_hand` (qty>0, joined to catalog_items) + this WP's `stock_issues` (last 10) ride the existing `loadWorkPackageDetail` Promise.all (no waterfall). **Simplification (typecheck-driven):** dropped a `readOnly`-conditional on the FETCH (the typed-empty `Promise.resolve` placeholders fought the PostgREST embed union) вАФ procurement may READ on-hand via RLS anyway (no leak), so always fetch and gate only the RENDER by `!readOnly`. **Consistency:** the WP аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ reuses the U4 buttonвЖТsheet UX + the same `STORE_ISSUE_LABEL` / `issueStock` action вАФ one аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ mechanism, two entry points (/store for managers, WP detail for the field). **No new guards/migration/nav** (the `store` component folder + the WP route already registered; no new route). **Test (written first, RED proven):** `wp-issue-stock.test.tsx` (offers a control when the store has stock, empty-state + no control when empty, issuing the chosen item to THIS WP calls `issueStock`, submit gating on item+qty, the recent-issues list renders). **Browser pass = operator on-device.** **аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ/Issue now has BOTH surfaces** вАФ the manager console (/store, U4) and the field self-service (WP detail, U5). **Out of scope (flagged):** the **two-party custody handshake** (store-keeper hands / receiver attests, reuse polymorphic consents) = next; wiring issue cost into `wp_profit` (cost-attribution, deferred with the margin layer); equipment round-trip; reversals; stock count/variance. **NEXT (Phase 3 cont.):** the two-party custody handshake on аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ (who holds the item), then stock count/variance.

## Spec 177 вАФ Store + Stock-In, U6: two-party custody handshake on аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ (2026-06-22)

Status: **U6 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 215 files / 1419** (DB-only вАФ no unit delta) ¬Ј **db:test 132 files / 2483 / 0** (file 183, 18 asserts) ¬Ј `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809000300`; db:types regenerated. The self-governance custody layer: every issued item gets exactly one custodian so "who lost it" is always answerable; shrinkage = a store P&L hit. **Operator decisions (AskUserQuestion, both recommended):** (1) **issue now, receiver confirms after** вАФ keep аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ as it is (stock decrements immediately, recorded by the keeper) + name a RECEIVER who later attests receipt; smallest change to the shipped issue flow. (2) **the receiver is a WORKER** (the team member who physically takes the material вАФ the self-governance actor; confirms via the worker portal). **Design (spec 177 ¬ІU6, DB-only; the receiver-picker at аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ + the portal confirm UI are U7):** `stock_issues` gains `receiver_worker_id` (FK workers, nullable вАФ legacy + the /store-manager path have none) + `received_at` (null = pending receipt, the audit flag). **`issue_stock` widened** with a trailing `p_receiver_worker_id default null` (DROP the 5-arg + CREATE the 6-arg = ONE overload, body reconstructed verbatim from LIVE `pg_get_functiondef`; the 5-positional callers вАФ pgTAP + the issueStock action вАФ still resolve here, receiver defaulting null); validates a named receiver is an **active worker on this project (or unassigned)** (22023). **New `confirm_stock_issue(issue)`** SECURITY DEFINER: the NAMED receiver worker attests вАФ `current_user_worker_id()` (the portal binding) must equal the issue's `receiver_worker_id`; sets `received_at`; non-workerвЖТ42501, unknown/no-receiver/already-confirmedвЖТ22023, wrong-workerвЖТ42501. **RLS:** `stock_issues` SELECT gains a `receiver_worker_id = (select current_user_worker_id())` arm so the worker portal can list their issues. **Migration `20260809000300`, pgTAP `183`.** **TWO traps caught by db:test + fixed forward вЖТ [[prc-ops-db-migration-lessons]]:** (1) **the issue_stock signature change broke pgTAP 182's structure pin** вАФ 182 asserted the 5-arg `issue_stock(uuid,uuid,uuid,numeric,text)` exists (`to_regprocedure` + `has_function_privilege`), which after the DROP returns null / errors on a non-existent function; updated 182's two pins to the 6-arg signature (the behavioral 5-positional calls still resolve, untouched). The meta-lesson: **widening an RPC's arity = grep every pgTAP file pinning the old signature.** (2) **a non-receiver worker can't READ the target issue via RLS**, so my first test passed the issue id through an RLS-scoped subquery вЖТ it resolved to NULL вЖТ `confirm_stock_issue(null)` raised 22023 (unknown), not the intended 42501 (receiver-mismatch); fixed by inserting the issue with a FIXED id and passing that literal (the definer RPC sees it and enforces the receiver-only rule). Plus an infra note: the remote pooler threw a transient `ECIRCUITBREAKER` on one file mid-suite (heavy DB traffic) вАФ re-ran clean. **Out of scope (flagged):** **U7 = the custody UI** (pick a receiver worker when аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ'ing at the WP detail + the worker-portal "аєДаЄФаєЙаЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєБаЄ•аєЙаЄІ" confirm + a pending-receipt indicator); a manager confirm-on-behalf override; wiring issue cost into `wp_profit`; equipment round-trip; reversals; stock count/variance. **NEXT (Phase 3 cont.):** U7 вАФ the custody UI (receiver picker + portal confirm), then stock count/variance.

## Spec 177 вАФ Store + Stock-In, U7: custody UI вАФ receiver picker + pending/received badge (2026-06-22)

Status: **U7 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 215 files / 1423 (+4: wp-issue-stock receiver/badge + store-manager badge)** ¬Ј `pnpm build` green. **No DB change** (reuses the U6 `issue_stock` 6-arg + `stock_issues.receiver_worker_id`/`received_at`) вЖТ no migration, no db:test delta. The ISSUE side of the custody handshake gets a UI: name a receiver when аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ'ing, and see pending-vs-received status. **Scope:** the receiver picker lives on the **WP-detail аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ** (`WpIssueStock`, the field surface where hand-over to a worker physically happens); the pending/received **badge** shows on BOTH recent-issues lists (/store + WP detail). The **/store-manager receiver picker is deferred** (managers allocate stock to a WP; the on-site receiver is the field's job) and the **worker-portal "аєДаЄФаєЙаЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєБаЄ•аєЙаЄІ" confirm is U8**. **Design:** `WpIssueStock` gains a `workers` prop + a `аЄЬаЄєаєЙаЄ£аЄ±аЄЪ (аЄЦаєЙаЄ≤аЄ°аЄµ)` `<select>` (the project's active workers) in the аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ sheet вЖТ `issueStock` passes `receiverWorkerId` (conditional spread вАФ omit when none, the supplier/exactOptionalPropertyTypes pattern); `WpIssueRow`/`IssueRow` gain `receiverName`/`receivedAt` (+ `receiverWorkerId` on the /store row) and each list renders a badge вАФ `аЄ£аЄ≠аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪ` (text-ink-muted) vs `аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєБаЄ•аєЙаЄІ` (text-action), shown only when a receiver was named (the manager path leaves it null = no badge). **Page wiring:** the WP-detail page fetches the project's active workers (`workers` where project_id + active вАФ site_admin reads them via the "workers readable by staff" RLS policy; the labour fetch already uses the RLS client) on the existing Promise.all, builds an idвЖТname map, and resolves `receiverName` from it (no fragile PostgREST embed); both pages add `receiver_worker_id, received_at` to the `stock_issues` select. **`issueStock` action** gains an optional `receiverWorkerId` вЖТ `p_receiver_worker_id` (omit-key conditional spread). **No DB / migration / guards / nav** (everything rides the U6 schema + existing routes). **Tests (written first, RED proven вАФ 4 failed/16 passed before, 20/20 after):** `wp-issue-stock.test.tsx` (the receiver select вЖТ `issueStock` called with `receiverWorkerId`; the pending/received badges + receiver name) + `store-manager.test.tsx` (the /store list badges pending vs received). **Browser pass = operator on-device.** **Out of scope (flagged):** **U8 = the worker-portal confirm** (`/portal` lists a worker's pending issues + a `аєДаЄФаєЙаЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєБаЄ•аєЙаЄІ` button вЖТ a `confirmStockIssue` action calling the U6 `confirm_stock_issue` RPC); the /store-manager receiver picker; a manager confirm-on-behalf override; wiring issue cost into `wp_profit`; stock count/variance; reversals. **NEXT (Phase 3 cont.):** U8 вАФ the worker-portal receipt confirm (closes the custody loop), then stock count/variance.

## Spec 177 вАФ Store + Stock-In, U8: worker-portal receipt confirm (closes the custody loop) (2026-06-22)

Status: **U8 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 216 files / 1426 (+3: portal-receipts)** ¬Ј `pnpm build` green. **No DB change** (reuses the U6 `confirm_stock_issue` RPC + the receiver-read RLS arm) вЖТ no migration, no db:test delta. **The custody loop is now closed:** the receiver worker attests receipt from their own portal, flipping the issue `аЄ£аЄ≠аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪ вЖТ аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєБаЄ•аєЙаЄІ`. **Design:** the `/portal` worker branch (when `get_my_worker_profile` returns a bound worker) gains a **аЄ£аЄ≤аЄҐаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£аЄ£аЄ≠аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪ** section, placed FIRST in the body (the actionable surface). It fetches the worker's pending issues вАФ `stock_issues` where `received_at is null`, joined to catalog_items + work_packages вАФ on the existing Promise.all; **the U6 receiver-read RLS arm scopes this to the bound worker's own issues** (a worker is not a project member, so the policy returns only rows where `receiver_worker_id = current_user_worker_id()`), so no explicit worker filter is needed. **New `PortalReceipts`** client component (`src/components/features/portal/portal-receipts.tsx`): each pending item (name ¬Ј spec ¬Ј WP ¬Ј qty) with a `аєДаЄФаєЙаЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєБаЄ•аєЙаЄІ` button вЖТ `confirmStockIssue` вЖТ `router.refresh()`; empty вЖТ `аєДаЄ°аєИаЄ°аЄµаЄ£аЄ≤аЄҐаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£аЄ£аЄ≠аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪ`; a per-row submitting state + an inline error. **New `confirmStockIssue(issueId)` server action** (`src/app/store/actions.ts`) calls the `confirm_stock_issue` RPC, maps 42501 (not the named receiver) вЖТ "аєДаЄ°аєИаЄ°аЄµаЄ™аЄіаЄЧаЄШаЄіаєМаЄҐаЄЈаЄЩаЄҐаЄ±аЄЩаЄ£аЄ≤аЄҐаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£аЄЩаЄµаєЙ" and 22023 (already confirmed / unknown) вЖТ a friendly message, `revalidatePath('/portal')`. **No DB / migration / guards / nav** (the `portal` component folder + the route already registered). **Test (written first, RED proven):** `portal-receipts.test.tsx` (lists pending items, empty state, the `confirmStockIssue` call shape on аєДаЄФаєЙаЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєБаЄ•аєЙаЄІ). **Browser pass = operator on-device** (the worker portal needs a portal-bound worker login). **CUSTODY HANDSHAKE COMPLETE end-to-end:** U6 engine вЖТ U7 issuer names a receiver + status badge вЖТ U8 receiver confirms on the portal. An unconfirmed issue stays `аЄ£аЄ≠аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪ` = the audit flag ("who holds it"). **Out of scope (flagged):** the /store-manager receiver picker; a manager confirm-on-behalf override (when a worker has no portal login); wiring issue cost into `wp_profit` (cost-attribution, deferred with the margin layer); equipment round-trip; reversals; stock count/variance. **NEXT (Phase 3 cont.):** stock count / variance (physical count vs on-hand вЖТ shrinkage adjustment), then reversals.

## Spec 177 вАФ Store + Stock-In, U9: stock count / variance (shrinkage) (2026-06-22)

Status: **U9 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 216 files / 1426** (DB-only вАФ no unit delta) ¬Ј **db:test 133 files / 2502 / 0** (file 184, 19 asserts) ¬Ј `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809000400`; db:types regenerated. The self-governance shrinkage mechanism: a physical count reconciles on-hand to reality, and the variance valued at cost is the store-BU P&L hit. **Design (spec 177 ¬ІU9, DB-only; the count UI is U10):** `stock_counts` (append-only physical-count events: project_id, catalog_item_id, **system_qty snapshot**, counted_qtyвЙ•0, **unit + unit_cost snapshot** (the moving-avg at count), **GENERATED `variance` = counted вИТ system** and **`variance_value` = (counted вИТ system) √Ч unit_cost** вАФ both generated from plain columns only, no generated-from-generated chain; note, counted_by вАФ no UPDATE/DELETE policy; a wrong count is corrected by a fresh count). **RPC `record_stock_count(project, item, counted_qty, note default null)`** SECURITY DEFINER: role gate = **SITE_STAFF_ROLES** (site_admin keeps the physical store + the PM tier вАФ NOT procurement) + `can_see_project`; `counted_qty >= 0` (22023); **locks the on-hand row вАФ counting is limited to items the store already tracks** (no on-hand row вЖТ 22023 "not stocked"; cataloguing found-untracked stock is a аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤, not a count); snapshots the unit (even a DEACTIVATED-but-still-on-hand item counts), computes `avg = round(value/qty, 2)` (the unchanged cost basis вАФ a count adjusts QUANTITY not unit cost), logs the count, and **reconciles on-hand to the counted truth** (`qty_on_hand = counted`, `total_value = round(counted √Ч avg, 2)`). **READ:** `stock_counts` SELECT = `can_see_project OR procurement` (the wrapped `(select current_user_role())` from the start). **Migration `20260809000400`, pgTAP `184`** (structure + anon-deny; count DOWN 100вЖТ90 вЖТ on-hand 90/value 900, variance вИТ10 / variance_value вИТ100 / system_qty 100; count UP 90вЖТ95; count to ZERO вЖТ value 0; unstocked-item + negative-qty 22023; non-member + visitor 42501; member reads the count history). **Clean first push вАФ no traps** (the prior units' lessons held: policy wrapped, fixtures complete, plan count correct). **Out of scope (flagged):** **U10 = the count UI** (a аЄХаЄ£аЄІаЄИаЄЩаЄ±аЄЪ action per on-hand row on /store вЖТ counted-qty form вЖТ `record_stock_count`, showing the variance); reversals of receipt/issue; found-untracked-stock costing; wiring issue cost into `wp_profit`; the late margin layer. **NEXT (Phase 3 cont.):** U10 вАФ the count UI (аЄХаЄ£аЄІаЄИаЄЩаЄ±аЄЪ on /store), then reversals.

## Spec 177 вАФ Store + Stock-In, U10: the count UI (аЄХаЄ£аЄІаЄИаЄЩаЄ±аЄЪ on /store) (2026-06-22)

Status: **U10 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 216 files / 1430 (+4: store-manager count)** ¬Ј `pnpm build` green. **No DB change** (reuses the U9 `record_stock_count` RPC) вЖТ no migration, no db:test delta. The U9 count engine gets its UI: count an item, see the variance, reconcile on-hand. **Surface:** each on-hand row on `/store` gets a `аЄХаЄ£аЄІаЄИаЄЩаЄ±аЄЪ` button (alongside `аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ`), gated to the **manager tier** (`canIssue` = isManagerRole = PM/super/director вАФ the /store-access вИ© `record_stock_count`-gate set; procurement on /store can't count, site_admin keeps the physical store but has no /store access вЖТ a **site_admin store-count surface is flagged** like the U5 field-аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ gap, but counting is store-wide with no per-WP analog) вЖТ a BottomSheet pre-scoped to that item: shows "аЄ£аЄ∞аЄЪаЄЪаЄ°аЄµ N unit", a **аЄИаЄ≥аЄЩаЄІаЄЩаЄЧаЄµаєИаЄЩаЄ±аЄЪаєДаЄФаєЙ** input with a **live variance preview** (`аЄ™аєИаЄІаЄЩаЄХаєИаЄ≤аЄЗ ¬±N (аЄВаЄ≤аЄФ/аєАаЄБаЄіаЄЩ/аЄХаЄ£аЄЗаЄБаЄ±аЄЩ)`, colored text-danger/text-action/text-ink-muted), + note вЖТ `recordStockCount` вЖТ refresh. **`StoreManager`** gains the count-sheet state (a third `useTransition`) + the per-row button; **`recordStockCount` server action** (`src/app/store/actions.ts`) validates uuids + `countedQty >= 0`, maps the RPC's 42501 вЖТ no-permission and 22023 вЖТ "аЄХаЄ£аЄІаЄИаЄЩаЄ±аЄЪаєДаЄФаєЙаєАаЄЙаЄЮаЄ≤аЄ∞аЄІаЄ±аЄ™аЄФаЄЄаЄЧаЄµаєИаЄ°аЄµаєГаЄЩаЄ™аєВаЄХаЄ£аєМ аЄЂаЄ£аЄЈаЄ≠аЄВаєЙаЄ≠аЄ°аЄєаЄ•аєДаЄ°аєИаЄЦаЄєаЄБаЄХаєЙаЄ≠аЄЗ", `revalidatePath('/store')`. **No DB / migration / guards / nav** (rides the U9 RPC + existing /store route). **Test (written first, RED proven вАФ 3 failed/13 passed before, 16/16 after):** `store-manager.test.tsx` count describe (the аЄХаЄ£аЄІаЄИаЄЩаЄ±аЄЪ control per row + gating, the live variance preview, the `recordStockCount` call shape). Self-inflicted test fix: `getByText(/-2/)` also matched the `PRC-2026-002` project option вЖТ tightened to `/аЄ™аєИаЄІаЄЩаЄХаєИаЄ≤аЄЗ -2/`. **Browser pass = operator on-device.** **Out of scope (flagged):** a site_admin store-count surface; a count-history view; reversals of receipt/issue; found-untracked-stock costing; wiring issue cost into `wp_profit`; the late margin layer; the deferred /store-manager receiver picker + manager confirm-on-behalf. **NEXT (Phase 3 cont.):** reversals (append-only negative receipt/issue correction), then the late margin layer (sell-to-WP per-level, flip `wp_profit` to at-issue-sell-price вАФ the cost-first dial is still locked).

## Spec 177 вАФ Store + Stock-In, U11: reversals (undo a wrong аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤ / аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ) (2026-06-22)

Status: **U11 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 216 files / 1430** (DB-only вАФ no unit delta) ¬Ј **db:test 134 files / 2520 / 0** (file 185, 18 asserts) ¬Ј `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809000500`; db:types regenerated. The correction mechanism: a wrong stock movement is undone by an append-only reversal that reverses its on-hand effect вАФ never by editing the original. **Design (spec 177 ¬ІU11, DB-only; the reversal UI is U12):** `stock_reversals` (append-only: project_id, catalog_item_id, **a TYPED FK to the reversed `receipt_id` OR `issue_id` вАФ exactly one** per CLAUDE.md's no-mixed-content-reference rule, enforced by a `(receipt_id is not null) <> (issue_id is not null)` CHECK; `qty` + `value_delta` (the on-hand value change applied вАФ negative for a receipt reversal, positive for an issue reversal); note, reversed_by вАФ no UPDATE/DELETE policy). **A partial unique index per FK (`where вА¶ is not null`) blocks reversing the same movement twice (вЖТ 23505).** **RPC `reverse_stock_receipt(receipt_id, note default null)`** (BACK_OFFICE gate вАФ the аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤ audience; membership = `can_see_project OR procurement`): loads the receipt, **locks on-hand and guards `qty_on_hand >= receipt.qty`** (you cannot un-receive stock that has since been issued out вЖТ 22023), inserts the reversal (unique check first), then subtracts `qty` + `total_cost` (depletion вЖТ value 0). **RPC `reverse_stock_issue(issue_id, note default null)`** (SITE_STAFF gate + `can_see_project`): inserts the reversal, then **adds the issue's `qty` + `total_cost` back** to on-hand (no negative risk). **READ:** `stock_reversals` SELECT = `can_see_project OR procurement` (wrapped role call). **Migration `20260809000500`, pgTAP `185`** (structure + anon-deny; procurement reverses a 30-receipt вЖТ on-hand 50вЖТ20 / value 500вЖТ200 / value_delta вИТ300; double-reverse вЖТ 23505; a receipt whose qty > on-hand вЖТ 22023; site_admin reverses a 10-issue вЖТ on-hand 20вЖТ30 / value_delta +100; double-reverse issue вЖТ 23505; visitor + non-member denies 42501; member reads the reversal history). **One trap caught by db:test + fixed forward вЖТ [[prc-ops-db-migration-lessons]]:** the receipt reversal checked the on-hand guard (`qty >= receipt.qty`) BEFORE the insert, so a double-reverse вАФ where the first reversal already dropped on-hand below the receipt qty вАФ raised 22023 (guard) instead of the intended 23505 (unique). Fix: **do the unique insert FIRST**, then the on-hand guard (a failed guard still rolls the insert back since the whole RPC call aborts atomically); applied live via `CREATE OR REPLACE` + edited the migration file (file==live). Lesson: **when an RPC has both a uniqueness constraint and a state guard, attempt the unique write before the state check** so the "already done" error wins over the "state changed" error. **Out of scope (flagged):** **U12 = the reversal UI** (a аЄБаЄ•аЄ±аЄЪаЄ£аЄ≤аЄҐаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£ button on the recent-receipts/issues lists вЖТ `reverse_stock_receipt`/`reverse_stock_issue`, with a confirm); the custody implication of reversing a CONFIRMED issue (the material returns after the worker attested вАФ allowed as a correction, surfaced later); intervening-activity makes a receipt reversal's avg approximate (exact for the immediate-mistake case); the late margin layer. **NEXT (Phase 3 cont.):** U12 вАФ the reversal UI, then the late margin layer (needs an operator decision вАФ it rewires `wp_profit`).

## Spec 177 вАФ Store + Stock-In, U12: the reversal UI (аЄБаЄ•аЄ±аЄЪаЄ£аЄ≤аЄҐаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£ on /store) (2026-06-22)

Status: **U12 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 216 files / 1435 (+5: store-manager reversal)** ¬Ј `pnpm build` green. **No DB change** (reuses the U11 `reverse_stock_receipt` / `reverse_stock_issue` RPCs) вЖТ no migration, no db:test delta. The U11 reversal engine gets its UI: undo a wrong аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤/аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ from /store with a confirm. **Surface:** `/store` gains a **аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤аЄ•аєИаЄ≤аЄ™аЄЄаЄФ** (recent receipts, last 10) list вАФ each row a `аЄБаЄ•аЄ±аЄЪаЄ£аЄ≤аЄҐаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£` control; and the existing **аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБаЄ•аєИаЄ≤аЄ™аЄЄаЄФ** list gains a `аЄБаЄ•аЄ±аЄЪаЄ£аЄ≤аЄҐаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£` control per issue. Both use the **shared `ConfirmActionButton`** (spec 67 вАФ button вЖТ themed ConfirmDialog вЖТ action in a transition вЖТ refresh; replaces window.confirm) with a per-row confirm message ("вА¶аЄВаЄ≠аЄЗаЄИаЄ∞аЄЦаЄєаЄБаЄХаЄ±аЄФаЄ≠аЄ≠аЄБаЄИаЄ≤аЄБаЄ™аєВаЄХаЄ£аєМ" / "вА¶аЄВаЄ≠аЄЗаЄИаЄ∞аЄЦаЄєаЄБаЄДаЄЈаЄЩаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤аЄ™аєВаЄХаЄ£аєМ"). **Gates (the key asymmetry):** receipt reversal = `reverse_stock_receipt` gate = **BACK_OFFICE = exactly the /store audience**, so the receipt аЄБаЄ•аЄ±аЄЪаЄ£аЄ≤аЄҐаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£ shows for **every /store user (incl. procurement вАФ it records аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤)**; issue reversal = `reverse_stock_issue` gate = SITE_STAFF вЖТ on /store that is the **manager tier**, so the issue аЄБаЄ•аЄ±аЄЪаЄ£аЄ≤аЄҐаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£ is gated on `canIssue` (procurement can't reverse an issue). **`StoreManager`** gains a `receipts` prop + the two `ConfirmActionButton`s; **`reverseStockReceipt` / `reverseStockIssue` server actions** (`src/app/store/actions.ts`) map the RPCs' 42501 / 23505 ("аЄ£аЄ≤аЄҐаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£аЄЩаЄµаєЙаЄЦаЄєаЄБаЄБаЄ•аЄ±аЄЪаєДаЄЫаєБаЄ•аєЙаЄІ") / 22023 ("аЄВаЄ≠аЄЗаЄЦаЄєаЄБаєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБаЄ≠аЄ≠аЄБаєДаЄЫаєБаЄ•аєЙаЄІ аЄБаЄ•аЄ±аЄЪаЄ£аЄ≤аЄҐаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤аєДаЄ°аєИаєДаЄФаєЙ"). **Page:** /store fetches the project's recent `stock_receipts` (last 10, joined catalog_items). **No DB / migration / guards / nav.** **Test (written first, RED proven вАФ 4 failed/17 passed before, 21/21 after):** `store-manager.test.tsx` reversal describe (the recent-аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤ list + its аЄБаЄ•аЄ±аЄЪаЄ£аЄ≤аЄҐаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£ control for any user; the receipt reversal after confirm вЖТ `reverseStockReceipt`; the issue аЄБаЄ•аЄ±аЄЪаЄ£аЄ≤аЄҐаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£ only when `canIssue`; the issue reversal after confirm вЖТ `reverseStockIssue`). **Browser pass = operator on-device.** **Out of scope (flagged):** reversal controls on the WP-detail issues list (only /store for now); the custody implication of reversing a confirmed issue; the late margin layer. **NEXT (Phase 3 cont.):** the LATE MARGIN LAYER вАФ sell-to-WP at a per-level price, flip `wp_profit` to at-issue-sell-price. **This is a FORK that needs an operator decision** (it rewires `wp_profit` and unlocks the cost-first dial); bring the design choice via AskUserQuestion before building.

## Spec 178 вАФ Store margin layer (transfer pricing), U1: sell-rate data + setter (2026-06-22)

Status: **U1 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 216 files / 1435** ¬Ј **db:test 135 files / 2534 / 0** (+1 file 186, +14 asserts) ¬Ј `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809000600`; db:types regenerated (app + worker). The BIG FORK resolved: operator AskUserQuestion locked all four recommended dials вАФ (1) **flat per-item sell rate** (global, not markup, not per-project), (2) sell **captured at issue**, (3) `wp_profit` materials = **ADD store-sell beside GL purchases** (disjoint source, no double-count), (4) external/3rd-party sales **deferred**. U1 = the data foundation (DB-only, mirrors `set_sell_rate` from spec 161 U1): `item_sell_rates` (PK `catalog_item_id`, `sell_rate numeric(12,2) >= 0`, **zero authenticated grant** = the margin-sensitive money posture) + `set_item_sell_rate(p_catalog_item_id, p_sell_rate)` definer (super_admin gate, upsert, audit row, anon EXECUTE revoked). mig `20260809000600`, pgTAP file 186. **Trap caught by db:test (1 file failed, 0 of its asserts ran): the test read the zero-grant `item_sell_rates` while `set local role authenticated` вЖТ permission-denied aborts the WHOLE transactional file (the \_tap_buf inserts roll back too вЖТ "not ok - 186" with 0 assertions). Fix = read the zero-grant table only as OWNER (before `set role` / after `reset role`); only the setter CALLS run under `authenticated` (the spec-161 pgTAP-98 pattern).** Convention note: the store family uses `22023` for value/existence validations (vs the labour family's `P0001`) вАФ kept `22023` here for store consistency.

## Spec 178 вАФ Store margin layer, U2: issue snapshots the sell price (2026-06-22)

Status: **U2 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 216 files / 1435** ¬Ј **db:test 136 files / 2546 / 0** (+1 file 187, +12 asserts) ¬Ј `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809000700`; db:types regenerated (+sell_price/total_sell on stock_issues, app + worker). The WP "buys" the stock at issue: `stock_issues` += `sell_price numeric(12,2)` (nullable вАФ legacy/cost-only rows have none) + `total_sell numeric(16,2)` generated `qty * sell_price`. `issue_stock` (**same 6-arg signature вЖТ CREATE OR REPLACE, body-only, grants + pgTAP 182/183 sig pins preserved, no DROP**) computes `v_sell = coalesce((select sell_rate from item_sell_rates where catalog_item_id=вА¶), v_avg)` вАФ the **costing rule**: an unpriced item sells AT COST (zero store margin), never null, so wp_profit (U4) is never understated. The snapshot is immutable (append-only) вАФ changing a rate only affects future issues (pgTAP proves: bump 50вЖТ80, the old issue keeps 50). issue_stock is SECURITY DEFINER so it reads the zero-grant `item_sell_rates` as owner. **Lesson re-applied:** miswrote `plan(10)` for 12 assertions (the bare `set_item_sell_rate` call isn't an assertion but the 3 post-bump checks are) вЖТ fixed to `plan(12)`. NEXT = U3 `store_pnl` read (per-item cost/sell/margin + shrinkage, reversed issues excluded).

## Spec 179 вАФ Purchase request links a catalog item (2026-06-22)

Status: **U1+U2 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 217 files / 1441 (+6: validate-purchase-request catalogItemId ¬Ј purchase-request-form-catalog)** ¬Ј **db:test 137 files / 2554 / 0** (+1 file 188, +8 asserts) ¬Ј `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809000800`; db:types regenerated (app + worker). Procurement's request (spec 171): "items not selectable yet" вЖТ operator AskUserQuestion chose the **real FK link** (not a UI snapshot). `purchase_requests` gains a **nullable `catalog_item_id` FK вЖТ catalog_items** (spec 175 master); picking a catalog item links it AND prefills `item_description` (`baseItem` + ` specAttrs`) + `unit` (a human snapshot that survives a later catalog edit/deactivation); the off-catalog free-text path stays (link null). **Posture mirrors `reason_code` (spec 176 U4):** nullable, NO default (legacy rows null), link set ONCE at create вЖТ INSERT-granted, not UPDATE-granted. **THE GRANT TRAP (caught proactively, not by a red db:test):** `purchase_requests` carries **column-scoped INSERT grants** to `authenticated` (mig `20260616000400` revoked table-level insert + re-granted an explicit column list), so a new column is NOT covered вЖТ the session-client insert would be denied; the migration adds `grant insert (catalog_item_id) вА¶ to authenticated`. **SELECT is table-level (mig `20260608120000`, never revoked) вЖТ the new column is readable without a grant** (unlike the spec-174 column-grant-SELECT trap вАФ different table, different posture). No RLS change (the INSERT policy pins requested_by/source/role only; the FK is unconstrained + nullable). **Validator** `validateCreatePurchaseRequest` += optional `catalogItemId` (uuid-or-null; blank/null/omitted вЖТ null; bad uuid вЖТ "аЄ£аЄЂаЄ±аЄ™аЄІаЄ±аЄ™аЄФаЄЄаєГаЄЩаєБаЄДаЄХаЄХаЄ≤аЄ•аєЗаЄ≠аЄБаєДаЄ°аєИаЄЦаЄєаЄБаЄХаєЙаЄ≠аЄЗ"); the exact-shape `toEqual` test updated with `catalogItemId: null`. **Action** `createPurchaseRequest` writes `catalog_item_id`. **Form** (`purchase-request-form.tsx`) += optional `catalogItems` prop (omitted/empty вЖТ picker hidden = free-text-only, **so the existing form tests are unaffected**) + a `аєАаЄ•аЄЈаЄ≠аЄБаЄІаЄ±аЄ™аЄФаЄЄаЄИаЄ≤аЄБаєБаЄДаЄХаЄХаЄ≤аЄ•аєЗаЄ≠аЄБ` `<select>` grouped by `item_category` (mirrors the supply-plan picker; option `baseItem ¬Ј specAttrs (unit)`, a `аЄЩаЄ≠аЄБаєБаЄДаЄХаЄХаЄ≤аЄ•аєЗаЄ≠аЄБ (аЄЮаЄіаЄ°аЄЮаєМаєАаЄ≠аЄЗ)` value="" escape hatch); picking prefills the description + unit (a catalog unit outside COMMON_UNITS falls to the аЄ≠аЄЈаєИаЄЩ аєЖ free-text unit input). **Both form callers feed the active catalog:** `projects/[id]/work-packages/[wpId]` (procurement + SA вАФ added to the existing Promise.all) and `review/work-packages/[wpId]` (PM review вАФ a new fetch). **Migration `20260809000800`, pgTAP `188`** (column nullable-uuid + no-default; FK to catalog_items; INSERT+SELECT granted, UPDATE not вАФ set once). **Test-first proven:** 6 validator/form cases RED before impl. **Out of scope (flagged):** reconciling PR вЖТ stock-in вЖТ on-hand by `catalog_item_id` (the payoff the link unlocks вАФ a later store unit); spend-by-item analytics; back-filling historical free-text requests; a typeahead/search picker (the grouped `<select>` matches supply-plan; a search box is a later UX unit if the catalog grows). **NEXT = the rest of procurement's "few requests" (operator to explain).**

## Spec 180 вАФ PR item is catalog-only + searchable (2026-06-23)

Status: **U1 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-23.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 217 files / 1444 (+3: catalog-search rewrite 3вЖТ6; reason/priority retargeted to search)** ¬Ј `pnpm build` green. **No DB change** (form-layer behaviour over the spec-179 column) вЖТ no migration, no db:test delta. Two operator follow-ups to spec 179: (1) "anything outside catalog must be **registered first**" вЖТ the PR item is now **catalog-only** (the `аЄЩаЄ≠аЄБаєБаЄДаЄХаЄХаЄ≤аЄ•аєЗаЄ≠аЄБ` free-text escape hatch is GONE); (2) "typing in item selection **searches** the catalog" вЖТ the grouped `<select>` becomes a typeahead. **Operator AskUserQuestion on the register-flow вЖТ chose "must register on setting"** (not inline add, not widen-to-SA): registration stays a Settings activity at `аЄХаЄ±аєЙаЄЗаЄДаєИаЄ≤ вЖТ аєБаЄДаЄХаЄХаЄ≤аЄ•аєЗаЄ≠аЄБ` (`/catalog`, spec 175, BACK_OFFICE-gated). Of PR requesters only **site_admin** isn't a catalog curator (PM/super/**procurement** all are) вАФ a missing item means asking a curator to register it; preserves the curated anti-drift catalog (the point of spec 175). **Form reshape (`purchase-request-form.tsx`, the ONLY code surface вАФ no DB/RPC/route/nav):** removed the free-text `аЄ£аЄ≤аЄҐаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£аЄІаЄ±аЄ™аЄФаЄЄ` input, the `аЄЂаЄЩаєИаЄІаЄҐ` dropdown + `аЄ≠аЄЈаєИаЄЩ аєЖ` unit-other, and the spec-179 grouped `<select>` (+ the `COMMON_UNITS`/`UNIT_OTHER_VALUE` machinery). New UX: a `аЄДаєЙаЄЩаЄЂаЄ≤аЄІаЄ±аЄ™аЄФаЄЄаЄИаЄ≤аЄБаєБаЄДаЄХаЄХаЄ≤аЄ•аєЗаЄ≠аЄБ` search input (dependency-free вАФ no combobox primitive exists; a normalised `contains` over `baseItem+specAttrs+unit`) вЖТ a short clickable result list (item ¬Ј spec (unit) + category subtitle); picking sets `catalogItemId` and **derives** `item_description` (`baseItem`+specAttrs) + `unit` as an immutable read-only chip with a `аєАаЄЫаЄ•аЄµаєИаЄҐаЄЩ` action; аЄЂаЄ°аЄ≤аЄҐаєАаЄЂаЄХаЄЄ still carries brand/model refinement. A **no-match** query shows `аєДаЄ°аєИаЄЮаЄЪаЄІаЄ±аЄ™аЄФаЄЄаЄЧаЄµаєИаЄДаєЙаЄЩаЄЂаЄ≤ вАФ аєАаЄЮаЄіаєИаЄ°аЄІаЄ±аЄ™аЄФаЄЄаЄЧаЄµаєИ аЄХаЄ±аєЙаЄЗаЄДаєИаЄ≤ вЖТ аєБаЄДаЄХаЄХаЄ≤аЄ•аєЗаЄ≠аЄБ` linking `/catalog`. **`catalogItems` prop is now REQUIRED** (both callers already pass it). **Submit gated on a chosen item** (`catalogItemId !== ""`); the shared **validator stays lenient** (catalogItemId optional uuid-or-null) so the non-form create paths (AppSheet, `record_site_purchase`, legacy) вАФ `catalog_item_id` correctly NULL вАФ are unaffected; the catalog-only rule lives at the form (the needed_by/priority UX-only posture, ADR 0026). **Tests (RED-first):** `purchase-request-form-catalog.test.tsx` rewritten (no free-text item input; typing filters; select вЖТ chip + аєАаЄЫаЄ•аЄµаєИаЄҐаЄЩ + search hidden; submit gating; submit sends linked id + derived desc/unit; no-match вЖТ /catalog link) + `-priority`/`-reason` retargeted to search+pick. **Two self-inflicted test fixes:** (a) a dynamic `аЄИаЄ≥аЄЩаЄІаЄЩ (unit)` label broke `getByLabelText("аЄИаЄ≥аЄЩаЄІаЄЩ")` вЖТ reverted to plain (unit shows in the chip); (b) a typed-spread mock wrapper вЖТ TS2556 вЖТ `vi.mocked(createPurchaseRequest)`. **Browser pass = operator on-device.** **Out of scope (flagged):** catalog-only on `record_site_purchase` (ad-hoc on-site cash buy stays free-text unless extended); inline add-to-catalog (operator chose Settings-only); arrow-key result navigation (revisit if the catalog grows large); making `catalog_item_id` NOT NULL. **NEXT = the rest of procurement's "few requests".**

## Spec 180 вАФ PR item picker, U2: pro-max bottom-sheet (2026-06-23)

Status: **U2 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-23.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 217 files / 1445 (+1: catalog picker now 8 cases вАФ adds the category-chip filter)** ¬Ј `pnpm build` green. **No DB change** (`catalog_items.image_path` already exists since spec 175 U4 вАФ the WP pages just select + sign it) вЖТ no migration, no db:test delta. Operator on the U1 inline search: **"UX is weird, any better ones? Uxui pro max."** The U1 picker dumped all ~71 catalog items in an always-open inline `<ul>` under the field вАФ a wall that shoved the form down. AskUserQuestion вЖТ **full pro-max** (bottom sheet + chips + thumbnails). **New component `CatalogItemPicker` (`src/components/features/purchasing/catalog-item-picker.tsx`):** the app's `BottomSheet` idiom (same primitive as аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ/stock/supply-plan) вАФ a trigger button `аєАаЄ•аЄЈаЄ≠аЄБаЄІаЄ±аЄ™аЄФаЄЄаЄИаЄ≤аЄБаєБаЄДаЄХаЄХаЄ≤аЄ•аєЗаЄ≠аЄБ` opens a sheet with a **pinned search** (`аЄДаєЙаЄЩаЄЂаЄ≤аЄІаЄ±аЄ™аЄФаЄЄ`, autofocus via rAF after the sheet's own focus-on-open), **category filter chips** (`RadioChip` вАФ the `/catalog` "select category first" pattern, spec 175 U6; аЄЧаЄ±аєЙаЄЗаЄЂаЄ°аЄФ + each present category), and **thumbnail result rows** (40px image or placeholder, base+spec, unit, category subtitle) with the **matched substring highlighted** (`highlight()` wraps the case-insensitive match in `text-action font-semibold`). Picking closes the sheet вЖТ a selected **chip** (thumbnail + name + `category ¬Ј unit` + `аєАаЄЫаЄ•аЄµаєИаЄҐаЄЩ`); `аєАаЄЫаЄ•аЄµаєИаЄҐаЄЩ` clears + reopens. No-match вЖТ a dashed register-CTA card вЖТ `/catalog`. **Thumbnails plumbed:** `PurchaseRequestCatalogItem` gains `thumbnailUrl: string | null`; both WP pages (`projects/[id]/work-packages/[wpId]` + `review/...`) now select `image_path` and `mintSignedUrls(CATALOG_IMAGES_BUCKET, вА¶)` (private bucket вЖТ service-role signed URLs; rows already read under the user's RLS) вАФ same pattern as `/catalog`. **The form (`purchase-request-form.tsx`) shrank:** its inline search JSX + the `catalogQuery`/`catalogMatches` state + the `Link`/`ITEM_CATEGORY_LABEL` imports moved into the picker; the form keeps `catalogItemId` + derives `item_description`/`unit` and passes `selectCatalogItem`/`clearCatalogItem` to the picker. **Tests (RED-first):** `purchase-request-form-catalog.test.tsx` rewritten for the sheet flow (trigger вЖТ search вЖТ category chip вЖТ result вЖТ chip; submit gating; submit payload; no-match вЖТ /catalog); `-reason` retargeted to open the sheet first. BottomSheet portals to `document.body` so testing-library `screen` still queries it. **Self-inflicted:** left a `setCatalogQuery("")` in the submit-reset after deleting that state (TS2304 + a test ReferenceError) вЖТ removed. **Browser pass = operator on-device** (form behind LINE auth + project/WP context). **NEXT = the rest of procurement's "few requests".**

## Spec 180 вАФ PR item picker, U3: category tap no longer ghost-selects an item (2026-06-23)

Status: **U3 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-23.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest unchanged (217 / 1445)** ¬Ј `pnpm build` green. **No DB change, single-file fix.** Operator: "tapping item categories sometimes turns into item selection." Root cause: the category chips are `RadioChip`s (an sr-only native radio). Tapping one focuses the radio вЖТ `BottomSheet`'s panel `onFocus={handleFocusCapture}` runs `scrollIntoView({ block: "center" })` (rAF) on the focused control вАФ intended to lift a text input above the keyboard, but on a chip it **scrolls the result list up under the finger**, so the synthesized touch `click` lands on a result row. The rAF timing is why it's intermittent ("sometimes"); it only misfires when the chip wasn't already centered. **Fix (`catalog-item-picker.tsx`):** `onFocusCapture={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}` on the category chip-row `<div>` вАФ a capture-phase stop halts the focus event before it bubbles to the panel's `onFocus`, so the sheet doesn't re-center on a chip (the radio still focuses; selection/a11y intact). The search input is untouched вЖТ still centers for the keyboard. **Not unit-testable** (the bug is touch + scrollIntoView layout timing, absent in jsdom вАФ no real scroll/touch); existing category-chip filter test still green; verified on-device by the operator. **NEXT = the rest of procurement's "few requests".**

## Spec 181 вАФ Supply Plan bulk PR, U1: procurement plans in PM's stead (2026-06-23)

Status: **U1 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-23.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 217 files / 1448 (+3: SUPPLY_PLAN_ROLES role-set pins)** ¬Ј **db:test 138 files / 2565 / 0** (+1 file 189, +11 asserts) ¬Ј `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809000900`; **no db:types delta** (RLS + RPC-gate only, no signature/column change). The "bulk PR (planned purchases)" arc opens. Operator's canonical flow: **PM plans вЖТ procurement compares prices вЖТ PD approves вЖТ procurement purchases**; for the moment procurement ALSO does the planning (PM's stead), PD approval stays required. **Locked decisions (AskUserQuestion + free-text):** (1) plan must be **PD-approved** before procurement generates PRs; generated PRs are **born `approved`** (inherit the plan's PD approval, no per-PR re-approval) вЖТ ready for the existing price-compare/PO flow [U3]; (2) procurement does create/add/remove/submit + generate; **approve/reject stay PD/super**; (3) entry = **inline grid** [U2], no paste-import v1; (4) **accuracy-correctness catch** вАФ a plan-generated PR is PLANNED not reactive, so it links to its plan line and is **excluded from `unplanned_miss`** [U3], else generating PRs would corrupt the very metric spec 176 exists to produce. **U1 = procurement ACCESS (this unit):** new `SUPPLY_PLAN_ROLES = [...PM_ROLES, "procurement"]` (role-home; members coincide with WORKER_ROSTER_ROLES, meaning differs = "who plans supply", kept separate per role-doctrine). **Migration `20260809000900`** (RLS + RPC widening, **`alter policy` + `CREATE OR REPLACE`, bodies sourced from LIVE = spec-176 U1/U3, edited only at role-list + membership lines**): the `supply_plans`/`supply_plan_lines` SELECT policies gain a `current_user_role()='procurement'` arm beside `can_see_project` (procurement is cross-project вЖТ its arm carries NO membership gate, spec 171/173 pattern); `create_supply_plan`/`add_supply_plan_line`/`remove_supply_plan_line`/`submit_supply_plan` role-list += procurement + membership skipped for it (`role <> 'procurement' AND NOT can_see_project`); `approve_supply_plan`/`reject_supply_plan` **untouched** (PD/super). **Page** (`/projects/[id]/supply-plan`): `requireRole(SUPPLY_PLAN_ROLES)`; the `SupplyPlanAccuracy` card is rendered ONLY for the planner tier (procurement skips it вАФ `supply_plan_accuracy` stays PM-gated + the measure is the PM's, so the page would 42501/empty otherwise); `canApprove` stays PD/super вЖТ procurement sees add/submit, no approve. **pgTAP `189`:** cross-project procurement (non-member) create+read+add+read-line+remove+submit + status=submitted; **cannot approve (42501)**; a non-member PM stays denied (procurement arm didn't widen PM); anon still can't EXECUTE (CREATE OR REPLACE preserved the revoke вАФ no DROP+CREATE anon re-grant). **Clean first push вАФ no traps** (CREATE OR REPLACE preserved grants; pgTAP 176 had no procurement pins to break; `alter policy` kept the policy names so any name pins hold). **NEXT = U2** (bulk-add RPC + the inline grid editor), then U3 (generation engine + accuracy exclusion), U4 (convert mode UI).

## Spec 181 вАФ Supply Plan bulk PR, U2: bulk-add + the inline grid editor (2026-06-23)

Status: **U2 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-23.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 217 files / 1450 (+2: supply-plan-manager grid 6вЖТ8)** ¬Ј **db:test 139 files / 2574 / 0** (+1 file 190) ¬Ј `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809001000`; db:types regenerated (app + worker, +`add_supply_plan_lines`). The "table / multiple items at once" the operator asked for. **DB вАФ `add_supply_plan_lines(p_plan_id uuid, p_lines jsonb)`** (mig `20260809001000`): loops `jsonb_array_elements`, validates + inserts every line with the SAME per-line checks as the single `add_supply_plan_line` (qty>0, active catalog item, WP-in-project), **ATOMIC** вАФ any bad line `raise`s вЖТ the whole batch rolls back (no partial saves). Same gate as the single add (PM/super/director/**procurement**, membership skipped for procurement); plan must be draft/rejected; returns the count inserted. The unique (item, WP) index still bites (dup vs the batch or vs existing вЖТ 23505, rolls back). **Action `bulkAddPlanLines`** (`supply-plan/actions.ts`): validates each row client-side (uuid + qty>0), get-or-creates the plan (`create_supply_plan`), then one `add_supply_plan_lines` call; maps 23505/42501/22023. **UI вАФ `SupplyPlanManager` rewritten** to an **inline grid** replacing the spec-176 one-at-a-time BottomSheet: N draft rows (item grouped-`<select>` + WP `<select>` (аЄЧаЄ±аєЙаЄЗаєВаЄДаЄ£аЄЗаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£ = null) + qty number + note + аєАаЄ≠аЄ≤аєБаЄЦаЄІаЄ≠аЄ≠аЄБ), `пЉЛ аєАаЄЮаЄіаєИаЄ°аєБаЄЦаЄІ`, and `аЄЪаЄ±аЄЩаЄЧаЄґаЄБ N аЄ£аЄ≤аЄҐаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£` that bulk-saves only the COMPLETE rows (item + qty>0; blank/partial trailing rows ignored вАФ forgiving fast entry) вЖТ resets to one blank row + refresh. The saved-lines list + the lifecycle buttons (аЄ™аєИаЄЗаЄ≠аЄЩаЄЄаЄ°аЄ±аЄХаЄі / аЄ≠аЄЩаЄЄаЄ°аЄ±аЄХаЄі / аЄХаЄµаЄБаЄ•аЄ±аЄЪ) are unchanged. **Used the existing grouped-`<select>` per row (NOT the spec-180 searchable picker)** to keep U2 decoupled (no cross-feature coupling, no thumbnail plumbing, no page change) вАФ **swapping the grid's item cell to the searchable CatalogItemPicker is a flagged follow-up** if the 71-item select feels heavy. **Test rewrite (`supply-plan-manager.test.tsx`):** the two add cases вЖТ grid (disable-save-until-item+qty, bulk-save shape `{projectId, lines:[{catalogItemId, workPackageId, qty, note}]}`, whole-project null-WP, пЉЛаєАаЄЮаЄіаєИаЄ°аєБаЄЦаЄІ adds a row); remove/submit/approve/reject unchanged; read-only now asserts the grid is absent. **Draft-row remove uses aria-label `аєАаЄ≠аЄ≤аєБаЄЦаЄІаЄ≠аЄ≠аЄБ`** (NOT `аЄ•аЄЪ`) so it doesn't collide with the saved-line `аЄ•аЄЪ` button in `getByRole`. **Self-inflicted:** wrote `plan(10)` for 9 assertions in pgTAP 190 вЖТ the custom runner does NOT fail on plan-count mismatch (only counts not-ok), so it slipped past the first db:test green; caught by an explicit assert-count grep, fixed to `plan(9)`. **Lesson re-logged: the pgTAP runner is lenient on plan mismatches вАФ grep `plan(N)` vs the real assertion count, don't trust a green db:test alone.** (Spawned a chip to reconcile a few PRE-EXISTING plan mismatches in other files, incl. one "planned 16 ran 15" = a silently-skipped assertion.) **NEXT = U3** (the generation engine: `purchase_requests.supply_plan_line_id` + `generate_purchase_requests_from_plan` born-approved + accuracy exclusion), then U4 (convert UI).

## Spec 181 вАФ Supply Plan bulk PR, U3: the generation engine (2026-06-23)

Status: **U3 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-23.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **db:test 140 files / 2584 / 0** (+1 file 191, +10 asserts) ¬Ј **vitest unchanged** (DB + action only, no UI) ¬Ј `pnpm build` (pending the U3+U4 ship вАФ built green at U2) ; db:push applied `20260809001100`; db:types regenerated (+`supply_plan_line_id` column + `generate_purchase_requests_from_plan` RPC). The "bulk PR" engine: an approved plan's selected lines вЖТ purchase_requests in one call. **Schema:** `purchase_requests.supply_plan_line_id` (nullable FK вЖТ supply_plan_lines) + a **PARTIAL unique index** `where supply_plan_line_id is not null` (a line converts at most once = idempotency; NULL вАФ the vast majority вАФ unconstrained). No authenticated INSERT grant needed for the new column вАФ the definer RPC owns the insert. **RPC `generate_purchase_requests_from_plan(p_plan_id, p_line_ids uuid[])`** (mig `20260809001100`): gate PM/super/director/**procurement** (membership skipped for procurement); plan must be **`approved`** (else 22023); loops the selected lines, **born-`approved` PRs** (status='approved', `approved_by = the plan's approver`, decided_at=now, reason_code NULL, source 'app', requested_by=auth.uid(), supply_plan_line_id=line) вАФ **inherits the plan's PD approval, no per-PR re-approval**; **skips already-linked lines** (idempotent, returns the count); **whole-project lines (null WP) вЖТ 22023** (a PR is raised against a WP). **Born-approved is SAFE вАФ verified the triggers:** the only AFTER-INSERT trigger `notify_pr_created` fires `when (new.status = 'requested')` so a born-approved PR sends NO false "needs approval" notification; every other purchase_requests trigger (audit_decision/cancellation/appsheet, derive, set_updated_at, notify_status_change) is AFTER/BEFORE **UPDATE** вЖТ none fire on insert. **`auth.uid()` inside SECURITY DEFINER returns the CALLING user** (procurement), not the owner вАФ JWT claims are session context, role is what DEFINER swaps (same as approve_supply_plan). **Accuracy fix (the design catch):** `supply_plan_accuracy` (CREATE OR REPLACE, grants preserved) gains `and r.supply_plan_line_id is null` in the prs CTE вАФ **plan-generated PRs (reason NULL but PLANNED) are excluded from the reactive/untagged counts**, else every planned order would read as a planning miss. **Action `generatePlanPurchaseRequests`** relays the RPC (maps 42501/22023; revalidates /supply-plan + /requests). pgTAP `191`: procurement generates 2 вЖТ born-approved + approved_by=PD; idempotent re-gen вЖТ 0; null-WP вЖТ 22023; non-approved plan вЖТ 22023; **accuracy: the 2 generated PRs excluded from untagged (0), the 1 reactive PR still counts as unplanned_miss (1)**. Generated PRs flow into the existing create_purchase_order (operates on approved PRs) = procurement's price-compare/PO step. **NEXT = U4** вАФ the convert-mode UI (checkboxes on an approved plan's lines + аЄ™аЄ£аєЙаЄ≤аЄЗаЄДаЄ≥аЄВаЄ≠аЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠, per-row PR-аєБаЄ•аєЙаЄІ badge), per the mockup.

## Spec 181 вАФ Supply Plan bulk PR, U4: the convert-mode UI (ARC COMPLETE) (2026-06-23)

Status: **U4 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-23. SPEC 181 ARC COMPLETE (U1вАУU4).** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 217 files / 1453 (+3: SupplyPlanManager convert mode)** ¬Ј `pnpm build` green. **No DB change** (reuses the U3 `generate_purchase_requests_from_plan` RPC + a page-side converted-set read) вЖТ no migration, no db:test delta. The user-facing payoff: on an **approved** plan, select lines and fire the PRs. **`SupplyPlanManager` convert mode** (`planStatus === 'approved'`): the saved-lines list gains a leading **checkbox** for each convertible line (WP-bound + not yet converted), a trailing **`аЄ™аЄ£аєЙаЄ≤аЄЗ PR аєБаЄ•аєЙаЄІ`** badge for already-converted lines, and a **`аЄХаєЙаЄ≠аЄЗаЄ£аЄ∞аЄЪаЄЄаЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩаЄБаєИаЄ≠аЄЩ`** note for whole-project (null-WP) lines; below, a **`аЄ™аЄ£аєЙаЄ≤аЄЗаЄДаЄ≥аЄВаЄ≠аЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠аЄИаЄ≤аЄБаєБаЄЬаЄЩ`** bar with **аєАаЄ•аЄЈаЄ≠аЄБаЄЧаЄ±аєЙаЄЗаЄЂаЄ°аЄФ** + **`аЄ™аЄ£аєЙаЄ≤аЄЗаЄДаЄ≥аЄВаЄ≠аЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠ (N)`** вЖТ `generatePlanPurchaseRequests({projectId, planId, lineIds})` вЖТ clears the selection + a `аЄ™аЄ£аєЙаЄ≤аЄЗаЄДаЄ≥аЄВаЄ≠аЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠аєБаЄ•аєЙаЄІ N аЄ£аЄ≤аЄҐаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£` status + refresh. Everyone on the page can generate (the page gate = SUPPLY_PLAN_ROLES = exactly the RPC's generate gate). **Page** (`/projects/[id]/supply-plan`): `PlanLine` gains `converted: boolean` вАФ after loading the lines it reads `purchase_requests.supply_plan_line_id IN (lineIds)` (procurement/PM via the privileged PR SELECT) вЖТ marks each line converted (idempotent badge + excluded from selection). **Tests:** the convert describe (badge on a converted line, no checkbox for converted/whole-project, select вЖТ `generatePlanPurchaseRequests` shape `{projectId, planId, lineIds:["lc"]}`, select-all, no convert UI on a draft plan). **Browser pass = operator on-device.** **THE BULK-PR ARC IS DONE end-to-end:** procurement (PM's stead) plans in the inline grid (U2) вЖТ PD approves вЖТ procurement checks the approved lines and fires born-approved PRs (U3 engine, U4 UI) вЖТ they flow into the existing price-compare/PO step; plan-linked PRs stay out of the PM-accuracy metric. **Flagged follow-ups:** swap the grid's grouped-`<select>` item cell to the spec-180 searchable picker; paste-from-spreadsheet import; whole-project (null-WP) line conversion; the convert UI as a proper desktop table (mockup) vs the current responsive list.

## Spec 181 вАФ Supply Plan bulk PR, U5: the missing nav door for procurement (2026-06-23)

Status: **U5 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-23.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј `pnpm build` green. **No DB change, single-file nav fix.** Operator: "procurement said they cannot find the menu." Root cause = the spec-171-U4 "access without a door" lesson, again: U1 admitted procurement to the `/projects/[id]/supply-plan` page + RPCs, but the **аєБаЄЬаЄЩаЄИаЄ±аЄФаЄЂаЄ≤ chip on the project page was inside `{isManagerRole(ctx.role)}`** (PM/super/director) вАФ and **procurement is NOT a manager role**, so it never saw the link. The whole path otherwise already existed: procurement hub вЖТ `аєВаЄДаЄ£аЄЗаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£` (`/projects`, PROJECT_VIEW_ROLES) вЖТ a project page (PROJECT_VIEW_ROLES, spec 173) вЖТ вА¶ but the supply-plan chip was the dead end. **Fix (`projects/[projectId]/page.tsx`):** `const canPlanSupply = SUPPLY_PLAN_ROLES.includes(ctx.role)` (mirrors `canOpenSchedule`) + the аєБаЄЬаЄЩаЄИаЄ±аЄФаЄЂаЄ≤ `<Link>` MOVED OUT of the manager-only block into its own `{canPlanSupply ? вА¶ : null}` door (placed right after the schedule chip). The reports/settings chips stay manager-only. No project-page test pins these chips (none exists), so no test delta. **LESSON re-logged (3rd time вАФ spec 171 U4, this): admitting a role to a PAGE + its RPCs is HALF the job вАФ also surface the NAV chip/link that reaches it, and check whether it's bundled inside an `isManagerRole`/PM-only block that excludes the new role.** **SPEC 181 NOW REACHABLE end-to-end for procurement.**

## Spec 182 вАФ Procurement price comparison, U1: quote capture + compare table (2026-06-23)

Status: **U1 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-23.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 218 files / 1457 (+4: price-comparison)** ¬Ј **db:test 141 files / 2597 / 0** (+1 file 192, +13 asserts) ¬Ј `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809001200`; db:types regenerated (+`purchase_quotes` table + 2 RPCs). Procurement's price comparison was 100% offline (pick one supplier, type the amount into the PO; losing quotes vanish). U1 = structured quote capture + a ranked compare table. **DB вАФ `purchase_quotes`** (mig `20260809001200`): PR + supplier + `unit_price numeric(12,2) >= 0` + note; **UNIQUE (purchase_request_id, supplier_id)** (one quote per supplier; re-quote = remove+re-add). **Money posture (unit_price is sensitive вАФ more than PO existence):** RLS SELECT to **back-office only (PM/procurement/super_admin/project_director), NOT site_admin**; no write policy. RPCs `add_purchase_quote` (back-office gate; PR must be **`approved`** = the pre-PO sourcing window; dup supplier вЖТ 23505; unknown PR/supplier or non-approved вЖТ 22023) + `remove_purchase_quote`. **THE project_director RIDE-ALONG TRAP вАФ caught by db:test file 91 (3rd time this session): a policy/RPC naming `project_manager` MUST also name `project_director`.** My first cut listed `('project_manager','procurement','super_admin')` вЖТ file 91 RED (2 fails). Fixed forward: added `project_director` to the policy + both RPCs, **re-applied to live via `supabase db query --linked --file`** (ALTER POLICY + CREATE OR REPLACE the 2 funcs) since the migration was already pushed, AND edited the migration file so a fresh setup is correct. **Action** `addPurchaseQuote`/`removePurchaseQuote` (maps 23505/42501/22023; trap: the RPC `p_note` param is typed `string` non-null вЖТ pass `?? ""` not `?? null`). **UI вАФ `PriceComparison`** (`price-comparison.tsx`): ranks quotes cheapest-first, cheapest row highlighted + `аЄЦаЄєаЄБаЄ™аЄЄаЄФ`, total = unit_price √Ч qty, `+N%` over the cheapest; an add form (supplier `<select>` of NOT-yet-quoted suppliers + аЄ£аЄ≤аЄДаЄ≤аЄХаєИаЄ≠аЄЂаЄЩаєИаЄІаЄҐ) + per-row remove. **Wired into `/requests/[requestId]`** in the `isBackOffice && status==='approved'` branch, ABOVE `CreatePoFromRequestButton` (compare вЖТ then order); the page fetches the PR's quotes (supplier-name embed, ordered by price) only for that branch. **Tests:** pgTAP 192 (back-office add/read/remove, dupвЖТ23505, non-approvedвЖТ22023, **site_admin can neither add (42501) nor READ (RLS count 0)**); `price-comparison.test.tsx` (rank+total+% , add offers only un-quoted suppliers, remove, empty state). **NEXT = U2** (pick a quote вЖТ prefill `create_purchase_order` with that supplier + amount), then U3 (price-history benchmark via the spec-179 catalog link), U4 (per-quote doc attachment).

## Spec 182 вАФ Procurement price comparison, U2: pick winner вЖТ PO (2026-06-23)

Status: **U2 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-23.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 218 files / 1459 (+2: pickвЖТPO)** ¬Ј `pnpm build` green. **No DB change** (reuses `create_purchase_order` + the U1 quotes) вЖТ no migration, no db:test delta. The winning quote now flows into the PO. **`CreatePurchaseOrderSheet`** gained `defaultSupplierId` + `defaultAmounts` props (seeded into the initial `supplierId`/`amounts` state; the caller **remounts via `key`** on a new pick вАФ avoids the setState-in-effect React-Compiler lint). **`PriceComparison`** now owns the create-PO action: each quote row gets a **pick radio** (defaults to the cheapest; the picked row gets `border-action bg-action-soft`), and a **`аЄ™аЄ£аєЙаЄ≤аЄЗаєГаЄЪаЄ™аЄ±аєИаЄЗаЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠аЄИаЄ≤аЄБ {supplier}`** button opens the sheet **prefilled** with the picked supplier + `defaultAmounts = { [line.id]: net total }` (net = unit_price √Ч qty; the sheet's default VAT mode is already `exclusive` = net+7%, matching Thai net quotes). With no quotes the button opens the sheet blank (same as before). **`/requests/[requestId]`** now renders `PriceComparison` with the PR-as-`line` and **drops the standalone `CreatePoFromRequestButton`** (PriceComparison owns it) вАФ the approved-state action is unified. **exactOptionalPropertyTypes trap:** passing `defaultSupplierId={picked?.supplierId}` (string|undefined) into a `?: string` prop вЖТ TS2375; fixed by typing the prop `?: string | undefined`. **Test:** the PO sheet is mocked to a stub exposing the prefill props; default-pick = cheapest (s1, аЄњ4,600), re-pick the dearer quote вЖТ that supplier + total (s2, аЄњ4,900). **NEXT = U3** (price-history benchmark via the spec-179 catalog link), then U4 (per-quote doc attachment).

## Spec 182 вАФ Procurement price comparison, U3: last-paid benchmark (2026-06-23)

Status: **U3 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-23.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 218 files / 1461 (+2: price-history benchmark)** ¬Ј **db:test 142 files / 2607 / 0** (+1 file 193, +10 asserts) ¬Ј `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809001300`; db:types regenerated (+`item_price_history` RPC). The "what did we pay last time" reference above the quote table. **DB вАФ `item_price_history(p_catalog_item_id uuid)`** (mig `20260809001300`): SECURITY DEFINER table-returning read вЖТ recent PURCHASED `purchase_requests` for a catalog item (the spec-179 link) вЖТ `supplier_name` (coalesce suppliers.name, the text snapshot), **NET unit price** (`round(amount/(1+vat_rate/100)/nullif(qty,0), 2)` вАФ amount is the line GROSS per spec 119, so net = apples-to-apples with the net quotes), qty, purchased_at; `where amount is not null and quantity > 0`, **order by `coalesce(purchased_at, requested_at) desc` limit 5**. **Money posture (ADR 0038, same as purchase_quotes):** back-office role gate (PM/procurement/super/**project_director** вАФ the file-91 ride-along, named correctly first try this time) вЖТ site_admin + anon get nothing; DEFINER also lets the cross-project price reference see purchases beyond the caller's membership (a price benchmark is org-wide). **UI вАФ `PriceComparison`** gains an optional `history: ItemPriceHistory[]` prop (default `[]` вЖТ U1/U2 tests untouched); when non-empty it renders **`аєАаЄДаЄҐаЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠аЄ•аєИаЄ≤аЄ™аЄЄаЄФ аЄњX/{unit} аЄИаЄ≤аЄБ Y ¬Ј N аЄДаЄ£аЄ±аєЙаЄЗ`** above the аєАаЄЫаЄ£аЄµаЄҐаЄЪаєАаЄЧаЄµаЄҐаЄЪаЄ£аЄ≤аЄДаЄ≤ heading (X/Y from `history[0]` = newest; N = `history.length`). **Page** (`/requests/[requestId]`): the select gains `catalog_item_id`; the history is fetched (one `rpc("item_price_history")`) only in the `isBackOffice && status==='approved' && catalog_item_id` case (off-catalog PRs have no axis вЖТ no line) and passed to `PriceComparison`. **Tests:** pgTAP 193 (shape + SECURITY DEFINER + anon-no-exec; **site_admin вЖТ 42501**; count excludes the amount-null PR + the other-item PR; net with VAT 0 = 98, with VAT 7% = 100, a null-supplier_id row coalesces to the text snapshot = 100; no null nets; `results_eq` on `purchased_at` proves newest-first); component test (benchmark line shows newest price/supplier/`N аЄДаЄ£аЄ±аєЙаЄЗ`; no line when history empty). **NET decision (no operator ask needed):** quotes are NET so last-paid is computed NET for a fair compare; the line uses the actual `unit` (matching the quote rows) not the literal "аЄЂаЄЩаєИаЄІаЄҐ". **NEXT = U4** (per-quote doc attachment: `quote` attachment purpose + `quote_id` FK).

## Spec 182 вАФ Procurement price comparison, U4: per-quote source document (ARC COMPLETE) (2026-06-23)

Status: **U4 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-23. SPEC 182 ARC COMPLETE (U1вАУU4).** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 218 files / 1463 (+2: quote-doc render)** ¬Ј **db:test 143 files / 2619 / 0** (+1 file 194, +12 asserts; +pin updates in file 20) ¬Ј `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809001400`+`20260809001500`; db:types regenerated (+`quote_id` column on attachments + the view). Each supplier quote (U1) now carries its source quotation doc (the рЯУО). **DB вАФ mig `вА¶001400`** adds the `quote` value to `purchase_request_attachment_purpose` (own migration вАФ ADD VALUE can't be referenced same-txn, the spec-66 invoice precedent). **mig `вА¶001500`:** `purchase_request_attachments.quote_id` (nullable FK вЖТ `purchase_quotes`, **ON DELETE CASCADE** вАФ matches the sibling PR FK; both dormant outside the admin hard-delete) + `pra_quote_id_shape` CHECK (quote_id only on quote rows) + column-scoped `grant insert(quote_id)` (the spec-179 new-column lesson); the INSERT policy gains a **quote arm** (back-office only вАФ NOT site_admin; PR `approved`; quote on THIS PR); a **RESTRICTIVE select** gates quote-purpose rows to back-office (money вАФ a quotation shows prices); the storage upload policy widened (+procurement/+director, +`approved` status arm); the `_current` view appends `quote_id`. **Action `addQuoteAttachment`** mirrors `addInvoiceAttachment` (idempotent 23505 replay; purpose='quote'+quote_id; server rebuilds the path). **UI:** new `QuoteDocAttach` (per-row uploader, the InvoiceUploader flow) вАФ a doc-less quote row shows the attach control, a doc'd row shows a `аєАаЄ≠аЄБаЄ™аЄ≤аЄ£` link; **remove is disabled on a doc'd quote** (append-only + FK вЖТ not hard-removable; kept for audit, aligned with "losing quotes are kept"). The page fetches quote docs (`purpose='quote'` from `_current`, signed via the pr-attachments bucket) вЖТ `quoteId вЖТ url` map passed to `PriceComparison`. **Per-row attach (not mid-add)** chosen for robustness + it matches the spec doc's "рЯУО per quote row"; the task's "in the add form" phrasing is an impl hint. **TRAPS caught by db:test (all forward-fixed; the corrected INSERT policy re-applied to live via `supabase db query --linked --file` since `вА¶001500` was already pushed):** (1) **name-capture** вАФ `q.purchase_request_id = purchase_request_id` bound the unqualified RHS to `q` (purchase_quotes has that column!) вЖТ always true вЖТ a cross-PR quote could be linked; qualified to `purchase_request_attachments.purchase_request_id` (the hazard every attachments-policy header warns about). (2) **bare eval-once** вАФ wrote `current_user_role()`/`auth.uid()` bare вЖТ pgTAP file 40 RED; wrapped as `(select вА¶)` (pg_get_expr drops the `public.` so `(select public.current_user_role())` still satisfies the lint вАФ file 40 stayed the model). (3) **two file-20 pins** my change legitimately invalidates вАФ the purpose-enum label set (+quote) + `policies_are` (the 4th, restrictive, policy); updated both. (4) **spec-143 membership** вАФ the pgTAP fixture's site_admin needed a `project_members` row to read the parent PR (procurement keeps its cross-project read). **Verified:** procurement attaches on an approved PR + reads; site_admin can neither attach (42501) nor read the quote doc (RESTRICTIVE, incl. via the view) but still sees the parent's reference row; a cross-PR quote_id is rejected. **THE PRICE-COMPARISON ARC IS DONE end-to-end:** capture N supplier quotes (U1) вЖТ rank + pick вЖТ prefill the PO (U2) вЖТ last-paid benchmark from history (U3) вЖТ each quote carries its source doc (U4). **Flagged follow-ups:** removing/replacing an attached quote doc (the doc-removal path is out of U4 scope вАФ a doc'd quote is currently immutable); a desktop table layout; quote expiry/validity dates.

## Spec 178 вАФ Store margin layer, U3: Store P&L read (2026-06-23)

Status: **U3 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-23.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **db:test 144 files / 2633 / 0** (+1 file 195, +14 asserts) ¬Ј `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809001600`; db:types regenerated (+`store_pnl`, app + worker). **Renumbered around the concurrent spec-179/181/182 session** (it took migs `вА¶000800`вАУ`вА¶001500` + pgTAP 188вАУ194, all merged to main while I was paused; U1+U2 stayed ancestors of HEAD `b20f3554`) вЖТ my mig = `вА¶001600`, pgTAP = 195. The margin layer becomes observable: `store_pnl(p_project_id)` returns **per-item** rows вАФ `qty_issued`, `cost_total` (ќ£ total_cost), `sell_total` (ќ£ **`coalesce(total_sell, total_cost)`** so unpriced/legacy issues count at cost), `margin` (sellвИТcost), `shrinkage_value` (ќ£ `stock_counts.variance_value`). **Reversed issues excluded** (anti-join `stock_reversals` on `issue_id` вАФ a reversed аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ never charged the WP). FULL OUTER JOIN of per-item issue aggregates + per-item count aggregates вЖТ an item that was only counted (pure shrinkage) still appears. **Money gate super_admin / project_director** (mirrors `wp_profit` вАФ NOT procurement, NOT site_admin/PM); SECURITY DEFINER, called on the user session (admin client has no JWT вЖТ 42501). Unknown project вЖТ 22023. pgTAP 195 (14): structure + anon-deny + per-item cost/sell/margin/shrinkage + unpriced-at-cost + reversed-excluded + director-allowed + PM/procurement-denied + unknown-project. Clean first push. NEXT = U4 flip `wp_profit` (fold ќ£ total_sell of non-reversed issues into the materials line).

## Spec 178 вАФ Store margin layer, U4: flip wp_profit (the keystone) (2026-06-23)

Status: **U4 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-23.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 1463** ¬Ј **db:test 145 files / 2637 / 0** (+1 file 196, +4 asserts) ¬Ј `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809001700`; **db:types ZERO drift** (same return signature). The transfer-pricing payoff lands: `wp_profit`'s `materials_cost` now = the GL acct-1400 purchase cost (unchanged) **PLUS** the per-WP `ќ£ coalesce(total_sell, total_cost)` of **non-reversed** `stock_issues` вАФ the store charges the WP its SELL price for material drawn from the store. **Disjoint sources** (store issues are never posted to the GL) вЖТ additive, no double-count; a WP pays sell price for store stock AND purchase price for direct-to-WP buys. Reversed issues excluded (anti-join `stock_reversals` on `issue_id`). **Body sourced from the LIVE `pg_get_functiondef`** (confirmed unchanged by the concurrent session), not an old migration вАФ the recurring overload/dropped-gate trap; **SAME return signature вЖТ CREATE OR REPLACE (body-only)**, so grants + the pgTAP **102** structure pins + the 90/91 gate invariants (no PM ref) all hold, and `settle_project` banks the new profit automatically (it reads `wp_profit.profit`). pgTAP 196 (4): WP-with-store-issues materials = store-sell 520 (priced 500 + unpriced-at-cost 20; reversed 5000 excluded) ¬Ј profit = budget 1000 вИТ 520 ¬Ј a WP with no store draws unchanged (per-WP, no leak) ¬Ј labor_sell still 0 (only the materials line folds). **102/104/105 stayed green** (their fixtures have no `stock_issues` on the tested WPs вЖТ the new term = 0). Clean first push. **wp_profit now reflects the store as a transfer-pricing BU. The cost-first dial is unlocked end-to-end (engine).** NEXT = U5 sell-rate setter UI (super-only) ¬Ј U6 store-margin UI on /store ¬Ј then Stream B mop-up.

## Spec 178 вАФ Store margin layer, U5: the sell-rate setter UI (super-only) (2026-06-23)

Status: **U5 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-23.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 219 files / 1466 (+3: set-sell-rate)** ¬Ј `pnpm build` green. **Code-only вАФ no DB / migration / db:test delta** (reuses the U1 `set_item_sell_rate` RPC). The first margin-layer UI: the operator can finally set the per-item sell rate. **Home = `/catalog`** (the item registry вАФ sell rate is a global per-item attribute). **Super_admin ONLY, money-locked end to end:** the rate is read on the page **via the admin client** and **only when `ctx.role === "super_admin"`** (the nova money pattern вАФ `item_sell_rates` is zero authenticated grant, so the rate never reaches the client for procurement/PM/director); written via the new **`setItemSellRate`** action (`requireRole(["super_admin"])` + `set_item_sell_rate` on the RLS server client so the definer super gate resolves; maps 42501/22023). New **`SetSellRate`** client control (per row, gated on a `canSetSellRate` prop) вАФ shows `аЄњ{rate}` when set or `аЄХаЄ±аєЙаЄЗаЄ£аЄ≤аЄДаЄ≤аЄВаЄ≤аЄҐ` when unset вЖТ a BottomSheet number input вЖТ `setItemSellRate` вЖТ refresh. `CatalogList` += `canSetSellRate` prop + `sellRate?` on `CatalogItem` (omitted for non-super via conditional spread вАФ the rate doesn't leave the server).
