Labels `ITEM_SELL_RATE_LABEL`/`SET_ITEM_SELL_RATE_LABEL` in labels.ts. **2 traps:** (1) `getByLabelText(/аЄ£аЄ≤аЄДаЄ≤аЄВаЄ≤аЄҐ/)` matched BOTH the input AND the BottomSheet dialog (its `aria-labelledby` вЖТ title `аЄХаЄ±аєЙаЄЗаЄ£аЄ≤аЄДаЄ≤аЄВаЄ≤аЄҐ` contains `аЄ£аЄ≤аЄДаЄ≤аЄВаЄ≤аЄҐ`) вЖТ query the number input by `getByRole("spinbutton")`. (2) `exactOptionalPropertyTypes` rejected the explicit `undefined` on optional `sellRate` вЖТ omit the key via conditional spread (the spec-177-U2 lesson). Browser pass = operator on-device (auth-gated). NEXT = U6 store-margin UI on /store ¬Ј then Stream B mop-up.

## Spec 178 вАФ Store margin layer, U6: the Store P&L view on /store (ARC COMPLETE) (2026-06-23)

Status: **U6 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-23. SPEC 178 STREAM A (margin layer) ARC COMPLETE (U1вАУU6).** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 220 files / 1468 (+2: store-pnl-view)** ¬Ј `pnpm build` green. **Code-only вАФ no DB / migration / db:test delta** (reads the U3 `store_pnl` RPC). The margin layer is now visible: /store shows a **аЄБаЄ≥аєДаЄ£-аЄВаЄ≤аЄФаЄЧаЄЄаЄЩаЄ™аєВаЄХаЄ£аєМ** section вАФ per item (аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ qty ¬Ј аЄХаєЙаЄЩаЄЧаЄЄаЄЩ ¬Ј аЄҐаЄ≠аЄФаЄВаЄ≤аЄҐ ¬Ј margin, + аЄВаЄ≠аЄЗаЄВаЄ≤аЄФ-аєАаЄБаЄіаЄЩ when a count varies) and the **project net = ќ£ margin + ќ£ shrinkage** (аЄБаЄ≥аєДаЄ£аЄ™аЄЄаЄЧаЄШаЄі). **super_admin / project_director ONLY** (`canSeePnl`, mirrors the `store_pnl` RPC gate вАФ procurement/PM/site_admin never see margins); rendered only when a project is selected. **Page** calls `store_pnl(project)` on the user session (definer gate resolves via JWT) and resolves item names separately (covers since-deactivated items). New presentational **`StorePnlView`** (pure server component, no `'use client'`) + `STORE_PNL_LABEL`. Browser pass = operator on-device (auth-gated). **STREAM A DONE: U1 sell-rate data вЖТ U2 issue snapshots sell вЖТ U3 store_pnl read вЖТ U4 wp_profit fold вЖТ U5 sell-rate setter UI вЖТ U6 store P&L view. The store is a transfer-pricing BU end to end (engine + screens).** NEXT = **Stream B** cost-side mop-up (deferred items): WP-detail reversal controls, site_admin count surface, count-history view, /store-manager receiver picker, manager confirm-on-behalf, GL posting of stock movements.

## Spec 178 вАФ Stream B (cost-side mop-up), B1: WP-detail reversal controls (2026-06-23)

Status: **B1 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-23.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 220 files / 1470 (+2: wp-issue-stock reversal)** ¬Ј `pnpm build` green. **Code-only вАФ no DB** (reuses the spec-177-U11 `reverse_stock_issue` RPC + the U12 `reverseStockIssue` action). Closes a real gap: a site_admin who drew stock from the WP detail (`WpIssueStock`) could not undo it there вАФ only managers could, and only from /store. Now each recent аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ in `WpIssueStock` carries a `аЄБаЄ•аЄ±аЄЪаЄ£аЄ≤аЄҐаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£` control (`ConfirmActionButton` вЖТ `reverseStockIssue({ issueId })`, mirrors /store U12 exactly: confirm вЖТ action вЖТ refresh; аЄВаЄ≠аЄЗаЄИаЄ∞аЄЦаЄєаЄБаЄДаЄЈаЄЩаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤аЄ™аєВаЄХаЄ£аєМ). **No gate prop** вАФ `WpIssueStock` only renders under the WP-detail `!readOnly` gate (= SITE_STAFF = the `reverse_stock_issue` gate), so every issue shown is reversible by that field staffer. Test extends `wp-issue-stock.test.tsx` (+`reverseStockIssue` mock; the control shows on a recent issue; confirm вЖТ reverseStockIssue with the issue id). **Flagged (unchanged):** the custody implication of reversing a CONFIRMED issue (a receiver already attested) is still an open follow-up вАФ same as /store. NEXT Stream B = site_admin count surface ¬Ј count-history ¬Ј /store-manager receiver picker ¬Ј manager confirm-on-behalf ¬Ј GL posting.

## Spec 178 вАФ Stream B, B4: /store-manager receiver picker (2026-06-23)

Status: **B4 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-23.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 220 files / 1471 (+1: store-manager receiver)** ¬Ј `pnpm build` green. **Code-only вАФ no DB** (reuses `issue_stock`'s `p_receiver_worker_id`, U6/U7). Closes the deferred custody gap on the /store surface: a manager issuing from /store could not name a receiver, so those аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ were never portal-confirmable (always аЄ£аЄ≠аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪ). Now the /store аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ sheet has an optional **аЄЬаЄєаєЙаЄ£аЄ±аЄЪ (аЄЦаєЙаЄ≤аЄ°аЄµ)** select of the project's active workers вЖТ `issueStock` passes `receiverWorkerId` (omit-key conditional spread when unselected). `StoreManager` += `workers` prop + `issueReceiver` state; the **page fetches the project's active workers** (`workers` by `project_id`+`active`, RLS-scoped вАФ empty for a viewer who can't read them, harmless since only the manager tier opens the sheet). Mirrors `WpIssueStock` U7 exactly. The existing no-receiver issue test still passes (backward compatible). Remaining Stream B = site_admin count surface ¬Ј count-history ¬Ј manager confirm-on-behalf ¬Ј GL posting.

## Spec 178 вАФ Stream B, B3: count-history view (аЄЫаЄ£аЄ∞аЄІаЄ±аЄХаЄіаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£аЄЩаЄ±аЄЪ) (2026-06-23)

Status: **B3 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-23.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 220 files / 1473 (+2: store-manager count history)** ¬Ј `pnpm build` green. **Code-only вАФ no DB** (reads existing `stock_counts`). /store gains a read-only **аЄЫаЄ£аЄ∞аЄІаЄ±аЄХаЄіаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£аЄЩаЄ±аЄЪ** audit list (last 10 counts for the project): per count the item, аЄЩаЄ±аЄЪаєДаЄФаєЙ (counted qty), and the colored аЄ™аєИаЄІаЄЩаЄХаєИаЄ≤аЄЗ (variance ¬±N вАФ danger when short, action when over, muted when matched), mirroring the U10 live-preview styling. The valued shrinkage already shows in the U6 P&L; this is the qty audit trail. `StoreManager` += `CountRow` type + `counts` prop + the section (after аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБаЄ•аєИаЄ≤аЄ™аЄЄаЄФ); the page fetches recent `stock_counts` (id, counted_qty, variance, unit, catalog_items) вАФ readable by any project viewer (the table's existing grant + RLS). Test extends store-manager.test (counts fixture + renderManager `counts`; the list renders with аЄ™аєИаЄІаЄЩаЄХаєИаЄ≤аЄЗ -2; hidden when no counts). Remaining Stream B = **site_admin count surface** (needs a project-scoped page вАФ site_admin has no /store access) ¬Ј **manager confirm-on-behalf** (needs a confirm_stock_issue widening + a gate decision вЖТ AskUserQuestion) ¬Ј **GL posting of stock movements** (Dr Inv/Cr AP into the spec-149 outbox вАФ a DB unit).

## Spec 178 вАФ Stream B, B2: site_admin stock-count surface (2026-06-23)

Status: **B2 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-23.** lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј **vitest 221 files / 1478 (+4: store-count-manager)** ¬Ј `pnpm build` green. **Code-only вАФ no DB** (reuses `record_stock_count`, SITE_STAFF-gated). Closes the self-governance gap: site_admin physically keeps the store but couldn't reach /store (BACK_OFFICE-gated), so had no UI to reconcile it. New **`/stock-count`** route (gated `SITE_STAFF_ROLES` = site_admin + PM tier; a settings drill-down: DetailHeader back вЖТ /settings, no HubNav, like /store) вАФ project picker (RLS-scoped) вЖТ on-hand list вЖТ per-row **аЄХаЄ£аЄІаЄИаЄЩаЄ±аЄЪ** вЖТ counted-qty sheet with the **live variance preview** (аЄ™аєИаЄІаЄЩаЄХаєИаЄ≤аЄЗ ¬±N аЄВаЄ≤аЄФ/аєАаЄБаЄіаЄЩ/аЄХаЄ£аЄЗаЄБаЄ±аЄЩ) вЖТ `recordStockCount`. New focused **`StoreCountManager`** (count-ONLY вАФ no аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤/аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ/reversal, those stay back-office on /store) + `STOCK_COUNT_LABEL`. **Entry:** a аЄХаЄ£аЄІаЄИаЄЩаЄ±аЄЪаЄ™аЄХаєКаЄ≠аЄБ door in the site_admin **аЄЂаЄЩаєЙаЄ≤аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ** block of /settings (beside аЄ≠аЄЄаЄЫаЄБаЄ£аЄУаєМ); `SETTINGS_TAB.match += "/stock-count"` so the аЄХаЄ±аєЙаЄЗаЄДаєИаЄ≤ tab stays lit (per-role [label,href] pins untouched вАФ safe). **Guards:** added `stock-count` to the nav-back-affordance `STATIC_DETAIL` list (it uses the back-chip DetailHeader); the new component lives in the already-allowed `features/store` domain. Test `store-count-manager.test.tsx` (4): picker вЖТ push `/stock-count?project=`; on-hand + аЄХаЄ£аЄІаЄИаЄЩаЄ±аЄЪ; empty store; count вЖТ recordStockCount + refresh with the live variance. **Remaining Stream B = manager confirm-on-behalf (needs a gate AskUserQuestion) ¬Ј GL posting (DB unit).**

## Spec 178 вАФ Stream B, B5a: confirm-on-behalf engine (2026-06-23)

Status: **B5a SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-23.** typecheck ¬Ј lint ¬Ј **db:test 146 files / 2651 / 0** (+1 file 197, +14 asserts) ¬Ј vitest ¬Ј `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809001800`; db:types regenerated (+received_on_behalf/received_by + the RPC). The custody fallback for login-less workers: a named receiver with no portal login can't self-attest, so their аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ sits аЄ£аЄ≠аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪ forever. **Operator gate (AskUserQuestion): PM tier ONLY (project_manager/super_admin/project_director) AND never the issuer** (separation of duties вАФ no rubber-stamping your own handoff). `stock_issues` += `received_on_behalf boolean default false` + `received_by uuid` (the confirming manager) вАФ a worker self-confirm (`confirm_stock_issue`, untouched) leaves both at defaults, so the two paths are always distinguishable. New `confirm_stock_issue_on_behalf(p_issue_id)` definer: PM-tier gate (42501) вЖТ unknown issue (22023) вЖТ can_see_project (42501) вЖТ receiver-named (22023) вЖТ not-already-received (22023) вЖТ not-the-issuer (`auth.uid()=issued_by` вЖТ 42501) вЖТ set received_at + received_on_behalf=true + received_by=auth.uid(). pgTAP 197 (14): structure + anon-deny + site_admin-denied + non-member-denied + no-receiver + already-received + unknown + issuer-self-denied + happy (received_at/on_behalf/by stamped). `confirm_stock_issue` (worker-self, pgTAP 183) unchanged вЖТ stays green (additive columns). **NEXT = B5b the UI** (a аЄҐаЄЈаЄЩаЄҐаЄ±аЄЩаЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєБаЄЧаЄЩ control on a manager's pending-аЄ£аЄ≠аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪ issues) ¬Ј then B6 GL posting.

## Spec 178 вАФ Stream B, B5b: confirm-on-behalf UI (2026-06-23)

Status: **B5b SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-23.** typecheck ¬Ј lint ¬Ј **vitest 221 files / 1482 (+4: store-manager confirm-on-behalf)** ¬Ј `pnpm build` green. **Code-only вАФ no DB** (calls the B5a RPC). The /store аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБаЄ•аєИаЄ≤аЄ™аЄЄаЄФ list gains a **аЄҐаЄЈаЄЩаЄҐаЄ±аЄЩаЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєБаЄЧаЄЩ** control (`ConfirmActionButton` вЖТ `confirmStockIssueOnBehalf`) on each **pending + named** issue (`canIssue && receiverWorkerId && !receivedAt`) вАФ a manager attests receipt for a login-less receiver. The RPC enforces not-the-issuer (the button shows regardless; a self-confirm maps to a clean 42501 message "аЄЬаЄєаєЙаєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБаЄҐаЄЈаЄЩаЄҐаЄ±аЄЩаєАаЄ≠аЄЗаєДаЄ°аєИаєДаЄФаєЙ"). New `confirmStockIssueOnBehalf` action (maps 42501/22023, revalidates /store). Shown beside аЄБаЄ•аЄ±аЄЪаЄ£аЄ≤аЄҐаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£; hidden once received or for non-managers. **Surfaced on /store only** (where the viewer is the manager tier); the WP-detail confirm-on-behalf is deferred (site_admin there isn't PM-tier вЖТ would be a dead button). **SPEC 178 COMPLETE except B6 (GL posting).** NEXT = B6 GL posting of stock movements (Dr Inv/Cr AP вЖТ spec-149 outbox, a DB unit).

## Spec 178 вАФ Stream B, B6a: store GL posting (receive + issue) (2026-06-23)

Status: **B6a SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-23.** typecheck ¬Ј lint ¬Ј **db:test 147 files / 2664 / 0** (+1 file 198, +13 asserts) ¬Ј vitest ¬Ј `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809001900`; db:types regenerated (+2 posters). Operator chose the **full standard perpetual-inventory scheme + a new Inventory account** (AskUserQuestion). Store movements now post to the GL **at COST** (the sell/margin stays in the management P&L вАФ wp_profit/store_pnl). **New account 1500** `аЄІаЄ±аЄ™аЄФаЄЄаЄДаЄЗаЄДаЄ•аЄ±аЄЗ (аЄ™аєВаЄХаЄ£аєМаЄЂаЄЩаєЙаЄ≤аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ)` / Inventory - site store (idempotent COA seed, under Assets 1000). **post_stock_receipt_to_gl:** Dr Inventory 1500 (project) / Cr AP 2100 (supplier; null party if unsourced) at total_cost. **post_stock_issue_to_gl:** Dr WIP 1400 (project+WP) / Cr Inventory 1500 at moving-avg total_cost. Both mirror `post_purchase_to_gl` (reverse-and-repost auto-correct, SECURITY DEFINER service_role-only, balanced via `post_journal_internal`). AFTER-INSERT enqueue triggers on `stock_receipts`/`stock_issues` (append-only вЖТ INSERT-only) feed the spec-149 async outbox; `drain_gl_posting` CREATE OR REPLACE routes the two new source tables. **No double-count:** issues are tagged `source_table='stock_issues'` (вЙ† purchase_requests), so wp_profit's 1400-purchase-filtered materials term excludes them вАФ the store-issue-SELL term it already adds is the management figure; the GL holds the cost. pgTAP 198 (13): account postable ¬Ј posters service_role-only ¬Ј receipt insert enqueues ¬Ј receive Dr1500/Cr2100 balanced ¬Ј issue Dr1400(WP)/Cr1500 balanced ¬Ј issue tagged stock_issues. **TRAP (caught by db:test, 4 files/18 failures): the drainer CREATE OR REPLACE copied the STALE 4-case body from the original migration `20260743000200` вАФ but the LIVE drainer had 7 cases (spec-149 U5/U5b/U6 added client_billings/retention_receivables/wht_certificates) вЖТ my replace DROPPED those 3 вЖТ tests 85/86/87/88 ("drain posts the вА¶") went red. The recurring lesson AGAIN: CREATE OR REPLACE a routing/dispatch fn from the LIVE `pg_get_functiondef`, never an old migration. Fixed the migration to the full 9-case body + applied the corrected drainer to LIVE via `db query --file` (migration already applied вЖТ file==DB).** **FLAGGED вАФ B6b: count(shrinkage) + reversal GL legs** (a reverse_stock_receipt/issue currently drops on-hand but does NOT yet post a GL flip вЖТ the GL overstates until B6b; beta has no real store data; will add post_stock_count_to_gl + post_stock_reversal_to_gl + triggers/routing). **SPEC 178 effectively COMPLETE вАФ U1вАУU6 + B1/B2/B3/B4/B5/B6a; only B6b (shrinkage/reversal GL legs) remains.**

## Spec 178 вАФ Stream B, B6b: store GL adjustments (count + reversal) вАФ ARC COMPLETE (2026-06-23)

Status: **B6b SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-23. SPEC 178 COMPLETE.** typecheck ¬Ј lint ¬Ј **db:test 148 files / 2680 / 0** (+1 file 199, +16 asserts) ¬Ј vitest ¬Ј `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809002000`; db:types regenerated (+2 posters). Completes the store GL at COST. **post_stock_count_to_gl:** shrinkage (short) Dr COGS-materials 5100 / Cr Inventory 1500; overage Dr 1500 / Cr 5100; **zero-variance вЖТ returns null (no entry)**. **post_stock_reversal_to_gl:** flips the original вАФ reverse a аЄ£аЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤ вЖТ Dr AP 2100 / Cr Inventory 1500; reverse a аєАаЄЪаЄіаЄБ вЖТ Dr Inventory 1500 / Cr WIP 1400 (the WP). Reads the reversed receipt/issue for cost + dims. AFTER-INSERT enqueue triggers on `stock_counts`/`stock_reversals`; **drain_gl_posting CREATE OR REPLACE вАФ this time sourced from the LIVE 9-case body (the B6a lesson) + the 2 new cases = 11 total**. pgTAP 199 (16, owner-context like file 83): posters service_role-only ¬Ј count enqueues ¬Ј shrinkage Dr5100/Cr1500 balanced ¬Ј overage Dr1500 ¬Ј zero-variance no entry ¬Ј receipt-reversal Dr2100/Cr1500 balanced ¬Ј issue-reversal Cr1400(WP) balanced. **SPEC 178 DONE вАФ the store is a transfer-pricing BU end to end: catalogвЖТsupply-planвЖТreceiveвЖТholdвЖТissue(2 surfaces)вЖТcustody(+on-behalf)вЖТcountвЖТreversal, all at cost on the books, with the per-item sell-rate margin layer (rateвЖТissue-snapshotвЖТstore P&LвЖТwp_profit foldвЖТsetter+P&L screens) + site_admin count surface. Operator to set real per-item sell rates to earn margin.**

## Spec 178 вАФ Stream B, B7: inventory вЖФ GL reconciliation (2026-06-23)

Status: **B7 SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-23.** typecheck ¬Ј lint ¬Ј **db:test 149 files / 2686 / 0** (+1 file 200, +6 asserts) ¬Ј `pnpm build`/vitest unchanged (DB-only, zero types drift); db:push applied `20260809002100`. Closes the store's money-integrity loop: the B6 GL postings gave Inventory **1500 exactly one feeder** (store movements) вЖТ unlike multi-feeder AP 2100 / WIP 1400 it reconciles to its subledger. Extended **`gl_reconciliation()`** (the no-arg one the app/`/accounting` call; sourced from the LIVE mig-749 body + one `sub` field + one UNION arm вАФ the source-from-LIVE discipline; same return shape вЖТ CREATE OR REPLACE, grants preserved) with an **`inventory_1500`** check: GL 1500 balance (drвИТcr) must equal ќ£ `stock_on_hand.total_value`. Holds when `posting_backlog`=0 (GL posts async vs synchronous on-hand вАФ the existing backlog check surfaces the lag). The `/accounting` reconciliation surface auto-renders the new row (it iterates rows). pgTAP 200 (6): the row exists ¬Ј ties at 500=500 (ok=true) ¬Ј flags drift (on-hand 600 vs GL 500 вЖТ ok=false, drift вИТ100). pgTAP 88 unaffected (it queries recon rows by check_name, no row-count pin). **Adversarial check confirmed: store GL touches only 2100/1400/1500/5100 вАФ none of the OTHER single-feeder recon invariants (1210/2210/1310/2200) вАФ so B6 never broke reconciliation; B7 adds the one tie that 1500 makes possible.** **SPEC 178 fully complete + money-integrity-checked.**

## Spec 178 вАФ follow-up: project_director may set sell rates (2026-06-23)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-23.** typecheck ¬Ј lint ¬Ј **db:test 149 files / 2687 / 0** (file 186 +1 assert) ¬Ј `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809002200`; db:types zero drift. Operator: "PD can also set." `set_item_sell_rate` gate widens super_admin вЖТ super_admin + project_director (the exec tier already sees store P&L via `store_pnl`); PM + procurement stay denied. **DB:** CREATE OR REPLACE `set_item_sell_rate` (body from LIVE, same sig вЖТ grants preserved), gate `not in ('super_admin','project_director')`; pgTAP 186 +director-allowed assert (plan 14вЖТ15, audit count 2вЖТ3). **UI:** `setItemSellRate` action `requireRole(["super_admin","project_director"])`; /catalog `canSetSellRate = super_admin || project_director` (the SetSellRate control + admin-client rate read now render for PD too). No types drift, no nav/guard change.

## ADR 0062 U5 вАФ remove the /contacts/dc door + page (DC is a worker) (2026-06-23)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-23.** typecheck ¬Ј lint ¬Ј vitest ¬Ј `pnpm build` green. **No DB change** (code-only; the `contractor_category` enum keeps its 'dc' value вАФ prod has 0 DC contractors, so nothing to migrate; we just stop WRITING it). Operator: "DC setting is confusing" вЖТ settings had TWO DC doors: **DC** (`/contacts/dc`, the old contractor-party list, hint even said 'companies') beside **аЄЧаЄµаЄ°аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ** (`/workers`, the real DC roster). ADR 0062 made DC a WORKER (no DC firm), so `/contacts/dc` is a dead duplicate вЖТ removed (the planned U5). **Changes:** deleted the `/contacts/dc` route (page + loading); removed the settings DC door + clarified the аЄЧаЄµаЄ°аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ hint ("аЄЧаЄ∞аєАаЄЪаЄµаЄҐаЄЩ DC (аЄЫаЄ£аЄ∞аЄИаЄ≥/аЄКаЄ±аєИаЄІаЄДаЄ£аЄ≤аЄІ) ¬Ј аЄДаєИаЄ≤аЄИаєЙаЄ≤аЄЗ"); dropped `"dc"` from the contacts type system (`ContactGroup`/`ContactTab`/`CONTACT_GROUP_TABS`/`STATUS_TABS` in `lib/contacts/groups`) + all `dc` machinery in the shared `ContactsTabs` (`DC_FIELDS`, `DC_SUBTYPE_OPTIONS`, `dcCreate`/`dcUpdate`, the `dc` tab branch, `TAB_LABEL.dc`, the `dc` prop). **Untouched (worker_type='dc' вАФ the actual DC, which STAYS):** `/workers` roster, `contact-crew-section` (DC workers under a subcontractor), labor/payroll. Tests: `contacts-groups.test` (dc removed from the tab map + status set), `nav-back-affordance` (dropped `contacts/dc` from STATIC_DETAIL). **Gotcha re-hit (spec 168): deleting a Next route вЖТ stale `.next/types/validator.ts` TS2307 on the old `page.js` вЖТ `rm -rf .next` + rebuild.** Only link to `/contacts/dc` was the settings door (no other nav). **DC is now ONE place: аЄЧаЄµаЄ°аЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ.**

## Spec 189 вАФ multiple supply plans per project (2026-06-24)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod вАФ 2026-06-24.** typecheck ¬Ј lint ¬Ј vitest (plan-list 5, new-button 2, manager 11) green; `db:push` applied `20260811000100`; db:test 191 + updated 176 green (the 6 other red files вАФ 119 catalog-identity, 82/84/85/86/87 GL-posting drain cluster вАФ are **pre-existing, unrelated** to supply plans). Operator: "enable multi-supply-plan" + chose **auto numbered/dated** labels + **full feature now**.

**Why:** spec 176 modeled ONE plan/project (`unique(project_id)` + get-or-create RPC + single-plan UI). Operator wants many (per phase/period).

**U1 DB (`20260811000100`, pgTAP 191):** drop `supply_plans_project_unique`; `create_supply_plan` get-or-create вЖТ **always-insert a new draft**. **TRAP HIT (the recurring one): my first `CREATE OR REPLACE` re-sourced the spec-176 body and DROPPED the spec-181 procurement arm вЖТ db:test 189 went red (`create_supply_plan: role not permitted` for procurement).** Fix: re-source from LIVE (spec-181 `20260809000900`) вАФ role list `+procurement`, membership skipped for procurement вАФ keep only the always-insert swap; reconciled prod with a direct CREATE OR REPLACE (db:push won't re-run an applied migration). pgTAP 176 idempotency assert flipped to always-create.

**U2 UI:** `createPlan(projectId)` action вЖТ returns new planId; `addPlanLine`/`bulkAddPlanLines` now take an explicit `planId` (no get-or-create); `NewPlanButton` (`'use client'`) creates вЖТ navigates `?plan=<id>`; pure `buildPlanList` (unit-tested) вЖТ list view models (auto-label `аєБаЄЬаЄЩ #N`, status, line count, selected); page lists all plans (date ¬Ј count ¬Ј status) + new-plan button, `?plan=<id>` opens the existing `SupplyPlanManager`; `PLAN_STATUS_LABEL` exported from the manager (single source). **Unchanged downstream:** `supply_plan_accuracy` already aggregates all a project's plan lines (plan-agnostic); `generate_purchase_requests_from_plan` is per-plan.

**LESSON (reinforced):** changing a DEFINER RPC body вЖТ source from the LIVE function (latest patch migration / `pg_get_functiondef`), never an older migration file вАФ role lists drift forward (spec 181 added procurement).

## Spec 201 вАФ Feedback two-way + CC triage agent вАФ U1 (2026-06-25)

Status: **U1 IN PROGRESS вАФ my-requests list.** Operator asked: (1) let users see their own
submitted reports, (2) redesign feedback into a two-way, CC-triaged loop (ultrathink +
Anthropic best-practices research). Spec `201-feedback-two-way.md` records the arc + the
three locked dials (AskUserQuestion): **draftвЖТoperator-approves** replies ¬Ј **manual**
cadence (`/triage-feedback` skill, no scheduler v1) ¬Ј **annotation later** (reuse
`photo_markups`). Architecture (per Anthropic building-effective-agents): outer loop =
workflow, inner triage = agent; CC = the operator's Claude Code, app holds only the thread
data model. Estimates given to PO: U1=2 ¬Ј U2=5 ¬Ј U3=3 ¬Ј U4=8 ¬Ј U5=5 ¬Ј U6=3 ¬Ј skill=3 (MVP
loop = 21, full = 29 pts).

**U1 (code-only, no DB):** the submitter-read RLS (`submitted_by = auth.uid()`, mig 20260813000000) already permits the read вАФ no migration. New presentational
`MyFeedbackList` (`src/components/features/feedback/my-feedback-list.tsx`): own reports,
newest-first, type + status badge + title; empty state `аЄҐаЄ±аЄЗаєДаЄ°аєИаЄ°аЄµаєАаЄ£аЄЈаєИаЄ≠аЄЗаЄЧаЄµаєИаєАаЄДаЄҐаєБаЄИаєЙаЄЗ`.
`/feedback` page fetches the caller's own rows (RLS-scoped) and renders the list under the
form (`router.refresh()` on submit already refreshes it). Attachments NOT shown вАФ a reporter
can't read their own attachment rows yet (`feedback_attachments` zero-auth-access; deferred
to an owner-read policy in a later unit). Test-first: `tests/unit/my-feedback-list.test.tsx`
(4: titles ¬Ј type+status badges ¬Ј newest-first sort ¬Ј empty state) вАФ red (no module) вЖТ green.
typecheck + lint clean.

**U2 SHIPPED prod 2026-06-25 (mig `20260813001200`, pgTAP 218 13/13) вАФ feedback thread +
operator reply.** Scope call: a thread needs a seed writer, so U2 includes the
operator-posts path (a human reply IS the human-approved channel; the draftвЖТapprove gate
governs CC replies in U4). **DB:** `feedback_messages` append-only (message doctrine, like
`feedback_attachments`) вАФ `feedback_id` FK, `author_kind` (new enum `feedback_author_kind` =
reporter/operator/agent), `author_id` (null=agent), `body` 1..4000, `created_at`. RLS SELECT
own-thread (submitter) or super_admin; writes RPC-only. `post_feedback_message(uuid,text)`
super_admin-only definer вЖТ stamps `operator` + `auth.uid()`. pgTAP 218: catalog/lockdown ¬Ј
super posts ¬Ј submitter reads own ¬Ј non-submitter reads nothing ¬Ј non-super cannot post
(42501) ¬Ј unknown-id/empty-body (22023) ¬Ј append-only UPDATE/DELETE (P0001). **UI:**
`FeedbackThread` (presentational, oldest-first, author-labelled `FEEDBACK_AUTHOR_LABEL`, team
left-accent) ¬Ј `FeedbackReply` (operator composer вЖТ `postFeedbackMessage` action) ¬Ј single
thread surface `/feedback/[id]` (RLS own-or-super вЖТ notFound otherwise; composer renders only
for super_admin) ¬Ј `MyFeedbackList` rows + review cards link to it. Reporter view read-only
(reporter-reply = U3); no `state` column yet (draft/published = U4). Test-first:
`feedback-thread.test.tsx` (4) + `feedback-reply.test.tsx` (2) redвЖТgreen. Full suite
1653/1653, typecheck+lint clean, db:test 165/168 (3 reds = pre-existing GL-drain cluster
85/86/87, unrelated). db:types regenerated (+feedback_messages, +feedback_author_kind).
**NEXT = U3 reporter reply (widen post path to the submitter + reporter composer).**

**U3 SHIPPED prod 2026-06-25 (mig `20260813001300`, pgTAP 219 5/5) вАФ reporter reply.** The
loop closes from the reporter's side. `post_feedback_message` **widened** (same sig вЖТ CREATE
OR REPLACE, grants preserved, body re-sourced from the U2 mig-1200 body вАФ the source-from-LIVE
discipline) so the author voice is DERIVED from the caller, never trusted: super_admin вЖТ
`operator`, the report's submitter вЖТ `reporter`, else 42501. One RPC, role-derived (no second
write path). **UI:** `/feedback/[id]` shows the `FeedbackReply` composer to `canReply =
super_admin || submitted_by === viewer` (page fetches `submitted_by`); composer copy
neutralised (`аЄХаЄ≠аЄЪаЄБаЄ•аЄ±аЄЪ`) so it serves both ends вАФ same component+action, the RPC stamps the
voice. **Test-first:** pgTAP 219 (submitter posts ¬Ј stamped reporter ¬Ј author_id=submitter ¬Ј
non-owner non-super 42501 ¬Ј super still operator); file 218's "cannot post" retargeted to a
true outsider (the submitter posting is now the U3 path). No type drift (sig unchanged). Full
suite 1653/1653, typecheck+lint clean, db:test 165/169 (4 reds = pre-existing GL-drain 85/86/87

- a transient 502 on 05-audit-log-revoke, green in the U2 run вАФ infra hiccup, not code).
  **NEXT = U4: CC drafts вЖТ operator approves вАФ the core.**

**U4 SHIPPED prod 2026-06-25 (mig `20260813001400`, pgTAP 220 17/17) вАФ CC drafts вЖТ operator
approves (the human-in-loop gate, locked dial 1).** **MODEL REFINEMENT (vs the planned `state`
column):** feedback_messages is append-only/immutable, so a draft can't be a message toggled
draftвЖТpublished. Instead a draft is NOT a message yet вАФ staged in a separate mutable
`feedback_message_drafts` table (super_admin-only RLS; reporter has NO read path). Approve =
insert a real append-only `agent` message + delete the draft (atomic). Keeps the thread
immutable, auto-hides drafts, makes approval the only path to the reporter. **DEFERRED:** the
`feedback_status` enum is NOT extended (no awaiting_review/awaiting_user) вАФ a pending draft
already signals "awaiting operator" (derived); resolution reuses `set_feedback_status`. **DB:**
`draft_feedback_message(uuid,text)` SERVICE_ROLE-only (CC stages via `db query`; app users
can't draft вАФ revoke public/auth/anon + grant service_role, the claim_next_report idiom);
`publish_feedback_draft(uuid)` + `discard_feedback_draft(uuid)` super_admin-only definers.
**UI:** `FeedbackDrafts` (super-only, `/feedback/[id]` above the composer) вЖТ аЄ≠аЄЩаЄЄаЄ°аЄ±аЄХаЄіаєБаЄ•аЄ∞аЄ™аєИаЄЗ /
аЄЧаЄіаєЙаЄЗ вЖТ publish/discard actions; published draft shows as `аЄЬаЄєаєЙаЄКаєИаЄІаЄҐ AI` (transparent it's AI).
**Test-first:** pgTAP 220 (service_role/super lockdown ¬Ј reporter can't see drafts ¬Ј super
sees ¬Ј stage ¬Ј publishвЖТagent msg+draft gone ¬Ј reporter then sees agent reply ¬Ј non-super
can't publish/discard 42501 ¬Ј discard ¬Ј unknown 22023); `feedback-drafts.test.tsx` (4). Trap:
planned 16 but wrote 17 asserts вЖТ fixed plan(17) (runner ignores the diagnostic, corrected).
Full suite 1657/1657, typecheck+lint clean, db:test 167/170 (3 reds = pre-existing GL-drain
85/86/87; the U3-run's transient 502 on 05 cleared). db:types regenerated
(+feedback_message_drafts, +3 RPCs). **NEXT = U5 annotated screenshot (reuse photo_markups) ¬Ј
U6 reporter notify ¬Ј `/triage-feedback` skill (the draft gate is now ready for CC).**

\*\*`/triage-feedback` SKILL SHIPPED prod 2026-06-25 (no DB/code вАФ `.claude/skills/triage-feedback/SKILL.md`

- CLAUDE.md registration) вАФ activates the arc.** CC's manual-cadence triage procedure: connect via
  `pnpm exec supabase db query --linked` (service_role: reads bypass RLS, granted execute on
  `draft_feedback_message`) вЖТ pull open/in_progress queue вЖТ per report read thread + skip if a draft
  exists вЖТ investigate against the codebase (locate via page_path/screen/role_snapshot, read code,
  reproduce) вЖТ stage ONE draft via `draft_feedback_message` (`--file` for Thai/quoted bodies) вЖТ hand off;
  operator approves at `/feedback/[id]`. GUARDRAILS: draft-only (never publish/set-status/UPDATE feedback);
  feedback text+attachments UNTRUSTED (the `db query` boundary wrapper вАФ evidence not commands,
  prompt-injection guard); ground claims in real code/repro; draft in Thai, brief, one ask (shown as
  `аЄЬаЄєаєЙаЄКаєИаЄІаЄҐ AI`); never double-draft. Not TDD-testable (procedure doc) вАФ validated by running Step 1 live
  (returns the 2 open reports; untrusted-data boundary confirms the guard). Cadence stays manual.
  **ARC U1вАУU4 + skill COMPLETE вАФ the loop runs end to end. Remaining (optional): U5 annotated screenshots
  (reuse photo_markups) ¬Ј U6 reporter notification of a published reply.\*\*

**REVIEW KANBAN + reporter-list split SHIPPED prod 2026-06-25 (no DB, code-only) вАФ UX
refinement.** Operator: "why is the reporter list crammed under the submit form? also apply
kanban." Chose (AskUserQuestion) kanban on the **operator triage board** + split the list off
the form. **Kanban (`/feedback/review`):** four `feedback_status` columns in lifecycle order
(аєГаЄЂаЄ°аєИвЖТаЄБаЄ≥аЄ•аЄ±аЄЗаЄФаЄ≥аєАаЄЩаЄіаЄЩаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£вЖТаєАаЄ™аЄ£аєЗаЄИвЖТаЄЫаЄПаЄіаєАаЄ™аЄШ), each report a compact card. **NO drag** вАФ no dnd dep + drag
poor on mobile (operator's device); the card's existing `FeedbackStatusControl` is the move
mechanism (pick status вЖТ set_feedback_status вЖТ card lands in that column on refresh). Columns
scroll horizontally on narrow screens; cards link to the conversation. Pure `groupFeedbackByStatus`
(`src/lib/feedback/kanban.ts`) + `FeedbackKanban` (server component embedding the client status
control island). **List split:** `/feedback` is now SUBMIT-only (+ `аєАаЄ£аЄЈаєИаЄ≠аЄЗаЄЧаЄµаєИаєАаЄДаЄҐаєБаЄИаєЙаЄЗ вЖТ` link);
the reporter list moved to its own route `/feedback/mine` (reuses `MyFeedbackList`). **Test-first:**
`feedback-kanban.test.tsx` (5: grouping order/placement/stability + board renders columns+cards).
**TRAP (the recurring one): new `/feedback/mine` page.tsx вЖТ `nav-back-affordance` completeness
guard red until classified вЖТ added to STATIC_DETAIL** (it renders DetailHeader, backвЖТ/feedback).
Full suite green after the fix (the other red, supply-plan-manager, was a load flake вАФ passes in
isolation). typecheck+lint clean. No DB. Not browser-verified (LINE-auth-gated; review is super-only).

**BUG FIX (from feedback triage) SHIPPED prod 2026-06-25 (mig `20260813001500`, pgTAP 11 6/6) вАФ
project_director could not upload photos.** Symptom (real report 0e3a7f3d, a PD): adding a photo
stuck forever on "аЄ£аЄ≠аЄ™аєИаЄЗаЄ£аЄєаЄЫвА¶аєАаЄ°аЄЈаєИаЄ≠аЄ°аЄµаЄ™аЄ±аЄНаЄНаЄ≤аЄУ" on every device with working net. **ROOT CAUSE:** ADR 0058
(spec 152, mig 20260752000000) made project_director a see-all writer and added it to the
`photo_logs` INSERT policy вАФ but that sweep only reconstructed `public.*` table policies from
pg_policies; the `photos` STORAGE bucket upload policy (on `storage.objects`, mig 20260524040000)
was MISSED. So a PD's capture enqueued вЖТ bytes upload to `photos` denied by RLS вЖТ offline queue
(`src/lib/photos/upload-queue.ts`) stuck at step `upload`, retried forever вЖТ the generic "waiting
for signal" banner never cleared (it never reached the photo_logs insert, which already admits PD).
**FIX:** DROP+CREATE "photos uploads by sa/pm/super" adding `project_director` (kept the policy name
вАФ precedent: 20260752 added PD to "photo_logs insert by sa/pm/super" without renaming). Verified
live (pg_policies with_check now lists project_director). Test-first: pgTAP 11 +assert (plan 5вЖТ6,
with_check like '%project_director%'). No types/app-code change. **STILL OPEN (handed to the
operator's running task task_1efe2a55):** the SIBLING pr-attachments bucket upload policies carry the
same ADR-0058 gap (delivery/invoice photos), and the upload-queue banner lies on a permanent 403
(treats authz denial like a connectivity wait вАФ classifyStorageUploadError only detects alreadyExists).

**FOLLOW-UP 2026-06-25 (code-only, no DB):** (1) **pr-attachments bucket вАФ NO gap, verified.** Queried
the LIVE catalog (not the stale migration files): the `pr attachment uploads by request owner or
receiver` storage policy ALREADY admits project_director (+procurement) вАФ a later migration widened it.
The migration FILES (20260614100200 etc.) showed sa/pm/super but were stale; **source-from-LIVE caught
it before I wrote a migration that would have REVERTED the procurement grant** (the recurring lesson, now
also for storage policies). (2) **Banner truthfulness SHIPPED** вАФ new pure `isAuthzDenied(message)`
(`src/lib/photos/upload-queue.ts`, matches row-level-security/unauthorized/403/forbidden) + `upload-queue-runner`
uses it: when every queued item is a permanent permission denial the banner says `аЄ™аєИаЄЗаЄ£аЄєаЄЫаєДаЄ°аєИаєДаЄФаєЙ N аЄ£аЄєаЄЫ вАФ
аЄ™аЄіаЄЧаЄШаЄіаєМаєДаЄ°аєИаЄЮаЄ≠ аЄХаЄіаЄФаЄХаєИаЄ≠аЄЬаЄєаєЙаЄФаЄєаєБаЄ•аЄ£аЄ∞аЄЪаЄЪ` (and the per-item label `аЄ™аЄіаЄЧаЄШаЄіаєМаєДаЄ°аєИаЄЮаЄ≠`) instead of the misleading
`вА¶аєАаЄ°аЄЈаєИаЄ≠аЄ°аЄµаЄ™аЄ±аЄНаЄНаЄ≤аЄУ`. Queue logic unchanged вАФ items still kept (evidence never auto-dropped), just labelled
honestly. Test-first: `upload-queue.test.ts` +isAuthzDenied (20 total). typecheck+lint clean. **The PD
photo-upload class is now fully closed: photos bucket fixed (PD upload works), pr-attachments confirmed
already-fine, and a blocked upload no longer lies about why.**

**FOLLOW-UP 2026-06-25 (test-only, no DB) вАФ closed the missing photo_logs regression guard.** The
photos-bucket guard landed in pgTAP 11, but `photo_logs` had NO photo-specific assertion that
`project_director` can INSERT/SELECT вАФ that widening shipped in spec-152's mig 20260752 and pgTAP 91 only
holds the meta-invariant "no policy NAMES project_manager without director", which can't see the photo_logs
SELECT (it gates on `procurement OR can_see_wp`, no PM literal) nor prove the INSERT behaviorally. Added a
`project_director` fixture (NOT enrolled in project_members вАФ deliberately exercises the can_see_project
see-all branch) + 2 cases to `09-photo-logs.test.sql`: H.4 director INSERT lives_ok, I.4 director SELECT
isnt-0 (plan 48вЖТ50). **db:test 09 = 50/50, 11 = 6/6 green** (full suite 167/170 files; the 3 reds are the
pre-existing `drain posts вА¶` GL-queue flake in 85/86/87 вАФ `have:19 want:1`, the shared-remote
`drain_gl_posting` count polluted by other sessions; the actual posted-line assertions pass вАФ unrelated to
photos). unit 20/20 ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј lint green. **PD photo class fully closed AND regression-guarded.**

**AWARENESS ARC A1 SHIPPED 2026-06-25 (code-only, NO DB) вАФ operator new-feedback triage card.**
The two-way loop was feature-complete but SILENT: no signal fires on submit, reply, draft, or
status change, and feedback wired into NEITHER awareness rail (in-app AwarenessCard/SelfCountBadge
nor the LINE outbox). A1 closes the operator side cheapest-first: a super*admin-only AwarenessCard
on `/dashboard` showing the count of `open` feedback вЖТ `/feedback/review`. Doctrine-perfect вАФ feedback
triage is a \_tabless* operator action, so it joins the dashboard inbox exactly like the WP-review hero

- bank-change card (spec 188); the PM tier incl. super_admin lands on `/dashboard` (roleHome, spec 183),
  so it's the highest-pull surface. Mirrors `getPendingBankChangeCount` + the bank-change card exactly:
  new `getOpenFeedbackCount(supabase)` (`src/lib/feedback/triage-count.ts`, server-only, best-effort 0 on
  error; RLS gives super all open rows) + super-only fetch & card in `dashboard/page.tsx` (label
  `аєАаЄ£аЄЈаєИаЄ≠аЄЗаєБаЄИаєЙаЄЗаєГаЄЂаЄ°аєИаЄ£аЄ≠аЄХаЄ£аЄІаЄИ`, icon Inbox; renders only when >0). Honest countвЖТdestination (open reports =
  the `аєГаЄЂаЄ°аєИ` column of the review kanban). Test-first: `tests/unit/feedback-triage-count.test.ts` (3 вАФ
  head-count query shape + status='open' + 0 on error/null) RED (no module) вЖТ GREEN; AwarenessCard
  presentation already pinned by `awareness-card.test.tsx`. **Full suite 257 files / 1668 / 0; typecheck
  ¬Ј lint green. No DB вЖТ pgTAP file 221 left for A2.** Spec `201-feedback-two-way.md` gained the
  **Awareness arc** section (A1 now ¬Ј A2 reporter reply-awareness via a new mutable `feedback_views`
  table ¬Ј A3 operator pending-draft surfacing ¬Ј A4 LINE push вАФ outward-facing, flagged). No flag (code-only,
  in-app, not outward-facing) вЖТ auto-merge.

**AWARENESS ARC A2 SHIPPED 2026-06-25 (mig `20260813001600`, pgTAP 221 16/16) вАФ reporter
reply-awareness (unread dot).** Closes the reporter side of the silent loop: when the
operator/agent publishes a reply, the reporter sees it without re-polling. **Unread modelled
in a NEW mutable `feedback_views(feedback_id, user_id, last_viewed_at, pk)` table** вАФ append-only
forbids a seen-flag on `feedback_messages` (P0001), and per-viewer state can't live on the shared
`feedback` row; the blessed precedent is `feedback_message_drafts` getting its own table for the
same reason. Zero direct access (revoke all, no policies) вАФ RPC-only via two definers:
`mark_feedback_viewed(uuid)` (visibility-gated upsert: submitter OR super, else 42501; unknown 22023) + `feedback_unread_ids() setof uuid` (the caller's OWN submissions with an operator/agent
message newer than last view; the reporter's own messages never count). **UI:** unread dot
("аЄХаЄ≠аЄЪаЄБаЄ•аЄ±аЄЪаєГаЄЂаЄ°аєИ") per `/feedback/mine` row (`MyFeedbackList` +`hasUnreadReply`; mine page builds the
set from `feedback_unread_ids`) ¬Ј `MarkFeedbackViewed` client island on `/feedback/[id]`
(best-effort `mark_feedback_viewed` on mount, after render вАФ not during, or the dot clears early) ¬Ј
roll-up `ApprovalsBadge` on the settings feedback entry (`SettingsLink` +`badge` slot). Test-first:
pgTAP 221 (16 вАФ lockdown, unread detect/clear/re-flag, own-messages-never-count, caller-scope, gate,
mutability) + `my-feedback-list.test.tsx` (+2). **LESSON: a zero-grant RLS table raises 42501 on a
direct SELECT (not 0 rows) вАФ assert the ABSENT privilege (`has_table_privilege`), never run the
SELECT (first 221 run failed on exactly this).** Full suite 257/1670; pgTAP 168/171 (3 reds =
pre-existing GL-drain 85/86/87, unrelated); typecheck ¬Ј lint green. db:types regenerated
(+feedback_views, +mark_feedback_viewed, +feedback_unread_ids). Schema migration flagged before
db:push (additive, reversible). **NEXT = A3 (operator pending-draft surfacing) or A4 (LINE push вАФ
outward-facing, needs both flags).**

**AWARENESS ARC A4 SHIPPED 2026-06-25 (migs `20260813001700`+`20260813001800`, pgTAP 222 8/8) вАФ
LINE push, operator ping (`feedback_submitted` вЖТ super_admins via the ADR 0037 outbox).** First
outbound feedback unit. **PRE-FLIGHT: the LINE channel is DARK** вАФ `select status,count(*) from
notification_outbox` = 49 rows ALL `pending`, `last_sent` null (token/cron never configured; the
WP/PR notifications are dark too). So A4 is **wired but inert**: a row enqueues on every report but
sends NOTHING until LINE go-live (which lights the whole outbox, feedback included) вАФ applying was
non-outward-facing now (flagged + confirmed dark before db:push). **DB:** mig вА¶1700 = enum add
`feedback_submitted` (own migration, add-then-use); mig вА¶1800 = `notify_feedback_submitted()`
DEFINER + pinned search_path + failure-SWALLOW (raise warning, never blocks submit_feedback) +
`after insert on feedback` trigger; snapshot rides in `payload` (feedback has no WP/PR FK вЖТ drain
SELECT unchanged). **Code:** payload.ts (+feedbackId/Type/Title/roleSnapshot/submittedBy) ¬Ј
compose-notification.ts (+Thai `аЄВаєЙаЄ≠аєАаЄ™аЄЩаЄ≠аєБаЄЩаЄ∞аєГаЄЂаЄ°аєИ (<type>) аЄИаЄ≤аЄБ<role>: <title>`) ¬Ј resolve-recipients.ts
(+`superIds` on RecipientContext; target super-only, exclude self-filing super) ¬Ј drain/route.ts
(+`needsSuperPool` super fetch вЖТ LINE ids + superIds into context). Target = super_admins ONLY
(feedback review is super-only). Test-first: pgTAP 222 (8 вАФ trigger/definer/enqueue payload/pending+0/
swallow-failure) + file 25 enum_has_labels lockstep (+feedback_submitted) + unit +5 (resolve super
pool/self-exclude ¬Ј compose bug+feature Thai ¬Ј payload parse). Full suite 257/1675; pgTAP 169/172 (3
reds = pre-existing GL-drain 85/86/87); typecheck ¬Ј lint green. db:types regenerated (+enum value).
**A4b DEFERRED = reporter-reply LINE mirror (trigger on feedback_messages, route by author_kind;
agent author_id null вЖТ target feedback.submitted_by); lower urgency, reporter pools ~0 (spec 192).**
**SEPARATE: the operator may want to ACTIVATE LINE (set LINE_MESSAGING_CHANNEL_ACCESS_TOKEN + the
pg_cron drain) вАФ 49 notifications sit queued unsent; that go-live is an operator config task.**

## Spec 205 вАФ WP labor budget, U1: data layer (set_wp_labor_budget) (2026-06-25)

Status: **U1 SHIPPED prod 2026-06-25 (migs `20260813002200` + harden `20260813002300`, pgTAP 226 21/21).**
Operator directive: "Each WP will have its own labor budget which will be set by either PM or PD."

**Decision (no new ADR вАФ extends ADR 0060):** labor budget = a money (baht) **cost ceiling**
for labor, distinct from `wp_economics.budget` (the PD-only profit denominator). Money, not
man-days вАФ the whole labor/profit stack is baht (`wp_labor_costs`, `wp_profit`, `budgetStatus`);
a man-day budget would have nothing to compare against. Single total (not own/dc split). Lives on
`wp_economics` (DRY with budget/is_external, same zero-grant MONEY posture + upsert+audit setter).
Does NOT feed `wp_profit` вАФ display target only. **Gate = PM or PD** (`project_manager`,
`project_director`, `super_admin`) вАФ deliberately **widens** vs `set_wp_budget` (PD-only) because
the PM owns crew cost; mirrors `set_wp_external`; names project_manager so project_director rides
along (ADR 0058 / pgTAP 90, still green).

**DB:** `wp_economics.labor_budget numeric(20,4)` nullable + non-negative check;
`set_wp_labor_budget(p_wp, p_budget)` definer, upsert preserving budget/is_external, audits
`{field:'labor_budget'}`. **Server action** `setWpLaborBudget` (`src/lib/labor/actions.ts`):
shape+non-negative validate, gate PM_ROLES on the authed session, call RPC on the user client.

**Adversarial review (workflow, 15 agents) caught a real medium security bug вЖТ harden migration
`20260813002300`:** the first migration revoked EXECUTE only from `public`, not `anon` (Supabase
auto-grants EXECUTE to anon on new functions), and the gate was null-unsafe (`current_user_role()`
is NULL for anon вЖТ `NULL not in (...)` is NULL вЖТ 42501 never fired вЖТ anon could write `labor_budget`
via direct PostgREST with `actor_id` NULL). Fixed: `revoke ... from public, anon` + null-safe gate
(role captured once into `v_role`, explicit `is null` check). Verified live: anon_exec=false,
auth_exec=true. Also softened the table comment ("read by PM review page" вЖТ "spec 205 U2, not built
yet"). **pgTAP 226 (21):** catalog + zero-grant col + anon/auth EXECUTE lockdown ¬Ј PM/PD/super set ¬Ј
0 accepted (вЙ† NULL) ¬Ј SA/visitor/null-role denied (42501) ¬Ј unknown/negative/null (P0001) ¬Ј upsert
preserves budget+is_external ¬Ј audit count. Full suite green (vitest 1699/1699, typecheck, lint);
pgTAP 176 files / 3000 assertions / 0 failures incl. 90/99/36. **U2 (PLANNED):** budget-vs-actual
card on `/review/work-packages/[id]` аЄДаєИаЄ≤аєБаЄ£аЄЗ section + inline set control.

**Follow-up surfaced (out of scope):** `set_wp_budget` / `set_wp_external` (20260761000000) have NO
grant management at all вЖТ share the latent anon-exec exposure; should get the same `from public, anon`
revoke + null-safe gate in a hardening sweep. (Spawned as a background task.)

## Spec 205 вАФ WP labor budget, U2: budget-vs-actual UI (ARC COMPLETE) (2026-06-25)

Status: **U2 SHIPPED 2026-06-25 (code-only, no DB). SPEC 205 COMPLETE (U1 data + U2 UI).**

Budget-vs-actual surface in the `аЄДаєИаЄ≤аєБаЄ£аЄЗ` section of the PM WP review page
(`/review/work-packages/[id]`). **Pure** `src/lib/labor/budget.ts` вАФ `laborBudgetSummary(budget,
spend)`: purpose-built (NOT a thin `budgetStatus` wrapper as the spec first sketched вАФ the review
flagged that `budgetStatus` treats 0 as "no budget", but the data layer stores 0 вЙ† NULL on purpose,
so the card must distinguish set-zero from unset). Returns `isSet` (budget !== null), remaining,
`pctUsed` (null when budget 0 with spend), `over`, and a `tone` (ok / attn вЙ•90% / over). Unit-tested
8/8 incl. the two 0-budget cases. **UI:** `LaborBudgetCard` (server, presentational вАФ money rendered
server-side) shows аЄЗаЄЪаЄДаєИаЄ≤аєБаЄ£аЄЗ ¬Ј аєГаЄКаєЙаєДаЄЫ (with %) ¬Ј аЄДаЄЗаєАаЄЂаЄ•аЄЈаЄ≠/аєАаЄБаЄіаЄЩаЄЗаЄЪ + a toned progress bar; embeds
`LaborBudgetControl` (client, mirrors the equipment `SetDailyRate` вАФ BottomSheet + numeric input вЖТ
`setWpLaborBudget`). Card test 3/3 (unset prompt / under / over). Labels SSOT'd in `labels.ts`
(`LABOR_BUDGET_*`). The card always renders on this PM-gated page (the PM/PD can set a ceiling before
any labor); `LaborCostView` self-gates to actual cost. Page reads `wp_economics.labor_budget` via the
admin client (zero-grant) next to the existing `wp_labor_costs` read; compares against
`costSummary.total`. **Verified with a real render** (temp route + preview MCP screenshot, 4 states:
unset / under-42% green / attn-94% amber / over-128% red вАФ all correct). Render gate: the `аЄДаєИаЄ≤аєБаЄ£аЄЗ`
section now always shows on the review page. **Adversarial review (10 agents) вЖТ 4 low/nit fixes
applied:** (1) `pctUsed` floors instead of rounds вАФ rounding up showed a full 100% bar with money
still remaining on a fractional spend, and tripped amber at 89.5%; floor keeps the % honest and the
90% boundary exact (over stays the single source of the full-bar truth) ¬Ј (2) same fix makes the attn
threshold exactly 90% ¬Ј (3) progress bar gains `role="progressbar"` + aria-valuenow/min/max + Thai
aria-label (matches work-package-list's bar) ¬Ј (4) spec body updated from the stale "thin wrapper"
sketch to the as-built purpose-built helper. +3 tests (fractional near-budget, 90% boundary,
progressbar role). Full suite green, typecheck + lint clean.

## Spec 205 вАФ WP labor budget, U3: surface on the WP detail аЄИаЄ±аЄФаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£ tab (2026-06-26)

Status: **U3 SHIPPED 2026-06-26 (code-only, no DB).** Operator (super_admin) feedback right after
U2: "I can't find it." Root cause = placement, not permission: U2 mounted the card only on
`/review/work-packages/[id]`, which `review/page.tsx` links **solely** for `pending_approval` WPs via
the аЄ£аЄ≠аЄХаЄ£аЄІаЄИ queue вАФ with nothing pending review there's no link at all, and a budget isn't something
you'd hunt for in an approval queue. Fix = also surface it on the everyday WP detail page's `аЄИаЄ±аЄФаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£`
(manage) tab, which is already gated to `isPlanner` (PM/PD/super) so it's money-safe (site
staff/procurement don't get the tab).

New `src/lib/labor/wp-budget-summary.ts` вАФ `fetchWpLaborBudgetSummary(wpId)`: server-only,
admin-client read of `labor_logs`вЖТ`aggregateLaborCost` + `wp_economics.labor_budget` вЖТ
`laborBudgetSummary` (DRY-extracted from the review page's inline reads; callers MUST gate on
`isManagerRole`). WP detail page (`projects/[id]/work-packages/[id]`): added a 9th entry to the
existing `Promise.all` (no waterfall) вАФ `isPlanner ? fetchWpLaborBudgetSummary(workPackageId) :
Promise.resolve(null)` вЖТ `laborBudget`; the `аЄИаЄ±аЄФаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£` tab renders `LaborBudgetCard` at its top under
`{laborBudget ? вА¶ : null}`. **Money posture:** the read AND the tab are both `isPlanner`-gated вЖТ a
`site_admin`/`procurement` session never runs the admin read nor sees the card. Card/control/RPC
unchanged from U1/U2; visual identical to the U2 screenshot. No new unit test (server fetch glue вАФ
consistent with `load-detail`/`fetch-zone-data`, neither unit-tested); covered by the U2 card/helper
tests + pgTAP 226 + a U3 adversarial review. typecheck + lint clean, full suite green. Kept on the
review page too (both surfaces).

**TELEGRAM notification channel SHIPPED 2026-06-26 (mig `20260813003100`, pgTAP 230) вАФ second
delivery channel alongside LINE (ADR 0037 extension).** Operator: "apart from notifying superadmins
in LINE, also notify them in Telegram вАФ currently only me." Built as a PARALLEL channel in the drain
(not a replacement): every notification goes to each recipient via LINE (if `line_user_id`) AND
Telegram (if `telegram_chat_id`); a user gets Telegram only once their chat id is set (today, just the
operator). **DB:** mig вА¶3100 = `users.telegram_chat_id text` nullable (drain reads via service_role
admin; `users` table-level grants cover it; same exposure as line_user_id вАФ an id not a credential).
**Code:** new `pushTelegramMessage` (`src/lib/notifications/telegram-push.ts`, mirrors line-push:
Bot API sendMessage, 4096-char truncate, per-chat best-effort) ¬Ј `env.server.ts` +`TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN`
(optional, drain skips Telegram when absent) ¬Ј `drain/route.ts` fetches `telegram_chat_id` alongside
`line_user_id` in all 3 user selects, builds `telegramChatByUser`, sends a second pass; `anySuccess`
= either channel reached the recipient, `recipientCount` = line+telegram (so a Telegram-only recipient
counts; row retried only if EVERY push failed). Reuses the operator's existing progress bot. Test-first:
`telegram-push.test.ts` (4) + pgTAP 230 (3 вАФ column exists/text/service_role-readable). Full suite
270/1757; pgTAP 181/181 (0 failures); typecheck ¬Ј lint green. db:types regen (+telegram_chat_id).
**ACTIVATION (operator): (1) set super-admin `telegram_chat_id` (SQL, from .telegram.env chat); (2)
add `TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN` to Vercel prod + redeploy.** Inert until both done (like LINE). Schema lane:
telegram-notify (LANES.md), sole session.

**SPEC 207 U1 вАФ project_categories taxonomy SHIPPED 2026-06-26 (mig `20260813003300`, pgTAP
232).** Operator approved spec 207 (project work-categories + category-scoped construction
drawings, feedback 1a556584) and resolved open decision #2 вЖТ master drawings are INTERNAL-ONLY
(subcontractors see only their own category's drawings; U6 will drop the `OR category_id IS NULL`
arm). **U1 = the per-project аЄЂаЄ°аЄІаЄФаЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ taxonomy (DB only, strictly additive):** new
`project_categories` table (project*id FK cascade ¬Ј code unique-per-project ¬Ј name nonblank/вЙ§120 ¬Ј
sort_order ¬Ј is_active ¬Ј created_by ¬Ј timestamps + the shared `set_updated_at` trigger); RLS
membership-gated read via `can_see_project` (the deliverables/reports precedent); NO delete
(deactivate-not-delete, the catalog_items/masters convention); writes ONLY via four SECURITY
DEFINER RPCs `create*/update*/reorder*/set_project_category_active`вАФ NULL-safe role gate
(pm/super/director) +`can_see_project`membership +`revoke вА¶ from public, anon`(the hardened
anon-exec doctrine, [[anon-exec-definer-audit-2026-06]]). A TABLE not an enum (ADR 0055 dec.2 вАФ
each project owns its set, operator-extensible at runtime); the operator-authored Thai`name` IS the
label (no labels.ts Record). pgTAP 232 (37 assertions): table/RLS/4-fns-secdef/anon-deny,
no-delete + RPC-only-write grants, full CRUD as a member PM, dup-code 23505, blank code/name 22023,
membership 42501 (non-member + unseen project, both create-deny and read-zero), role-gate 42501
(site_admin + visitor), reorder-by-ordinality. Full pgTAP suite 183/0 (3178 assertions, 0 failures);
lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј test 270 files / 1760 green. db:types regen (+`project_categories`+4 RPCs, both
app + worker). **NEXT = U2** (work_packages.category_id nullable FK +`set_work_package_category`,
clone of `set_work_package_deliverable`).

**SPEC 207 U2 вАФ one-category-per-WP FK SHIPPED 2026-06-26 (mig `20260813003400`, pgTAP 233).**
THE locked decision as a single NULLABLE FK: `work_packages.category_id uuid null references
project_categories(id) ON DELETE SET NULL` + index вАФ the `deliverable_id` precedent EXACTLY, never a
join table; NULL = uncategorised. `set_work_package_category(p_work_package_id, p_category_id)` is a
clone of `set_work_package_deliverable` (spec 155): SECURITY DEFINER, NULL-safe role gate
(pm/super/director), `can_see_wp` membership FIRST (unknown WP вЖТ 42501, no existence disclosure),
NULL = uncategorise, a non-null category must EXIST + be `is_active` + share the WP's project else
22023, writes `category_id` ONLY (the sole writer вАФ SA/PM have no direct work_packages UPDATE path),
`revoke вА¶ from public, anon`. pgTAP 233 (17 assertions): column/nullable/FK-`ON DELETE SET NULL`,
fn secdef + anon-deny + auth-allow, bind + NULL-uncategorise, cross-project/inactive/unknown category
all 22023, membership 42501 (non-member), role-gate 42501 (site_admin + visitor). Caught my own
plan/count slip pre-commit (declared plan(16), ran 17 вАФ the custom runner counts only not-ok lines so
it passed silently; corrected to plan(17)). Full pgTAP suite 184/0 (0 failures); lint ¬Ј typecheck ¬Ј
test 270 / 1760 green. db:types regen (+`category_id` +`set_work_package_category`). **NEXT = U3**
(category authoring + WpCategoryControl UI; first UI unit of the taxonomy track; requires U1+U2,
both now merged).

**SPEC 207 U3a вАФ аЄЂаЄ°аЄІаЄФаЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ authoring manager SHIPPED 2026-06-26 (code-only, no DB).** U3 was a large
UI unit (manager + WP-binding control across ~10 files), so SPLIT for the quality bar: U3a = the
in-app category authoring (create + list); U3b = rename/reorder/deactivate; U3c = `WpCategoryControl`
binding. **U3a:** `CategoriesManager` server component on the project page (PM-only / open-project,
mounted next to `DeliverablesManager`) lists the project's categories (code ¬Ј name) + hosts the
`AddCategorySheet` client island (clone of Add/DeliverablesManager, spec 164). `createProjectCategory`
action (`projects/[projectId]/actions.ts`) shape-validates + relays to the `create_project_category`
RPC, maps 23505/42501/22023, and appends `sort_order` = current max + 1 (read under the caller's RLS;
relies on the RPC gate вАФ no client role re-read, so it stays correct regardless of PM_ROLES contents).
`PROJECT_CATEGORY_LABEL = "аЄЂаЄ°аЄІаЄФаЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ"` added to labels.ts (SSOT; distinct from аЄЗаЄІаЄФаЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ/аЄЫаЄ£аЄ∞аєАаЄ†аЄЧаєВаЄДаЄ£аЄЗаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£).
`src/lib/categories/validate.ts` (code вЙ§40 / name вЙ§120, mirrors deliverables). `loadProjectDetail`
extended with a 7th parallel category read (concurrency test updated 6вЖТ7 + shape assertion). No new
`features/` folder вЖТ no allowlist edit (manager lives in the app-route folder; `WpCategoryControl`
will live in the existing `work-packages/` folder in U3c). Test-first: `categories-validate.test.ts`
(7) + `add-category-sheet.test.ts` (3, submit-gating/create+refresh/inline-error) +
load-project-detail (categories). Full suite + lint + typecheck green. **NEXT = U3b** (rename/reorder/
deactivate from the manager rows) then **U3c** (`WpCategoryControl` in the WP аЄИаЄ±аЄФаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£ tab) вЖТ then the
drawings track U4вАУU6.

## Spec 222 вАФ Supply plan: one item into multiple work packages, U1 (2026-06-29)

Status: **U1 SHIPPED 2026-06-29 (code-only, no DB / no RPC).** Operator: "when procurement
creates a аєБаЄЬаЄЩаЄИаЄ±аЄФаЄЂаЄ≤, don't force a WP, but let them pick multiple WPs per item if they want."
WP-not-forced was already true (`work_package_id` nullable; save needs only item + qty). New =
one item вЖТ many WPs. Operator chose the **"pre-fill rows"** model (over per-WP qty nested in one
row): a per-row `пЉЛ аЄЂаЄ•аЄ≤аЄҐаЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩ` button (enabled once an item is picked) opens an inline WP checklist;
confirming replaces that draft row with one pre-filled row per ticked WP (item copied, qty blank),
which the planner fills, saved via the existing `bulkAddPlanLines` one-shot. No schema/RPC change вАФ
a line is already `(plan,item,WP)` with nullable WP + array insert. Pure helper
`expandRowToWorkPackages(row, wpIds)` holds the fan-out. Test-first: helper test (0вЖТunchanged,
NвЖТN blank-qty rows, distinct keys) + behavioral test (pick вЖТ tick 2 WPs вЖТ 2 rows вЖТ fill вЖТ save 2
lines) + affordance-disabled-until-item. Full suite **1994/0** green; lint ¬Ј typecheck clean.
No SSOT files touched (inline Thai strings). SPEC 222 COMPLETE (single unit).

## Perf debt rank 4 вАФ store / supply-plan / workers loader waterfalls (2026-07-02)

Status: **SHIPPED (code-only, no DB).** The last three ranked RSC loader waterfalls from the
2026-06 architecture audit (`docs/architecture-quality-audit-2026-06.md`, rank 4 вАФ deferred then
because it paired with the store phase; specs 197/198 have since shipped). Same treatment as the
spec 147/148 sweep: independent reads ride ONE `Promise.all`, dependent reads follow in a second
batch; same queries/columns/results вАФ only the scheduling changes.

- `/projects/[projectId]/store` вАФ 10 serial awaits вЖТ batch of 8 (on-hand, categories, catalog,
  suppliers, receipts, counts, delivered-PRs [canIssue], store_pnl [canSeePnl]) + a 2-read second
  batch (divert set, P&L names). Conditional reads use the `canX ? query : Promise.resolve({ data:
null })` idiom (spec 147 U1 pattern).
- `/projects/[projectId]/supply-plan` вАФ 13+N serial awaits вЖТ batch of 7 (plans, templates, catalog,
  categories, memberships, WPs, accuracy [isPlanner]) + a 5-way second batch (line counts, overrider
  name, selected-plan linesвЖТconverted chain, signed thumbs, work-category scopes). The per-work-
  category Relation-R loop (serial N awaits) moved into a new concurrent
  `resolveWorkCategoryScopes(supabase, ids)` in `src/lib/catalog/scoped-categories.ts` вАФ dedups ids,
  fans out via `Promise.all`, OMITS unmapped ids (the ADR 0066 D8 show-all fallback keys off
  absence, unchanged).
- `/workers` вАФ 3 serial reads вЖТ one `Promise.all`.

Test-first (RED verified): 4 new tests in `catalog-scoped-categories.test.ts` incl. a deferred-stub
concurrency assert (all reads issued before any resolves вАФ fails under a serial loop). Full suite
**2307/0**; lint ¬Ј typecheck green. Real-browser verified via the dev-preview login (server HTML 200
on all 3 routes + a selected `?plan=` heavy path; no error boundary). Open question (out of scope):
`<Suspense>` streaming / per-section skeletons for these pages remains a future, larger lever.

## Audit hygiene ranks 6+10+11+15 вАФ lightbox code-split ¬Ј colour-guard broaden ¬Ј SSOT literals ¬Ј lucide verify (2026-07-02)

Status: **SHIPPED (code-only, no DB).** Four background-hygiene items from the 2026-06 architecture
audit ('docs/architecture-quality-audit-2026-06.md') bundled into one PR.

- **Rank 6 'photo-lightbox-dynamic':** 'ZoomablePhoto' split вАФ 'photo-lightbox.tsx' is now a thin
  trigger (thumbnail button + open state, public API unchanged, zero consumer churn) and the whole
  enlarged view (markup canvas + comments + the photo-markups server actions) moved to
  'photo-lightbox-overlay.tsx', loaded via 'next/dynamic' ('ssr: false', full-screen scrim as the
  loading fallback). The heavy chunk now downloads on first tap, not with every page that renders a
  thumbnail. Static guard test pins the split (trigger must use next/dynamic and must NOT import the
  markup actions). Behaviour note: the markup cache now lives in the overlay, so reopening refetches
  markups (fresher; previously cached across opens within one thumbnail instance).
- **Rank 10 'design-doctrine-test-broaden':** the colour guard bans ALL raw Tailwind hue literals
  (was: green only) across every utility prefix, with a documented 4-file allowlist: status-colors.ts
  (pill palette SSOT) ¬Ј photo-lightbox-overlay.tsx (always-dark chrome вАФ theme-flipping tokens cannot
  express it; the register's "migrate the lightbox" idea deliberately not done for this reason) ¬Ј
  login-button.tsx (LINE-brand green) ¬Ј logout-button.tsx (one brand-band hover shade).
  'labor-log-zone' migrated 'accent-slate-900' вЖТ 'accent-brand' (identical colour per globals.css).
- **Rank 11 'ssot-literal-bypass':** hub-nav.tsx вЖТ 'SUBCONTRACTOR_LABEL', ledger-view.ts вЖТ
  'STORE_RECEIVE_LABEL'; new 'tests/unit/label-ssot.test.ts' guards the exact quoted literals
  against re-hardcoding outside labels.ts.
- **Rank 15 'lucide-optimize-imports':** closed with ZERO code вАФ verified in the installed
  'next/dist/server/config.js' that 'lucide-react' is in Next's built-in 'optimizePackageImports'
  default list (merged with user config), so an explicit entry is a no-op.

Test-first (RED verified: 4 failures, each for the intended reason). The 3 lightbox test files
switched to awaited opens (the overlay is now an async chunk). Open questions: none.

## Spec 244 U5 вАФ per-person activity timeline (2026-07-02)

Status: **SHIPPED (PR through the gate; migrations 057000+058000 applied).** Operator: "app usage
feature is good, but it lacks information, I need detailed info down to individual's logged
activities" вЖТ brainstormed, chose "Both": U5 = the app-usage timeline drill-down now,
business-action feed = a phase-2 follow-up spec (domain-table reads, spec 240 stays shelved).

- Tapping a person on `/settings/usage` opens `/settings/usage/[actorId]`: last 14 days as
  day-grouped sessions вАФ start time, duration, screen sequence (normalized, consecutive-deduped
  with √Чcounts), friction chips inline. Protective copy; PDPA (routes/types/timestamps only; the
  context jsonb is never selected, let alone rendered); super_admin-only page over the RLS
  session client.
- RPC `get_actor_timeline(p_actor_id, p_days)` (mig `20260813057000`): SECURITY INVOKER вАФ RLS
  scopes the read (super_admin any actor; a subject only self; cross-subject = zero rows);
  groups the heartbeat-dominated slice per session server-side (duration = heartbeats √Ч 20s; a
  raw read would hit the PostgREST page cap). pgTAP 255 (22 asserts).
- FRICTION_EVENT_LABEL moved to labels.ts (friction map + timeline both consume);
  formatThaiTime/formatThaiDate reused вАФ no new formatters.
- Adversarial 4-lens verify (RLS¬Јmath¬Јruntime¬Јcompleteness) + cavecrew-reviewer; findings folded
  TDD-first: mig `20260813058000` client_ts order tiebreak (batched ingest shares one created_at
  per flush вАФ in-batch tap order was indeterminate); formatScreenTime 60-minute carry fix
  ("1 аЄКаЄ°. 60 аЄЩаЄ≤аЄЧаЄµ"); RPC failure now throws to the error boundary instead of rendering a false
  "no activity"; codepoint session sort (localeCompare ICU '.'/'+' inversion). RLS lens: no leak
  path found.
- vitest 2328, pgTAP 217 files / 3,967 asserts / 0 failures, lint/typecheck/build clean.

Open questions: phase-2 business-action feed needs its own scout + spec (photo_logs, approvals,
store moves via domain tables). The defect-report BottomSheet form_abandon adopter is still the
standing U2b follow-up.

## Spec 247 вАФ photo gate on аЄ™аєИаЄЗаЄЗаЄ≤аЄЩаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤аЄХаЄ£аЄІаЄИ (2026-07-03)

## GL fix вАФ dc_payments poster re-drain guard (2026-07-03)

- The chipped twin of spec 249 U1c (064200): post_dc_payment_to_gl could DOUBLE-POST a
  superseded payment вАФ after R2 superseded R1 and R2's drain reversed R1's entry,
  re-running R1's outbox job found no un-reversed entry to reverse (the not-exists
  filter skips reversed ones) and re-posted R1 unpaired.
- Fix: migration 065000 вАФ CREATE OR REPLACE (body sourced from LIVE via
  pg_get_functiondef, verified equal to 20260783000000; signature unchanged, grants
  preserved) adds the guard: any row a newer row supersedes is non-current вЖТ post
  nothing; the successor's drain owns the reversal.
- Test-first: new pgTAP 256-dc-payment-redrain-guard (9) вАФ recordвЖТdrainвЖТsupersedeвЖТ
  drainвЖТre-drain attack (reset R1's job to pending, drain again) вЖТ zero
  posted-unreversed entries for the superseded row, successor untouched. RED on the
  unguarded poster (have 1 / want 0), GREEN after 065000.
- Verified: pgTAP 256 9/9; db:types regen zero drift (body-only change); full db:test +
  vitest/lint/typecheck run pre-ship.
- Open questions: none.

## Spec 259 вАФ Void purchase order, procurement self-service revert (2026-07-03)

- Operator: PO-3245 was created by mistake (duplicate/test order, still `ordered`,
  nothing shipped) and there was no way to undo it вАФ `purchase_orders` has no
  DELETE/UPDATE policy (ADR 0044 ¬І6), and the only "fix" would have been an
  operator hand-editing prod rows outside the app. Operator also asked for
  procurement to be able to self-serve this instead of needing an engineer.
- Change: `void_purchase_order(p_po_id)` вАФ third RPC in the ADR 0038
  record_purchase/create_purchase_order family, same back-office gate
  (`project_manager`/`procurement`/`super_admin`). Guard: every member must
  still be exactly `purchased` (nothing shipped/delivered) вАФ all-or-nothing.
  Per member: reverses any already-posted GL entry + skips any still-pending
  `gl_posting_outbox` job (the spec 198 U2 divert pattern вАФ create_purchase_order's
  approvedвЖТpurchased flip is the exact transition the GL-posting triggers key
  on, and nulling the fields back does NOT re-enqueue a reversal on its own).
  Members reset to their exact pre-purchase shape (status/purchase_order_id/
  delivery_id/supplier/supplier_id/amount/vat_rate(вЖТ0, NOT NULL)/order_ref/eta/
  purchased_at) вАФ free to be bundled into a correct PO. One `purchase_order_void`
  audit row (new `audit_action` enum value, own migration вАФ Postgres enum-add
  rule). The PO row deletes; `purchase_order_deliveries` cascades.
- Test-first: pgTAP `259-void-purchase-order` (23/23) вАФ structure, role gate
  (site_admin/visitor refused), 404, the shipped-line guard, GL reversal
  (WP-WIP nets to 0 for an already-posted line) + pending-job skip, full
  unlink, PO+delivery delete, audit row shape, and the acceptance criterion:
  the reverted ticket bundles cleanly into a brand-new PO. Vitest
  `canVoidPurchaseOrder` pure predicate (client-side mirror of the RPC guard).
- Real incident, same session: migration pushed live (additive-only, no
  collision вАФ the concurrent spec 251 schema-lane holder hadn't pushed
  anything yet), pgTAP proved green on the remote, then PO-3245 itself
  (uuid `d111bcbe-a0e4-4d2f-9d48-3def1c6ecb09`, 19 store-bound lines) was
  reverted for real via the RPC (signed in as the dev-preview super_admin
  test account, not raw SQL) вАФ all 19 lines back to `approved`, PO gone,
  audit row recorded. Verified via service-role read afterward.
- Verified: lint/typecheck clean, vitest 2536/2536. UI: a
  "аЄҐаЄБаєАаЄ•аЄіаЄБаєГаЄЪаЄ™аЄ±аєИаЄЗаЄЛаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠" confirm-button on `/requests/orders/[poId]`, gated to
  `isBackOfficeRole` + `canVoidPurchaseOrder(members)`, mirrors the existing
  `PurchaseRequestCancel`/`ConfirmActionButton` pattern.
- Open questions: none. Out of scope (recorded in the spec): editing a PO in
  place, voiding a partially-shipped order, any broader admin-powers framework
  for procurement beyond this one action.

## Spec 251 вАФ Subcontracts (agreed vs paid) вАФ U1 SCHEMA вАФ COMPLETE (2026-07-03 night)

- GL treatment resolved live with operator this session (spec doc updated same
  commit): direct one-step post at payment time вАФ Dr WIP-construction (1400,
  project_id + contractor_id dimensioned, work_package_id NULL) / Cr Bank (1110).

  no progress-% certification signal to trigger one; explicit follow-up.
- Migration ts claimed: `20260813067000` (schema lane, LANES.md).
- Next: pgTAP first (TDD) for the 3 tables + 2 enums + RLS + 5 RPCs + the new
  `post_subcontract_payment_to_gl` poster, then the migration to turn it green.
- Verified: pgTAP 31/31 in the new file (258-spec251-subcontracts.test.sql);
  full suite 224 files, 4112 assertions, only 1 pre-existing failure (`void_purchase_order`
  missing project_director вАФ unrelated, flagged separately, spawn_task task_18f20d4a).
  vitest 2532/2532, lint/typecheck clean, db:types regenerated (pure additive diff).
- Real concurrent-lane collision surfaced mid-build: another session (spec 259,
  `prc-ops-povoid`) pushed migrations 068000/069000 to the shared remote despite
  its own LANES.md note saying it would wait for this lane to release. Reconciled
  by copying their 2 migration files (exact source, not reconstructed) from their
  worktree into this one so `supabase db push` could see a consistent history,
  then pushed 067000/067100 with `--include-all` (CLI-supported out-of-order
  apply, non-destructive, domain-independent). Those 2 borrowed files are
  deliberately NOT part of this PR (their own PR #285 carries them) вАФ only
  067000/067100 are staged here.
- Pin reconcile (expected collateral of adding audit*action enum values, matches
  the PR #269 precedent): both audit_action full-label pgTAP pins
  (03-audit-log-shape, 18-appsheet-writer-purchasing) updated to include the 5
  new subcontract*\* labels AND spec 259's purchase_order_void (both are live on
  the shared DB now; the pin checks exact match against reality).
- Open questions (unbuilt, explicit follow-ups per the spec doc): accrual-stage
  GL posting (needs progress-% certification first); per-WP cost attribution for
  multi-WP deals (same follow-up вАФ wp_profit()'s account-1400 filter keys on
  work_package_id, which subcontract payment lines leave NULL); no void/tombstone
  path on subcontract_payments (every supersede is a correction with a full valid
